V002-N01370.label: 瘙痒
V002-N01370.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状
V002-N01370.definition: 属一般症状视诊所见。仅有皮肤瘙痒而无原发损害者。神经精神性皮肤病之一。分全身性和局限性两种，前者与皮肤本身变化如干燥、萎缩等及全身性疾病加糖尿病、肝胆病、习惯性便秘、月经病、贫血、白血病、何杰金氏病、膀胱炎及肾病等有关；后者常与局部摩擦刺激或神经官能症等有关。开始仅有瘙痒，因搔抓出现抓痕、血痂，久之出现色素沉着和苔藓样或湿疹样改变。应去除病因，避免搔抓，忌酒类等刺激性饮食。

V002-N01370.label: 皮肤瘙痒
V002-N01370.aliases: Itching of the Skin； 风瘙痒； 肌肤瘙痒； 皮肤剧烈瘙痒； 皮肤轻度瘙痒； 皮肤痒； 皮肤阵发性瘙痒； 全身皮肤瘙痒； 身痒； 痒风； 足趾间奇痒
V002-N01370.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜瘙痒
V002-N01370.definition: 全身皮肤瘙痒不适的表现。

V002-N01370.label: 瘙痒
V002-N01370.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语

V002-N01370.label: 瘙痒
V002-N01370.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01370.definition: A sensation that causes the desire or reflex to scratch. It is often caused by exposure to pathogenic wind, blood heat or blood deficiency. It can be seen in disorders of the skin and mucous membrane or food/drug allergy

V002-N01369.label: 皮肤斑疹
V002-N01369.aliases: 出疹； 丹疹； 红疹； 皮肤斑块； 皮肤出斑疹； 皮肤出疹； 皮肤花斑； 皮肤丘疹； 身发斑疹； 肢体斑点
V002-N01369.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜皮肤症状
V002-N01369.definition: 望皮肤所见。是指肌肤表面出现红色小疹

V002-N01369.label: 出疹
V002-N01369.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语

V002-N01369.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01369.label: 出疹
V002-N01369.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01369.definition: Raised red or white spots on the skin. It is often caused by wind heat, wind dampness or pestilence. It can be seen in urticaria, measles, roseola infantum, eczema, dermatitis medicamentosa, sweat rash, scabies, pigmented purpuric lichenoid dermatitis, pityriasis rosea, skin rashes during menstruation/pregnancy, or scarlet fever.

V002-N01323.label: 头痛病
V002-N01323.definition: 以头痛为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01323.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01323.label: 头痛
V002-N01323.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜疼痛
V002-N01323.definition: 患者自觉头部疼痛的症状。风寒湿热等邪外侵，风阳火毒上扰，痰浊瘀血阻滞，致经气不利，气血逆乱，或因气血营精亏虚，清阳不升，脑神失养等，均可导致头痛。除脑系疾病、头颅损伤及眼、口鼻等头部病变外，许多全身性疾病也都可导致头痛。头痛作为主症还可以是独立的病种，如偏头风、面风痛等。

V002-N01323.label: 头痛
V002-N01323.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证
V002-N01323.definition: 即指由于外感与内伤，致使脉络绌急或失养，清窍不利所引起的以病人自觉头部疼痛为特征的一种常见病证，也是一个常见症状，可以发生在多种急慢性疾病中，有时亦是某些相关疾病加重或恶化的先兆。

V002-N01323.label: 头痛
V002-N01323.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜疼痛｜疼痛-按部位分
V002-N01323.definition: 头部疼痛，包括头的前、后、偏侧部疼痛和整个头部疼痛。

V002-N01323.label: 头痛
V002-N01323.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语

V002-N01323.label: 头痛
V002-N01323.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N01323.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01323.label: 头痛
V002-N01323.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01323.definition: A subjective feeling of pain in the region of the head. Contributing factors may include contraction of wind, cold, damp or heat, emotions, ascending of wind yang and toxic heat, turbid phlegm or stagnant blood impairing the flow of meridian qi and blood, or malnourishment of the brain due to deficiency of qi, blood, Ying nutrients and essence. It is often seen in head wind, migraine, hemilateral head wind, facial wind and pain, cerebral arteriosclerosis, brain tumour, ear, nose and throat problems, exogenous diseases or other systemic conditions.

V002-N01355.label: 腹痛病
V002-N01355.definition: 以腹部疼痛为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01355.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01355.label: 腹痛
V002-N01355.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜疼痛｜脘腹痛
V002-N01355.definition: 胃脘与季肋以下，耻骨毛际以上的腹部发生疼痛的症状。腹腔内的所有脏器，因六淫外感，内外损伤，虫、食、石、粪阻痹，气滞血瘀，或气血亏虚等所导致的各种急慢性病变，都有可能产生腹痛。

V002-N01355.label: 腹痛
V002-N01355.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01355.definition: 因感受外邪、饮食所伤、情志失调及素体阳虚导致气机阻滞、脉络痹阻或经脉失养所致。症见胃脘以下、耻骨毛际以上的部位发生疼痛为主要表现的病证。

V002-N01355.label: 腹痛
V002-N01355.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜疼痛｜疼痛-按部位分
V002-N01355.definition: 属于问脘腹所见。腹中疼痛。见脾气血虚证，其证机是气血虚弱，经气筋脉失养，脉络空虚而痛；其治当补益气血，以小建中汤加减。

V002-N01355.englishNames: abdominal pain; Abdominal pain disorder; Abdominal pain
V002-N01355.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01355.definition: Pain that occurs between the chest and pelvic regions. It can be acute or chronic, often resulting from external contraction of six pathogenic factors, parasitic worms, improper diet, stones obstructing the flow of qi and blood or deficiency of qi and blood.

V002-N01328.definition: 以不易入睡或睡眠短浅，易醒早醒，甚至整夜不能入睡为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01328.label: 不寐（诊法）
V002-N01328.definition: 经常性的睡眠减少，或不易入睡，或睡眠短浅而易醒，甚或彻夜不眠的表现。

V002-N01328.label: 不寐

V002-N01328.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01328.label: 不寐
V002-N01328.aliases: 不寐病； Insomnia disorder； Sleeplessness； 失眠
V002-N01328.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01328.definition: Characterized by an inability to obtain normal sleep and drowsiness and low energy during the day. Associated symptoms may include dizziness, tinnitus and poor memory. Often results from emotional disturbances, mental exhaustion and, subsequently, the disharmony between the Ying-nutrients and Wei-defence.

V002-N01328.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01328.label: 失眠
V002-N01328.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01328.definition: Prolonged inability to get sufficient sleep. Contributing factors may include over-thinking, deficiency of qi and blood, liver qi stagnation, internal fire heat, or retention of turbid phlegm. These factors may cause disharmony between yin and yang and subsequently, mental restlessness. It is often seen in sleeplessness, neurasthenia, depression, mania, hysteria and/or some systemic conditions.

V002-N01328.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01328.label: 失眠

V002-N01328.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01328.label: 失眠
V002-N01328.definition: inability to sleep or abnormal wakefulness, the same as insomnia

V002-N01337.label: 失音
V002-N01337.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01337.definition: The occurrence of hoarseness or an inability to make sounds. Contributing factors may include wind cold or wind heat (toxic fire) affecting the throat, dry heat consuming the lung fluids, internal phlegm heat due to over-eating of oily, sweet food, essential qi deficiency due to chronic diseases, or liver qi stagnation. It is often seen in hoarseness, tuberculosis of the throat, qi exhaustion, throat polyps, diphtheria, or loss of voice in pregnancy.

V002-N01365.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜疼痛

V002-N01365.label: 关节疼痛
V002-N01365.aliases: 骨节疼痛； 关节痛； 痛在骨节； 肢节痛

V002-N01365.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01365.definition: A subjective feeling of pain in the joints. Contributing factors may include traumatic injuries or wind, cold, damp or heat impairing the flow of meridian qi. It is often seen in joint subluxation, bone injury, bi-impediment, or osteoarticular tuberculosis.

V002-N01366.label: 瘫痪
V002-N01366.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01366.definition: Muscle flaccidity or disuse of the limbs. Contributing factors may include cold, dampness, toxic heat or stasis obstructing the meridians, malnourishment of the muscles or sinews due to essence-blood deficiency, intracranial lesion or impaired flow of meridian qi. It is often seen in stroke, hemiplegia, qi collapse, brain tumour, polio, muscular atrophy, athlete’s foot, foot weakness, limb weakness, cranial or spinal injury, or surgical wound.

V002-N01320.label: 谵语
V002-N01320.definition: 神志不清，胡言乱语，语无伦次，声高气粗的表现。

V002-N01333.label: 耳聋
V002-N01333.pinyinNames: dong long; er long; ěr lóng
V002-N01333.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01333.definition: Hearing loss in one or both ears (also known as severe hearing impairment). Often results from internal phlegm fire, deficiency of qi and blood, trauma or drug side-effects/poisoning. It is commonly seen in ear problems or other systemic conditions that may affect the hearing.

V002-N01333.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01333.label: 耳聋

V002-N01333.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01333.label: 耳聋
V002-N01333.definition: loss, complete or partial, of the sense of hearing

V002-N01338.label: 咯血
V002-N01338.path: 内科疾病｜气血津液疾病
V002-N01338.definition: 以咯血为主要表现的血证。

V002-N01338.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01338.label: 咯血
V002-N01338.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医儿科疾病｜血证
V002-N01338.definition: 以咳嗽而出血、或痰中带血、或咯出纯血为主要表现的血证。

V002-N01338.label: 咳血
V002-N01338.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证｜血证
V002-N01338.definition: 血由肺及器官外溢，经口而咳出，表现为痰中带血，或痰血相兼，或纯血鲜红，简夹泡沫，均称为咳血，亦称为嗽血或咯血。

V002-N01338.label: 咯血
V002-N01338.aliases: Cough with hemorrhage； 咯有血块
V002-N01338.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜出血
V002-N01338.definition: 咳嗽而出血，痰少血多，或大量咯吐鲜血的表现。

V002-N01338.label: 咯血
V002-N01338.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语

V002-N01338.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N01338.label: 咯血
V002-N01338.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N01338.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01338.label: 咯血
V002-N01338.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01338.definition: The expectoration of blood from the throat or along the respiratory tract below the throat. Contributing factors may include fire hyperactivity due to yin deficiency, ascending of heart fire, or pathogenic heat accumulating in the lung. It is often seen in pharyngitis or lung diseases.

V002-N01338.label: 咯血

V002-N01341.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01341.label: 咳血
V002-N01341.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01341.definition: The coughing up of blood from the bronchi or lungs. Contributing factors may include traumatic injuries, exogenous pathogenic factors affecting the lung, liver fire affecting the lung, fire hyperactivity due to yin deficiency, or qi failing to keep blood with the vessels. It is often seen in pulmonary tuberculosis, lung cancer or emphysema. It may also occur as a result of bleeding disorders, epidemic haemorrhagic fever or heart failure.

V002-N01345.label: 呕吐
V002-N01345.definition: 胃内容物，甚至胆汁、肠液通过食道反流到口腔，并吐出的反射性动作。

V002-N01345.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01345.label: 呕吐
V002-N01345.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜脾胃病
V002-N01345.definition: 胃内容物从口中吐出的症状。可由诸种原因使胃失和降，胃气上逆所致。除胃本身的各种疾病均可导致呕吐以外，肝、胆、胰、肠的病变，以及耳眩晕、恶阻、头部内伤、颅内病变、某些药物中毒、中暑、晕动病、脏厥类疾病等等，皆可出现呕吐。

V002-N01345.label: 呕吐
V002-N01345.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01345.definition: 多由饮食所伤，外感时邪、脾胃虚弱，致胃失和降，气逆于上，胃中之物从口吐出的一种病证。一般以有物有声谓之呕，有物无声谓之吐，无物有声谓之干呕。呕与吐常同时发生，很难截然分开，故并称为呕吐。

V002-N01345.label: 呕吐
V002-N01345.aliases: 暴吐； 但呕； 反呕； 呕不止； 呕多； 呕恶； 呕家； 呕逆； 呕吐不止； 其人必呕； 时呕； 吐逆； 微呕； 喜呕
V002-N01345.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜躯体症状｜胃脘症状
V002-N01345.definition: 胃内容物，甚至胆汁、肠液通过食道反流到口腔，并吐出的反射性动作。

V002-N01345.label: 呕吐
V002-N01345.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语

V002-N01345.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N01345.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01345.label: 呕吐
V002-N01345.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01345.definition: The involuntary, forceful expulsion of the contents of the stomach through the mouth. Contributing factors may include exogenous/endogenous diseases, head injury, pregnancy and drug poisoning. These factors may affect the descending of stomach qi. It is often seen in gastrointestinal diseases, disorders of the liver, gallbladder and pancreas, motion sickness, morning sickness, intracranial lesion, qi exhaustion, or drug poisoning.

V002-N01345.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01345.label: 呕吐

V002-N01345.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01345.label: 呕吐
V002-N01345.definition: forcible expulsion of the stomach contents through the mouth

V002-N01347.label: 暴吐
V002-N01347.definition: 以突发剧烈呕吐为主要表现的危急重证。

V002-N01347.label: 暴吐
V002-N01347.definition: 以卒然呕吐为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01347.label: 呕吐
V002-N01347.aliases: 暴吐； 但呕； 反呕； 呕不止； 呕多； 呕恶； 呕家； 呕逆； 呕吐不止； 其人必呕； 时呕； 吐逆； 微呕； 喜呕
V002-N01347.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜躯体症状｜胃脘症状

V002-N01347.label: 暴吐
V002-N01347.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01347.definition: The occurrence of sudden, severe involuntary expulsion of food, phlegm or bile through the mouth. Contributing factors may include binge eating, pestilence or food/drug poisoning. These factors may cause fulminant ascending of stomach qi.

V002-N01346.label: 干呕
V002-N01346.definition: 有呕吐的声音、动作，但没有呕吐物排出的表现。

V002-N01346.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01346.definition: The reverse movement of the stomach and oesophagus without vomiting of food. Often results from failure of stomach qi to descend due to stomach deficiency or liver qi stagnation.

V002-N01326.label: 神昏
V002-N01326.definition: 神志模糊，不省人事，甚至昏睡不醒，呼之不应的表现。

V002-N01326.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01326.label: 意识丧失
V002-N01326.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜神经病学表现
V002-N01326.definition: 神识丧失，对环境刺激缺乏反应的症状。轻者称晕厥或昏厥。常因痰浊、热毒、外伤、气血逆乱、阴阳衰竭及其他强烈刺激等，使神明失主所致。

V002-N01326.label: 神昏
V002-N01326.aliases: 暴不知人； 不省人事； 不识人； 不知与人言； 昏不识人； 昏不知人； 昏倒； 昏糊； 昏厥； 昏愦； 昏愦不语； 昏冒； 昏蒙； 昏迷； 昏仆； 厥脱； 仆倒； 神识不清； 神识昏厥； 神识昏蒙； 神识昏蒙错乱； 神识欠清； 神识丧失； 神志不清； 神志昏迷； 神志混乱； 神志模糊； 突然昏厥； 突然昏仆； 眩晕欲仆； 意识丧失； 晕厥

V002-N01326.definition: 神志模糊，不省人事，甚至昏睡不醒，呼之不应的表现。

V002-N01326.label: 昏迷
V002-N01326.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01326.definition: An inability to maintain an awareness of self and environment coupled with a complete (or near-complete) lack of responsiveness to people and other environmental stimuli. Contributing factors may include phlegm turbidity, toxic heat, traumatic injuries, disorder of qi and blood, exhaustion of yin and yang, or other intense stimuli. It is often seen in terminal stage of exogenous diseases or late-stage endogenous diseases.

V002-N01326.label: 神昏

V002-N01340.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜呼吸症状
V002-N01340.definition: 由于感到空气不足，而出现呼吸费力或表现为呼吸节律、频率和深度的变化。

V002-N01340.label: 气短
V002-N01340.aliases: 喘促； 短气； 呼吸过速； 呼吸急促； 气促； 气短而喘； 气急； 气少； 少气； 吸促； 吸而不出； 吸而微数； 息促

V002-N01340.definition: 呼吸微弱而喘促，或短气不足以吸，似喘而无声的表现。

V002-N01340.label: 气喘

V002-N01340.label: 气喘
V002-N01340.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01340.definition: The occurrence of difficulty or rapid breathing. Contributing factors may include exogenous wind cold or wind heat affecting the lung, exuberant pathogenic heat affecting the lung, phlegm-fluid retention in the lung, or qi deficiency of the lung and kidney. It is often seen in exogenous diseases, lung diseases, heart diseases, disorders of the throat or thoracic cage, debilitation, qi collapse, or abdominal tumour/fluid.

V002-N01340.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01340.label: 喘促

V002-N01352.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01352.label: 胁痛
V002-N01352.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肝胆病｜肝病
V002-N01352.definition: 自觉一侧或两侧胁肋部疼痛的症状。胁痛可归属于广义的胸痛范畴，其病机特点为气机郁滞、脉络失和、疏泄不利，胁痛为肝胆、胁肋部病变的常见症状之一。

V002-N01352.label: 胁痛
V002-N01352.aliases: 季肋痛； 胠胁肋痛； 胁下痛
V002-N01352.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证
V002-N01352.definition: 因情志不遂、饮食不节、跌仆损伤、久病体虚等导致肝气郁结、瘀血停滞、湿热内生、肝阴不足等。症见一侧或两侧胁肋部疼痛。古又称胁肋痛、季肋痛或胁下痛。胁，指侧胸部，为腋以下至第十二肋骨部的统称。

V002-N01352.label: 胁痛
V002-N01352.aliases: 季肋痛； 两胁疼痛； 两胁痛； 两胁下痛； 胠胁肋痛； 胠胁痛； 胁肋疼痛； 胁下痛； 心胁痛； 胸胁痛

V002-N01352.definition: 一侧或两侧胁肋部位疼痛。

V002-N01352.label: 胁痛

V002-N01352.englishNames: Hypochondriac Pain; hypochondriac pain; Pain in the subcostal region; Hypochondrium pain disorder
V002-N01352.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01352.definition: Pain on one or both sides of the subcostal region often results from qi stagnation or bile accumulation. It is commonly seen in liver cancer, liver abscess, liver heat, liver distension, ascites, gallbladder heat, gallbladder distension, pleural effusion, masses below the left subcostal region or fibrinous pleurisy.

V002-N01349.label: 胃痛病
V002-N01349.definition: 以胃脘近心窝处经常发生 疼痛为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01349.label: 胃脘痛
V002-N01349.aliases: 胃痛； 心下痛； Epigastric Pain
V002-N01349.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜疼痛｜脘腹痛
V002-N01349.definition: 自觉剑突下的上腹部位疼痛的症状。多因寒热侵扰、饮食失调、阴阳气血不足、气滞血瘀等使胃失和降所致。胃脘痛是胃部病变的常见症状，肠、胰、胆、肝、脾的病变亦常表现为胃脘部位的疼痛，甚至厥心痛等病有时亦可表现为胃脘痛。

V002-N01349.label: 胃痛
V002-N01349.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01349.definition: 是由外邪犯胃、饮食不节、情志失调、脾胃素虚及药物损害等。以胃气郁滞、失于和降、不通则痛为基本病机。以上腹胃脘部近心窝处发生疼痛为主症的病证。

V002-N01349.label: 胃痛
V002-N01349.aliases: Gastralgia； 胃脘疼痛； 胃脘痛
V002-N01349.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜疼痛｜疼痛-按部位分
V002-N01349.definition: 上腹胃脘部剑突下疼痛。

V002-N01349.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语

V002-N01349.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01349.definition: A subjective pain in the upper abdominal below the xiphoid process. Often results from failure to stomach qi to descend due to cold/heat, improper diet, deficiency of qi, blood, yin and yang, and stagnation of qi and blood. It is commonly seen in stomach problems or problems of the intestines, pancreas, gallbladder, liver and spleen. It may also be seen in severe cardiac pain.

V002-N01344.englishNames: heart pain; Cardiac pain; heart pain [disease/disorder]
V002-N01344.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01344.definition: A subjective feeling of pain around the Danzhong point (Ren 17) and on the left side of the chest. Contributing factors may include internal phlegm turbidity and stagnant blood, cold retention due to yang deficiency, or yin blood deficiency. It is often seen in cardiac pain in chest bi-impediment, angina pectoris, heart bi-impediment, or heart heat.

V002-N00248.label: 心痛

V002-N00248.definition: 胸阳不振，以胸闷或发作性心胸疼痛为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00248.label: 胸痹
V002-N00248.definition: 以胸闷或发作性心胸疼痛为主要表现的疾 病。

V002-N00248.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00248.label: 胸痹
V002-N00248.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜心病
V002-N00248.definition: 胸阳不振，阴寒、痰浊留踞胸廓，或心气不足，鼓动乏力，使气血痹阻，心失血养所致。以胸闷及发作性心胸疼痛为主要表现的内脏痹病类疾病。

V002-N00248.label: 胸痹
V002-N00248.aliases: Pectoral Stuffiness Pain； 胸痹心痛
V002-N00248.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病证
V002-N00248.definition: 是指胸部闷痛，甚则胸痛彻背，喘息不得卧为主症的一种疾病。轻者仅感胸闷隐痛，呼吸欠畅，重者则有胸痛，严重者心痛彻背，背痛彻心。病因为寒邪内侵、饮食失调、情志失节、年迈体弱。病机为心脉痹阻，病位在心，涉及肝脾肾等。

V002-N01335.definition: Pain in the teeth and/or gum. V002-N01353.definition: 以目黄、身黄、小便黄为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01353.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01353.label: 黄疸
V002-N01353.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肝胆病｜肝病
V002-N01353.definition: 以白睛、皮肤粘膜、小便发黄为特征的一组症状。多因外感湿热、疫毒，内伤酒食，或脾虚湿困、血瘀气滞等所致。一般按病之新久缓急与黄色的明暗等分为阳黄与阴黄。黄疸为肝胆病变的常见症状，胰的病变、大量血液损害、稻瘟病等亦可出现黄疸。凡以黄疸为主要表现的疾病，可归纳为黄疸病类。

V002-N01353.definition: 是感受湿热疫毒，肝胆气机受阻，疏泄失常，胆汁外溢所致，以目黄、身黄、尿黄为主要表现的常见肝胆病证。黄疸在古代亦称黄瘅，由于疸与瘅通，故其义相同。

V002-N01360.label: 便血
V002-N01360.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医儿科疾病｜血证
V002-N01360.definition: 血自肛门排出，包括血随便出，或便黑如柏油状，或单纯下血的症状。多因脾胃虚弱、气不统血，或胃肠积热、湿热蕴结、气血瘀滞等所致。

V002-N01360.label: 便血
V002-N01360.englishNames: Blooby Stool; Blood In Stool Hemafecia
V002-N01360.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证｜血证
V002-N01360.definition: 系由胃、肠脉络受损，出现血液随大便而下，或大便呈柏油样为主要临床表现的病证。

V002-N01360.label: 便血
V002-N01360.aliases: 便血暗红； 便血鲜红； 肠风； 大便带血； 大便下血； 后血； 圊血； 下血； 脏毒
V002-N01360.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜出血
V002-N01360.definition: 消化道出血，经肛门排出，包括单纯便血、先便后血、先血后便、便血杂下，或便中挟血。

V002-N01360.label: 便血

V002-N01360.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01360.label: 便血
V002-N01360.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01360.definition: The passage of fresh blood through the anus, usually in or with stools. Alternatively, individuals may have black “tarry” faeces or expulsion of fresh bright red blood without stools. Contributing factors may include qi deficiency of the spleen and stomach, damp heat accumulating in the stomach and intestines, or stagnation of qi and blood in the stomach and intestines. It is often seen in anal disorders, gastrointestinal diseases, epidemic haemorrhagic fever, bleeding disorders, ancylostomiasis, schistosomiasis or food/drug poisoning.

V002-N01360.label: 便血

V002-N01360.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01360.label: 便血
V002-N01360.definition: loss of blood through anus, with stool

鼻衄病

V002-N01334.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01334.definition: The occurrence of bleeding from the nose. Contributing factors may include nasal problems, trauma, ascending of fire heat along the lung, stomach and liver meridians, or spleen deficiency. It is often seen in nasal trauma, bleeding disorders, measles, erysipelas, scarlet fever, flu, dizziness, aplastic anaemia, tympanites or severe headache due to ascending of kidney qi.

V002-N01351.label: 嘈杂病
V002-N01351.definition: 以自觉胃中空虚，似饥非饥，似痛非痛，似辣 非辣，脘部懊憹，莫可名状为主要表现的疾 病。

V002-N01351.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01351.label: 嘈杂
V002-N01351.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜脾胃病
V002-N01351.definition: 自觉胃中空虚，似饥非饥，似痛非痛，似辣非辣，脘部懊憹，莫可名状的一种症状，多因伤食、胃寒、胃热、阴血亏虚及肝胃不和等所致。胃及食管的病变、胆胀、胰胀等病常可见嘈杂。

V002-N01351.label: 嘈杂
V002-N01351.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01351.definition: 是指胃中空虚，似饥非饥，似辣非辣，似痛非痛，莫可名状，时作时止的病证，可单独出现，又常与胃痛、吐酸兼见。

V002-N01351.label: 嘈杂
V002-N01351.aliases: 胃脘嘈杂； 胃中嘈杂
V002-N01351.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜躯体症状｜胃脘症状
V002-N01351.definition: 是指胃中空虚，似饥非饥，似辣非辣，似痛非痛，莫可名状，时作时止的病证，可单独出现，又常与胃痛、吐酸兼见。

V002-N01351.label: 嘈杂
V002-N01351.englishNames: stomach upset; Epigastic Upset; gastric upset; Epigastric upset disorder; epigastric upset
V002-N01351.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语

V002-N01351.label: 嘈杂

V002-N01351.path: 传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾系病类

V002-N01351.label: 嘈杂
V002-N01351.englishNames: stomach upset; Epigastic Upset; gastric upset; Gastric upset; Epigastric upset disorder; epigastric upset
V002-N01351.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01351.definition: A subjective feeling of stomach emptiness, the sensation of fullness after a very small amount of food, abdominal distension or unexplained discomfort. Often results from an improper diet, stomach cold, stomach heat, yin blood deficiency or disharmony between the liver and stomach. It is commonly seen in problems of stomach, oesophagus, gallbladder or pancreas.

V002-N01362.definition: 以尿血或尿中带血为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01362.label: 尿血病
V002-N01362.path: 内科疾病｜气血津液疾病
V002-N01362.definition: 以尿血为主要表现的血证。

V002-N01362.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01362.label: 血尿
V002-N01362.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜出血
V002-N01362.definition: 血随小便排出的症状。常因湿热下注、阴虚火旺、疫毒或药毒伤肾等所致。石淋、热淋、子淋、肾瘅、肾痨，肾及膀胱的癌瘤，某些血液病变、传染病等常可见尿血。

V002-N01362.label: 尿血
V002-N01362.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证｜血证
V002-N01362.definition: 小便中混有血液，甚或伴有血块的病证，称为尿血。

V002-N01362.label: 尿血
V002-N01362.aliases: 尿血淡红； 尿血鲜红； 尿血棕红； 尿中带血丝； 尿中夹血块； 血尿
V002-N01362.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜出血
V002-N01362.definition: 血从小便中排出，尿色因之而呈淡红、鲜红、红赤，甚或夹杂血块。

V002-N01362.label: 尿血
V002-N01362.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语

V002-N01362.aliases: 溺血； 溲血； 血尿
V002-N01362.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N01362.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01362.label: 尿血
V002-N01362.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01362.definition: The brown or red discolouration of the urine. Contributing factors may include damp heat in the urinary bladder, fire hyperactivity due to yin deficiency, exuberance of heart fire, pestilence or toxic drug damaging the kidney and urinary bladder. It is often seen in stony stranguria, heat stranguria, pregnancy strangury, kidney heat, renal tuberculosis, kidney/bladder cancer, blood disorders, or contagious diseases.

V002-N01362.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01362.label: 尿血

V002-N01342.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01342.label: 胸痛
V002-N01342.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜疼痛｜胸胁痛
V002-N01342.definition: 自觉胸部疼痛的症状。广义胸痛的范围包括心痛及胁痛在内。可因外伤、火热内灼、痰饮内阻、气滞血瘀等所致；肺、心、胸膈的多种疾病皆可见胸痛。

V002-N01342.label: 胸痛
V002-N01342.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜疼痛｜疼痛-按部位分｜胸背痛

V002-N01342.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N01342.label: 胸痛
V002-N01342.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N01342.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01342.label: 胸痛
V002-N01342.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01342.definition: A subjective feeling of pain in the chest area, including cardiac/chest pain or pain in the subcostal region. Contributing factors may include chest injury, internal fire heat, phlegm-fluid retention, or stagnation of qi and blood. It is often seen in chest injury, pneumothorax, lung abscess, lung heat, pleural effusion, whooping cough, lung cancer or cardiac pain in chest bi-impediment.

V002-N01342.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01342.label: 胸痛

V002-N01342.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01342.label: 胸痛
V002-N01342.definition: pain in the middle or lateral part of the chest

V002-N01324.label: 眩晕
V002-N01324.definition: 以头晕、目眩为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01324.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01324.label: 眩晕
V002-N01324.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肝胆病
V002-N01324.definition: 自觉头晕眼花、视物旋转动摇的症状。有经常性与发作性的不同，病位主要在脑髓清窍。多因气血营精不能上荣于头，或因风阳、火热上扰，痰浊、瘀血阻滞，清阳被遏等所致。

V002-N01324.label: 眩晕
V002-N01324.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证
V002-N01324.definition: 由于风、火、痰、虚、瘀引起清窍失养，临床上以头晕、眼花为主症的一类病证称为眩晕。眩即眼花，晕是头晕，两者常同时并见，故统称为“眩晕”。

V002-N01324.label: 眩晕
V002-N01324.aliases: 癫眩； 掉眩； 风眩； 苦冒； 冒眩； 脑转； 时时自冒； 头目眩晕； 头眩； 头晕目眩； 头晕眼花； 眩冒； 眩运； 眴仆； 徇蒙招尤； 郁冒
V002-N01324.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜头面症状｜头部症状

V002-N01324.path: 传统医学疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜脑系病类

V002-N01324.label: 眩晕

V002-N01324.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N01324.label: 头晕
V002-N01324.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N01324.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01324.label: 眩晕
V002-N01324.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01324.definition: Subjective dizziness, blurred vision and feeling like a spinning or swaying movement. Contributing factors may include failure of qi, blood and essence to nourish the head, wind phlegm or fire heat disturbing the head or stagnant blood obstructing clear yang. It is commonly seen in wind dizziness, cerebral arteriosclerosis, deficiency dizziness, aural vertigo, pregnancy dizziness, eclampsia, postpartum blood dizziness, motion sickness, cerebral atrophy or mental over-exertion. It may also be secondary to head trauma, neck pain, drug poisoning, brain tumour or ear, nose and throat conditions.

V002-N01324.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01324.label: 眩晕

V002-N01318.label: 发热
V002-N01318.definition: （1）体温升高，超出正常范围；（2）虽体温正常，但自觉身热不适的表现。

V002-N01318.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01318.label: 发热
V002-N01318.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜体温变化
V002-N01318.definition: 以体温升高，或自觉发热为主的症状。发热为临床极常见症状，外感六淫、疫毒之邪，或因情志、劳倦所伤等所致诸种疾病，尤其是各种传染病、时行病、疮疡类疾病，内脏瘅［热］病类疾病等均可导致。

V002-N01318.label: 外感发热
V002-N01318.englishNames: Fever Caused by Exogenous Pathogenic Factors
V002-N01318.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜外感病证
V002-N01318.definition: 是指已患有某种或多种内科疾病，又感受六淫之邪或温热疫毒之气，导致体温升高，并持续不降，伴有恶寒、面赤、烦渴、脉数等为主要临床表现的一种并发的病证。

V002-N01318.label: 发热
V002-N01318.aliases: 发热不恶寒； 身大热； 身热； 体温升高
V002-N01318.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜寒热｜但热不寒
V002-N01318.definition: (1)体温升高，超出正常范围；(2)虽体温正常，但自觉身热不适的表现。

V002-N01318.label: 发热

V002-N01318.label: 发热
V002-N01318.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01318.definition: Having a temperature above the normal range or a subjective feverish sensation. Contributing factors may include exogenous pathogenic factors, pestilence, emotions or over-exertion. It is often seen in externally contracted conditions, sores/ulcers, consumptive conditions, or heat in the zang–fu organs.

V002-N01318.label: 发热

V002-N01318.label: 发热
V002-N01318.definition: elevation of the body temperature above the normal or subjective feeling of feverishness

V002-N01339.label: 咳嗽病
V002-N01339.definition: 以咳嗽、咯痰为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01339.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01339.label: 咳嗽
V002-N01339.aliases: 暴咳； 内伤咳嗽； 外感咳嗽
V002-N01339.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肺病
V002-N01339.definition: 从肺经喉发出“咳、咳”有声的症状。多因六淫外邪袭肺、有害气体刺激、痰饮停肺、气阴亏虚等而致肺失清肃宣降、肺气上逆所致。几乎所有肺系疾病均可见到咳嗽，它脏疾病亦可影响到肺而伴见咳嗽。

V002-N01339.label: 咳嗽
V002-N01339.aliases: 暴咳； 久咳； 内伤咳嗽； 外感咳嗽
V002-N01339.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病证
V002-N01339.definition: 由六淫外邪侵袭肺系，或脏腑功能失调，内伤及肺，肺气不清，失于宣肃所成，临床以咳嗽、咯痰为主要表现。若咳与嗽分别言之，则有声无痰为咳，有痰无声为嗽。一般痰声多并见，难以截然分开，故以咳嗽并称。

V002-N01339.label: 咳逆
V002-N01339.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病证｜咳嗽

V002-N01339.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜呼吸症状
V002-N01339.definition: 指肺气向上冲击喉间而发出的一种“咳-咳”声音。古人将其分为三种有声无痰谓之咳，有痰无声谓之嗽，有痰有声谓之咳嗽。

Associated symptoms may include fatigue, frequent common colds, chest tightness, panting, pain in the subcostal region, haemoptysis and puffy face or eyes. Contributing factors may include chronic cough damaging lung qi, phlegm dampness due to spleen deficiency, liver fire affecting the lung, water retention due to kidney deficiency or deficiency of qi and yin.

V002-N00354.definition: Characterized by a sudden onset, urgent coughing sound, difficult expectoration of sputum, or coughing with scanty, yellow or white sputum. Associated symptoms include fever, headache, stuffy/runny nose, a red, sore and scratchy throat, and a dry mouth. Often occurs when six exogenous pathogenic factors or pestilence attack the lung and causes lung qi to ascend.

V002-N01336.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01336.label: 齿衄
V002-N01336.englishNames: gum bleeding; gingival hemorrhage; Gum bleeding
V002-N01336.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01336.definition: The occurrence of bleeding from the gum. Contributing factors may include heat accumulating in the stomach meridian, fire hyperactivity due to yin deficiency, or deficiency of the heart and spleen. It is often seen in periodontal atrophy, purpura, aplastic anaemia, liver masses, bleeding disorders, or epidemic haemorrhagic fever.

V002-N01363.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V002-N01363.definition: 是以小便混浊，白如泔浆，排尿时并无疼痛为主症。

V002-N01363.label: 小便浑浊
V002-N01363.aliases: 白浊； 便后白浊； 便浊； 二浊； 溺白； 溺浊； 尿白； 尿后溢浊； 尿如乳糜； 尿如脂液； 尿浊； 小便浑浊如膏脂； 小便有膏； 遗浊

V002-N01363.path: 传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾系病类

V002-N01363.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01363.label: 尿浊
V002-N01363.englishNames: turbid urine; Cloudy urine; turbid urine (disease); Turbid urine disorder
V002-N01363.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01363.definition: Turbid, white urine (like rice-washed water). Often results from downward flow of damp heat or deficiency of the spleen and kidney. It is commonly seen in filariasis, renal tuberculosis, chronic prostatitis, kidney cancer, and chest or abdominal trauma or surgeries. It may also be seen in children with external contraction of pathogenic factors or internal dysfunctions.

V002-N01363.label: 小便浑浊
V002-N01363.definition: murky urine like rice water or grease

V002-N01319.label: 抽搐
V002-N01319.definition: 肌肉不由自主地突然而迅速抽动的表现。

V002-N01319.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01319.label: 抽搐
V002-N01319.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜神经病学表现
V002-N01319.definition: 各种原因引起的四肢不自主抽动的症状。引起抽搐的病因病机主要有热毒内盛、风阳扰动、风毒窜络、阴血亏耗等。常见于脑系疾病、传染病、中毒、头颅内伤、厥病类疾病、子痫、产后痉病、小儿惊风、破伤风、狂犬病等病。

V002-N01319.label: 抽搐
V002-N01319.aliases: 抽风； 抽搦； 动风
V002-N01319.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜形态症状｜姿态症状
V002-N01319.definition: 肌肉不由自主地突然而迅速抽动的表现。

V002-N01319.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语

V002-N01319.label: 抽搐

V002-N01319.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N01319.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01319.label: 抽搐
V002-N01319.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01319.definition: Uncontrolled shaking of the limbs, mouth corner or head. Contributing factors may include internal exuberance of toxic heat, stirring of wind yang, toxic wind affecting the meridians, or consumption of yin blood. It is often seen in late-stage exogenous diseases, exhaustion of Yuan-primordial qi, epileptic seizures, infantile convulsions, poisoning or accidental injuries.

V002-N01319.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01319.label: 抽搐

V002-N01319.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01319.label: 抽搐
V002-N01319.definition: sudden, violent uncontrollable movements of the limbs caused by contraction of muscles

V002-N01343.label: 心悸病
V002-N01343.definition: 以自觉心跳，惊慌不安，不能自主为主要表 现的疾病。

V002-N01343.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01343.label: 心悸
V002-N01343.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜心病
V002-N01343.definition: 自觉心搏跳动异常、心慌不安的症状。心悸常分为惊悸、怔忡，心动悸。以心悸为主要特征，心系、脑系疾病常见心悸。

V002-N01343.label: 心悸
V002-N01343.aliases: Palpitation disorders； 过早搏动； 心动过缓； 心动过速； 心动悸； 心房颤动； 心房扑动； 心下悸
V002-N01343.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病证
V002-N01343.definition: 是指气血阴阳亏虚，或痰饮瘀血阻滞，心失所养，心脉不畅，引起心中急剧跳动，惊慌不安，不能自主为主要表现的一种病证。

V002-N01343.label: 心悸
V002-N01343.aliases: palpitations； 悸动不宁； 自觉心博
V002-N01343.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜躯体症状｜心胸症状
V002-N01343.definition: 感觉心脏跳动不安，常伴有心慌的表现。

V002-N01343.label: 心悸
V002-N01343.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语

V002-N01343.label: 心悸
V002-N01343.path: 传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病类

V002-N01343.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N01343.label: 心悸
V002-N01343.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N01343.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01343.label: 心悸
V002-N01343.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01343.definition: Unpleasant, involuntary sensations of rapid, irregular and/or forceful beating of the heart. Often results from failure of qi and blood to nourish the heart, emotions, exogenous pathogens affecting the heart or phlegm stasis obstructing the heart vessels. It is commonly seen in heart impediment, heart heat, lung conditions, emotional disorders, chronic debility, or thyroid problems.

V002-N01343.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01343.label: 心悸

V002-N01343.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01343.label: 心悸
V002-N01343.definition: a subjective sensation of rapid and forceful beating of the heart

V002-N01358.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01358.definition: Abnormal build up of fluid in the abdomen. Contributing factors may include qi stagnation, blood stasis, spleen deficiency, or internal accumulation of damp heat. It is often seen in tympanites, masses or tuberculosis.

V002-N01322.label: 错语
V002-N01322.definition: 语言前后颠倒，错乱无序，语后自知，不能自主的表现。

V002-N01322.definition: A type of dysphasia that the patient frequently employs wrong words but realizes the mistake afterwards, often resulting from heart qi deficiency, malnourishment of the heart mind or kidney essence failing to nourish the brain.

V002-N01327.label: 烦躁
V002-N01327.definition: 心中烦闷不安，急躁易怒，甚则手足动作及行为举止躁动不宁的表现。

V002-N01327.label: 烦躁
V002-N01327.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V002-N01327.definition: Typical clinical symptoms are an oppressive, feverish sensation in the chest and restless hands/feet. They are often caused by fire hyperactivity due to yin deficiency.

V002-N01327.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01327.label: 烦躁
V002-N01327.definition: vexation followed by irritability, irascibility, and restlessness

V002-N01357.label: 腹泻
V002-N01357.definition: 粪便稀薄，排便次数增加的表现，是多种类似症状的统称。

V002-N01357.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01357.label: 泄泻
V002-N01357.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医儿科疾病
V002-N01357.definition: 大便次数增多，粪质稀薄为特征的症状。外感风寒湿热疫毒之邪，或饮食所伤，情志失调，或久病脾肾阳气亏虚等均可导致。临床有暴泻与久泻之分。脾胃、大小肠、肝胆胰的病变常有泄泻的症状。

V002-N01357.label: 泄泻
V002-N01357.aliases: 大便次数增多； 腹泻； 久痢； 久泄不止； 久泻； 飱泄； 泄下

V002-N01364.label: 水肿
V002-N01364.definition: 以水肿为主要表现的疾病的统称。

V002-N01364.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01364.label: 水肿
V002-N01364.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜气血津液证候｜津液病｜津液内停｜水证
V002-N01364.definition: 眼睑、头面、四肢、腹背或全身浮肿的症状。一般按病之新久缓急和邪正虚实而有阳水、阴水之分。外邪侵袭，或劳倦内伤，或饮食失调，使气化不利而水液潴留，泛溢肌肤则发为水肿。其常见疾病有风水、皮水、石水、正水、肾水、溢饮、脾水、心衰、经行浮肿、子肿等。凡以水肿为主要表现的疾病，可以归纳为水肿病类。

V002-N01364.label: 水肿
V002-N01364.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V002-N01364.definition: 是指因感受外邪、饮食失调或劳倦过度，使肺失通调、脾失传输、肾失开合、膀胱气化不利，导致体内水液潴留，泛滥肌肤，表现以头面、四肢、腹背，甚至全身浮肿为特征的一类病证。

V002-N01364.label: 浮肿
V002-N01364.aliases: 胕肿； 腑肿； 水气； 水肿； 肿胀
V002-N01364.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状
V002-N01364.definition: 全身或局部水肿，按之凹陷的表现。

V002-N01364.label: 水肿
V002-N01364.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语

V002-N01364.label: 水肿
V002-N01364.path: 传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾系病类

V002-N00440.definition: A group of conditions caused by impaired qi transformation and retained water flowing over the skin. Contributing factors may include external pathogenic factors, over-exertion or improper diet.

V002-N01329.label: 健忘
V002-N01329.definition: 以记忆力减退、遇事易忘为主要表现的疾 病。

V002-N01329.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N01329.label: 健忘
V002-N01329.aliases: 多忘； 好忘； 善忘； 喜忘； 易忘
V002-N01329.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N01329.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01329.label: 健忘
V002-N01329.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01329.definition: A noticeable memory decrease that does not conform to age-related effects. Often results from deficiency of the heart and spleen, disharmony between the heart and kidney, ageing, or phlegm stasis affecting the heart mind. It is commonly seen in mental over-exertion, cerebral atrophy, insomnia, emotional disorder, dementia, head trauma or poisoning.

V002-N01329.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01329.label: 健忘

V002-N01330.label: 但欲寐
V002-N01330.definition: 不分昼夜，时时欲睡，呼之能醒，醒后复睡的表现。

V002-N01330.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01330.label: 睡眠过多
V002-N01330.aliases: 多寐； 多眠症； 嗜睡
V002-N01330.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜神经病学表现
V002-N01330.definition: 多因阳气不足，或痰湿内盛，瘀血浊毒阻蔽清阳所致，以不分昼夜，时时欲睡，实际入睡时间增加为表现的疾病。

V002-N01330.label: 睡眠过多
V002-N01330.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜精神情志病类

V002-N01330.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜睡眠症状
V002-N01330.definition: 不分昼夜，时时欲睡，呼之能醒，醒后复睡的表现。

V002-N01330.label: 嗜睡

V002-N01330.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01330.label: 嗜睡
V002-N01330.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01330.definition: Prolonged night time sleep and excessive daytime sleepiness. Contributing factors may include yang qi deficiency or internal retention of phlegm dampness/stagnant blood. It is often a warning sign of unconsciousness in exogenous diseases and commonly seen in hypersomnia, dementia, obesity, head injuries, poisoning, or consumptive conditions.

V002-N01331.label: 目盲
V002-N01331.path: 中医眼科学｜眼科学诊断
V002-N01331.definition: 视力严重下降甚至失明的表现。

V002-N01331.label: 目盲
V002-N01331.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜五官症状｜眼目症状｜目视所见

V002-N01331.vocabName: 简帛医药文献词典（2018）（未校勘）
V002-N01331.label: 目盲

V002-N01331.label: 目盲
V002-N01331.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语

V002-N01331.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01331.label: 目盲
V002-N01331.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01331.definition: Severe impairment or loss of eyesight. Contributing factors may include stagnation of qi and blood, ascending of phlegm heat, hyperactivity of liver fire, or malnourishment of the eyes due to yin blood deficiency of the liver and kidney. It is often seen in cataract or emotional disturbance.

V002-N01331.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01331.label: 目盲

V002-N01331.definition: lack or loss of ability to see

V002-N01348.label: 吐血病
V002-N01348.path: 内科疾病｜气血津液疾病
V002-N01348.definition: 以血随呕吐而出，呕吐纯血为主要表现的血 证。

V002-N01348.label: 吐血
V002-N01348.definition: 胃与食道出血，经口吐出，或可挟有食物残渣。

V002-N01348.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01348.label: 呕血
V002-N01348.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医儿科疾病｜血证
V002-N01348.definition: 血由胃或食管等上消化道而来，经口呕出或吐出的症状。可由肝胃积热、脾气虚弱、瘀血阻滞等多种原因，使胃络受损，胃失和降所致。

V002-N01348.label: 吐血
V002-N01348.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证｜血证
V002-N01348.definition: 血由胃来，经呕吐而出，血色红或紫黯，常夹有食物残渣，称为吐血，亦称为呕血。

V002-N01348.label: 吐血
V002-N01348.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜出血
V002-N01348.definition: 胃与食道出血，经口吐出，或可挟有食物残渣。

V002-N01348.label: 呕血
V002-N01348.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语

V002-N01348.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01348.label: 吐血
V002-N01348.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V002-N01348.definition: Blood ejection out of the mouth without nausea, vomiting or cough. Often results from exuberant stomach heat, liver qi stagnation transforming into heat or deficiency of spleen qi and heart blood. Contributing factors may include alcohol drinking, ingestion of spicy, oily food, anger, worries or over exertion.

V002-N01348.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01348.label: 呕血
V002-N01348.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01348.definition: The bleeding from the upper gastrointestinal tract (stomach or oesophagus) out of the mouth. Contributing factors may include heat accumulating in the liver and stomach, spleen qi deficiency or stagnant blood. These factors may affect the descending of stomach qi. It is often seen in stomach heat, stomach ulcer, tympanites, bleeding disorders, epidemic haemorrhagic fever, kidney failure, stomach or liver cancer.

V002-N01348.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01348.label: 吐血

V002-N01354.path: 内科疾病｜脾胃疾病
V002-N01354.definition: 以泛吐酸水为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01354.vocabName: 中医药学名词（2004）
V002-N01354.label: 吐酸
V002-N01354.path: 诊断学｜诊法

V002-N01354.label: 吞酸
V002-N01354.path: 诊断学｜诊法
V002-N01354.definition: 酸水自胃中上至咽喉，不及吐出而下咽，并可感觉到酸味刺激性的表现。

V002-N01354.vocabName: 中医药学名词（2004）
V002-N01354.label: 泛酸
V002-N01354.path: 诊断学｜诊法
V002-N01354.definition: 酸水自胃中上逆的表现，包括吞酸与吐酸。

V002-N01354.vocabName: 临床术语
V002-N01354.label: 吐酸
V002-N01354.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01354.definition: 吐酸胃酸过多，随胃气上逆而吐出的病证。吞酸指自觉酸水上泛至咽，旋即吞咽而下；泛酸统指胃酸上泛之证。其病机为肝气犯胃，胃失和降。

V002-N01354.vocabName: 临床术语
V002-N01354.label: 泛酸
V002-N01354.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜躯体症状｜胃脘症状
V002-N01354.definition: 酸水自胃中上逆的表现，包括吞酸与吐酸。

V002-N01354.vocabName: 临床术语
V002-N01354.label: 吐酸
V002-N01354.aliases: 嗳腐吐嗖； 嗳腐吐酸； 呕吐酸水； 呕吐酸馊苦水
V002-N01354.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜躯体症状｜胃脘症状｜泛酸
V002-N01354.definition: 酸水自胃中上逆，并频频吐出酸水的表现。

V002-N01354.vocabName: 临床术语
V002-N01354.label: 吞酸
V002-N01354.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜躯体症状｜胃脘症状｜泛酸
V002-N01354.definition: 酸水自胃中上至咽喉，不及吐出而下咽，并可感觉到酸味刺激性的表现。

V002-N01354.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01354.label: 泛酸
V002-N01354.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V002-N01354.definition: A symptom of vomiting sour-tasting fluids. Often results from deficiency cold of the spleen and stomach or liver heat (transformed from qi stagnation) affecting the stomach.

V002-N01354.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01354.label: 吐酸
V002-N01354.aliases: 吞酸； 泛酸； 噫酸； Acid reflux
V002-N01354.englishNames: acid vomiting; acid regurgitation; Acid regurgitation
V002-N01354.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01354.definition: The swallowing of acid contents regurgitated from the stomach to the throat or vomiting out of the mouth. It is often accompanied by stomach discomfort and belching. Contributing factors may include liver qi stagnation, stomach qi disharmony, liver fire affecting the stomach, food stagnation in the spleen and stomach, or ascending of fluid due to deficiency cold of the spleen and stomach. It is often seen in improper diet, oesophageal heat, stomach ulcer or stomach distension.

V002-N01354.label: 吐酸
V002-N01354.path: 诊法

V002-N01354.label: 吞酸

V002-N01354.definition: swallowing of acid contents regurgitated from the stomach to the throat

V002-N00404.label: 气血津液病类术语
V002-N00404.englishNames: category of Qi, blood and fluid diseases terminology
V002-N00404.pinyinNames: qi xue jin ye bing lei shu yu

V002-N00405.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00405.label: 虚劳
V002-N00405.path: 第1部分：内科学｜气血津液病
V002-N00405.definition: 以阴阳、气血、脏腑虚损为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00405.label: 虚劳
V002-N00405.path: 内科疾病｜气血津液疾病
V002-N00405.definition: 阴阳、气血、脏腑虚损的慢性虚衰性疾病的 统称。

V002-N00405.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00405.label: 虚劳
V002-N00405.aliases: 六极（中医）； 五劳七伤； 虚损
V002-N00405.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证
V002-N00405.definition: 劳逸失度而伤人致病，常渐积而发，起病徐缓，逐渐加重，病程较长，伤及脏腑气血为主，其次可伤及筋肉、经络及关节，多表现为虚证和慢性病。

V002-N00405.label: 虚劳
V002-N00405.aliases: 内科虚劳杂病； 虚损
V002-N00405.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证
V002-N00405.definition: 又称虚损，是以脏腑功能衰退，气血阴阳不足为主要病机的多种慢性虚弱症候的总称。

V002-N00405.label: 虚劳类病
V002-N00405.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语

V002-N00405.label: 虚劳
V002-N00405.aliases: 六极（中医）； 五劳七伤； 虚损； 虚劳病
V002-N00405.englishNames: Consumptive Diseases; consumptive disease; Consumptive disorder
V002-N00405.path: 传统医学疾病｜气血津液病

V002-N00405.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00405.label: 虚劳类病
V002-N00405.englishNames: consumptive diseases diseases; category of consumptive disease; Deficiency/consumption
V002-N00405.pinyinNames: xu lao lei bing; xū láo lèi bìng
V002-N00405.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00405.definition: A collective term for chronic deficiency or consumption of qi, blood, yin, yang and the five zang organs. Contributing factors may include over-exertion, an improper diet, emotions, alcohol consumption, sexual indulgence or major medical conditions.

V002-N00405.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00405.label: 虚劳

V002-N00408.label: 髓劳
V002-N00408.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证
V002-N00408.definition: 因先后天不足，精血生化无源，或因有毒药物及理化因素伤正，邪毒淤阻，新血不生。以出血，血亏，全血细胞减少，易染邪毒为主要表现的劳病类疾病。

V002-N00408.label: 髓劳
V002-N00408.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜虚劳类病

V002-N00408.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00408.label: 髓劳
V002-N00408.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00408.definition: Characterized by haemorrhage, anaemia and deficiency of whole blood cells. Contributing factors may include heredity, postnatal malnutrition or exposure to drugs or certain chemicals.

V002-N00407.label: 血劳
V002-N00407.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证｜血证
V002-N00407.definition: 因先后天亏损，血液生化不足，或因失血、溶血等耗伤血液，以致营血亏少，脏器失其濡养。以面白舌淡，眩晕心悸，血红细胞少，血红蛋白量低为主要表现的劳病类疾病。

V002-N00407.label: 血劳
V002-N00407.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜虚劳类病

V002-N00406.label: 虚损病
V002-N00406.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜虚劳类病

V002-N00409.label: 内伤发热病
V002-N00409.englishNames: fever disease due to internal damage
V002-N00409.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜虚劳类病

V002-N00409.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00409.label: 内伤发热病
V002-N00409.englishNames: fever due to internal dysfunctions; fever disease due to internal damage; Fever due to internal dysfunctions
V002-N00409.pinyinNames: nei shang fa re bing; nèi shāng fā rè bìng
V002-N00409.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00409.definition: Characterized by a low-grade fever, tidal fever, bone-steaming sensation, hot flashes and feverish sensations of the palms and soles. Individuals may also present with symptoms indicative of deficiency of yin, yang, qi, blood and the zang–fu organs. Contributing factors may include over-exertion, emotional disturbance, improper diet or dysfunctions of the zang–fu organs. These factors may cause deficiency of qi and blood and disharmony between yin and yang.

V002-N00411.label: 厥脱类病
V002-N00411.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语

V002-N00411.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00411.label: 厥脱类病
V002-N00411.englishNames: syncope and prostration diseases; Syncope/fainting; category of syncope and prostration
V002-N00411.pinyinNames: jue tuo lei bing; jué tuō lèi bìng
V002-N00411.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00411.definition: A group of critical conditions caused by disorder of qi and blood, exhaustion of yang qi or collapse of yin blood. Contributing factors may include mental stress, eating disorder, drug poisoning, food poisoning or external contraction of pathogenic factors.

V002-N00415.label: 饥厥
V002-N00415.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病

V002-N00415.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00415.label: 饥厥
V002-N00415.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00415.definition: Characterized by sudden palpitations, weakness, cold sweats, a pale face and, in severe cases, sudden fainting may be present. Often results from failure of Ying nutrients to nourish the brain due to inability to eat food or hunger.

V002-N00423.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00423.label: 食厥
V002-N00423.path: 第1部分：内科学｜急症｜厥证
V002-N00423.definition: 暴饮暴食而致食积内停，气机阻塞引起的厥证。

V002-N00423.label: 食厥
V002-N00423.path: 内科疾病｜气血津液疾病

V002-N00423.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00423.label: 食厥
V002-N00423.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜心病｜厥证
V002-N00423.definition: 因饥饿等而使营气不足，清阳不升，脑神失养所致。以突发心慌、软弱、冷汗、面白，甚至晕厥等为主要表现的厥病类疾病。

V002-N00423.label: 食厥
V002-N00423.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病证｜厥证
V002-N00423.definition: 因食填中脘，胃气不降，气逆于上，清窍闭阻而致，症见暴饮暴食，突然昏厥，脘腹胀满，呕呃酸腐，头晕，苔厚腻，脉滑。

V002-N00423.label: 饥厥
V002-N00423.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病

V002-N00423.label: 食厥
V002-N00423.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜厥病

V002-N00423.label: 食厥
V002-N00423.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜情志情况｜晕厥

V002-N00423.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00423.label: 食厥
V002-N00423.englishNames: crapulent syncope; Over-eating-induced syncope; Crapulent Syncope
V002-N00423.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00423.definition: Characterized by fainting after over-eating, abdominal distension and fullness, belching and a slippery, forceful pulse. Often results from binge eating. Alternatively, it may occur when wind cold or anger triggers the stagnant food in the spleen and stomach and causes qi to ascend to disturb the heart mind.

V002-N00423.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00423.label: 饥厥
V002-N00423.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00423.definition: Characterized by sudden palpitations, weakness, cold sweats, a pale face and, in severe cases, sudden fainting may be present. Often results from failure of Ying nutrients to nourish the brain due to inability to eat food or hunger.

V002-N00423.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00423.label: 食厥

V002-N00414.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00414.label: 血厥
V002-N00414.path: 第1部分：内科学｜急症｜厥证
V002-N00414.definition: 失血过多，神明失养或血随气升，上冲清窍所致的厥证。

V002-N00414.label: 血厥
V002-N00414.path: 内科疾病｜气血津液疾病

V002-N00414.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00414.label: 血厥
V002-N00414.aliases: Blood Syncope； Syncope due to Excessive Bleeding
V002-N00414.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜心病｜厥证
V002-N00414.definition: 因情绪紧张、恐惧，或因创伤剧痛，或为年老体弱，或在突然改变体位等情况下，导致一时气机紊乱，脉络弛缓，清阳不升，脑失血养。以突然昏倒、面白肢厥、神识不清为主要表现的厥、脱类疾病。

V002-N00414.label: 血厥
V002-N00414.englishNames: Bleed Fainting; Syncope Due to Excessive Bleeding; Syncope Resulting from Blood Disorder; Syncope Resulting from Disorders of the Blood
V002-N00414.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病证｜厥证
V002-N00414.definition: 多因急躁恼怒而发，突然昏倒，不知人事，牙关紧闭，面赤唇紫，舌暗红，脉弦有力。病机为怒而气上，血随气升，蒙闭清窍。

V002-N00414.label: 血厥
V002-N00414.aliases: 脉厥； Blood Syncope； Syncope due to Excessive Bleeding
V002-N00414.englishNames: blood syncope; Bleeding Syncope; syncope due to excessive bleeding
V002-N00414.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病

V002-N00414.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00414.label: 血厥
V002-N00414.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜情志情况｜晕厥

V002-N00414.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00414.label: 血厥
V002-N00414.aliases: 脉厥； Blood Syncope； Syncope due to Excessive Bleeding； Blood syncope disorder
V002-N00414.englishNames: blood syncope; Bleeding Syncope; Blood syncope; syncope due to excessive bleeding
V002-N00414.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00414.definition: Characterized by sudden fainting, a pale face, cold limbs and transient mental cloudiness. Contributing factors may include nervousness, fear, intense traumatic pain, ageing or a sudden change in posture. These factors may disturb qi activity and result in the failure of blood to nourish the brain.

V002-N00414.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00414.label: 血厥

V002-N00412.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00412.label: 风厥
V002-N00412.path: 第1部分：内科学｜气血津液病
V002-N00412.definition: 风毒突致，扰乱气血，阴阳乖戾，阳气欲脱，以胸闷心悸,呼吸困难，肢厥脉微,皮肤瘙痒，神志异常等为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00412.label: 风厥
V002-N00412.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜脑系病证
V002-N00412.definition: 因风毒突致，扰乱气血，阴阳乖戾，气机阻闭，甚至阳气欲脱。以胸闷心悸，呼吸困难，肢厥脉微，皮肤瘙痒，血压降低，神志异常等为主要表现的厥、脱类疾病。

V002-N00412.label: 风厥
V002-N00412.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病

V002-N00412.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00412.label: 风厥
V002-N00412.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00412.definition: Characterized by chest tightness, palpitations, difficulty breathing, cold limbs, a feeble pulse, skin itching, low blood pressure and mental cloudiness. Often results from wind disturbing or blocking qi and blood or yang qi collapse.

V002-N00412.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00412.label: 风厥

V002-N00417.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00417.label: 厥证
V002-N00417.definition: 以短暂的突然昏倒，不省人事为主要表现的危急重病的统称。

V002-N00417.label: 厥证
V002-N00417.path: 内科疾病｜气血津液疾病
V002-N00417.definition: 以突然昏倒，不省人事，或伴四肢逆冷为主 要表现的疾病的统称。

V002-N00417.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00417.label: 厥证
V002-N00417.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜心病
V002-N00417.definition: 以突然昏倒、不省人事、或伴四肢逆冷为主要表现的疾病的统称。

V002-N00417.label: 厥证
V002-N00417.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病证
V002-N00417.definition: 是指由于阴阳失调、气机逆乱所引起的，以突然昏倒，不省人事，或伴有四肢逆冷为主要临床表现的一种急性病证。病机多为情志内伤、久病体虚、亡血失津、饮食不节。

V002-N00417.label: 厥病
V002-N00417.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病

V002-N00417.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00417.label: 厥病
V002-N00417.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00417.definition: A group of emergent conditions characterized by sudden fainting and cold limbs. Contributing factors may include mental stress, eating disorder, six exogenous pathogenic factors, pestilence, phlegm dampness, drug poisoning or food poisoning. These factors may block the flow of qi and cause the disorder of qi and blood.

V002-N00417.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00417.label: 厥证

V002-N00422.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00422.label: 热厥
V002-N00422.path: 第1部分：内科学｜急症｜厥证
V002-N00422.definition: 邪热过盛，格阴于外，或阳郁于里不能外达所致的厥证。

V002-N00422.label: 热厥
V002-N00422.path: 内科疾病｜气血津液疾病

V002-N00422.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00422.label: 热厥
V002-N00422.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜心病｜厥证
V002-N00422.definition: 邪热炽盛，阳盛格阴于外，以壮热口渴、烦躁不宁、胸腹灼热、手足厥冷、便秘尿黄、舌红苔黄、脉弦数等为常见症的证候。

V002-N00422.label: 热厥
V002-N00422.aliases: 阳厥； Heat Syncope； 煎厥
V002-N00422.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜厥病

V002-N00422.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00422.label: 热厥
V002-N00422.aliases: 阳厥； Heat Syncope； Yang syncope； 煎厥
V002-N00422.englishNames: heat syncope; Heat Syncope Syndrome; Heat syncope
V002-N00422.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00422.definition: Characterized by cold extremities up to the elbows and knees or beyond, body fever without sweating, a flushed face, a dry tongue and lips, scanty, dark yellow urine, and dry stools. In severe cases, unconsciousness may be present. Often results from exposure to hot environment for a prolonged period or severe fire heat/summer heat damaging yin or disturbing the heart mind.

V002-N00422.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00422.label: 热厥

V002-N00419.path: 第1部分：内科学｜急症｜厥证
V002-N00419.definition: 中气衰竭或气机逆乱蒙闭诸窍所致的厥证。

V002-N00419.path: 第1部分：内科学｜急症｜厥证

V002-N00419.label: 气厥
V002-N00419.englishNames: syncope due to disorder of qi
V002-N00419.path: 内科疾病｜气血津液疾病
V002-N00419.definition: 气机怫郁上逆所致的厥证。

V002-N00419.label: 郁厥
V002-N00419.path: 内科疾病｜气血津液疾病

V002-N00419.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00419.label: 气厥
V002-N00419.aliases: Qi Syncope Syndrome； Syncope due to Disorder of Qi
V002-N00419.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜心病｜厥证
V002-N00419.definition: 因精神刺激、情志不舒、气机郁闭所致。以突然昏厥、过时复醒，或有感觉、运动障碍，但无脏腑形器损害的厥病类疾病。

V002-N00419.label: 气厥
V002-N00419.englishNames: Syncope Due to Disorder of the Vital Energy; Syncope Resulting From Disorder of Qi; Syncope Resulting From Disorder of the Vi-tal Energy
V002-N00419.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病证｜厥证
V002-N00419.definition: 因精神刺激，情志不舒，气机郁闭所致。以突然昏厥，不知人事，或四肢厥冷、呼吸气粗、口噤握拳、舌苔薄白，脉伏或沉弦。

V002-N00419.label: 气厥
V002-N00419.aliases: 郁厥； Qi Syncope Syndrome； Syncope due to Disorder of Qi
V002-N00419.englishNames: Qi Syncope; qi syncope; syncope due to disorder of qi
V002-N00419.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜厥病

V002-N00419.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00419.label: 气厥
V002-N00419.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜情志情况｜晕厥

V002-N00419.label: 气厥
V002-N00419.aliases: 郁厥； Qi Syncope Syndrome； Syncope due to Disorder of Qi； Qi syncope disorder
V002-N00419.englishNames: Qi Syncope; qi syncope; Qi syncope; syncope due to disorder of qi
V002-N00419.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00419.definition: Characterized by sudden fainting (patients recover after some time). Some may also experience sensory or motor disturbance but no organic pathological changes. Often occurs when emotional disturbance causes qi to stagnate or when clear yang fails to ascend due to spleen qi deficiency.

V002-N00419.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00419.label: 气厥

V002-N00424.definition: 一次过量饮酒，酒气上攻，神明失主。以烦躁、欲呕、气喘、酣睡昏厥为主要表现的厥病类疾病。

V002-N00424.label: 酒厥
V002-N00424.englishNames: alcoholic syncope; syncope due to immoderate drinking; alcoholism syncope
V002-N00424.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜厥病

V002-N00424.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00424.label: 酒厥
V002-N00424.englishNames: alcoholic syncope; syncope due to immoderate drinking; alcoholism syncope; Alcoholic syncope
V002-N00424.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00424.definition: Characterized by restlessness, vomiting, sleepiness, and panting. In severe cases, fainting and cold limbs may be present. It occurs when excessive alcohol drinking affects the heart mind.

V002-N00421.label: 冷厥
V002-N00421.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜脑系病证
V002-N00421.definition: 因处于寒冷环境，外寒内侵，阳气严重耗损。以体温过低，神识昏厥为主要表现的厥病类疾病。

V002-N00421.label: 寒厥
V002-N00421.englishNames: cold syncope; cold type of cold limbs
V002-N00421.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜厥病

V002-N00421.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00421.label: 寒厥
V002-N00421.aliases: 阴厥； 冷厥； Cold syncope disorder； Yin syncope
V002-N00421.englishNames: cold syncope; cold type of cold limbs; Cold syncope
V002-N00421.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00421.definition: Characterized by hypothermia, cold limbs and mental cloudiness. Chilblains may also be present. Often results from exposure to cold environment for a prolonged period or severe cold consuming yang qi.

V002-N00421.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00421.label: 寒厥

V002-N00418.label: 中恶
V002-N00418.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜脑系病证
V002-N00418.definition: 因神气不足，卒感秽浊不正之气，或入阴森恐惧之处等，神明被蒙。以突然头晕呕恶，呼吸困难，不省人事，移时或经治而解为主要表现的厥病类疾病。

V002-N00420.label: 痰厥
V002-N00420.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜心病｜厥证
V002-N00420.definition: 因情志刺激，气郁喉痹，或因风痰内动，痰阻气道，闭扰神明所致。以突然昏厥或神昏、喉间痰壅、肢厥脉沉实为主要表现的厥病类疾病。

V002-N00420.label: 痰厥
V002-N00420.englishNames: Adverse Rising of Phlegm; Coldness of the Extremities Due to the Accumulation of Phlegm; Coma Due to the Accumalation of Phlegm; Coma or Coldness of the Extremities Due to the Accumulation of Phlegm; Phlegm Syncope
V002-N00420.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病证｜厥证
V002-N00420.definition: 素有咳喘宿疾，多湿多痰，恼怒或剧烈咳嗽后突然昏倒，喉中有痰声，或呕吐涎沫，呼吸气粗，舌苔白腻，脉沉滑。病机为肝郁肺痹，痰随气升，上闭清窍。

V002-N00420.label: 痰厥
V002-N00420.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜厥病

V002-N00420.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00420.label: 痰厥
V002-N00420.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜情志情况｜晕厥

V002-N00420.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00420.label: 痰厥
V002-N00420.englishNames: Phlegm Syncope; phlegm syncope; Phlegm syncope
V002-N00420.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00420.definition: Characterized by sudden fainting or unconsciousness, phlegm sounds in the throat, cold limbs, and a deep, excessive, wiry and slippery pulse. Often occurs when emotional disturbance causes qi to stagnate in the throat or when wind phlegm obstructs the airways adn blocks the heart mind.

V002-N00420.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00420.label: 痰厥

V002-N00425.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00425.label: 脱病
V002-N00425.definition: 正气外脱，以神志淡漠,甚则昏迷,气息微弱，面色苍白，四肢厥冷，大汗淋漓，口开手撒，二便失禁，脉微细欲绝为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00425.label: 脱病
V002-N00425.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病

V002-N00427.label: 液脱
V002-N00427.definition: 人体阴液极度亏损而致形体羸瘦，脏腑生理功能衰微，甚则生命垂危的病机变化。

V002-N00427.label: 液脱
V002-N00427.definition: 由于汗、吐、下损伤津液，造成阴液脱失的病理变化。

V002-N00427.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00427.label: 津液亏虚
V002-N00427.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜气血津液证候｜津液病
V002-N00427.definition: 津液亏少，脏腑组织失却濡养，以口燥咽干、唇焦或裂、渴欲饮水、小便短少、大便干结、舌红少津、脉细数无力等为常见症的证候。

V002-N00427.label: 液脱
V002-N00427.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜津液失常｜津液不足
V002-N00427.definition: 指人体阴液极度亏损而致形体羸瘦，脏腑生理功能衰微，甚则生命垂危的病理变化。

V002-N00427.label: 液脱
V002-N00427.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证
V002-N00427.definition: 因津液大量急剧耗失，以致阴亏脉陷，气阴欲脱。以口渴无尿，肤燥脉微，血压显著降低为主要表现的脱病类疾病。

V002-N00427.label: 液脱病
V002-N00427.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜脱病

V002-N00427.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00427.label: 液脱
V002-N00427.englishNames: liquid depletion; liquid collapse; turbid fluid depletion

V002-N00426.label: 气脱
V002-N00426.path: 病机类｜气血失调｜气失调｜气虚
V002-N00426.definition: 气虚至极无以固摄，真气外泄的病机变化。

V002-N00426.label: 气脱
V002-N00426.definition: 由于邪气太盛，正气骤伤；或长期损耗，正气衰竭；或大汗、大吐、大出血致气随液脱、气随血脱等原因，导致气不内守而外选脱失的危重病理变化。

V002-N00426.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00426.label: 气脱
V002-N00426.aliases: 元气衰败； 元气虚脱
V002-N00426.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气病
V002-N00426.definition: 真气因某种原因而急骤外泄，以突然面色苍白，口唇青紫，汗出肢冷，呼吸微弱，舌淡脉细数为常见症的危重证候。

V002-N00426.label: 气脱
V002-N00426.aliases: 元气败脱； 元气将脱； 正气暴脱
V002-N00426.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜气失调
V002-N00426.definition: 指气不内守，大量向外亡失，以致生命机能突然衰竭的一种病理状态。

V002-N00426.label: 气脱病
V002-N00426.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜脱病

V002-N00426.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00426.label: 气脱
V002-N00426.englishNames: qi desertion; qi collapse; qi prostration; Qi collapse
V002-N00426.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V002-N00426.definition: A pathological state in which extreme deficiency of qi causes qi to float on the exterior of the body.

V002-N00426.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00426.label: 气脱
V002-N00426.englishNames: qi prostration; qi collapse; qi desertion

V002-N00426.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00426.label: 气脱
V002-N00426.definition: desertion of qi due to sudden damage to the healthy qi, massive loss of blood, profuse sweating, excessive vomiting and diarrhea, or due to prolonged consumption in a chronic disease

V002-N00428.label: 血脱
V002-N00428.path: 病机类｜气血失调｜血失调
V002-N00428.definition: 出血而致血海空虚，血液脱失的危重病机变化。

V002-N00428.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00428.label: 血脱
V002-N00428.definition: 突然大量失血，或长期反复出血，血脉空虚，气血欲脱,以出血，面色苍白,头晕目眩，心悸征忡，气微而短,四肢厥冷,渐致神志昏蒙,舌淡白，脉微或，或微细欲绝，血压持续下降，低于90/60mmHg 等为特征的脱病。

V002-N00428.label: 血脱
V002-N00428.definition: 各种急性大出血，导致的血海空虚，血液脱失的危重病理变化。

V002-N00428.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00428.label: 血脱
V002-N00428.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病
V002-N00428.definition: 突然大量出血或长期反复出血，血液亡脱于外，以面色苍白、头晕眼花、心悸怔忡、气微而短、四肢清冷、舌淡脉芤等为常见症的证候。

V002-N00428.label: 血脱
V002-N00428.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜血失调
V002-N00428.definition: 指各种急性大出血，导致的血海空虚，血液脱失的危重病理变化。

V002-N00428.label: 血脱
V002-N00428.englishNames: Blood Prostration; Collapse Due to Massive Hemorrhage; Exhaustion of the Blood; Hemorrhagic Shock; Massive Bleeding
V002-N00428.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证｜血证
V002-N00428.definition: 因突然大量失血，以致血脉空虚，全身失却血液濡养，气血欲脱。以出血，面色苍白，脉微或芤，血压显著降低为主要表现的脱病类疾病。

V002-N00428.label: 血脱病
V002-N00428.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜脱病

V002-N00428.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00428.label: 血脱

V002-N00428.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00428.label: 亡血
V002-N00428.definition: acute critical deficiency of blood, mostly due to massive hemorrhage, also called blood desertion

V002-N00429.label: 精脱
V002-N00429.path: 病机类｜脏腑病机｜五脏病机｜肾与膀胱病机
V002-N00429.definition: 肾精亏损，甚则脱失，官窍失养的病机变化。

V002-N00429.label: 精脱
V002-N00429.definition: 过劳伤精耗气，导致肾中精气亏损脱失，它窍失养的病理变化。

V002-N00429.label: 精脱
V002-N00429.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜精失调

V002-N00429.label: 精脱病
V002-N00429.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜脱病

V002-N00429.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00429.label: 精脱
V002-N00429.englishNames: essence prostrstion; essence collapse; depletion of essence

V002-N00429.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00429.label: 精脱
V002-N00429.definition: a pathological change characterized by depletion and loss of kidney essence that leads to impaired hearing

V002-N00416.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00416.label: 尸厥
V002-N00416.path: 第1部分：内科学｜急症｜厥证
V002-N00416.definition: 各种原因致脑神严重受损，以神志丧失，身体僵直，不能言动，二便失禁，其状若尸为特征的疾病。

V002-N00416.label: 尸厥
V002-N00416.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜脑系病证
V002-N00416.definition: 因各种原因致脑神严重受损。以神识丧失，身体僵直，不能言动，二便失禁，其状若尸为主要表现的厥、脱类疾病。

V002-N00416.label: 尸厥
V002-N00416.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病

V002-N00416.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00416.label: 尸厥
V002-N00416.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜情志情况｜晕厥

V002-N00416.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00416.label: 尸厥
V002-N00416.englishNames: corpse-like syncope; cadaverous syncope; Sudden syncope
V002-N00416.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00416.definition: A severe condition characterized by loss of consciousness, impaired ability to speak, faint breathing, body rigor, and bowel and bladder incontinence. Contributing factors may include medical conditions, poisoning or traumatic injuries. These factors may cause separation between yin and yang and damage to the Yuan-primordial qi.

V002-N00413.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00413.label: 薄厥
V002-N00413.path: 第1部分：内科学｜急症｜厥证
V002-N00413.definition: 因暴怒等精神刺激致血随气上逆，以突然发生的眩晕、头痛,烦躁不安，偏身麻木，甚则神志不清，汗出，息促等为特征的厥证。

V002-N00413.label: 中风
V002-N00413.aliases: Wind stroke disorders； 薄厥； 大厥； 痱风； 偏枯； 仆击； 真中风
V002-N00413.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证
V002-N00413.definition: 是由于气血逆乱，产生风、火、痰、瘀，导致脑脉痹阻或血溢脑脉之外。临床以突然昏仆、半身不遂、口舌歪斜、言语蹇涩或不语、偏身麻木为主症。依据脑髓神机受损程度的不同，有中经络、中脏腑之分，临床表现为不同证候。

V002-N00413.label: 薄厥
V002-N00413.englishNames: flopping syncope; emotional syncope; sudden syncope
V002-N00413.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病

V002-N00413.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00413.label: 薄厥
V002-N00413.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜情志情况｜晕厥

V002-N00413.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00413.label: 薄厥
V002-N00413.englishNames: flopping syncope; emotional syncope; sudden syncope; Flopping syncope
V002-N00413.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00413.definition: Characterized by sudden fainting, intense headache, high blood pressure, restlessness, a red face, numbness on one side of the body, and tremor of the limbs. In severe cases, vomiting of blood, mental cloudiness, sweating and rapid breathing may be present. Often occurs when emotions like sudden rage cause hyperactivity of liver yang and disordered qi and blood.

V002-N00413.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00413.label: 薄厥

V002-N00435.label: 痰饮类病
V002-N00435.englishNames: category of phlegm fluid retention disease
V002-N00435.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语

V002-N00435.label: 痰饮
V002-N00435.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜痰饮类病

V002-N00435.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00435.label: 痰饮
V002-N00435.englishNames: phlegm fluid retention; phlegm-fluid retention; Phlegm-fluid retention
V002-N00435.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00435.definition: Characterized by obesity with recent weight loss and a decreased appetite, bowel sounds, and loose stools. Associated symptoms may include palpitations, shortness of breath and vomiting of foamy saliva. Often results from fluid retention in the stomach and intestines.

V002-N00435.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00435.label: 痰饮类病
V002-N00435.englishNames: category of phlegm fluid retention disease; Phlegm-fluid disorders; phlegm fluid diseases
V002-N00435.pinyinNames: tan yin lei bing; tán yǐn lèi bìng
V002-N00435.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00435.definition: Water retention in certain body parts due to dysfunction of the lung, spleen and kidney.

V002-N00436.label: 痰饮
V002-N00436.definition: 脏腑气化失司，水液代谢障碍所形成的病理产物。属继发性致病因素。

V002-N00436.label: 痰饮
V002-N00436.definition: 痰与饮的合称，脏腑病变过程中渗出并积存于体内的清理产物，可阻碍气血运行而成为继发的致病因素。

V002-N00436.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00436.label: 痰饮
V002-N00436.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医病因和病机｜中医病因
V002-N00436.definition: 机体水液代谢障碍所形成的病理产物，这种病理产物形成之后，作为一种致病因素作用于机体，阻滞经络，阻碍气血，影响脏腑，从而引起各种复杂的病理变化，导致各种新的病证出现。

V002-N00436.label: 痰饮
V002-N00436.path: 病因病机｜病因｜病理产物
V002-N00436.definition: 指机体水液代谢障碍所形成的质地黏稠的病理产物。属继发性致病因素。

V002-N00436.label: 痰饮
V002-N00436.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证
V002-N00436.definition: 多因素体脾虚，运化无力，复加饮食失节，或因感受湿邪，致脾阳受损，水湿失运，停于胃肠引起。主要表现是心下满闷，呕吐清水痰涎，胃肠沥沥有声。

V002-N00436.label: 痰饮
V002-N00436.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜痰饮类病

V002-N00436.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00436.label: 痰饮
V002-N00436.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜伴随产物

V002-N00436.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00436.label: 痰饮
V002-N00436.englishNames: phlegm fluid retention; phlegm-fluid retention; Phlegm-fluid retention
V002-N00436.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00436.definition: Characterized by obesity with recent weight loss and a decreased appetite, bowel sounds, and loose stools. Associated symptoms may include palpitations, shortness of breath and vomiting of foamy saliva. Often results from fluid retention in the stomach and intestines.

V002-N00436.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00436.label: 痰饮

V002-N00436.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00436.label: 痰饮
V002-N00436.definition: a combination of phlegm and retained fluid as an entity to cause disease, also called phlegm-fluid retention

V002-N00439.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00439.label: 悬饮
V002-N00439.definition: 饮邪停留于胁肋部，以胸胁饱满、胀闷，咳唾引痛为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00439.label: 悬饮
V002-N00439.definition: 饮邪停留于胁胁部引起的，以胸胁饱满、胀 闷，咳唾引痛为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00439.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00439.label: 悬饮
V002-N00439.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医病因和病机｜中医病因｜痰饮｜饮证
V002-N00439.definition: 因肺、胸部的痨、癌等病变，以及某些全身性疾病，导致饮邪停积胸腔，阻碍气机升降。以胸胁饱满、胀闷，咳唾引痛等为主要表现的胸部痰饮类疾病。

V002-N00439.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证

V002-N00439.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00439.definition: Characterized by fullness, distension and tightness in the chest or subcostal region and cough-induced pain. Often occurs when fluid retention in the chest cavity (due to lung tuberculosis/cancer or other systemic conditions) obstructs the flow of qi.

V002-N00437.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00437.label: 支饮
V002-N00437.path: 第1部分：内科学｜气血津液病｜饮证
V002-N00437.definition: 以咳喘胸满不得卧，痰清稀，白沫量多，面浮肢肿，平素伏而不作,每遇寒即发，身有寒热，背痛，身痛，舌淡体胖有齿痕，苔白滑或白腻，脉紧为特征的饮证。

V002-N00437.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00437.label: 支饮
V002-N00437.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医病因和病机｜中医病因｜痰饮｜饮证
V002-N00437.definition: 因感染痨虫，或感受温热、湿热等邪，郁而不解，入侵心包之络，或因肾衰水毒上泛，损伤心包，以胸痛，气喘，心包腔积液等为主要表现的痰饮类疾病。

V002-N00437.label: 支饮
V002-N00437.englishNames: Fluid-retention in the chest and hypochondrium
V002-N00437.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证
V002-N00437.definition: 因感染痨虫，或感受温热、湿热等邪，郁而不解，入侵心包之络，或因肾衰水毒上泛，损伤心包。以胸痛，气喘，心包腔积液等为主要表现的痰饮类疾病。

V002-N00437.label: 支饮
V002-N00437.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜痰饮类病

V002-N00437.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00437.label: 支饮
V002-N00437.englishNames: thoracic fluid retention; Thoracic fluid retention
V002-N00437.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00437.definition: Characterized by coughing, panting, chest fullness with an inability to lie flat, shortness of breath and foamy sputum. Associated symptoms may include fever, chills, a cold sensation in the back, back pain, facial puffiness, and leg oedema. Often occurs when retained thoracic fluid affects the lung. In addition, it is commonly triggered by external wind cold or eating cold/cool food.

V002-N00437.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00437.label: 支饮

V002-N00438.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00438.label: 溢饮
V002-N00438.path: 第1部分：内科学｜气血津液病｜饮证
V002-N00438.definition: 以头面、下肢或全身浮肿，畏冷，乏力等为特征的饮证。

V002-N00438.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00438.label: 溢饮
V002-N00438.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医病因和病机｜中医病因｜痰饮｜饮证
V002-N00438.definition: 因肺、胸部的痨、癌等病变，以及某些全身性疾病，导致饮邪停积胸腔，阻碍气机升降。以胸胁饱满、胀闷，咳唾引痛等为主要表现的胸部痰饮类疾病。

V002-N00438.label: 溢饮
V002-N00438.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证
V002-N00438.definition: 因饮食不节，或情志失调，年高体弱，阳气素虚等，使脾失健运，肾失开合，气机阻滞，水湿内停。以头面、下肢或全身浮肿，畏冷，乏力等为主要表现的水肿类疾病。

V002-N00438.label: 溢饮
V002-N00438.englishNames: anasarcous fluid retention; subcutaneous fluid retention
V002-N00438.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜痰饮类病

V002-N00438.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00438.label: 溢饮
V002-N00438.englishNames: anasarcous fluid retention; subcutaneous fluid retention; Subcutaneous fluid retention
V002-N00438.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00438.definition: Characterized by facial puffiness and leg or generalized pitting oedema, and body heaviness. Associated symptoms may include cold intolerance, panting, coughing and a dry mouth with no desire to drink water. Often occurs when water retention (due to spleen deficiency) flows over the surface of the body or when exogenous wind cold blocks the flow of lung qi.

V002-N00438.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00438.label: 溢饮

V002-N00452.definition: 以多饮、多食、多尿、乏力、消瘦或尿有甜味为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00452.label: 消渴
V002-N00452.path: 内科疾病｜气血津液疾病
V002-N00452.definition: 以多饮、多食、多尿为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00452.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表

V002-N00452.aliases: 肺消； 膈消； 消瘅； 消中
V002-N00452.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证

V002-N00452.label: 消渴

V002-N00452.definition: 指口渴大量饮水而渴不解。

V002-N00452.path: 传统医学疾病｜气血津液病

V002-N00452.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00452.label: 消渴类病
V002-N00452.englishNames: category of wasting and thirst disease; Wasting and thirst disorders
V002-N00452.pinyinNames: xiao ke lei bing; xiāo kě lèi bìng
V002-N00452.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00452.definition: A group of disorders characterized by polydipsia, polyphagia and polyuria. Contributing factors include overeating of oily, sweet food, emotions, sexual indulgence, exposure to pathogenic warm heat or abuse of medicinal minerals. These factors may cause stomach heat, lung dryness, hyperactive heart fire to consume yin and disturb qi transformation.

V002-N00453.definition: Characterized by excessive thirst, excessive drinking, and clear urine with a sweet or fruit-like smell. Individuals often have normal bowel movements. Often occurs when lung heat consumes yin fluids.

V002-N00455.definition: Characterized by thirst, excessive drinking, profuse urination with turbid, oily and sweet smelling urine, a dark complexion, and weight loss. Often occurs when hyperactive heart fire consumes kidney yin or disturbs the qi transformation.

V002-N00456.definition: 消渴发展至严重阶段，脏气衰败，阴津亏竭，痰湿浊毒内蕴，虚火上扰，清窍被蒙，神明失主。在消渴症状基础上，出现以神识昏蒙为主要表现的脾病及脑的厥病类疾病。

V002-N00456.label: 消渴厥
V002-N00456.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜消渴病

V002-N00431.definition: 因禀赋不足，或后天损伤，气虚不能摄血，或阴虚火旺，迫血妄行所致。以容易出现持久难止的出血为主要表现的出血类疾病。

V002-N00431.label: 血溢类病
V002-N00431.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语

V002-N00431.pinyinNames: xue yi lei bing; xuè yì lèi bìng
V002-N00431.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00431.definition: A group of conditions caused by the failure of qi to hold blood within the vessels or hyperactive fire (due to yin deficiency) forces blood to move recklessly. They include haemoptysis, nosebleed, bloody stools or purpura.
