V002-N00434.label: 葡萄疫
V002-N00434.definition: 以遍体皮肤出现大小青紫斑点，色若葡萄等为特征的瘟疫。

V002-N00434.label: 紫斑
V002-N00434.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证｜血证
V002-N00434.definition: 血液溢出于肌肤之间，皮肤表现青紫斑点或斑块的病症，称为紫斑。亦有称为肌衄及葡萄疫者。

V002-N00434.label: 紫癜病
V002-N00434.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证｜血证
V002-N00434.definition: 因先天禀赋因素，或邪毒壅遏脉络，或因病久脾虚不摄等，使血溢脉外。以皮肤、粘膜出现紫暗色斑块及其他部位出血为主要表现的出血类疾病。

V002-N00434.label: 紫癜病
V002-N00434.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜血溢类病

V002-N00434.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00434.label: 葡萄疫
V002-N00434.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V002-N00434.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00434.label: 紫癜病
V002-N00434.pinyinNames: zi dian bing; zǐ diàn bìng
V002-N00434.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00434.definition: A condition characterized by red or purple discoloured (grape-shaped) spots on the skin or mucosa that do not blanch on applying pressure, especially on the leg. In severe cases, it may affect the zang–fu organs. Contributing factors may include congenital weakness, heat accumulating in the zang–fu organs, allergic reactions to food or medicine, blood heat damaging blood collaterals, or the spleen failing to control blood within the small vessels.

V002-N00434.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00434.label: 葡萄疫

V002-N00433.label: 便血
V002-N00433.aliases: 便血暗红； 便血鲜红； 肠风； 大便带血； 大便下血； 后血； 圊血； 下血； 脏毒
V002-N00433.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜出血
V002-N00433.definition: 消化道出血，经肛门排出，包括单纯便血、先便后血、先血后便、便血杂下，或便中挟血。

V002-N00433.label: 肠风
V002-N00433.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜血溢类病

V002-N00433.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00433.label: 便血
V002-N00433.aliases: 肠风； 后血； 下血； 泻血； 血箭； 大便下血
V002-N00433.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N00433.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00433.label: 肠风
V002-N00433.englishNames: bloody stools; blood stool; Intestinal wind (bloody stools)
V002-N00433.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00433.definition: Characterized by fresh blood in stools. Individuals may also have haemorrhoids. Contributing factors may include retained wind cold or toxic heat in the large intestine, damp heat accumulating in the stomach and intestines or qi failing to keep blood within the vessels.

V002-N00433.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00433.label: 肠风

V002-N00432.label: 青腿牙疳
V002-N00432.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证｜血证
V002-N00432.definition: 因火热上攻、寒湿蕴郁下肢所致。以牙龈瘠清出血，两腿青紫斑块为主要表现的出血类疾病。

V002-N00432.label: 青腿牙疳
V002-N00432.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜血溢类病

V002-N00447.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00447.label: 汗证
V002-N00447.path: 第1部分：内科学｜气血津液病
V002-N00447.definition: 以全身或局部非正常出汗为主要表现的疾病的统称。

V002-N00447.label: 汗类病
V002-N00447.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语

V002-N00447.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00447.label: 汗类病
V002-N00447.englishNames: category of sweating disease; Sweating disorders; sweating diseases
V002-N00447.pinyinNames: han lei bing; hàn lèi bìng
V002-N00447.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00447.definition: A group of conditions caused by disharmony between the Ying nutrients and Wei-defence upon invasion by exogenous pathogenic wind, cold, and summer heat and dampness. Alternatively, they may also result from insecurity of the skin pores due to deficiency of the zang–-fu organs. These include spontaneous sweating, night sweats, yellow sweating and bloody sweating.

V002-N00450.label: 黄汗
V002-N00450.path: 内科疾病｜气血津液疾病
V002-N00450.definition: 以汗出色黄染衣为主要表现的汗证。

V002-N00450.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00450.label: 黄汗
V002-N00450.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜汗证
V002-N00450.definition: 因营卫不畅或外感湿热之邪所致。以汗出色黄染衣为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00450.label: 黄汗
V002-N00450.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜汗出异常
V002-N00450.definition: 汗液发黄，甚则染衣的表现。

V002-N00450.label: 黄汗
V002-N00450.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜汗类病

V002-N00450.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00450.label: 黄汗
V002-N00450.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜排出物情况｜汗

V002-N00450.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00450.label: 黄汗
V002-N00450.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N00450.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00450.label: 黄汗
V002-N00450.englishNames: yellowish sweating; yellow sweat; Yellow sweating
V002-N00450.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00450.definition: Characterized by yellow-coloured sweating that contaminates cloth. It is often caused by disharmony between the Ying nutrients and Wei-defence or external contraction of damp heat.

V002-N00450.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00450.label: 黄汗

V002-N00448.label: 自汗病
V002-N00448.path: 内科疾病｜气血津液疾病
V002-N00448.definition: 以自汗为主要表现的汗证。

V002-N00448.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00448.label: 自汗
V002-N00448.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜汗证
V002-N00448.definition: 不因劳累、炎热、衣着过暧、服用发汗药等因素而时时汗出、动辄益甚的汗出异常症状。营卫不和、表虚不固、正气外越等为自汗的常见原因。引起自汗的常见疾病有虚劳类、脱病类疾病，中暑、瘿气等。

V002-N00448.label: 自汗
V002-N00448.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证｜汗证
V002-N00448.definition: 不因外界环境的影响，而白昼时时汗出，动辄益甚者，称为自汗。

V002-N00448.label: 自汗
V002-N00448.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜汗出异常
V002-N00448.definition: 不因劳累活动，不因天热及穿衣过暖和服用发散药物等因素而自然汗出的表现。

V002-N00448.label: 自汗
V002-N00448.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜汗类病

V002-N00448.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00448.label: 自汗
V002-N00448.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜排出物情况｜汗

V002-N00448.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00448.label: 自汗
V002-N00448.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N00448.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00448.label: 自汗
V002-N00448.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00448.definition: Characterized by persistent, spontaneous day sweating that is not attributed to physical exertion, hot weather, wearing too many clothes or taking diaphoretics. It is mostly commonly caused by disharmony between the Ying nutrients and Wei-defence or qi failing to secure the yin fluids.

V002-N00448.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00448.label: 自汗

V002-N00448.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00448.label: 自汗
V002-N00448.definition: excessive sweating during the daytime with no apparent cause such as physical exertion, hot weather, thick clothing or medication

V002-N00451.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00451.label: 肌衄
V002-N00451.aliases: 汗血； 瘀斑； 紫斑； 紫癜
V002-N00451.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医儿科疾病｜血证
V002-N00451.definition: 血液瘀积于肌肤之间，皮肤表现青紫斑点或斑块的病证，也称紫斑。

V002-N00451.label: 汗血
V002-N00451.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜汗出异常
V002-N00451.definition: 属于问汗所见。是指汗出色淡红如血而言。

V002-N00451.label: 血汗
V002-N00451.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜汗类病

V002-N00451.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00451.label: 汗血
V002-N00451.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜排出物情况｜汗

V002-N00451.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00451.label: 便血
V002-N00451.aliases: 肠风； 后血； 下血； 泻血； 血箭； 大便下血
V002-N00451.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N00451.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00451.label: 汗血
V002-N00451.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N00451.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00451.label: 血汗
V002-N00451.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00451.definition: Characterized by red coloured sweats, along with symptoms due to fire-heat or deficiency of qi and blood. Contributing factors may include exogenous fire heat affecting the surface of the body, fire hyperactivity of the heart, liver and stomach, or deficiency of qi and blood.

V002-N00449.label: 盗汗病
V002-N00449.path: 内科疾病｜气血津液疾病
V002-N00449.definition: 以盗汗为主要表现的汗证。

V002-N00449.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00449.label: 盗汗
V002-N00449.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜汗证
V002-N00449.definition: 睡时汗出、醒后汗止的汗出异常症状。常因阴血不足，湿阻气机等所致。痨病、佝偻病和外感温热病恢复期多有盗汗。

V002-N00449.label: 盗汗
V002-N00449.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证｜汗证
V002-N00449.definition: 寐中汗出，醒来自止者，称为盗汗，亦称为寝汗。

V002-N00449.label: 盗汗
V002-N00449.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜汗出异常
V002-N00449.definition: 入睡后出汗，醒来即止的表现。

V002-N00449.label: 盗汗
V002-N00449.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜汗类病

V002-N00449.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00449.label: 盗汗
V002-N00449.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜排出物情况｜汗

V002-N00449.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00449.label: 盗汗
V002-N00449.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N00449.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00449.label: 盗汗
V002-N00449.englishNames: Night sweats; night sweating; night sweats
V002-N00449.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00449.definition: Characterized by episodes of sweating during sleep that stop after waking up and are not related to external environmental factors. Most commonly caused by internal heat due to yin deficiency or damp heat opening the skin pores.

V002-N00449.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00449.label: 盗汗

V002-N00449.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00449.label: 盗汗
V002-N00449.definition: sweating during sleep that ceases on awakening

V002-N00430.label: 蓄血病
V002-N00430.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语

V002-N00410.label: 晕动病
V002-N00410.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜脑系病证
V002-N00410.definition: 多由情志不畅，饮食饥饱失常，或禀赋气机不调，加之乘坐舟车运动，导致气血逆乱，痰浊上犯。以乘坐舟车时感疲乏眩晕、恶心呕吐为主要表现的眩晕类疾病。

V002-N00410.label: 晕动病
V002-N00410.pinyinNames: yun dong bing; yun er bing
V002-N00410.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语

V002-N00410.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00410.label: 晕动病
V002-N00410.aliases: 注车； 注船； Car sickness； Seasickness
V002-N00410.pinyinNames: yun dong bing; yūn dòng bìng; yun er bing
V002-N00410.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00410.definition: Characterized by a pale face, dizziness, nausea and vomiting. The symptoms slowly decrease and then disappear once the motion has stopped. Contributing factors may include emotions, hunger/binge eating or disagreement between visually perceived movement and the vestibular system’s sense of movement. These factors may cause disordered qi and blood, allowing phlegm turbidity to ascend and disturb the mind.

V002-N00444.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00444.label: 皮水
V002-N00444.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肾膀胱病｜水肿［病］
V002-N00444.definition: 水气泛溢皮肤，以全身浮肿，尿少，腹胀为主要表现的水肿病。

V002-N00444.label: 皮水
V002-N00444.definition: 以新起浮肿，尿少，蛋白尿，血压高为主要表 现的水肿病。

V002-N00444.label: 皮水
V002-N00444.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证｜水肿
V002-N00444.definition: 因风寒湿热毒邪侵袭，使肺失宣降，水道不利，水液潴留，以新起浮肿，尿少，蛋白尿，血压高为主要表现的水肿类疾病。

V002-N00444.label: 皮水
V002-N00444.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜水肿类病

V002-N00444.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00444.label: 皮水
V002-N00444.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00444.definition: Characterized by generalized pitting oedema. In severe cases, bulging abdomen may be present. Associated signs and symptoms may include limb swelling or pain, chest tightness, a poor appetite, no aversion to wind, a white, greasy coating and a superficial pulse. Often occurs when turbid dampness obstructs the flow of spleen qi and causes water dampness to flow over the surface of the body.

V002-N00444.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00444.label: 皮水

V002-N00443.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00443.label: 风水
V002-N00443.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肾膀胱病｜水肿［病］
V002-N00443.definition: 风邪外袭，以突发头面部及四肢水肿为主要表现的水肿病。

V002-N00443.label: 风水
V002-N00443.definition: 以突发局限性水肿为主要表现的水肿病。

V002-N00443.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00443.label: 风水
V002-N00443.aliases: 风水相搏； 风袭水泛； 风袭水停
V002-N00443.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜病因证候｜外感病证｜六淫证候｜风淫证候
V002-N00443.definition: 外感风邪，肺卫失宣，水湿浸淫肌肤，以突起眼睑、头面、四肢水肿，或起风团肿块，微恶风寒，小便短少，脉浮等为常见症的证候。

V002-N00443.label: 风水
V002-N00443.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证｜水肿
V002-N00443.definition: 风邪外袭，以突发头面部及四肢水肿为主要表现的水肿病。

V002-N00443.label: 风水
V002-N00443.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜水肿类病

V002-N00443.label: 风水
V002-N00443.path: 传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾系病类｜水肿

V002-N00443.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00443.label: 风水
V002-N00443.englishNames: wind edema; Wind edema disorder; Wind oedema
V002-N00443.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00443.definition: Characterized by a sudden fever, aversion to wind, sore, swollen throat, joint pain, and swelling of the face and eyelid. Over time, individuals may experience generalized oedema. Associated signs and symptoms may include shortness of breath, scanty urine, proteinuria and elevated blood pressure. If often occurs when pathogenic wind affects the lung’s functions in dispersing and descending qi and regulating water passage.

V002-N00443.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00443.label: 风水

V002-N00446.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00446.label: 正水
V002-N00446.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肾膀胱病｜水肿［病］
V002-N00446.definition: 以全身浮肿，尿少，腹满而喘等呈进行性发展为主要表现的水肿病。

V002-N00446.label: 正水
V002-N00446.definition: 以浮肿，尿少，血压高等呈进行性发展为主 要表现的水肿病。

V002-N00446.label: 正水
V002-N00446.englishNames: regular edema; typical anasarca; typical edema
V002-N00446.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜水肿类病

V002-N00446.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00446.label: 正水
V002-N00446.englishNames: regular edema; Generalized oedema; typical anasarca; typical edema
V002-N00446.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00446.definition: Characterized by progressive oedema of the whole body, scanty urine or urine retention, abdominal fullness and panting. Often occurs when retained water (due to yang deficiency of the spleen and kidney) affects the lung.

V002-N00445.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00445.label: 石水
V002-N00445.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肾膀胱病｜水肿［病］
V002-N00445.definition: 以反复发作的腹部胀痛而硬，全身水肿为主要表现的水肿病。

V002-N00445.label: 石水
V002-N00445.definition: 以反复发作的浮肿，蛋白尿，血压高，面白为 主要表现的水肿病。

V002-N00445.label: 石水
V002-N00445.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证｜水肿
V002-N00445.definition: 因皮水等迁延日久，正气渐虚所致。以反复发作的浮肿，蛋白尿，血压高，面白为主要表现的水种类疾病

V002-N00445.label: 石水
V002-N00445.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜水肿类病

V002-N00445.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00445.label: 石水
V002-N00445.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00445.definition: Characterized by recurrent oedema, hardness of the lower abdomen, distending pain in the subcostal region, abdominal fullness, absence of panting, a bright pale complexion and a deep pulse. Individuals may also have persistent proteinuria and hypertension. Often occurs when exogenous pathogenic factors trigger the retained water dampness in the lower jiao (due to chronic wind oedema and skin oedema).

V002-N00445.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00445.label: 石水

V002-N00441.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00441.label: 阳水
V002-N00441.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肾膀胱病｜水肿［病］
V002-N00441.definition: 外邪侵袭,滕理闭塞,或气机不畅而致水液泛滥,以面部先肿,肿势明显,按之凹陷即起,病体不虚为主要表现的水肿病。

V002-N00441.label: 阳水
V002-N00441.definition: 以面部先肿，肿势明显，按之凹陷即起，病体 不虚为主要表现的水肿病。

V002-N00441.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00441.label: 阳水
V002-N00441.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜气血津液证候｜津液病｜津液内停｜水证｜水肿
V002-N00441.definition: 头面先肿，继及全身，腰以上肿甚，多属外感风邪，肺失宣降，风水相搏所致。

V002-N00441.label: 阳水
V002-N00441.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证｜水肿
V002-N00441.definition: 风邪袭表，肺气闭塞，通调失职，风遏水阻，以眼睑浮肿，继则全身及四肢皆肿，来势迅速，多有恶寒，发热，肢节酸楚，小便不利等症为主的疾病。

V002-N00441.label: 阳水
V002-N00441.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜水肿类病

V002-N00441.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00441.label: 阳水
V002-N00441.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00441.definition: Characterized by an acute onset of pitting swelling of the face and eyelid. Associated symptoms may include fever and aversion to wind, with no body weakness. Often occurs when exogenous pathogenic factors block the skin pores, obstruct the flow of qi and result in water dampness.

V002-N00441.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00441.label: 阳水

V002-N00442.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00442.label: 阴水
V002-N00442.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肾膀胱病｜水肿［病］
V002-N00442.definition: 五脏虚衰，气化失司而致水液停蓄所致，以面浮足肿，或下肢先肿，肿势难消，按之凹陷不易恢复为主要表现的水肿病。

V002-N00442.label: 阴水
V002-N00442.definition: 以面浮足肿，或下肢先肿，肿势难消，按之凹 陷不易恢复为主要表现的水肿病。

V002-N00442.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00442.label: 阴水
V002-N00442.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜气血津液证候｜津液病｜津液内停｜水证｜水肿
V002-N00442.definition: 足跗或下肢先肿，继及全身，腰以下肿甚，多由阳气虚衰，蒸化无力，以致水湿内停，外渗肌肤而成。

V002-N00442.label: 阴水
V002-N00442.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证｜水肿
V002-N00442.definition: 脾阳不振，运化无权，土不制水，以身肿日久，腰以下为甚，按之凹陷不易恢复，脘腹胀闷，纳减便溏，面色不华，神疲乏力，四肢倦怠，小便短少，舌质淡，苔白腻或白滑，脉沉缓或沉弱为主症的疾病。

V002-N00442.label: 阴水
V002-N00442.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜水肿类病

V002-N00442.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00442.label: 阴水
V002-N00442.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00442.definition: Characterized by a gradual onset of facial puffiness, and pitting foot or leg swelling. Often occurs when water dampness (due to deficiency of the five zang organs) flow over the surface of the body.

V002-N00442.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00442.label: 阴水

V002-N01195.label: 咽喉病类术语
V002-N01195.pinyinNames: yan hou bing lei shu yu

V002-N01196.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01196.label: 乳蛾
V002-N01196.path: 第9部分：耳鼻喉科学｜咽喉病
V002-N01196.definition: 以咽痛或咽异物感不适，喉核红肿，形如蚕蛾，表面或有黄白色脓点为主要表现的咽喉病。

V002-N01196.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V002-N01196.label: 乳蛾
V002-N01196.path: 中医耳鼻喉科学｜咽喉病
V002-N01196.definition: 以咽痛或咽异物感不适，喉核红肿，形如蚕蛾，表面或有黄白色脓点为主要表现的咽喉病。相当于扁桃体炎。

V002-N01196.label: 乳蛾
V002-N01196.definition: 以发热，咽痛，喉核红肿胀大，形如蚕蛾，或 表面呈黄白色脓血，或喉核肿大、质硬、暗红 等为主要表现的喉核疾病。发于一侧者为 单乳蛾，发于两侧者为双乳蛾。

V002-N01196.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01196.label: 乳蛾
V002-N01196.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医五官科疾病｜中医耳鼻咽喉科疾病｜中医咽喉疾病
V002-N01196.definition: 因邪客喉核（腭扁桃体），或脏腑虚损，虚火上炎，气血瘀滞所致。以发热、咽痛、喉核红肿胀大、形如乳头或蚕蛾，或表面有黄白色脓点，或喉核肥大、质硬、暗红等为主要表现的咽喉疾病。

V002-N01196.label: 乳蛾
V002-N01196.aliases: Tonsillitis disorder； 扁桃体炎； 单乳蛾； 风热乳蛾； 喉蛾； 活乳蛾； 烂乳蛾； 烂头乳蛾； 连珠乳蛾； 乳鹅； 乳蛾核； 双乳蛾； 死乳蛾； 阳蛾； 阴蛾
V002-N01196.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医咽喉疾病
V002-N01196.definition: 邪毒积聚喉核或脏腑虚损、喉核失养所致的以咽痛或咽部不适感，喉核红肿，表面或有黄白脓点为主要特征的咽部疾病。

V002-N01196.label: 乳蛾
V002-N01196.englishNames: nippled moth; tonsillitis; Nippled Moth; Tonsillitis disorder
V002-N01196.path: 中医疾病｜咽喉病类术语

V002-N01196.label: 乳蛾
V002-N01196.englishNames: nippled moth; tonsillitis; Nippled Moth; Tonsillitis disorder
V002-N01196.path: 传统医学疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜眼、耳、鼻和喉系统病类

V002-N01196.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N01196.label: 乳蛾
V002-N01196.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜五官科类

V002-N01196.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01196.label: 乳蛾
V002-N01196.englishNames: tonsillitis; nippled moth; Nippled Moth; Tonsillitis; Tonsillitis disorder
V002-N01196.pinyinNames: ru dong; ru e; rǔ é
V002-N01196.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01196.definition: Characterized by fever, sore throat, and enlargement of the tonsils that resembles a nipple or silkworm moth. Individuals may also present with white pus-filled spots on the surface of the tonsil or swollen, hard and dark red tonsil. Often results from exogenous pathogens affecting the tonsil, ascending of deficiency fire, or stagnation of qi and blood.

V002-N01196.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01196.label: 乳蛾
V002-N01196.path: 眼、耳鼻喉科病｜耳鼻喉科病

V002-N01196.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01196.label: 乳蛾
V002-N01196.path: 临床各科｜耳鼻喉口齿科
V002-N01196.definition: inflammation of the palatine tonsils, sometimes covered with a yellowish white secretion like milk

V002-N01197.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01197.label: 急乳蛾
V002-N01197.path: 第9部分：耳鼻喉科学｜咽喉病｜乳蛾
V002-N01197.definition: 以发病急骤为特征的乳蛾。

V002-N01197.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V002-N01197.label: 急乳蛾
V002-N01197.path: 中医耳鼻喉科学｜咽喉病
V002-N01197.definition: 以发病急骤为特点的乳蛾。

V002-N01197.label: 急乳蛾
V002-N01197.definition: 以发病急骤为特点的乳蛾病。

V002-N01197.label: 急乳蛾
V002-N01197.pinyinNames: ji ru dong; ji ru e
V002-N01197.path: 中医疾病｜咽喉病类术语｜乳蛾

V002-N01197.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01197.label: 急乳蛾
V002-N01197.englishNames: Acute tonsillitis; acute nippled moth; acute tonsillitis; acute tonsilitis
V002-N01197.pinyinNames: jí rǔ é; ji ru dong; ji ru e
V002-N01197.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01197.definition: Characterized by fever and red, swollen and painful tonsil that resembles silkworm moth. It is often caused by wind heat affecting the tonsil.

V002-N01198.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01198.label: 慢乳蛾
V002-N01198.path: 第9部分：耳鼻喉科学｜咽喉病｜乳蛾
V002-N01198.definition: 以慢性反复发作为特征的乳蛾。

V002-N01198.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V002-N01198.label: 慢乳蛾
V002-N01198.path: 中医耳鼻喉科学｜咽喉病

V002-N01198.label: 慢乳蛾
V002-N01198.definition: 以慢性反复发作为特点的乳蛾病。

V002-N01198.label: 慢乳蛾
V002-N01198.pinyinNames: man ru e; man ru dong
V002-N01198.path: 中医疾病｜咽喉病类术语｜乳蛾

V002-N01198.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01198.label: 慢乳蛾
V002-N01198.englishNames: Chronic tonsillitis; chronic tonsillitis; chronic tonsilitis; chronic nippled moth
V002-N01198.pinyinNames: màn rǔ é; man ru e; man ru dong
V002-N01198.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01198.definition: Characterized by frequent discharge of pus from the tonsil with mild redness, swelling and throat discomfort. It is often caused by dysfunctions of the zang–fu organs and ascending of deficiency fire due to persistent tonsillitis.

V002-N01214.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01214.label: 梅核气
V002-N01214.path: 第9部分：耳鼻喉科学｜咽喉病
V002-N01214.definition: 以咽喉异物感如梅核梗阻，咽之不下，咯之不出为主要表现的咽喉病。

V002-N01214.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V002-N01214.label: 梅核气
V002-N01214.path: 中医耳鼻喉科学｜咽喉病
V002-N01214.definition: 以咽喉异物感如梅核梗阻，咽之不下，咯之不出为主要表现的咽喉病。

V002-N01214.label: 梅核气
V002-N01214.definition: 以咽喉异物感如梅核梗阻，咽之不下，咯之 不出，时发时止为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01214.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01214.label: 梅核气
V002-N01214.path: TF[中医精神疾病和心理学]｜中医精神疾病
V002-N01214.definition: 因情志不遂，肝气郁滞，痰气互结，停聚于咽所致，以咽中似有梅核阻塞、咯之不出、咽之不下为主要表现的郁病类疾病。

V002-N01214.label: 梅核气
V002-N01214.aliases: 回食丹； 梅核； 梅核风； 咽部神经官能症； 癔球症
V002-N01214.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医咽喉疾病
V002-N01214.definition: 痰气互结于咽喉所致的以咽部异物感，如梅核梗阻，咯之不出，咽之不下为主要特征的疾病。

V002-N01214.label: 咽喉有异物感
V002-N01214.aliases: 喉梗； 喉中有物梗阻； 觉喉中有物梗阻； 梅核气； 咽部堵塞感； 咽部紧缩感； 咽喉异物感； 咽异物感； 咽中有物梗阻； 咽中有异物感
V002-N01214.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜五官症状｜咽喉症状
V002-N01214.definition: 指喉咙部似有异物梗阻，咯之不出，咽之不下的症状。

V002-N01214.englishNames: plum-stone qi(globus hystericus); Globus Hystericus; globus hystericus; plum-stone qi; plum-pit qi; Plum pit qi
V002-N01214.pinyinNames: mei he qi; méi hé qì
V002-N01214.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01214.definition: A sensation of a foreign body trapped in the throat that can neither be swallowed nor expectorated. Often occurs when phlegm and qi stagnate in the throat due to emotional disturbance.

V002-N01214.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V002-N01216.definition: 各种骨类或其他异物于咽喉或食管等部位引起的以咽喉刺痛、吞咽不利等为主要表现的咽喉病。

V002-N01216.label: 骨鲠

V002-N01199.definition: 以喉核肥大，妨碍吞咽或呼吸为主要表现的咽喉病。

V002-N01199.label: 石蛾
V002-N01199.definition: 以喉核肥大，质地较硬，不红不肿，甚则堵塞 咽喉，妨碍吞咽和言语为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01199.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01199.definition: Characterized by a hard enlarged tonsil. It is often seen in children and caused by stagnant qi and blood due to weakness of the zang–fu organs.

V002-N01213.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01213.label: 喉咳
V002-N01213.path: 第9部分：耳鼻喉科学｜咽喉病
V002-N01213.definition: 以阵发性咽喉干痒，咳嗽无痰，或少痰或咽异物感为主要表现的咽喉病。

V002-N01213.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V002-N01213.label: 喉咳
V002-N01213.path: 中医耳鼻喉科学｜耳鼻喉科诊断
V002-N01213.definition: 咽喉疾病引起突然和反复发作的咽喉干痒、咳嗽的表现。

V002-N01213.label: 喉咳
V002-N01213.definition: 以咽喉长期干痒不适，引发咳嗽为主要表现 的疾病。

V002-N01213.label: 喉咳
V002-N01213.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医咽喉疾病
V002-N01213.definition: 因脏腑虚损、风邪外侵所致的以突然和反复发作的咽喉干痒、咳嗽痰少为主要特征的疾病。

V002-N01213.label: 喉咳
V002-N01213.path: 中医疾病｜咽喉病类术语

V002-N01213.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01213.label: 喉咳
V002-N01213.englishNames: laryngeal cough; throat coughing; throat cough; Laryngitis
V002-N01213.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01213.definition: Characterized by sudden or recurrent dry, scratchy throat, cough with scanty or no sputum, hoarse voice, and mild congestion and swelling of the throat. It is often caused by exposure to pathogenic factors, fume or odour stimuli, chronic cough, or malnourishment of the throat due to yin deficiency of the lung and kidney.

V002-N01203.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01203.label: 喉痈
V002-N01203.path: 第9部分：耳鼻喉科学｜咽喉病
V002-N01203.definition: 发生于咽喉及其邻近部位，以咽喉剧痛，吞咽困难，局部红肿高突为主要表现的疾病的统称。

V002-N01203.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V002-N01203.label: 喉痈
V002-N01203.path: 中医耳鼻喉科学｜咽喉病
V002-N01203.definition: 发生于咽喉及其邻近部位，以咽喉剧痛，吞咽困难，局部红肿高突为主要表现的痈肿的统称。

V002-N01203.label: 喉痈
V002-N01203.definition: 发生于咽喉及其周围，以咽喉疼痛逐渐加 剧，吞咽、语言困难，咽喉红肿病突为主要表 现的痈疮的统称。

V002-N01203.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医五官科疾病｜中医耳鼻咽喉科疾病｜中医咽喉疾病
V002-N01203.definition: 因脏腑蕴热，复感外邪，热毒客于咽喉，腐血败肉，酿成痈脓。以咽喉局部红肿、疼痛剧烈、吞咽困难、高热等为主要表现的痈病类疾病。据其发生部位而有不同的病名。

V002-N01203.definition: 因内外热毒搏结咽喉所致的咽喉及其邻近部位的痈肿，以咽喉红肿疼痛、吞咽困难为主要特征。

V002-N01203.label: 喉痈
V002-N01203.path: 中医疾病｜咽喉病类术语

V002-N01203.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01203.label: 喉痈
V002-N01203.englishNames: throat abscess; Peritonsillar abscess; Throat Abscess
V002-N01203.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01203.definition: Characterized by high fever, red, swollen throat with intense pain and difficulty swallowing. It is often caused by retention of toxic heat coupled with contraction of exogenous pathogens, causing slough and sepsis in the throat area.

V002-N01211.definition: Characterized by red, swollen and sore throat, followed by profuse sputum and difficulty swallowing and breathing. It is often caused by ascending of wind heat and phlegm fire to the throat.

V002-N00457.pinyinNames: tou shen xing ti bing lei shu yu

V002-N00458.label: 颅脑类病
V002-N00458.englishNames: Brain diseases; cranial diseases; category of cranial disease
V002-N00458.pinyinNames: lú nǎo lèi bìng; lu nao lei bing
V002-N00458.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00458.definition: Any disorders involving the head or brain due to invasion of exogenous pathogens, ascending of wind yang, ascending of qi and blood, wind phlegm disturbing the mind or stagnant blood obstructing the brain collaterals.

V002-N00476.label: 颅脑痈
V002-N00476.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜脑系病证
V002-N00476.definition: 邪毒随气血壅聚于颅内，蕴而化热，致血败肉腐成痈。以急起发热，头痛，呕吐，身体相应部位的感觉与运动障碍等为主要表现的内脏痈病类疾病。

V002-N00476.label: 颅脑痈
V002-N00476.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜颅脑类病

V002-N00475.label: 脑萎
V002-N00475.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜脑系病证
V002-N00475.definition: 因五脏亏虚，气血不足，使脑髓空虚所致。以进行性健忘，智能减退，人格障碍，痴呆，震颤等为主要表现的劳病类疾病。

V002-N00475.label: 脑萎
V002-N00475.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜颅脑类病

V002-N00475.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00475.label: 脑萎
V002-N00475.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00475.definition: Characterized by progressive forgetfulness, and decreased intelligence. Some individuals may present with personality disorder, dementia or tremor. Often results from deficiency of the five zang organs or age-related deficiency of qi and blood.

V002-N00459.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00459.label: 中风
V002-N00459.definition: 以突然半身不遂，语言謇涩或失语，口舌斜，偏身麻木，严重者突然昏仆为主要表现，并具有起病急，变化快，如风邪善行数变特点的疾病。

V002-N00459.label: 中风
V002-N00459.definition: 以突然昏扑，半身不遂，语言謇涩或失语，口 舌歪斜，偏身麻木为主要表现，并具有起病 急，变化快，如风邪善行数变的特点的疾病。

V002-N00459.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00459.label: 中风
V002-N00459.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肝胆病
V002-N00459.definition: 因气血逆乱、脑脉痹阻或血溢于脑所致。以昏仆、半身不遂、肢体麻木、舌蹇不语等为主要表现的脑神疾病。

V002-N00459.label: 中风
V002-N00459.aliases: Wind stroke disorders； 薄厥； 大厥； 痱风； 偏枯； 仆击； 真中风
V002-N00459.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证
V002-N00459.definition: 是由于气血逆乱，产生风、火、痰、瘀，导致脑脉痹阻或血溢脑脉之外。临床以突然昏仆、半身不遂、口舌歪斜、言语蹇涩或不语、偏身麻木为主症。依据脑髓神机受损程度的不同，有中经络、中脏腑之分，临床表现为不同证候。

V002-N00459.label: 中风病
V002-N00459.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜颅脑类病

V002-N00459.label: 中风
V002-N00459.path: 传统医学疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜脑系病类

V002-N00459.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00459.label: 中风病
V002-N00459.aliases: 中风； 卒中； Wind stroke disorders； Apoplexy
V002-N00459.pinyinNames: zhong feng bing; zhòng fēng bìng
V002-N00459.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00459.definition: Characterized by sudden fainting, hemiplegia or deviation of the eyes and mouth corner. Often results from wind phlegm attacking the meridians, disorder of qi and blood, or bleeding in the brain. It includes trismus, haemorrhagic stroke, ischemic stroke, facial palsy and hemiplegia.

V002-N00462.label: 急风病
V002-N00462.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜颅脑类病｜中风病

V002-N00462.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00462.label: 急风病
V002-N00462.englishNames: Acute wind stroke; acute wind disease
V002-N00462.pinyinNames: ji feng bing; jí fēng bìng
V002-N00462.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00462.definition: Characterized by sudden collapse, loss of unconsciousness, lockjaw, upward fixation of the eyes, neck rigidity, and phlegm sounds in the throat. In severe cases, opisthotonos, loss of consciousness and convulsions may be present.Often occurs when wind phlegm mists the mind or epidemic pathogenic qi directly attacks the zang–fu organs.

V002-N00460.label: 缺血性中风

V002-N00464.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00464.label: 中风后遗症
V002-N00464.definition: 中风后日久遗留的半身不遂、偏身麻木、噤口、言语不利、口舌蜗斜、风痱、风懿，或渐而痴呆,或神志失常，或抽搐发作等各种病证。

V002-N00464.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00464.label: 风痱
V002-N00464.path: 第1部分：内科学｜脑病｜中风后遗症
V002-N00464.definition: 以言语不清，发音难辨，思维迟钝，记忆力锐减，站立不稳,步态慌张，容易跌倒，手足颤动，口角流涎，甚则口不能言，足废不用等为特征的中风后遗症。

V002-N00464.label: 中风后遗症
V002-N00464.definition: 中风后遗存的以半身不遂，麻木不仁，口舌 歪斜，言语不利为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00464.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00464.label: 中风
V002-N00464.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肝胆病
V002-N00464.definition: 因气血逆乱、脑脉痹阻或血溢于脑所致。以昏仆、半身不遂、肢体麻木、舌蹇不语等为主要表现的脑神疾病。

V002-N00464.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表

V002-N00464.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肝胆病｜中风
V002-N00464.definition: 中风后出现的以半身不遂、麻木不仁、口舌歪斜、言语不利为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00464.label: 中风后遗症
V002-N00464.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证｜中风
V002-N00464.definition: 多为中风之后，风痰内扰，瘀阻经络，或气虚血瘀，或肾虚精亏所致。以中风后言语不利，口眼斜，半身不遂为主要表现的一类疾病。

V002-N00464.label: 风痱
V002-N00464.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜脑系病证
V002-N00464.definition: 多为中风之后，风痰内扰，瘀阻经络，或肾虚精亏所致。以中风后舌喑不能言，足废不能用为主要表现的痿病类疾病。

V002-N00464.label: 风痱
V002-N00464.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜颅脑类病｜中风病

V002-N00464.path: 传统医学疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜脑系病类

V002-N00464.label: 风痱
V002-N00464.aliases: 中风后遗症； 喑痱； Post-stroke disability
V002-N00464.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00464.definition: Characterized by post-stroke tongue stiffness and disuse muscle atrophy. Contributing factors may include wind phlegm disturbing the heart mind, stagnant blood obstructing the meridians, or deficiency of essence and marrow.

V002-N00463.label: 口僻
V002-N00463.definition: 以口眼歪斜于一侧，目不能闭，口角流涎为 主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00463.label: 面瘫
V002-N00463.englishNames: Bell; Faccial Palsy; Facial Hemiparalysis; Facial Paralysis
V002-N00463.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜脑系病证
V002-N00463.definition: 多由风邪入中面部，痰浊阻滞经络所致。以突发面部麻木，口眼斜为主要表现的痿病类疾病。

V002-N00463.label: 口眼斜
V002-N00463.aliases: Facial  Hemiparalysis； 吊线风； 风口侯； 口舌喎斜； 口眼歪斜； 口眼喎斜； 口； 戾； 面瘫； 僻； 歪咀风； 卒口僻； 僻
V002-N00463.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜五官症状｜口唇症状
V002-N00463.definition: 口眼向一侧歪斜，患侧眼睛闭合困难，口中或有口水流出的表现

V002-N00463.label: 口僻
V002-N00463.englishNames: Facial paralysis disorder; deviated mouth; wry mouth
V002-N00463.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜颅脑类病｜中风病

V002-N00463.label: 口眼斜
V002-N00463.aliases: 吊线风； 面瘫； 歪咀风； 口眼歪斜
V002-N00463.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N00463.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00463.label: 口僻
V002-N00463.englishNames: Facial paralysis disorder; deviated mouth; wry mouth; Deviation of the mouth corner
V002-N00463.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00463.definition: Characterized by a sudden facial numbness, deviation of the eyes and mouth corner and slurred speech. Often occurs when wind cold or wind heat affects the face or wind phlegm obstructs the meridians.

V002-N00463.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V002-N00463.definition: a diseased state characterized by skewing of the mouth to one side of the face with drooling from the corner of the mouth and inability to close the eye

V002-N00474.label: 头风
V002-N00474.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证｜头痛
V002-N00474.definition: 头痛病经久不愈，以头痛部位不定，作止无常，发作则持续不已，愈后遇触复发为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00474.label: 颤病
V002-N00474.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜脑系病证
V002-N00474.definition: 因染邪、中毒、电击等损伤脑神，或因痰浊、瘀血阻痹脑络，经气不行，或年老精血亏虚，脑失所养，虚风内动而成。以头部不自主细微摇动，口眼抽动，手足颤抖等为主要表现的风病类疾病。

V002-N00474.label: 颤病
V002-N00474.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜颅脑类病

V002-N00474.label: 头风
V002-N00474.englishNames: intermittent headache; head wind; Head wind disorder
V002-N00474.path: 传统医学疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜脑系病类｜头痛

V002-N00474.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00474.label: 颤病
V002-N00474.aliases: 脑风； 颤症； Parkinson’s disease
V002-N00474.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00474.definition: Characterized by tremor of hands and feet, involuntary shaking of the head or twitching of the mouth and eyes. Contributing factors may include medical conditions, poisoning, electrical shock, or age-related deficiency of essence and blood. It may also occur when phlegm or stagnant blood obstructs the brain collaterals or meridian qi.

V002-N00472.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00472.label: 脑络痹
V002-N00472.englishNames: brain collateral bi;brain collateral painful impediment
V002-N00472.definition: 以头痛，头晕，情志改变，或有肢体麻痹、震颤等为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00472.label: 脑络痹
V002-N00472.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜脑系病证
V002-N00472.definition: 因用脑过度，过食肥甘，房事不节，或年老肾虚，致精血亏少，经脉失柔，或痰浊瘀血阻滞，气血阻痹，脑失所养所致。以头痛，头晕，情志改变，或有肢体麻痹、震颤等为主要表现的内脏痹病类疾病。

V002-N00472.label: 脑络痹
V002-N00472.englishNames: cerebral collateral impediment; brain collateral bi; brain collateral painful impediment
V002-N00472.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜颅脑类病

V002-N00465.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00465.label: 头风
V002-N00465.definition: 头痛病经久不愈，以头痛部位不定,作止无常，发作则持续不已，愈后遇触复发为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00465.label: 头痛病
V002-N00465.definition: 以头痛为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00465.label: 头风
V002-N00465.definition: 头痛病经久不愈者。以其痛作止无常，发作 则持续不已，愈后遇触复发为主要表现的疾 病。

V002-N00465.label: 头风
V002-N00465.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证｜头痛
V002-N00465.definition: 头痛病经久不愈，以头痛部位不定，作止无常，发作则持续不已，愈后遇触复发为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00465.label: 头风病
V002-N00465.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜颅脑类病

V002-N00465.label: 头风
V002-N00465.englishNames: intermittent headache; head wind; Head wind disorder
V002-N00465.path: 传统医学疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜脑系病类｜头痛

V002-N00465.vocabName: T/CIATCM 104-2023（表14-表27）张仲景经方术语代码表
V002-N00465.label: 头风
V002-N00465.path: 经方病机（金匮要略）代码表｜中风病机

V002-N00465.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00465.label: 头风病
V002-N00465.aliases: 头风； 头痛病； Head wind disorder； Headache
V002-N00465.pinyinNames: tou feng bing; tóu fēng bìng
V002-N00465.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00465.definition: Characterized by chronic, recurrent headache with no fixed positions. Contributing factors may include external contraction of wind heat, wind cold or summer heat and dampness, hyperactive liver yang transforming into wind, or wind phlegm disturbing the mind. This condition is subcategorized into migraine, parietal headache or thunderclap headache.

V002-N00465.label: 头风

V002-N00465.label: 头风

V002-N00469.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00469.label: 真头痛
V002-N00469.definition: 以突然剧烈头痛，连脑户尽痛，手足逆冷至肘膝关节，恶心呕吐为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00469.label: 真头痛
V002-N00469.definition: 以突然剧烈头痛，连及脑户，手足逆冷至肘 膝关节，恶心呕吐为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00469.label: 真头痛
V002-N00469.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证｜头痛
V002-N00469.definition: 因风阳上窜，气血上逆，扰乱清阳所致。为头痛的一种特殊重症，以突发剧烈头痛、持续不解，阵发加重，常伴有喷射性呕吐、肢厥、抽搐等。

V002-N00469.label: 厥头痛
V002-N00469.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜颅脑类病｜头风病

V002-N00469.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00469.label: 厥头痛
V002-N00469.pinyinNames: jue tou tong; jué tóu tòng
V002-N00469.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00469.definition: Characterized by intense headache, a red face and restlessness. Nausea, vomiting, cold hands/feet and significantly elevated blood pressure may be present. Often occurs when wind yang ascends and disordered qi and blood affect the head.

V002-N00466.label: 外感头痛
V002-N00466.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证｜头痛
V002-N00466.definition: 因外邪致病，起病较急。症见疼痛较剧，表现为掣痛、跳痛、灼痛、胀痛、重痛，痛无休止。

V002-N00466.label: 外感头痛
V002-N00466.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜颅脑类病｜头风病

V002-N00470.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00470.label: 雷头风
V002-N00470.definition: 以头痛，伴脑内如雷鸣响，面起核块为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00470.label: 雷头风
V002-N00470.englishNames: thunder head wind; thunder headache; thunder-like headache
V002-N00470.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜颅脑类病｜头风病

V002-N00470.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00470.label: 雷头风
V002-N00470.englishNames: thunder head wind; thunder headache; thunder-like headache; Thunder head wind
V002-N00470.pinyinNames: lei tou feng; léi tóu fēng
V002-N00470.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00470.definition: Characterized by severe, sudden onset of headache like a clap of thunder and a storm raging in your head. Associated symptoms may include chills, fever and referred eye pain. Often occurs when wind fire carries phlegm or when phlegm heat generates wind to affect the head.

V002-N00470.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00470.label: 雷头风

V002-N00467.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00467.label: 内伤头痛
V002-N00467.path: 第1部分：内科学｜脑病｜头痛［病］
V002-N00467.definition: 人体脏腑、气血损伤，或内邪上扰所致的头痛。

V002-N00467.label: 内伤头痛
V002-N00467.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证｜头痛
V002-N00467.definition: 虚证起痛缓慢，疼痛较以，表现为急痛、空痛、昏痛、痛势悠悠，遇劳加重，时作时止。因肝阳、痰浊、瘀血所致者多这实证，表现为头昏胀痛、或昏蒙重痛，或痛处固定的刺痛等。

V002-N00467.label: 内伤头痛
V002-N00467.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜颅脑类病｜头风病

V002-N00468.label: 偏头痛
V002-N00468.definition: 偏于一侧的头部疼痛，往往比较顽固，可能定期发作，常伴有恶心、呕吐、眼睛牵扯痛等症。

V002-N00468.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00468.label: 偏头痛
V002-N00468.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜疼痛｜头痛
V002-N00468.definition: 因风火痰涎或风寒入侵，或恼怒紧张，或肝阳上扰，致使经络痹阻，阴阳失调，气血逆乱于头部而成。以反复发作、或左或右、来去突然的剧烈头痛为主要表现的痛病类疾病。

V002-N00468.label: 偏头风
V002-N00468.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证｜头痛
V002-N00468.definition: 因风火痰涎或风寒入侵，或恼怒紧张，或肝阳上扰，致使经络痹阻，阴阳失调，气血逆乱于头部而成。以反复发作、或左或右、来去突然的剧烈头痛为主要表现的痛病类疾病。

V002-N00468.label: 偏头痛
V002-N00468.aliases: 半边头痛； 偏头风； 头半边痛； 头角痛
V002-N00468.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜疼痛｜疼痛-按部位分｜头痛
V002-N00468.definition: 偏于一侧的头部疼痛，往往比较顽固，可能定期发作，常伴有恶心、呕吐、眼睛牵扯痛等症。

V002-N00468.label: 偏头风
V002-N00468.englishNames: hemilateral head wind; Migraine disorder; migraine
V002-N00468.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜颅脑类病｜头风病

V002-N00468.label: 偏头风
V002-N00468.englishNames: hemilateral head wind; Migraine disorder; migraine
V002-N00468.path: 传统医学疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜脑系病类｜头痛

V002-N00468.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00468.label: 偏头痛
V002-N00468.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N00468.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00468.label: 偏头风
V002-N00468.aliases: 偏头痛； Migraine disorder； Migraine pain disorder； Migraine； 偏正头风
V002-N00468.englishNames: hemilateral head wind; Migraine disorder; migraine; Hemilateral head wind
V002-N00468.pinyinNames: pian tou feng; piān tóu fēng
V002-N00468.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00468.definition: A condition characterized by sudden, recurrent and intense headache occurring on one side of the head. Contributing factors may include wind cold, wind fire that carries phlegm, liver yang transforming into wind or stagnant blood obstructing the meridians. These factors may cause disordered qi and blood to affect the head.

V002-N00468.label: 偏头痛
