V002-N00473.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00473.label: 脑鸣
V002-N00473.definition: 以自觉脑内如虫蛀鸣响为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00473.label: 脑鸣
V002-N00473.definition: 自觉头脑内有声音鸣响。

V002-N00473.label: 脑鸣
V002-N00473.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜脑系病证
V002-N00473.definition: 多因脑髓空虚，或因火郁，痰湿阻滞所致。以自觉脑内如虫蛀鸣响为主要表现的脑神疾病。

V002-N00473.label: 脑鸣
V002-N00473.aliases: Tinnitus Crania； 头脑鸣响； 头响； 头中鸣响
V002-N00473.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜头面症状｜头部症状
V002-N00473.definition: 自觉头脑内有声音鸣响。

V002-N00473.label: 脑鸣
V002-N00473.englishNames: cerebral tinnitus; intracranial tinnitus; Cerebral tinnitus disorder
V002-N00473.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜颅脑类病

V002-N00473.label: 脑鸣
V002-N00473.englishNames: cerebral tinnitus; intracranial tinnitus; Cerebral tinnitus disorder
V002-N00473.path: 传统医学疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜脑系病类

V002-N00473.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00473.label: 脑鸣
V002-N00473.englishNames: ringing in the brain; Ringing in the brain; cerebral tinnitus; intracranial tinnitus; intracranial tunnitus; Cerebral tinnitus disorder
V002-N00473.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00473.definition: Characterized by a subjective sensation of ringing in the brain instead of the ear. Associated symptoms may include depression, anxiety, insomnia, restlessness and poor memory. Often results from aged-related kidney deficiency. Alternatively, it may also occur when stagnant fire (due to stress or anxiety) ascends to affect the head.

V002-N00471.label: 面风痛
V002-N00471.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜脑系病证

V002-N00471.label: 面部疼痛
V002-N00471.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜疼痛｜疼痛-按部位分
V002-N00471.definition: 属问面所见。系指部分或整个颜面部包括目眶、鼻唇沟、面颊、颌、口唇等处剧烈疼痛的症状。

V002-N00471.label: 面风痛
V002-N00471.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜颅脑类病

V002-N00471.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00471.label: 面风痛
V002-N00471.pinyinNames: mian feng tong; miàn fēng tòng
V002-N00471.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00471.definition: Characterized by episodes of severe, sudden pain or spasm in one side of the face, often accompanied by facial spasm. Often occurs when wind cold or wind heat attacks the meridians on the face or phlegm stasis affects the meridians.

V002-N00536.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00536.label: 痿病
V002-N00536.definition: 以四肢筋脉弛缓，软弱无力，日久不用,渐至肌肉萎缩，不能随意运动为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00536.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00536.label: 痿病
V002-N00536.path: 中医内科学｜内科学肢体病
V002-N00536.definition: 以四肢筋脉弛缓，软弱无力，日久不用，渐至肌肉萎缩，不能随意运动为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00536.label: 痿病
V002-N00536.definition: 以四肢筋脉弛缓，软弱无力，日久不用，渐至 肌肉萎缩，不能随意运动为主要表现的疾 病。

V002-N00536.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00536.label: 痿证
V002-N00536.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜肢体经络病证
V002-N00536.definition: 四肢痿软无力，肌肉萎缩，出现功能障碍甚至功能丧失的表现。

V002-N00536.label: 痿病
V002-N00536.aliases: Wilting disorder； 痿躄； 痿证
V002-N00536.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜经络肢体病证
V002-N00536.definition: 系指肢体筋脉驰缓，软弱无力，日久不用，引起肌肉萎缩或瘫痪的一种病证。痿者萎也，枯萎之义，即指肢体痿弱，肌内萎缩。

V002-N00536.label: 痿证类病
V002-N00536.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语

V002-N00536.label: 痿证
V002-N00536.path: 传统医学疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜骨、关节和肌肉系统病类

V002-N00536.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00536.label: 痿证类病
V002-N00536.aliases: 痿病； 痿证； Flaccidity disorder； Wilting disorder； Wei-flaccidity pattern
V002-N00536.englishNames: category of wilting disease; Wei-flaccidity disorders; flaccidity diseases
V002-N00536.pinyinNames: wei zheng lei bing; wěi zhèng lèi bìng
V002-N00536.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00536.definition: A group of disorders characterized by limb weakness and muscle atrophy caused by malnourishment of the muscles or sinews, resulting from damp heat, emotions, congenital weakness, age-related deficiency of the liver and kidney, or qi deficiency of the lung and spleen.

V002-N00536.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00536.label: 痿病

V002-N00544.label: 骨蚀
V002-N00544.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜痿证类病

V002-N00544.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00544.label: 骨蚀
V002-N00544.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00544.definition: Characterized by bone pain, muscular atrophy, limping and shortening of the affected leg without suppuration. It is often caused by pathogenic factors penetrating the bone or traumatic injuries to sinews or bones.

V002-N00542.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00542.label: 肝痿
V002-N00542.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肢体病｜五痿
V002-N00542.definition: 以肢体筋急拘挛，渐至痿弱不能运动，伴口苦，爪枯等为特征的痿病。

V002-N00542.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00542.label: 肝痿
V002-N00542.path: 中医内科学｜内科学肢体病
V002-N00542.definition: 以肢体筋急拘挛，渐至痿弱不能运动，伴口苦，爪枯等为主要表现的痿病。

V002-N00542.label: 筋痿
V002-N00542.englishNames: Atrophic Debility of the Tendon; Flaccidity due to Malnutrition of the Muscles
V002-N00542.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜经络肢体病证｜痿病
V002-N00542.definition: 多由尪痹、骨痹等病，长期卧床不起，精气亏损，筋脉炎养所致。以肢体挛急，屈不能伸，渐至萎弱不用为主要表现的肢体痿病类疾病。

V002-N00542.label: 阳痿
V002-N00542.aliases: 筋痿； 阳事不举； 阴器不举； 阴痿； 宗筋弛纵
V002-N00542.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V002-N00542.definition: 是指青壮年男子，由于虚损、惊恐或湿热等原因，致使宗筋弛纵，引起阴茎萎软不举，或临房举而不坚的病证。

V002-N00542.label: 筋痿
V002-N00542.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜痿证类病

V002-N00542.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00542.label: 筋痿
V002-N00542.englishNames: sinew wilting; Limb flaccidity; sinew flaccidity
V002-N00542.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00542.definition: Characterized by limb contracture, impaired extension and gradual disuse. Often results from essence-qi deficiency and malnourishment of muscles or sinews due to bed-ridden rheumatoid arthritis or prolonged bone impediment.

V002-N00542.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00542.label: 筋痿

V002-N00539.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00539.label: 脾痿
V002-N00539.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肢体病｜五痿
V002-N00539.definition: 以四肢痿软，食少，腹胀，腹泻，疲乏，消瘦等为特征的痿病。

V002-N00539.label: 肌痿
V002-N00539.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜经络肢体病证｜痿病
V002-N00539.definition: 多因脾虚失运，不能输精以濡养肌肉，或湿浊伤及经络、肌肉所致。以肌肉萎缩，痿弱无力不用为主要表现的肢体痿病类疾病。

V002-N00539.label: 脾痿
V002-N00539.englishNames: Numbness and Flaccidity of the Muscles due to Disorder of the Spleen
V002-N00539.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N00539.definition: 因胃肠的慢性久病，或因它脏病变影响，进食过少等，使脾气痿弱，精微匮乏，机体失却充养。以食少，腹胀，腹泻，疲乏，消瘦等为主要表现的内脏痿病类疾病。

V002-N00539.label: 肌痿
V002-N00539.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜痿证类病

V002-N00539.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00539.label: 肌痿
V002-N00539.englishNames: muscular flaccidity; muscular wilting; Muscle flaccidity
V002-N00539.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00539.definition: Characterized by muscular atrophy, numbness, weakness and disuse. Often occurs when the spleen fails to nourish muscles or turbid dampness affects the meridians or muscles.

V002-N00539.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00539.label: 肉痿

V002-N00543.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00543.label: 肾痿
V002-N00543.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肢体病｜五痿
V002-N00543.definition: 以腰脊酸软，不能伸举，下肢痿弱，不能行动，伴面色暗黑，牙齿干枯等为特征的痿病。

V002-N00543.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00543.label: 骨质疏松症
V002-N00543.definition: 以骨量减少、骨的微观结构退化为特征的，致使骨的脆性增加以及易于发生骨折的一种全身性骨骼疾病。

V002-N00543.label: 骨痿
V002-N00543.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜痿证类病

V002-N00543.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00543.label: 骨痿
V002-N00543.englishNames: bone wilting; Bone flaccidity; bone flaccidity
V002-N00543.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00543.definition: Characterized by low back soreness, difficulty in maintaining a standing position, bowed legs, muscular atrophy in the lower legs, and inability to walk. A dark complexion and withered gum may also be present. It is often caused by pathogenic heat damaging yin, long-term over-exertion, and hyperactivity of fire due to kidney essence deficiency.

V002-N00541.label: 腲腿风
V002-N00541.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜痿证类病

V002-N00537.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00537.label: 心痿
V002-N00537.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肢体病｜五痿
V002-N00537.definition: 以四肢关节不能活动，足胫纵缓不能收持,心烦，面赤，脉洪数等为特征的痿病。

V002-N00537.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00537.label: 心痿
V002-N00537.path: 中医内科学｜内科学肢体病
V002-N00537.definition: 以四肢关节不能活动，足胫纵缓不能收持，心烦，面赤，脉洪数为主要表现的痿病。

V002-N00537.label: 脉痿
V002-N00537.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜痿证类病

V002-N00537.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00537.label: 脉痿
V002-N00537.englishNames: vessel flaccidity; Heart vessel flaccidity; vessel wilting
V002-N00537.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00537.definition: Characterized by muscular atrophy in the lower legs, foot weakness, inability to stand and impaired lifting and flexion of the knee and ankle joints. It is often caused by ascending of heart blood/qi or blood failing to nourish the vessels upon heavy loss of blood.

V002-N00537.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00537.label: 脉痿

V002-N00538.label: 痿病
V002-N00538.aliases: Wilting disorder； 痿躄； 痿证
V002-N00538.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜经络肢体病证
V002-N00538.definition: 系指肢体筋脉驰缓，软弱无力，日久不用，引起肌肉萎缩或瘫痪的一种病证。痿者萎也，枯萎之义，即指肢体痿弱，肌内萎缩。

V002-N00538.label: 痿躄
V002-N00538.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜经络肢体病证｜痿病
V002-N00538.definition: 多因禀赋不足，或后天失调，湿热痰浊阻滞，筋脉失养所致。以四肢尤其是下肢进行性麻痹不仁，瘦弱无力，肌肉萎缩，不能随意运动为主要表现的肢体痿病类疾病。

V002-N00538.label: 痿躄
V002-N00538.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜痿证类病

V002-N00538.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00538.label: 痿躄
V002-N00538.englishNames: atrophic wilting; atrophic flaccidity; leg flaccidity; Lower limb weakness and flaccidity
V002-N00538.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00538.definition: Characterized by progressive lower leg paralysis, weakness, atrophy and absence of voluntary movement. Often results from malnourishment of the leg muscles due to congenital weakness, postnatal malnutrition, or retention of damp heat and turbid phlegm.

V002-N00538.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00538.label: 痿躄

V002-N00540.label: 肢痿
V002-N00540.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜经络肢体病证｜痿病
V002-N00540.definition: 可能与感染热毒、接触毒物、饮食失节等有关，经气阻痹所致。以四肢末端对称性感觉与运动障碍，肌肉萎缩，皮肤薄嫩而干燥，出汗异常等为主要表现的肢体痿病类疾病。

V002-N00540.vocabName: 简帛医药文献词典（2018）（未校勘）
V002-N00540.label: 痿痹
V002-N00540.path: 上編 簡帛醫學詞語｜病症詞語
V002-N00540.definition: 肢體不能運動或喪失感覺。

V002-N00540.label: 痿痹
V002-N00540.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜痿证类病

V002-N00540.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00540.label: 痿痹
V002-N00540.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00540.definition: Characterized by symmetric sensory and motor disorders, muscular atrophy, dry, thin and delicate skin and abnormal sweating. Often occurs upon exposure to cold, dampness, toxic heat or poisons. It may also result from an improper diet, phlegm stasis obstructing the meridians or malnourishment of muscles or sinews due to essence-blood deficiency.

V002-N00477.label: 瘿类病
V002-N00477.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语

V002-N00477.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00477.label: 瘿类病
V002-N00477.englishNames: goitered carbuncle diseases; Thyroid disorders; goitered carbuncle
V002-N00477.pinyinNames: ying lei bing; yǐng lèi bìng
V002-N00477.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00477.definition: A group of disorders involving enlargement of the thyroid gland, causing a swelling in the front part of the neck. Contributing factors may include deficiency of anti-pathogenic qi, invasion of exogenous pathogens, emotional disturbance or non-acclimatization.

V002-N00485.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00485.label: 瘿劳
V002-N00485.path: 第2部分：外科学｜瘿瘤岩疾病｜瘿
V002-N00485.definition: 以疲乏呆钝，嗜睡，畏冷，浮肿，毛发脱落，脉迟缓等为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00485.label: 瘿劳
V002-N00485.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜瘿
V002-N00485.definition: 多由瘿病治疗失时，或药物治疗失当及手术切除后，或因脑部肿瘤等病变，使脾肾阳虚，气血亏虚，水湿泛溢所致。以疲乏呆钝，嗜睡，畏冷，浮肿，毛发脱落，脉迟缓等为主要表现的劳病类疾病。

V002-N00485.label: 瘿劳
V002-N00485.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜瘿类病

V002-N00485.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00485.label: 瘿劳
V002-N00485.englishNames: goiter exhaustion; hypothyrea; Hypothyroidism; hypothyroidism; overstrained goiter
V002-N00485.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00485.definition: Characterized by fatigue, feeling cold, delayed relaxation of tendon reflexes, sleepiness and swelling of the limbs. Hair loss, low libido and a slow pulse may be present. Contributing factors may include delayed treatment of goitre, inappropriate use of medication, unsuccessful surgery or brain tumour. These factors may cause yang deficiency of the spleen and kidney and generate phlegm dampness.

V002-N00482.label: 筋瘿
V002-N00482.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜瘿类病

V002-N00482.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00482.label: 筋瘿
V002-N00482.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类｜瘿

V002-N00482.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00482.label: 筋瘿
V002-N00482.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00482.definition: Characterized by varicose jugular veins on the goiter that resemble an earthworm. Often occurs when hyperactive liver fire consumes yin blood and causes jugular vein distention.

V002-N00481.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00481.label: 肉瘿
V002-N00481.path: 第2部分：外科学｜瘿瘤岩疾病｜瘿
V002-N00481.definition: 以颈前结喉单侧或双侧结块,柔韧而圆,如肉团随吞咽动作而上下移动为主要表现的癭。

V002-N00481.label: 肉瘿
V002-N00481.path: 外科疾病｜外科其他疾病

V002-N00481.label: 肉瘿
V002-N00481.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜瘿
V002-N00481.definition: 肉瘿是甲状腺的良性肿瘤。相当于西医的甲状腺腺瘤（囊肿）。其特点是颈前喉结一侧或两侧结块，柔韧而圆，如肉之团，能随吞咽动作而上下移动，发展缓慢。好发于女性青年及中年人。

V002-N00481.label: 肉瘿
V002-N00481.englishNames: fleshy goiter; flesh goiter; thyroid adenoma and cyst; adenoma of thyroid
V002-N00481.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜瘿类病

V002-N00481.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00481.label: 肉瘿
V002-N00481.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类｜瘿

V002-N00481.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00481.label: 肉瘿
V002-N00481.englishNames: fleshy goiter; Fleshy goiter; flesh goiter; thyroid adenoma and cyst; adenoma of thyroid; thyroid adenoma
V002-N00481.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00481.definition: Characterized by single or multiple soft, round lumps that move with swallowing. Often occurs when emotion-related phlegm dampness accumulates in the front of the neck or when qi stagnation transforms into fire to consume qi and yin.

V002-N00481.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00481.label: 肉瘿

V002-N00481.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00481.label: 肉瘿
V002-N00481.definition: a benign goiter, soft or beefy, with a slow progress, mostly referring to adenomatous or cystic goiter

V002-N00484.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00484.label: 瘿痈
V002-N00484.path: 第2部分：外科学｜瘿瘤岩疾病｜瘿
V002-N00484.definition: 以甲状腺剧痛，全身不适、乏力、肌肉疼痛，可有发热、兴奋、怕热、心慌、颤抖及多汗等为主要表现的瘿。

V002-N00484.label: 瘿痈
V002-N00484.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜瘿
V002-N00484.definition: 瘿痈是颈靥部炎症性疾患。相当于西医的急性甲状腺炎。其特点是急性发病，发病前多由感冒、咽痛等病史。主要表现为结喉两侧结块，肿胀，灼热，疼痛，伴有发热、畏寒等。

V002-N00484.label: 瘿痈
V002-N00484.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜瘿类病

V002-N00484.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00484.label: 瘿痈
V002-N00484.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类｜瘿

V002-N00484.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00484.label: 瘿痈
V002-N00484.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00484.definition: Characterized by sudden presence of painful thyroid nodules with no discolouration of the skin or mild redness, fatigue, and muscle pain. Associated symptoms include fever, sweating, palpitations, tremor of the hands and a foreign body sensation in the throat. Contributing factors may include exogenous wind heat affecting the lung and stomach or stagnant heat in the liver and stomach. The combined external and internal heat may consume fluids and form into phlegm, resulting in phlegm fire stagnation in the neck.

V002-N00479.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00479.label: 气瘿
V002-N00479.path: 第2部分：外科学｜瘿瘤岩疾病｜瘿
V002-N00479.definition: 以颈前漫肿，肿块柔软无痛，可随喜怒而消长为主要表现的癭。

V002-N00479.label: 气瘿
V002-N00479.path: 外科疾病｜外科其他疾病
V002-N00479.definition: 以颈部漫肿，肿块柔软无痛，可随喜怒而消 长为主要表现的瘿。

V002-N00479.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00479.label: 瘿
V002-N00479.aliases: 粉瘿瘤； 气瘿； 瘿瘤； Goiter Like Diseases
V002-N00479.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医外科疾病
V002-N00479.definition: 因内有郁火，外感风热邪毒所致。以结喉两旁结块肿硬、皮色不变、微有灼热、痛引耳后枕部、常伴发热、较少化脓为主要表现的瘿病类疾病。

V002-N00479.label: 气瘿
V002-N00479.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜瘿
V002-N00479.definition: 气瘿是颈部漫肿，肿块柔软无痛、可随喜怒而消长的甲状腺肿大性疾病。俗称“大脖子”病。

V002-N00479.label: 气瘿
V002-N00479.englishNames: qi goiter; Qi goiter disorder; simple goiter; endemic goiter
V002-N00479.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜瘿类病

V002-N00479.label: 气瘿
V002-N00479.englishNames: qi goiter; Qi goiter disorder; simple goiter; endemic goiter
V002-N00479.path: 传统医学疾病｜气血津液病

V002-N00479.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00479.label: 气瘿
V002-N00479.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类｜瘿

V002-N00479.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00479.label: 气瘿
V002-N00479.englishNames: qi goiter; Qi goiter disorder; simple goiter; endemic goiter; Qi goiter
V002-N00479.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00479.definition: Characterized by diffuse swelling in the front of the neck with a normal skin colour. It may feel soft or nodular and its size changes with emotions. Contributing factors may include diet, iodine deficiency, emotions or heredity. These factors may cause phlegm qi stagnation in the front of the neck.

V002-N00479.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00479.label: 气瘿

V002-N00479.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00479.label: 瘿
V002-N00479.aliases: BNG120； 粉瘿瘤； 气瘿； 瘿瘤； Goiter Like Diseases

V002-N00479.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00479.label: 气瘿
V002-N00479.definition: a goiter that is painless and soft to the touch and that swells and shrinks with the patient’s moods

V002-N00479.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00479.label: 瘿
V002-N00479.aliases: BNG120； 粉瘿瘤； 气瘿； 瘿瘤； Goiter Like Diseases
V002-N00479.definition: enlargement of the thyroid gland, causing a swelling in the front part of the neck

V002-N00483.label: 侠瘿瘅
V002-N00483.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜瘿
V002-N00483.definition: 由多种原因导致阴阳气血失调，痰气瘀血互结于结喉之旁所致。以顿前结节性肿块生长，疲乏，反应迟钝，食少便秘，多尿，腰痛，尿血，骨胳疼痛、畸形，甚至骨折为主要表现的瘿病类疾病。

V002-N00483.label: 侠瘿瘤
V002-N00483.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜瘿类病

V002-N00483.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00483.label: 侠瘿瘤
V002-N00483.pinyinNames: xia ying liu; xiá yǐng liú
V002-N00483.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00483.definition: Characterized by thyroid nodules, fatigue, slow reactions, decreased appetite, constipation, polyuria or bloody urine, bone pain, malformation or even fracture. Often occurs when disordered qi, blood, yin and yang cause phlegm qi and stagnant blood to remain beside the Adam’s apple.

V002-N00478.label: 瘿肿
V002-N00478.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜瘿类病

V002-N00478.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00478.label: 瘿肿
V002-N00478.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00478.definition: Characterized by an enlargement or solid lump below the Adam’s apple in the front part of the neck. Contributing factors may include age-related qi deficiency, liver qi stagnation and blood stasis, or phlegm turbidity due to spleen deficiency. These factors may cause phlegm qi and stagnant blood in front of the neck.

V002-N00480.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00480.label: 瘿气
V002-N00480.path: 第2部分：外科学｜瘿瘤岩疾病｜瘿
V002-N00480.definition: 以颈前肿大，善饥消瘦，急躁心悸，畏热多汗，手颤，眼突等为主要表现的癭。

V002-N00480.label: 瘿气
V002-N00480.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜瘿
V002-N00480.definition: 多因情志内伤，阴虚气郁，使痰气互结、化火伤阴而成。以颈前肿大，善饥消瘦，急躁心悸，畏热多汗，手颤，眼突等为主要表现的瘿病类疾病。

V002-N00480.label: 瘿气
V002-N00480.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜瘿类病

V002-N00480.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00480.label: 瘿气
V002-N00480.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00480.definition: Characterized by enlargement of the thyroid gland, rapid hunger, weight loss, restlessness, palpitations, irritability, heat intolerance and sweating. Tremor of the hands and exophthalmos may also be present. Often occurs when qi stagnation transforms into fire to consume qi and yin and causes phlegm qi to stagnate in the front of the neck.

V002-N00486.label: 乳房类病
V002-N00486.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语

V002-N00486.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00486.label: 乳房类病
V002-N00486.englishNames: Breast diseases; breast diseases; category of breast disease
V002-N00486.pinyinNames: ru fang lei bing; rǔ fáng lèi bìng
V002-N00486.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00486.definition: A group of breast problems due to congenital weakness, disharmony between the Chong and Ren meridians, invasion by exogenous pathogens, emotions, overeat of oily food or milk accumulation.

V002-N00500.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00500.label: 乳悬
V002-N00500.path: 第2部分：外科学｜乳房疾病
V002-N00500.definition: 以产后乳头或乳房过度下垂，坠胀不适为主要表现的乳房疾病。

V002-N00500.label: 乳悬
V002-N00500.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜乳房疾病
V002-N00500.definition: 多因暴怒气泄，胃虚血燥等所致。以产后乳头或乳房过度下垂，痛不可忍为主要表现的乳房病类疾病。

V002-N00500.label: 乳悬
V002-N00500.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜乳房类病

V002-N00500.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00500.label: 乳悬
V002-N00500.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00500.definition: Characterized by the breast or nipple falling down, drooping, or downward to the front of the abdomen, coupled with intolerable pain. Contributing factors may include sudden rage damaging qi or blood dryness due to stomach deficiency.

V002-N00497.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00497.label: 乳头风
V002-N00497.path: 第3部分：皮肤科学｜疾病｜湿疮
V002-N00497.definition: 以乳头、乳晕部位群集丘疹、丘疱疹，伴有瘙痒渗出，结痂增厚皸裂为特征的湿疮。

V002-N00497.label: 乳头风
V002-N00497.definition: 以乳头、乳晕部位皮肤皲 裂，喂奶时痛如刀割为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00497.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00497.label: 乳头破碎
V002-N00497.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医外科疾病｜乳腺疾病
V002-N00497.definition: 因肝火或湿热蕴结于乳头、乳蒂及乳晕部所致。以乳头破碎，或乳晕裂开，疼痛，揩之出血或流黄色粘液，哺乳痛甚为主要表现的乳房疾病。

V002-N00497.label: 乳头风
V002-N00497.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜乳房疾病
V002-N00497.definition: 因肝火或湿热蕴结于乳头、乳蒂及乳晕部所致。以乳头破碎，或乳晕裂开，疼痛，揩之出血或流黄色粘液，哺乳痛甚为主要表现的乳房病类疾病。

V002-N00497.label: 乳头破裂
V002-N00497.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜躯体症状｜胸腹症状｜乳房症状
V002-N00497.definition: 是指乳头及乳晕部发生裂伤或糜烂而言。

V002-N00497.label: 乳头风
V002-N00497.englishNames: nipple wind; rhagadia mammae; cracked nipple
V002-N00497.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜乳房类病

V002-N00497.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00497.label: 乳头风
V002-N00497.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类｜湿疹

V002-N00497.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00497.label: 乳头风
V002-N00497.englishNames: nipple wind; rhagadia mammae; cracked nipple; Nipple eczema
V002-N00497.pinyinNames: ru tou feng; rǔ tóu fēng
V002-N00497.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00497.definition: Characterized by sharp pain, followed by bleeding, oozing and crusting. Painful fissuring or abscess may be present. It is commonly seen in breast-feeding women. If often occurs when liver fire or damp heat accumulates in the nipples, areolae, or the surrounding skin.

V002-N00497.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00497.label: 乳头风
V002-N00497.aliases: BWP075； 乳头破碎； 奶头风
V002-N00497.englishNames: cracked nipple; Cracked Nipple; nipple wind; rhagadia mammae

V002-N00497.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00497.label: 乳头风
V002-N00497.aliases: BWP075； 乳头破碎； 奶头风
V002-N00497.englishNames: cracked nipple; Cracked Nipple; nipple wind; rhagadia mammae
V002-N00497.definition: painful fissuring of the mammary nipple or areola

V002-N00494.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00494.label: 乳核
V002-N00494.path: 第2部分：外科学｜乳房疾病

V002-N00494.label: 乳核
V002-N00494.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜乳房疾病
V002-N00494.definition: 是指乳腺小叶内纤维组织和腺上皮的良性肿瘤。相当于西医的乳腺纤维腺瘤。其特点是乳中结核，形如丸卵，边界清楚，表面光滑，推之活动。

V002-N00494.label: 乳房肿块
V002-N00494.aliases: 奶疬； 乳房结块； 乳房有肿块； 乳核； 乳中结核
V002-N00494.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜躯体症状｜胸腹症状｜乳房症状
V002-N00494.definition: 是指乳房有大小不等地结块，状如核仁，推之可动的症状。

V002-N00494.label: 乳核
V002-N00494.englishNames: mammary nodule; fibroadenoma of breast; breast nodule; nodule in breast; breast nodule (fibroadenoma of breast)
V002-N00494.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜乳房类病

V002-N00494.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00494.label: 乳核
V002-N00494.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜儿科类

V002-N00494.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00494.label: 乳核
V002-N00494.englishNames: mammary nodule; fibroadenoma of breast; breast nodule; Breast nodules; nodule in breast; breast nodule (fibroadenoma of breast)
V002-N00494.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00494.definition: Characterized by hard, mobile, and often pain-free breast nodule (often singular) with a smooth surface and a clear margin that changes with emotions or menstrual cycle. Contributing factors may include emotional disturbance and disharmony between the Chong and Ren meridians. These factors may cause phlegm stasis in the breast.

V002-N00494.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00494.label: 乳核
V002-N00494.aliases: BWR090； 乳痞； 乳中结核
V002-N00494.englishNames: nodule in breast; breast nodule (fibroadenoma of breast)

V002-N00498.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00498.label: 乳衄
V002-N00498.path: 第2部分：外科学｜乳房疾病
V002-N00498.definition: 以乳窍溢出血性液体，乳晕部触及可活动的质软、形态大小不同肿块为主要表现的乳房疾病。

V002-N00498.label: 乳衄
V002-N00498.definition: 以乳窍溢出血性液体，乳晕都触及可活动的 质软、不痛肿块为主要表现的乳房疾病。

V002-N00498.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00498.label: 乳衄
V002-N00498.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医外科疾病｜乳腺疾病
V002-N00498.definition: 因肝脾两伤，肝经火郁，脾失统血所致。以乳窍溢出血性液体，乳晕部触及可活动的质软、不痛肿块为主要表现的乳房病类疾病。

V002-N00498.label: 乳衄
V002-N00498.englishNames: Bleeding from the Breast; Bleeding from the Nipple
V002-N00498.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜乳房疾病
V002-N00498.definition: 因肝脾两伤，肝经火郁，脾失统血所致。以乳窍溢出血性液体，乳晕部触及可活动的质软、不痛肿块为主要表现的乳房病类疾病。

V002-N00498.label: 乳衄
V002-N00498.englishNames: nipple bleeding; thelorrhagia; bleeding of nipple (thelorrhagia)
V002-N00498.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜乳房类病

V002-N00498.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00498.label: 乳头出血
V002-N00498.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N00498.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00498.label: 乳衄
V002-N00498.englishNames: thelorrhagia; nipple bleeding; Nipple discharge; bleeding of nipple (thelorrhagia)
V002-N00498.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00498.definition: Characterized by discharge of bloody fluids from the nipple of the breast or palpable, soft, mobile and painless lumps. Contributing factors may include anger or worries damaging the liver and spleen or stagnant fire in liver meridian affecting the spleen’s function in controlling blood within the small vessels.

V002-N00498.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00498.label: 乳衄
V002-N00498.englishNames: thelorrhagia; Bleeding from the Breast; Bleeding from the Nipple; bleeding of nipple (thelorrhagia)

V002-N00498.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00498.label: 乳衄
V002-N00498.englishNames: thelorrhagia; Bleeding from the Breast; Bleeding from the Nipple; bleeding of nipple (thelorrhagia)

V002-N00499.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00499.label: 乳泣
V002-N00499.path: 第2部分：外科学｜乳房疾病
V002-N00499.definition: 以非哺乳期乳汁自出为主要表现的乳房疾病。

V002-N00499.label: 乳泣
V002-N00499.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜乳房疾病
V002-N00499.definition: 多因气虚不摄，或热迫乳汁外溢所致。以非哺乳期乳汁自出为主要表现的乳房病类疾病。

V002-N00499.label: 乳泣
V002-N00499.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜乳房类病

V002-N00499.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00499.label: 乳泣
V002-N00499.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00499.definition: Characterized by spontaneous flow of milk from the breast that is not associated with childbirth or nursing. Often occurs when qi fails to hold milk (fluids) or when liver qi stagnation transforms into fire to move the milk (fluids).

V002-N00492.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00492.label: 乳漏
V002-N00492.path: 第2部分：外科学｜乳房疾病
V002-N00492.definition: 以乳房或乳晕部瘘管，时流脓水或乳汁，久不收口为主要表现的乳房疾病。

V002-N00492.label: 乳漏
V002-N00492.definition: 以乳房或乳晕部见瘘管，时流脓水或乳汁， 久不收口为主要表现的疮疡疾病。

V002-N00492.label: 乳漏
V002-N00492.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜乳房疾病
V002-N00492.definition: 是指发生在乳房部或乳晕部的疮口溃脓后，久不收口而形成管道者。其特点是疮口脓水淋漓，或杂有乳汁，或杂有豆渣样物，溃口经久不愈。

V002-N00492.label: 乳漏
V002-N00492.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜乳房类病

V002-N00492.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00492.label: 乳漏
V002-N00492.englishNames: mammary fistula; Mammary duct fistula; breast fistula
V002-N00492.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00492.definition: Characterized by an abnormal passage between a sub-areolar duct and skin that exudates pus or milk. Often occurs spontaneously following acute mastitis, acute septic mastitis, comedomastitis, tuberculosis of the breast, or breast surgery.

V002-N00492.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00492.label: 乳漏

V002-N00492.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00492.label: 乳漏
V002-N00492.definition: an abnormal passage that leads to the cutaneous surface of the breast or areola of the nipple and exudes pus

V002-N00496.label: 乳头湿疹
V002-N00496.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜乳房疾病
V002-N00496.definition: 多因肝经湿热，或脾胃虚弱，血虚风燥所致。以乳头、乳晕部出现群集的小丘疹、疮疹，基底潮红，可有渗出、糜烂为主要表现的湿疮类疾病。

V002-N00496.label: 乳头湿疹
V002-N00496.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜乳房类病

V002-N00495.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00495.label: 乳疬
V002-N00495.path: 第2部分：外科学｜乳房疾病
V002-N00495.definition: 以男性、儿童乳晕部发生扁圆形肿块，触之疼痛为主要表现的乳房疾病。

V002-N00495.label: 乳疬
V002-N00495.definition: 以男性、儿童单侧或双侧乳晕部发生扁圆形 肿块，触之疼痛为主要表现的乳房疾病。

V002-N00495.label: 乳疬
V002-N00495.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜乳房疾病
V002-N00495.definition: 男女儿童或中老年男性的乳晕部出现疼痛性结块，称之为乳疬。相当于西医的乳房异常发育症。其特点是单侧或双侧乳晕中央有扁圆形肿块，质地中等，有轻度压痛。

V002-N00495.label: 乳疬
V002-N00495.englishNames: gynecomastia; hypertrophy of breast; mastauxy in children
V002-N00495.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜乳房类病

V002-N00495.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00495.label: 乳疬
V002-N00495.englishNames: Gynecomastia; gynecomastia; hypertrophy of breast; mastauxy in children
V002-N00495.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00495.definition: Characterized by oval or round, tender lumps on one or both sides of the sub-areolar region in children or male adults. Contributing factors may include congenital kidney qi deficiency, postnatal deficiency of the liver and kidney, disharmony between the Chong and Ren meridian, malnourishment of the liver, and phlegm qi stagnation.

V002-N00495.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00495.label: 乳疬
V002-N00495.englishNames: gynecomastia; hypertrophy of breast; mastauxy in children

V002-N00495.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00495.label: 乳疬
V002-N00495.englishNames: gynecomastia; hypertrophy of breast; mastauxy in children
V002-N00495.definition: excessive development of the breast in the children and male adults

V002-N00491.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00491.label: 乳疽
V002-N00491.path: 第2部分：外科学｜乳房疾病
V002-N00491.definition: 乳房深处的急性化脓性疾病。

V002-N00491.label: 乳疽
V002-N00491.englishNames: Breast Cellulitis; Deep-seated Mammary Abscess; Intramammary Abscess; Mammary Abscess
V002-N00491.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜乳房疾病
V002-N00491.definition: 多因肝气郁结，胃热蕴蒸所致。以乳房深处结块微痛，皮色不变，酿脓、溃破、愈合缓慢为主要表现的痈病类疾病。

V002-N00491.label: 乳疽
V002-N00491.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜乳房类病

V002-N00491.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00491.label: 乳疽
V002-N00491.englishNames: breast gangrene; mammary deep abscess; Breast abscess
V002-N00491.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00491.definition: Characterized by lumps located deep within the breast with mild pain and no skin discolouration at first, followed by a gradual increase in lump size, a slow formation of pus, discharge of yellow pus after rupture, coupled with a deep ulcerative opening and prolonged healing. Contributing factors may include liver blood stagnation, stomach heat accumulation, blocked milk ducts, or toxin entering the interior.

V002-N00487.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00487.label: 乳痈
V002-N00487.path: 第2部分：外科学｜乳房疾病
V002-N00487.definition: 乳房的急性化脓性疾病。

V002-N00487.label: 乳痈
V002-N00487.definition: 乳房的一种急性化脓性疾病。

V002-N00487.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00487.label: 乳痈
V002-N00487.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡｜痈
V002-N00487.definition: 多因乳头破碎，风邪外袭，或乳汁淤积，乳络阻滞，郁而化热所致。以乳房部结块、肿胀疼痛、溃后脓出稠厚为主要表现的痈病类疾病。

V002-N00487.label: 乳痈
V002-N00487.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜乳房疾病
V002-N00487.definition: 是由热毒侵入乳房所引起的一种急性化脓性疾病。相当于西医的急性化脓性乳腺炎。常发生于产后未满月的哺乳妇女，尤以初产妇多见，也可在怀孕期，或非哺乳期及非怀孕期发生。其特点是乳房局部结块，红肿热痛，伴有全身发热等症状。

V002-N00487.label: 乳痈
V002-N00487.aliases: Deep Rooted Breast Carbuncles； 乳吹
V002-N00487.englishNames: Acute Mastitis; acute mastitis; breast abscess
V002-N00487.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜乳房类病

V002-N00487.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00487.label: 乳痈
V002-N00487.aliases: Deep Rooted Breast Carbuncles； 乳吹
V002-N00487.englishNames: Acute Mastitis; breast abscess; acute mastitis; Acute mastitis
V002-N00487.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00487.definition: Characterized by distending, painful nodules in varying sizes and problems suckling the milk out of the breast, followed by increased nodules with redness, tenderness and discharge of yellow, thick pus. In severe cases, chills and a high-grade fever may be present. The onset is typically rapid and commonly seen within the first few months of delivery. Contributing factors may include cracks on the nipples, contraction of external damp heat, blocked milk ducts or milk accumulation, stomach heat, and liver qi stagnation transforming into heat.

V002-N00487.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00487.label: 乳痈

V002-N00487.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00487.label: 乳痈
V002-N00487.definition: acute pyogenic inflammation of the breast

V002-N00490.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00490.label: 粉刺性乳痈
V002-N00490.path: 第2部分：外科学｜乳房疾病
V002-N00490.definition: 以乳腺导管扩张、浆细胞浸润为病变基础的慢性非细菌性化脓性乳房疾病。

V002-N00490.label: 粉刺性乳痈
V002-N00490.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜乳房疾病
V002-N00490.definition: 因肝郁化热，肉腐化脓而成。多有先天性乳头凹陷畸形，乳头中常伴粉渣样物排出，急性发作时脓液中常夹有粉渣样物质为主要表现的痈病类疾病。

V002-N00490.label: 粉刺性乳痈
V002-N00490.englishNames: plasma cell mastitis; comedomastitis; mammary abscess with acne
V002-N00490.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜乳房类病｜乳痈

V002-N00489.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00489.label: 乳发
V002-N00489.path: 第2部分：外科学｜乳房疾病
V002-N00489.definition: 以乳房红肿痛热，溃后大片皮肉腐烂坏死，甚至热毒内攻为特征的发。

V002-N00489.label: 乳发
V002-N00489.definition: 以乳房红肿痛热，溃后大片皮肉腐烂坏死， 甚至热毒内攻为主要表现的痈。

V002-N00489.label: 乳发
V002-N00489.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜乳房疾病
V002-N00489.definition: 是发生在乳房部肌肤之间，容易腐烂坏死的严重化脓性疾病。相当于西医的乳房部蜂窝组织炎或乳房坏疽。多发生于哺乳期妇女。

V002-N00489.label: 乳发
V002-N00489.englishNames: suppurative mastitis; mammary cellulitis; phlegmonous mastitis
V002-N00489.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜乳房类病｜乳痈

V002-N00489.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00489.label: 乳发
V002-N00489.aliases: 脱壳乳痈； Shell-bursting pyogenic abscess
V002-N00489.englishNames: suppurative mastitis; mammary cellulitis; phlegmonous mastitis; Acute septic mastitis
V002-N00489.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00489.definition: Characterized by redness, pain and a burning sensation of the breast, coupled with dark skin pigmentation after abscess rupture. In severe cases, restlessness, unconsciousness and delirium may be present. Often occurs when exogenous damp heat and toxic fire affects the liver and stomach meridians and remains in the skin around the breasts.

V002-N00489.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00489.label: 乳发
V002-N00489.englishNames: phlegmonous mastitis; Suppurative Mastitis; suppurative mastitis

V002-N00489.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00489.label: 乳发
V002-N00489.englishNames: phlegmonous mastitis; Suppurative Mastitis; suppurative mastitis
V002-N00489.definition: a serious suppurative inflammation of the breast leading to necrosis and abscess formation

V002-N00488.label: 男子乳痈
V002-N00488.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜乳房类病｜乳痈

V002-N00493.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00493.label: 乳癖
V002-N00493.path: 第2部分：外科学｜乳房疾病
V002-N00493.definition: 以乳房部疼痛结块，与月经周期及情志变化密切相关为主要表现的良性增生性疾病。

V002-N00493.label: 乳癖
V002-N00493.definition: 以乳房有形状大小不一的肿块，疼痛，与月 经周期相关为主要表现的，乳腺组织的良性 增生性疾病。

V002-N00493.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00493.label: 乳癖
V002-N00493.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医外科疾病｜乳腺疾病
V002-N00493.definition: 以乳房有形状大小不一的肿块，疼痛，与月经周期相关为主要表现的，乳腺组织的良性增生性疾病。

V002-N00493.label: 乳癖
V002-N00493.englishNames: lump in breast; Nodule Of The Breast
V002-N00493.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜乳房疾病
V002-N00493.definition: 是一种乳腺组织的良性增生性疾病。相当于西医的乳腺增生病。其特点是单侧或双侧乳房疼痛并出现肿块，乳痛和肿块与月经周期及情志变化密切相关。

V002-N00493.label: 乳癖
V002-N00493.englishNames: breast lump; lump in breast; mammary hyperplasia; Breast lump disorder; breast lump(hyperplasia of mammary gland)
V002-N00493.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜乳房类病

V002-N00493.label: 乳癖
V002-N00493.englishNames: breast lump; lump in breast; mammary hyperplasia; Breast lump disorder; breast lump(hyperplasia of mammary gland)
V002-N00493.path: 传统医学疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜女性生殖系统（包括分娩）病类｜其他女性生殖系统病类

V002-N00493.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00493.label: 乳癖
V002-N00493.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜儿科类

V002-N00493.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00493.label: 乳癖
V002-N00493.englishNames: breast lump; lump in breast; mammary hyperplasia; Breast lumps; Breast lump disorder; breast lump(hyperplasia of mammary gland)
V002-N00493.pinyinNames: ru xian; ru pi; rǔ pǐ
V002-N00493.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00493.definition: Characterized by breast lumps with or without pain that change with emotions or menstrual cycles. Contributing factors may include emotional disturbance and disharmony between the Chong and Ren meridians. These factors may cause stagnant qi, blood and phlegm to remain in the mammary gland.

V002-N00493.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00493.label: 乳癖
V002-N00493.englishNames: mammary hyperplasia; lump in breast; breast lump(hyperplasia of mammary gland)

V002-N00493.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00493.label: 乳癖
V002-N00493.englishNames: mammary hyperplasia; lump in breast; breast lump(hyperplasia of mammary gland)

V002-N00549.label: 干燥病
V002-N00549.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中毒及其他病类
V002-N00549.definition: 因素体阴虚，或感染邪毒而致津液生化不足，清窍、关节失其濡养所致。以口鼻干燥，眼干及涩痛、异物感等为主要表现的虚弱性疾病。

V002-N00549.label: 干燥病
V002-N00549.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语

V002-N00549.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00549.label: 干燥病
V002-N00549.pinyinNames: gan zao bing; gān zào bìng
V002-N00549.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00549.definition: Characterized by dryness in mouth, nose or eyes. It can be accompanied by no sweating, dry skin and bone joint pain. It is often caused by yin deficiency or toxin infection, leading to yin consumption and thus malnourishment of skin, orifices and joints.

V002-N00545.label: 脚气病
V002-N00545.path: 内科疾病｜气血津液疾病
V002-N00545.definition: 以腿脚麻木、酸痛、软弱，或挛急、肿胀，或枯 萎等为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00545.label: 脚气病
V002-N00545.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语

V002-N00545.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00545.label: 脚气病
V002-N00545.pinyinNames: jiao qi bing; jiǎo qì bìng
V002-N00545.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00545.definition: Characterized by leg weakness, painful calf muscles, poor coordination, tingling, a burning sensation and muscle tenderness, spasm and swelling. Muscle wasting and foot/toe drop may also be present. Often results from spleen deficiency or downward flowing of damp heat (due to improper diet with vitamin B1 deficiency).

V002-N00548.label: 脚气冲心
V002-N00548.englishNames: disease of weak foot affecting heart
V002-N00548.path: 内科疾病｜气血津液疾病
V002-N00548.definition: 以心悸气喘，面唇青紫，神志恍惚，恶心呕吐 等为主要表现的脚气病。

V002-N00548.label: 脚气冲心
V002-N00548.englishNames: disease of weak foot affecting heart; beriberi ramming the heart; beriberi involving heart
V002-N00548.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜脚气病

V002-N00548.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00548.label: 脚气冲心
V002-N00548.englishNames: Cardiac beriberi; disease of weak foot affecting heart; beriberi ramming the heart; beriberi involving heart
V002-N00548.pinyinNames: jiao qi chong xin; jiǎo qì chōng xīn
V002-N00548.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00548.definition: Characterized by leg weakness, palpitations, orthopnoea, face and lips cyanosis, mental confusion, nausea, vomiting and oedema due to long-term beriberi. It is often caused by weakened body after long-term illness, leading to damp toxins attacking the heart.

V002-N00547.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00547.label: 湿脚气
V002-N00547.path: 第1部分：内科学｜气血津液病｜脚气
V002-N00547.definition: 以腿脚肿胀酸软为特征的脚气病。

V002-N00547.label: 湿脚气
V002-N00547.path: 内科疾病｜气血津液疾病
V002-N00547.definition: 以肿胀酸软为主要表现的脚气病。

V002-N00547.label: 湿脚气
V002-N00547.englishNames: weak foot due to dampness; damp beriberi; wet beriberi
V002-N00547.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜脚气病

V002-N00547.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00547.label: 湿脚气
V002-N00547.englishNames: Wet beriberi; weak foot due to dampness; damp beriberi; wet beriberi
V002-N00547.pinyinNames: shi jiao qi; shī jiǎo qì
V002-N00547.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00547.definition: Characterized by swelling, soreness and weakness of lower legs. Associated symptoms include palpitations, cyanosis, oedema and cardiac dilatation.

V002-N00546.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00546.label: 干脚气
V002-N00546.path: 第1部分：内科学｜气血津液病｜脚气
V002-N00546.definition: 以腿脚肌肉枯萎、挛急为特征的脚气病。

V002-N00546.label: 干脚气
V002-N00546.path: 内科疾病｜气血津液疾病
V002-N00546.definition: 以枯萎、挛急为主要表现的脚气病。

V002-N00546.label: 干脚气
V002-N00546.englishNames: weak foot due to dryness; dry beriberi
V002-N00546.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜脚气病

V002-N00546.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00546.label: 干脚气
V002-N00546.englishNames: weak foot due to dryness; Dry beriberi; dry beriberi
V002-N00546.pinyinNames: gan jiao qi; gān jiǎo qì
V002-N00546.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00546.definition: Characterized by tingling or pain in legs and feet, and muscular atrophy and contracture. Associated symptoms may include mental confusion, delirium, foot/toe drop, abnormal gait and absence of knee reflex.

V002-N00550.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00550.label: 侏儒
V002-N00550.definition: 以身材异常矮小，性征缺乏而智力发育正常为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00550.label: 侏儒
V002-N00550.definition: 以身材异常矮小，性征缺乏而智力发育正常 为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00550.label: 侏儒
V002-N00550.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语

V002-N00550.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00550.label: 侏儒
V002-N00550.pinyinNames: zhu ru; zhū rú; zhu  ru
V002-N00550.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00550.definition: Characterized by unusually short limbs/torso, lack of secondary sexual characteristics, and normal intelligence. It is often caused by intracranial tumour or growth hormone deficiency.

V002-N00507.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00507.label: 痹病
V002-N00507.definition: 以肌肉、筋骨、关节酸痛、麻木、重着、灼热，或关节肿大、僵直、畸形为主要表现的疾病的统称。

V002-N00507.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）

V002-N00507.path: 中医内科学｜内科学肢体病

V002-N00507.label: 痹病
V002-N00507.definition: 以肌肉、筋骨、关节酸痛、麻木、重着、灼热， 或关节肿大、僵直、畸形为主要表现的疾病 的统称。

V002-N00507.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00507.label: 痹证
V002-N00507.aliases: 痹痛； 历节风； Arthralgia Syndrome
V002-N00507.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜肢体经络病证
V002-N00507.definition: 以肌肉、筋骨、关节酸痛、麻木、重着、灼热，或关节肿大、僵直、畸形为主要表现的疾病的统称。

V002-N00507.label: 痹病
V002-N00507.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜经络肢体病证
V002-N00507.definition: 泛指肌体正气不足，卫外不固，邪气乘虚而入，致使气血凝滞，经络痹阻，引起相关系统疾病的总称。

V002-N00507.label: 三痹
V002-N00507.aliases: 痹证； 风寒湿痹； 风湿痹病； 风湿痹痛
V002-N00507.englishNames: three kinds of arthralgia; three types of arthralgia
V002-N00507.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜经络肢体病证｜痹病
V002-N00507.definition: 因风寒湿邪杂至，导致气血运行不畅，经络阻滞所致。以关节和/或肌肉游走性酸楚、种着、疼痛等为主要表现的肢体痹病类疾病。

V002-N00507.label: 痹证类病
V002-N00507.aliases: 风湿病； 风湿痹病； 痹证； 痹病
V002-N00507.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语

V002-N00507.label: 痹病
V002-N00507.englishNames: arthralgia; bi disease; impediment disease; Joint impediment disorders
V002-N00507.path: 传统医学疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜骨、关节和肌肉系统病类

V002-N00507.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00507.label: 痹证类病
V002-N00507.aliases: 风湿病； 风湿痹病； 痹证； 痹病； Impediment disorders； Joint impediment disorders； Bi-impediment disease/pattern
V002-N00507.englishNames: bi-impediment diseases; category of impediment disease; Bi-impediment disorders
V002-N00507.pinyinNames: bi zheng lei bing; bì zhèng lèi bìng
V002-N00507.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00507.definition: A group of disorders characterized by joint pain, numbness and impaired movement due to wind, cold and dampness or heat attacking the meridians.

V002-N00507.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00507.label: 痹病

V002-N00535.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00535.label: 燥痹
V002-N00535.definition: 以口干、眼干，甚则肢体疼痛，肌肤枯涩，脏器损害为特征的痹病。

V002-N00535.label: 燥痹
V002-N00535.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜痹证类病

V002-N00535.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00535.label: 燥痹
V002-N00535.englishNames: dry impediment; dry bi; Dryness-related impediment
V002-N00535.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00535.definition: Characterized by dry mouth, eyes, nose and throat, scanty or absent saliva/nasal discharge/tears, dryness or mild pain of the eyes, dry skin, scanty or absent sweating, bone/joint pain, joint rigidity/deformation, and impaired joint flexion and extension. In severe cases, withered, scaly skin and damage to multiple organs and systems. Often results from exposure to dry heat or internal cold dampness transforming into dryness to consume yin fluids. As a result, qi and blood fail to nourish the zang–fu organs, orifices, tissues, skins, bones and sinews.

V002-N00526.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00526.label: 鹤膝风
V002-N00526.definition: 风邪外袭,阴寒凝滞,经络气血亏损,以病后膝关节肿大，股胫变细，形如鹤膝等为特征的痹病。

V002-N00526.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00526.label: 鹤膝风
V002-N00526.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医骨伤科疾病
V002-N00526.definition: 发生于膝关节，日久膝肿粗大，上下股胫枯细，形如鹤膝，属于流痰的痨病类疾病。

V002-N00526.label: 买麻藤
V002-N00526.aliases: 白钻； 驳骨藤； 大瓠藤； 大节藤； 果米藤； 含水藤； 鹤膝风； 接骨藤； 苦楝藤； 老熊果； 麻骨风； 买子藤； 倪藤； 脱节藤； 竹节藤
V002-N00526.englishNames: Common Jointfir Stem; Stem of  Common Jointfir; Stem of Smalleaf

V002-N00527.label: 腰痹
V002-N00527.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜经络肢体病证｜痹病｜顽痹
V002-N00527.definition: 因外伤、劳损或寒湿侵袭腰部所致。以腰部长期疼痛，弯腰、受寒或劳累加重，或活动受限为主要表现的肢体痹病类疾病。

V002-N00527.label: 腰痹
V002-N00527.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜痹证类病

V002-N00527.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00527.label: 腰痹
V002-N00527.aliases: Lower back pain disorder； Lumbago disorder
V002-N00527.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00527.definition: Characterized by chronic or recurrent lower back pain that aggravates upon bending, exposure to cold or fatigue. In severe cases, impaired movement may be present. Often results from trauma, strain or exposure to cold dampness.

V002-N00528.label: 寒湿证腰痛
V002-N00528.aliases: 寒湿腰痛； 腰痛寒湿证

V002-N00528.definition: 多由肾瘅迁延不愈或反复发作而成。以乏力，腰痛腰酸，排尿异常为主要表现的内脏胀［著］病类疾病。

V002-N00528.label: 肾着
V002-N00528.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜痹证类病｜腰痹

V002-N00528.label: 肾著
V002-N00528.englishNames: affection of kidney by colddampness; kidney disorder with cold painful waist; Kidney stagnation disorder
V002-N00528.path: 传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾系病类

V002-N00528.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00528.label: 肾着
V002-N00528.englishNames: low back pain due to cold dampness; kidney affection by cold dampness; Lower back pain due to cold dampness
V002-N00528.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00528.definition: Characterized by lower back pain and heaviness with a cold sensation and difficulty turning over. Often occurs when cold dampness obstructs the meridians in the low back.

V002-N00512.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00512.label: 热痹
V002-N00512.englishNames: heat bi; arthralgia caused by heat pathogen

V002-N00512.definition: 热毒搏于关节，以起病急骤，关节疼痛，局部红肿灼热，痛不可触，屈伸不利，得冷稍舒为主要表现的痹病。

V002-N00512.label: 热痹
V002-N00512.definition: 因热毒搏于关节，以起病急骤，关节疼痛，局 部红肿灼热，痛不可触，屈伸不利，得冷稍舒 为主要表现的痹病。

V002-N00512.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00512.label: 热痹
V002-N00512.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜肢体经络病证｜痹证
V002-N00512.definition: 热毒流注关节，或内有蕴热，复感外邪，与热相搏于关节。以发热，患病关节红、肿、热、痛等为主要表现的肢体痹病类疾病。

V002-N00512.label: 热痹
V002-N00512.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜经络肢体病证｜痹病
V002-N00512.definition: 因热毒流注关节，或内有蕴热，复感外邪，与热相搏于关节。以发热，患病关节红、肿、热、痛等为主要表现的肢体痹病类疾病。

V002-N00512.label: 热痹
V002-N00512.englishNames: heat impediment; arthralgia due to heattoxicity; Arthralgia due to Heattoxicity; heat bi; arthralgia caused by heat pathogen
V002-N00512.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜痹证类病

V002-N00512.label: 热痹
V002-N00512.englishNames: heat impediment; heat bi; heat arthralgia; Heat impediment; arthralgia due to heattoxicity; Arthralgia due to Heattoxicity; arthralgia caused by heat pathogen
V002-N00512.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00512.definition: Characterized by joint redness, swelling, pain, hotness and impaired movement that is alleviated with cold. Associated symptoms may include fever, thirst and scanty, dark yellow urine. Often occurs when toxic heat or damp heat flows into the joints or when combined internal heat and exogenous pathogenic heat affect the joints.

V002-N00517.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肢体病｜痹病
V002-N00517.definition: 以四肢筋脉肿胀、疼痛,渐至肌肉、关节肿胀，皮色暗红，屈伸不利为特征的痹病。

V002-N00517.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00517.label: 筋痹
V002-N00517.path: 中医内科学｜内科学肢体病
V002-N00517.definition: 以四肢筋脉肿胀、疼痛，渐至肌肉、关节肿胀，皮色暗红，屈伸不利为主要表现的痹病。

V002-N00517.label: 筋痹
V002-N00517.definition: 以四肢筋脉肿胀、疼痛，渐至肌肉、关节肿 胀，皮色暗红，屈伸不利为主要表现的肢体 痹病类疾病。

V002-N00517.label: 筋痹
V002-N00517.englishNames: Articular Rheumatism; Muscular Rheumatism; Painful Tendons; Syndrome due to Stagnation of Cold-wetness Evil in Tendons
V002-N00517.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜经络肢体病证｜痹病
V002-N00517.definition: 多由过度劳累、筋脉受伤，或感受寒冷、气血痹阻所致。以四肢筋脉肿胀、疼痛，渐至叽肉、关节肿胀，皮色暗红，屈伸不利为主要表现的肢体痹病类疾病。

V002-N00517.label: 筋痹
V002-N00517.englishNames: muscular rheumatism; impediment of the sinew; tendon bi; sinew impediment
V002-N00517.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜痹证类病

V002-N00517.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00517.label: 筋痹
V002-N00517.englishNames: muscular rheumatism; tendon bi; impediment of the sinew; Sinew impediment; sinew impediment
V002-N00517.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00517.definition: Characterized by swelling and pain of the tendons, muscles and joints with a dark red skin discolouration and impaired joint movement. Often results from over-exertion, tendon injury or cold-induced stagnation of qi and blood.

V002-N00517.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00517.label: 筋痹

V002-N00517.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准

V002-N00516.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00516.label: 肌痹
V002-N00516.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肢体病｜痹病
V002-N00516.definition: 风寒湿热毒邪入于肌肉筋脉,以对称性近端肌肉乏力、疼痛、麻木，或有萎缩，伴眼睑紫红色斑疹等为特征的痹病。

V002-N00516.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00516.label: 肌痹
V002-N00516.path: 中医内科学｜内科学肢体病
V002-N00516.definition: 风寒湿热毒邪入于肌肉筋脉，以对称性近端肌肉乏力、疼痛、麻木，或有萎缩，伴眼睑紫红色癍疹等为主要表现的痹病。

V002-N00516.label: 肌痹
V002-N00516.definition: 以对称性近端肌肉乏力、疼痛、麻木，或有萎 缩，伴眼睑紫红色斑疹等为主要表现的肢体 痹病类疾病。

V002-N00516.label: 肌痹
V002-N00516.englishNames: A Syndrome Manifested as Myalgia, Numbness and Flaccidity; Painful Muscles
V002-N00516.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜经络肢体病证｜痹病
V002-N00516.definition: 多因热毒与痰湿郁于肌肤，留而不去，肌肤失养。以对称性近端肌肉乏力、疼痛、麻木，或有萎缩，伴眼睑紫红色斑疹等为主要表现的肢体痹病类疾病。

V002-N00516.label: 皮肤疼痛
V002-N00516.aliases: 肌痹； 肌肤疼痛； 皮肤痛； 皮痛
V002-N00516.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜疼痛｜疼痛-按部位分
V002-N00516.definition: 属于皮肤科视诊所见的一种异常症状。是指周身肌肉、皮肤疼痛无力，痠楚不仁，活动受限，兼见皮肤红斑、水肿的症状。

V002-N00516.label: 肌痹
V002-N00516.englishNames: muscle bidisease; dermatomyositis; muscle bi; muscle impediment; flesh impediment
V002-N00516.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜痹证类病

V002-N00516.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00516.label: 肉痹
V002-N00516.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00516.definition: Characterized by weakness, pain, numbness or atrophy in the proximal musculature, coupled with dark red maculae on the eyelids. Often occurs when toxic heat and phlegm dampness remain in the skin.

V002-N00516.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00516.label: 肌痹

V002-N00531.label: 腿风
V002-N00531.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜经络肢体病证
V002-N00531.definition: 因经气失常所致。以临睡时下肢自觉酸胀不适，须相互摩擦，影响睡眠为主要表现的形体疾病。

V002-N00531.label: 腿风
V002-N00531.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜痹证类病

V002-N00531.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00531.label: 腿风
V002-N00531.englishNames: restless legs syndrome; Restless legs pattern
V002-N00531.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00531.definition: Characterized by intolerable soreness, numbness and a burning pain felt deep in the calf muscle. Individuals may experience a crawling feeling, itching, pricking pain that may occasionally affect the arms. The symptoms are alleviated by moving the affected leg, change of body position, walking or tapping the affected area. However, the symptoms recur after relaxation and can severely disturb the sleep. Often occurs when pathogenic wind retains in the Ying nutrients and Wei-defence and causes meridian qi and blood to stagnate.

V002-N00530.label: 膝痹
V002-N00530.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜经络肢体病证｜痹病｜顽痹
V002-N00530.definition: 因劳损或年高，膝失精血充养，经气不利所致。以膝部长期固定疼痛，活动时关节内有声响等为主要表现的肢体痹病类疾病。

V002-N00530.label: 膝痹
V002-N00530.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜痹证类病

V002-N00530.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00530.label: 膝痹
V002-N00530.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00530.definition: Characterized by knee pain (in a fixed position), swelling, joint stiffness and impaired movement, coupled with bony crepitus. Contributing factors may include age-related malnourishment of the knee joints, impaired meridian qi, or long-term standing and/or weight bearing.

V002-N00514.label: 肢痹
V002-N00514.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜经络肢体病证｜痹病
V002-N00514.definition: 因邪客经络，经气不畅，阳气郁遏不伸，气血痹阻所致。以四肢末端对称性麻木不仁，疼痛等感觉消失，严重者可延至肘膝为主要表现的肢体痹病类疾病。

V002-N00514.label: 肢痹
V002-N00514.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜痹证类病

V002-N00524.label: 顽痹
V002-N00524.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜经络肢体病证｜痹病
V002-N00524.definition: 因风寒湿邪久羁，或因劳累损伤、年老正虚，肌肉骨骼失却精血充养，经气阻痹所致。以固定部位的筋骨关节反复发作性疼痛，麻木不已，活动受限，遇风寒加重等为主要表现的肢体痹病类疾病。

V002-N00524.label: 肢体麻木
V002-N00524.aliases: Numbness of the Muscles； 不仁； 发麻； 发木； 麻痹； 顽痹； 顽麻； 肢体发麻； 肢体麻痹； 肢体麻木不仁
V002-N00524.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜麻木
V002-N00524.definition: 肢体肌肤局限性知觉障碍的表现，“麻”指自觉肌肉内有如虫行感，按之不止；“木”指皮肤无痛痒感觉，按之不知。

V002-N00524.label: 顽痹
V002-N00524.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜痹证类病

V002-N00524.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00524.label: 顽痹
V002-N00524.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00524.definition: Characterized by recurrent joint pain, numbness, deformity and impaired movement that aggravate upon exposure to wind cold. Contributing factors may include a history of wind-cold-dampness bi-impediment, over-exertion, or age-related malnourishment of the joints.

V002-N00523.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00523.label: 周痹
V002-N00523.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肢体病｜痹病
V002-N00523.definition: 以周身疼痛，上下游行，或沉重麻木，项背拘急，脉濡涩为特征的痹病。

V002-N00523.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00523.label: 周痹
V002-N00523.path: 中医内科学｜内科学肢体病
V002-N00523.definition: 以周身疼痛，上下游行，或沉重麻木，项背拘急，脉濡涩为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00523.label: 周痹
V002-N00523.definition: 以周身疼痛，上下游行，或沉重麻木，项背拘 急，脉濡涩为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00523.label: 周痹
V002-N00523.englishNames: general arthralgia; bi disease with general pain; general impediment
V002-N00523.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜痹证类病

V002-N00523.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00523.label: 周痹
V002-N00523.englishNames: Generalized impediment; general arthralgia; bi disease with general apin; general impediment; bi disease with general pain
V002-N00523.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00523.definition: Characterized by recurrent, migratory and asymmetrical joint pain. Associated symptoms may include limb heaviness, numbness, joint redness and swelling, and neck stiffness. Often occurs in patients with a weakened immune system when wind, cold, dampness or heat affect the blood flow.

V002-N00522.label: 偏痹
V002-N00522.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜经络肢体病证｜痹病
V002-N00522.definition: 因腰部闪挫、劳损、寒湿侵袭等原因，使经气阻痹所致。以腰痛向一侧下肢后外侧放射，麻木、疼痛，腹压增加时疼痛加重，活动受限为主要表现的肢体痹病类疾病。

V002-N00522.label: 偏痹
V002-N00522.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜痹证类病

V002-N00522.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00522.label: 偏痹
V002-N00522.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00522.definition: Characterized by pain radiating along the back or outside of one leg from the lower back, accompanied by numbness or pain that aggravates with increased intra-abdominal pressure, and restricted movement. Contributing factors may include acute lumbar sprain, chronic lumbar strain, or cold dampness obstructing the meridians.

V002-N00519.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00519.label: 骨痹
V002-N00519.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肢体病｜痹病｜五脏痹
V002-N00519.definition: 以肢体麻木无力，骨骼疼痛，大关节僵硬变形，活动受限等为特征的痹病。

V002-N00519.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）

V002-N00519.label: 骨痹
V002-N00519.definition: 以肢体麻木无力，骨骼疼痛，大关节僵硬变 形，活动受限等为主要表现的肢体痹病类疾 病。

V002-N00519.label: 骨痹
V002-N00519.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜经络肢体病证｜痹病
V002-N00519.definition: 因风寒湿邪久羁，或年老体衰，骨失充养，骨质脆弱所致。以肢体麻木无力，骨骼疼痛，大关节僵硬变形，活动受限等为主要表现的肢体痹病类疾病。

V002-N00519.label: 骨痹
V002-N00519.englishNames: bone bi; bone bidisease; bone impediment
V002-N00519.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜痹证类病

V002-N00519.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00519.label: 骨痹
V002-N00519.englishNames: bone bi; Bone impediment; bone bidisease; bone impediment
V002-N00519.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00519.definition: Characterized by bone pain, joint stiffness, deformity or impaired movement, and limb numbness and weakness. In severe cases, kyphosis of the lumbar spine, impaired extension of the leg, leg weakness or lower back pain may be present. Often results from retention of wind, cold and dampness. It may also result from age-related malnourishment of the bones.

V002-N00519.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00519.label: 骨痹

V002-N00525.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00525.label: 痹证
V002-N00525.aliases: 痹痛； 历节风； Arthralgia Syndrome
V002-N00525.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜肢体经络病证
V002-N00525.definition: 以肌肉、筋骨、关节酸痛、麻木、重着、灼热，或关节肿大、僵直、畸形为主要表现的疾病的统称。

V002-N00525.label: 历节风
V002-N00525.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜痹证类病

V002-N00525.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00525.label: 历节风
V002-N00525.englishNames: multiple arthralgia; Joint wind; joint-running wind
V002-N00525.pinyinNames: li jie feng; lì jié fēng
V002-N00525.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00525.definition: Characterized by severe, migratory joint pain, swelling, redness and hotness, coupled with impaired movement. The symptoms are aggravated at night and alleviate during the day. Often occurs when wind, cold or dampness affect the meridians or, over time, transform into heat to affect the joints.

V002-N00532.label: 足跟痹
V002-N00532.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜经络肢体病证｜痹病｜顽痹
V002-N00532.definition: 因外伤或劳损，肾精气不足所致。以足跟疼痛、麻木，行走时加重为主要表现的肢体痹病类疾病。

V002-N00532.label: 足跟痹
V002-N00532.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜痹证类病

V002-N00532.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00532.label: 足跟痹
V002-N00532.pinyinNames: zú gēn bì; zu gen bi
V002-N00532.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00532.definition: Characterized by heel pain or numbness that is aggravated on walking. It is often caused by wear and tear of bone, delayed healing of trauma, age-related deficiency of the liver and kidney, bone deformation or bone spurs.

V002-N00515.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00515.label: 皮痹
V002-N00515.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肢体病｜痹病
V002-N00515.definition: 以局部或全身皮肤硬化为主症，严重者可累及脏腑的痹病。

V002-N00515.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）

V002-N00515.path: 中医内科学｜内科学肢体病
V002-N00515.definition: 以局部或全身皮肤硬化为主症，严重者可累及脏腑的痹病。

V002-N00515.label: 皮痹
V002-N00515.definition: 以局部或全身皮肤进行性肿硬、萎缩，严重 者可累及脏腑为主要表现的痹病类疾病。

V002-N00515.label: 皮痹
V002-N00515.englishNames: Numbness of the Skin; Skin Blockage Syndrome; Syndrome From Wind-cold Evil Involving the Skin
V002-N00515.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病

V002-N00515.label: 皮痹
V002-N00515.englishNames: scleroderma; skin impediment; skin numbness; dermatosclerosis
V002-N00515.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜痹证类病

V002-N00515.englishNames: skin bi; scleroderma; skin impediment; Skin impediment; skin numbness; dermatosclerosis
V002-N00515.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00515.definition: Characterized by progressive local or systemic skin swelling, hardness or atrophy. In severe cases, the zang–fu organs may be affected. Often occurs when wind, cold, dampness or heat remain in the skin or reside in the zang–fu organs.

V002-N00515.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V002-N00515.label: 皮痹
V002-N00515.definition: a disease characterized by hardening and thickening of the skin, followed by atrophy at the late stage,referring to scleroderma

V002-N00521.label: 血痹
V002-N00521.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜经络肢体病证｜痹病

V002-N00521.label: 血痹

V002-N00521.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00521.definition: Characterized by paroxysmal paleness, dark purple or reddish extremities (fingers/toes). Red patches, sensation of finger cold and/or numbness may be present. Often occurs when wind cold affects the blood vessels. Emotional stress may also disturb the harmony between Ying nutrients and blood.

V002-N00520.label: 脊痹
V002-N00520.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肢体病｜痹病
V002-N00520.definition: 以腰脊疼痛，关节肿痛，两胯活动受限,甚至腰脊强直僵硬，脊柱弯曲变形为特征的痹病。

V002-N00520.label: 脊痹
V002-N00520.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜经络肢体病证｜痹病
V002-N00520.definition: 因肾虚于先，寒邪深入骨髓，使气血凝滞，脊失温煦所致。以腰背疼痛，两胯活动受限，严重者脊柱弯曲变形，甚至强直僵硬，或背部酸痛、肌肉僵硬沉重感，阴雨天及劳累为甚的肢体痹病类疾病。

V002-N00520.label: 脊痹
V002-N00520.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜痹证类病

V002-N00533.label: 转筋
V002-N00533.definition: 局部肌肉拘挛强直的表现，常见于小腿腓肠肌。

V002-N00533.label: 转筋
V002-N00533.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜经络肢体病证
V002-N00533.definition: 局部肌肉拘挛强直的表现，常见于小腿腓肠肌。

V002-N00533.label: 转筋
V002-N00533.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜痹证类病

V002-N00533.label: 转筋
V002-N00533.path: 传统医学疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜骨、关节和肌肉系统病类

V002-N00533.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00533.label: 转筋
V002-N00533.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜机体活动情况

V002-N00533.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00533.label: 转筋
V002-N00533.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N00533.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00533.label: 转筋
V002-N00533.aliases: 腓腨转筋； （腓腨）转筋； Muscle cramp disorder； Muscle spasm disorder； 腓臑转筋
V002-N00533.englishNames: Muscle spasm disorder; muscle cramp; Leg cramp
V002-N00533.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00533.definition: Characterized by a sudden, uncontrolled muscle contraction in the lower leg, coupled with stiffness and impaired flexion and extension. The symptoms can be alleviated by pulling, twisting or hot compression on the affected limb. Often results from ageing or exposure to cold.

V002-N00533.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00533.label: 转筋

V002-N00529.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00529.label: 大偻
V002-N00529.definition: 以腰骶胯疼痛，腰脊僵直，活动受限，渐及胸颈，腰椎生理弯曲消失，乃至腰弯、背突、颈重、肩随，屈伸转侧不利，可伴见膝腿乏力，关节游走窜痛，遇寒加重，或五心烦热等为特征的痹病。

V002-N00529.label: 大偻
V002-N00529.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜痹证类病

V002-N00529.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00529.label: 大偻
V002-N00529.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00529.definition: Characterized by pain in the lower back or gluteal region, stiffness of the lower back, and impaired movement. Over time, individuals may present with loss of spinal mobility, and limitation of anterior flexion, lateral flexion, and extension of the lumbar spine. Leg weakness, migratory joint pain that aggravates upon cold and feverish sensations in the palms, soles and chest may also be present. Often results from kidney deficiency or exposure to wind, cold and damp heat.

V002-N00534.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00534.label: 痛风
V002-N00534.definition: 以躅趾、跖趾关节及足背、足跟、踝、指、腕等小关节红肿剧痛，反复发作，关节畸形,形成痛风石为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00534.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00534.label: 痛风
V002-N00534.path: 中医内科学｜内科学肢体病
V002-N00534.definition: 以◎(造字：左足右母)趾、跖趾关节、足背、足跟、踝、指、腕等小关节红肿剧痛，反复发作，关节畸形，形成痛风石为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00534.label: 痛风
V002-N00534.definition: 以姆趾、跖趾关节、足背、足跟、踝、指、腕等 小关节红肿剧痛，反复发作，关节畸形，形成 痛风石为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00534.label: 痛风
V002-N00534.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜经络肢体病证｜痹病
V002-N00534.definition: 因饮食失宜，脾肾不足，外邪痹阻，痰瘀沉积于关节周围。以拇趾、跖趾关节、足背、足跟、踝、指、腕等小关节红肿剧痛反复发作，关节畸形，形成“痛风石”为主要表现的肢体痹病类疾病。

V002-N00534.label: 痛风
V002-N00534.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜痹证类病

V002-N00534.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00534.label: 痛风
V002-N00534.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00534.definition: Characterized by recurrent attacks of a red, tender, hot and swollen joint, coupled with joint deformity and trophi formation. It most commonly affects the metatarsal-phalangeal joint at the base of the big toe. Other joints, such as the heels, ankles, knees, wrists, and fingers, may also be affected. Often occurs with phlegm stasis and trophi deposits in joints due to an improper diet, exposure to pathogenic factors, or damp heat accumulation within the body.

V002-N00534.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00534.label: 痛风

V002-N00513.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00513.label: 尪痹
V002-N00513.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肢体病｜痹病
V002-N00513.definition: 以肢体关节疼痛，屈伸不利,关节肿大、僵硬、变形,甚则肌肉萎缩，筋脉拘紧,肘膝不得伸,或尻以代踵、脊以代头而成废人，舌质暗红，脉细涩为特征的重证骨痹。

V002-N00513.label: 尪痹
V002-N00513.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜经络肢体病证｜痹病
V002-N00513.definition: 因风寒湿热之邪留滞于筋骨关节，久之损伤肝肾阴血。以关节晨僵，小关节对称性多发性肿痛，活动受限，甚至僵硬变形为主要表现的肢体痹病类疾病。

V002-N00513.label: 尪痹
V002-N00513.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜痹证类病

V002-N00513.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00513.label: 尪痹
V002-N00513.englishNames: aggrevated bi; Joint impediment; arthral impediment
V002-N00513.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00513.definition: Characterized by morning (joint) stiffness, multiple symmetrical pain of smaller joints, restricted movement or joint deformity. Often occurs when wind, cold, dampness or heat remain in the sinews, bones or joints, and over time, damages the yin blood of the liver and kidney.

V002-N00513.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00513.label: 尪痹

V002-N00501.label: 胁肋痛
V002-N00501.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语

V002-N00501.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00501.label: 胁痛
V002-N00501.englishNames: Hypochondriac Pain; hypochondriac pain; Pain in the subcostal region; Hypochondrium pain disorder
V002-N00501.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00501.definition: Pain on one or both sides of the subcostal region often results from qi stagnation or bile accumulation. It is commonly seen in liver cancer, liver abscess, liver heat, liver distension, ascites, gallbladder heat, gallbladder distension, pleural effusion, masses below the left subcostal region or fibrinous pleurisy.

V002-N00551.label: 肥胖病
V002-N00551.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语

V002-N00551.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00551.label: 肥胖病
V002-N00551.pinyinNames: fei pang bing; féi pàng bìng
V002-N00551.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00551.definition: Characterized by evenly distributed excess body fat and body weight exceeding the standard weight of the same sex, age and height by more than 20%. Individuals may experience fatigue and slow movement. It is often caused by ingestion of oily, fatty food, physical inactivity, spleen deficiency and subsequently, accumulation of phlegm dampness.

V002-N00502.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00502.label: 疝气
V002-N00502.definition: 以阴囊、小腹疼痛肿起,涉及腰、胁、背以及心窝部、脐周，伴有四肢厥冷,冷气抢心，止作无时为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00502.label: 疝气
V002-N00502.path: 外科疾病｜外科其他疾病
V002-N00502.definition: 以阴囊、小腹疼痛肿起，涉及腰、胁、背以及 心窝部、脐周，伴有四肢厥冷，冷气枪心，止 作无时为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00502.label: 疝气
V002-N00502.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜泌尿、男性前阴病
V002-N00502.definition: 阴囊、小腹疼痛肿起，涉及腰、胁、背以及心窝部、脐周，伴有四肢厥冷，冷气抢心，止作无时为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00502.label: 疝气类病
V002-N00502.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语

V002-N00502.label: 疝气
V002-N00502.path: 传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾系病类

V002-N00502.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00502.label: 疝气
V002-N00502.englishNames: hernia; Lower abdominal colic disorder; Hernia
V002-N00502.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00502.definition: Characterized by an abnormal protrusion of abdominal cavity contents into the scrotum or inguinal canal. Contributing factors include maldevelopment, ageing, spleen qi deficiency or stagnation of qi and blood. It may also result from increased negative abdominal pressure due to crying, coughing, emotions or straining due to constipation or problems with urination.

V002-N00502.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00502.label: 水疝

V002-N00502.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00502.label: 水疝
V002-N00502.definition: an accumulation of fluid in the testicle

V002-N00506.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00506.label: 筋疝
V002-N00506.path: 第2部分：外科学｜其他｜疝气
V002-N00506.definition: 以阴囊筋脉曲张，伴有坠胀为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00506.label: 筋疝
V002-N00506.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜泌尿、男性前阴病
V002-N00506.definition: 因血脉瘀滞所致。以阴囊筋脉曲张如蚯蚓状，伴有坠胀为主要表现的疝病类疾病。

V002-N00506.label: 筋疝
V002-N00506.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜疝气类病

V002-N00506.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00506.label: 筋疝
V002-N00506.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00506.definition: Characterized by an enlargement of the veins within the scrotum (that resemble earthworms), coupled with a bearing-down sensation. Often results from stagnation of qi and blood within the scrotum.

V002-N00504.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00504.label: 水疝
V002-N00504.path: 第2部分：外科学｜其他｜疝气
V002-N00504.definition: 以皮色光亮，状如水晶，肿痛不消，脉弦数为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00504.label: 水疝
V002-N00504.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜泌尿、男性前阴病
V002-N00504.definition: 是指睾丸或精索鞘膜积液所引起的阴囊或精索部的囊形肿物。

V002-N00504.label: 水疝
V002-N00504.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜疝气类病

V002-N00504.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00504.label: 水疝
V002-N00504.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00504.definition: Characterized by a painless enlargement in the scrotum on one or both sides, accompanied by a bearing-down sensation, impalpable testis, absence of redness or pain and positive transillumination test. Often results from an accumulation of water dampness inside the scrotum.

V002-N00504.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00504.label: 水疝

V002-N00504.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00504.label: 水疝
V002-N00504.definition: an accumulation of fluid in the testicle

V002-N00505.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00505.label: 血疝
V002-N00505.englishNames: blood hernia;hernia due to blood stasis
V002-N00505.path: 第2部分：外科学｜其他｜疝气
V002-N00505.definition: 以阴囊部血肿，皮色紫暗为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00505.label: 血疝
V002-N00505.englishNames: Bloody Hernia; Carbuncle of the Lower Abdomen Near the External Genitalia; Extravasation of the Scrotum
V002-N00505.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜泌尿、男性前阴病
V002-N00505.definition: 因跌打损伤，或因手术，导致阴囊瘀血。以阴囊肿大，皮色紫暗为主要表现的疝病类疾病。

V002-N00505.label: 血疝
V002-N00505.englishNames: hernia due to blood stasis; blood hernia
V002-N00505.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜疝气类病

V002-N00505.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00505.label: 血疝
V002-N00505.englishNames: hernia due to blood stasis; blood hernia; Haematocele
V002-N00505.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00505.definition: Characterized by enlargement of the scrotum with a dark purple skin discolouration. Often occurs when traumatic injuries or surgery cause stagnation of qi and blood in the scrotum.

V002-N00503.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00503.label: 气疝
V002-N00503.path: 第2部分：外科学｜其他｜疝气
V002-N00503.definition: 气怒郁于下焦，以腹部及外阴部疼痛为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00503.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00503.label: 狐疝
V002-N00503.path: 第2部分：外科学｜其他｜疝气
V002-N00503.definition: 以昼则肿坠，夜则入腹，按之有声，如狐之昼出夜归为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00503.label: 狐疝
V002-N00503.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中毒及其他病类
V002-N00503.definition: 因肝气失于疏泄，或小儿、老年气弱，或腹内压力增加时，使肠管等腹内器官滑入阴囊而成。以腹股沟处有肿物突起，时大时小，胀痛恨作，如狐之出入无常为主要表现的疝病类疾病。

V002-N00503.label: 狐疝
V002-N00503.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜疝气类病

V002-N00503.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00503.label: 狐疝
V002-N00503.englishNames: inguinal hernia; indirect hernia; Inguinal hernia
V002-N00503.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00503.definition: Characterized by a protrusion of abdominal cavity contents through the inguinal canal. It may cause pain and distension that is aggravated when standing and alleviated when lying down. Contributing factors may include failure of the liver to maintain free flow of qi, qi deficiency in infants or the elderly, or increased intra-abdominal pressure.

V002-N00503.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00503.label: 狐疝

V002-N00552.label: 糙皮病
V002-N00552.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中毒及其他病类
V002-N00552.definition: 因饮食糙劣，或脾胃虚弱，摄食不良，饮食精微不足以营养肌肤所致。以皮肤粗糙脱屑为主要表现的虚弱性疾病。

V002-N00552.label: 糙皮病
V002-N00552.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语

V002-N00552.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00552.label: 糙皮病
V002-N00552.pinyinNames: cao pi bing; cāo pí bìng
V002-N00552.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00552.definition: Characterized by inflamed skin that may progress into skin lesion(s) and desquamation. Associated symptoms may include mouth/tongue ulceration, abdominal pain, diarrhoea, and hypoesthesia of the extremities. In severe cases, restlessness, depression, dementia, delirium or unconsciousness may be present. It is often caused by dietary lack of niacin, weakness of the spleen and stomach and subsequently, malnourishment of the skin and zang–fu organs.

V002-N01185.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V002-N01185.label: 鼻塞
V002-N01185.path: 中医耳鼻喉科学｜耳鼻喉科诊断

V002-N01185.label: 鼻塞
V002-N01185.aliases: Nasal obstruction； 鼻塞不通； 鼻塞不闻香臭； 鼻塞难通
V002-N01185.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜五官症状｜鼻症状
V002-N01185.definition: 鼻腔堵塞，通气不畅的表现。

V002-N01185.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N01185.label: 鼻塞
V002-N01185.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜五官科类

V002-N01185.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N01185.label: 鼻塞
V002-N01185.aliases: 鼻不通气； 鼻堵； 鼻窒
V002-N01185.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N01185.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01185.label: 鼻塞

V002-N01185.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01185.label: 鼻塞

V002-N01187.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01187.label: 鼻窒

V002-N01022.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01022.label: 小儿泄泻
V002-N01022.path: 第7部分：儿科学｜脾胃系病
V002-N01022.definition: 发生于小儿的以粪便稀薄而不成形，排便次数增加为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01022.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N01022.label: 小儿泄泻
V002-N01022.path: 中医儿科学｜儿科学脾胃病
V002-N01022.definition: 发生于小儿的以粪便稀薄，排便次数增加，或粪便稀薄而不成形为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01022.label: 小儿泄泻
V002-N01022.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证
V002-N01022.definition: 是以大便次数增多，粪质稀薄或如水样为主症的一种小儿常见病。由外感六淫，内伤乳食，脾胃虚弱导致运化失常所致。

V002-N01022.label: 小儿泄泻
V002-N01022.pinyinNames: xiao er xie xie; xiao dong xie xie
V002-N01022.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N00995.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00995.label: 小儿咳嗽
V002-N00995.definition: 发生于小儿的以咳嗽为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00995.label: 小儿咳嗽
V002-N00995.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证
V002-N00995.definition: 咳嗽是以咳嗽阵作为主症的肺系病证。有声无痰为咳，有痰无声为嗽，有声有痰为咳嗽。小儿咳嗽发生的原因，有外因和内因之分，外因责之于感受外邪，其中又以感受风邪为主。内因责之于肺脾虚弱，痰自内生。小儿因肺脏娇嫩，卫外不固，易为外邪所侵，故以外感咳嗽为多见。

V002-N00995.label: 小儿咳嗽
V002-N00995.pinyinNames: xiao dong ke su; xiao er ke sou; xiao er ke su
V002-N00995.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N00996.label: 百晬嗽
V002-N00996.aliases: 乳嗽； 胎嗽； 百晬咳； 百晬内嗽
V002-N00996.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病｜小儿咳嗽

V002-N00996.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00996.label: 百晬嗽
V002-N00996.aliases: 乳嗽； 胎嗽； 百晬咳； 百晬内嗽
V002-N00996.englishNames: hundred-day cough; Neonatal cough; hundry-day cough
V002-N00996.pinyinNames: bai zui su; bai 晬su; bǎi zuì sòu
V002-N00996.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00996.definition: Characterized by cough with profuse sputum and rapid breathing. Often occurs in a newborn within one hundred days after birth. This condition often occurs when wind attacks the lung, causing heat and phlegm to obstruct the free flow of lung qi.

V002-N00996.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00996.label: 百晬内嗽

V002-N00996.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00996.label: 百晬内嗽
V002-N00996.definition: cough with sputum and dyspnea occurring in a newborn within one hundred days after birth

V002-N01040.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01040.label: 佝偻病
V002-N01040.definition: 婴幼儿维生素D及其活性代谢物缺乏而引起的钙、磷代谢紊乱，以骨质变软、骨发育障碍、畸形为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01040.label: 佝偻病
V002-N01040.definition: 以小儿发育迟缓，骨软变形为主要表现的疾 病。

V002-N01040.label: 佝偻病
V002-N01040.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证
V002-N01040.definition: 是婴幼儿时期常见的慢性营养缺乏性疾病。以多汗，夜啼，烦躁，枕秃，肌肉松驰，囟门迟闭，甚至鸡胸肋翻，下肢弯曲等为特征。

V002-N01040.label: 佝偻病
V002-N01040.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N01038.label: 赤游丹
V002-N01038.path: 第7部分：儿科学｜新生儿疾病
V002-N01038.definition: 以发病部位出现皮肤红肿，形如云片、色赤如丹、游走不定为主要表现的新生儿疾病。

V002-N01038.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N01038.label: 赤游丹
V002-N01038.path: 中医儿科学｜新生儿疾病
V002-N01038.definition: 以发病部位出现皮肤红肿，形如云片、色赤如丹、游走不定为主要表现的新生儿疾病。

V002-N01038.label: 赤游丹
V002-N01038.definition: 于发病部位出现皮肤红肿，形如云片、色赤 如丹、游走不定为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N01038.label: 赤游丹
V002-N01038.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜初生儿病证
V002-N01038.definition: 是初生儿急性皮肤感染性疾病，以皮肤色赤如丹，形如云片，游走不定为特征。

V002-N01038.label: 小儿赤游丹
V002-N01038.pinyinNames: xiao dong chi you dan; xiao er chi you dan
V002-N01038.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N01038.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜儿科类

V002-N01038.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01038.label: 小儿赤游丹
V002-N01038.pinyinNames: xiao dong chi you dan; xiǎo ér chì yóu dān; xiao er chi you dan
V002-N01038.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01038.definition: Characterized by rapidly enlarged erythematous skin lesion, accompanied by fever and chills. In severe cases, high fever, unconsciousness and convulsions may be present. It is often caused by inappropriate care of skin injury or fetal toxin affecting the skin.

V002-N01038.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01038.label: 赤游丹
V002-N01038.aliases: BEX020； 赤游风； 赤游肿
V002-N01038.englishNames: wandering erysipelas; Migrant Erysipelas; Wandering Erysipelas; red wandering erysipelas

V002-N01038.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01038.label: 赤游丹
V002-N01038.aliases: BEX020； 赤游风； 赤游肿
V002-N01038.englishNames: wandering erysipelas; Migrant Erysipelas; Wandering Erysipelas; red wandering erysipelas
V002-N01038.definition: a type of erysipelas in the newborn characterized by changing the location of the lesion either from the trunk to the extremities or from the extremities to the trunk

V002-N01027.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01027.label: 小儿遗尿
V002-N01027.definition: 以小儿已达到膀胱应能控制排尿的年龄，入睡后仍有不随意排尿为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01027.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N01027.label: 小儿遗尿
V002-N01027.path: 中医儿科学｜儿科学肾病
V002-N01027.definition: 以小儿已达到膀胱应能控制排尿的年龄入睡后仍有不随意排尿为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01027.label: 小儿遗尿

V002-N01027.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N01027.label: 小儿遗尿
V002-N01027.pinyinNames: xiao er yi niao; xiao dong yi niao; xiǎo ér yí niào
V002-N01027.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01027.definition: Characterized by an inability to control urination during sleep after the age of five years. It is often caused by incomplete development of kidney qi resulting in bladder function failure.

V002-N01019.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01019.label: 小儿厌食
V002-N01019.path: 第7部分：儿科学｜脾胃系病
V002-N01019.definition: 发生于小儿的以长期厌恶进食，食量减少但精神尚好为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01019.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N01019.label: 小儿厌食
V002-N01019.path: 中医儿科学｜儿科学脾胃病
V002-N01019.definition: 发生于小儿的以长期厌恶进食，食量减少为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01019.label: 小儿厌食
V002-N01019.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证
V002-N01019.definition: 厌食是以较长时期厌恶进食、食量减少为特征的一种小儿常见病证。本病多由喂养不当、他伤脾胃、先天不足、情志失调引起，其病变脏腑主要在脾胃，病机关键为脾胃失健，纳化失和。

V002-N01019.label: 小儿厌食
V002-N01019.pinyinNames: xiao er yan shi; xiao dong yan shi
V002-N01019.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N01019.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N01019.label: 小儿厌食
V002-N01019.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N01019.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01019.label: 小儿厌食
V002-N01019.pinyinNames: xiao er yan shi; xiao dong yan shi; xiǎo ér yàn shí
V002-N01019.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01019.definition: Characterized by persistent poor appetite, aversion to food, and significant weight loss, but with normal spirit and physical activities. Alternatively, abdominal distension, belching, and irregular bowel movements may be present. It is often caused by spleen deficiency or damage to stomach yin due to inappropriate feeding or fright.

V002-N01042.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N01009.label: 小儿痴呆
V002-N01009.definition: 因先天禀赋不足，或后天疾病所致，以小儿智力低下为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01009.label: 小儿痴呆
V002-N01009.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证

V002-N01009.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N01009.label: 小儿痴呆
V002-N01009.pinyinNames: xiao er chi dai; xiao dong chi dai; xiǎo ér chī dāi
V002-N01009.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01009.definition: Characterized by delayed movement or language development, dull expression, and learning disability. Vacant look, head shaking or tongue wagging may be present. It is often caused by genetic deficiency, malnutrition, brain injury, high fever and/or drug poisoning affecting brain development.

V002-N01010.label: 滞颐
V002-N01010.englishNames: Frequently Drool in Infancy; Infantile Slobbering with Saliva Wetting the Lower Jaw
V002-N01010.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证
V002-N01010.definition: 因脾脏虚冷，或牌胃蕴热，津液不收所致。以小儿经常不自觉地自口中溢出涎液为主要表现的不固类疾病。

V002-N01010.label: 滞颐
V002-N01010.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N01010.label: 滞颐
V002-N01010.englishNames: dribbling; infantile slobbering; Drooling in babies
V002-N01010.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01010.definition: Characterized by saliva flowing outside of the mouth unintentionally that may wet the cheeks and chest. Often results from deficiency cold of the spleen or heat accumulating in the spleen and stomach.

V002-N01010.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01010.label: 滞颐
