V002-N01010.definition: salivation in an infant with wet cheeks

V002-N01020.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01020.label: 异食癖
V002-N01020.aliases: 喜食异物； 异食症； Parorexia
V002-N01020.path: TF[中医精神疾病和心理学]｜中医精神疾病
V002-N01020.definition: 一种特殊的嗜好，是指对生冷食物和正常饮食以外的物品有不可自制的食欲。如善食生米、生豆、生果子、茶叶甚至陶土、粉笔、泥土、蜡烛、砖块、瓦片、破布、纸张、煤渣等。

V002-N01020.label: 异食癖
V002-N01020.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜脑系病证
V002-N01020.definition: 又称“异食症"。系一种特殊的嗜好，是指对生冷食物和正常饮食以外的物品有不可自制的食欲。如善食生米、生豆、生果子、茶叶甚至陶土、粉笔、泥土、蜡烛、砖块、瓦片、破布、纸张、煤渣等。小儿异食癖常与营养缺乏(如缺铁、缺锌)及管教疏忽等有关;成人罹患异食癖可认为是一种强迫行为。 异食癖的主要危险为食入致病菌、寄生虫卵或有毒物质而致病。

V002-N01020.label: 喜食异物
V002-N01020.aliases: 嗜食异物； 嗜异； 嗜异物癖； 异食； 异食癖； 异食症； 异嗜症
V002-N01020.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜饮食口味症状｜饮食症状｜口味偏嗜
V002-N01020.definition: 嗜食生米、泥土、纸张、煤炭、墙皮等各种非食品之异物的表现。

V002-N01020.label: 小儿异食
V002-N01020.pinyinNames: xiao dong yi shi; xiao er yi shi
V002-N01020.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N01020.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N01020.label: 小儿异嗜
V002-N01020.aliases: 嗜食； 嗜异； 异食癖
V002-N01020.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N01020.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01020.label: 小儿异食
V002-N01020.pinyinNames: xiao dong yi shi; xiao er yi shi; xiǎo ér yì shí
V002-N01020.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01020.definition: An abnormal craving for objects not normally considered food, including fingernails, paintings on toys, mud, paper, hair, dirt, soil block, coal cinder or rocks. Ingestion of these objects may damage the body. It is often caused by spleen-related malnutrition or intestinal parasites.

V002-N01043.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01043.label: 解颅
V002-N01043.definition: 以小儿颅凶应合而不合，颅缝开解，头颅增大，叩之呈破壶音，目珠下垂如落日状为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01043.label: 解颅
V002-N01043.englishNames: hydrocephalus due to nonclosure of fontanel
V002-N01043.definition: 以颅囟应合而不合，颅缝开解，头颅增大，叩 之呈破壶音，目珠下垂如落日状为主要表现 的小儿疾病。

V002-N01043.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01043.label: 解颅
V002-N01043.englishNames: Hydrocephalus due to Nonclosure of Fontanel
V002-N01043.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医儿科疾病
V002-N01043.definition: 因先天不足，颅内受损，或因热毒壅滞，水湿停积于脑所致。以头颅增大、囟门和颅缝开解为主要表现的小儿疾病。

V002-N01043.label: 解颅
V002-N01043.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证

V002-N01043.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N01043.pinyinNames: xie lu; jie lu; jiě lú
V002-N01043.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01043.definition: Characterized by an enlargement of the head and retarded closure of the cranial sutures. Often results from congenital defect or retention of excess fluid within the skull due to accumulated toxic heat.

V002-N01043.definition: abnormal accumulation of excess fluid within the skull marked by enlargement of the head and retarded closure of the skull sutures, the same as hydrocephalus

V002-N01039.label: 奶癣
V002-N01039.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证

V002-N01039.label: 婴儿湿疮
V002-N01039.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N01039.definition: 婴儿湿疮是发于1～2岁婴儿的过敏性皮肤病。又称奶癣、胎敛疮。相当于西医学的婴儿湿疹。其特点是：好发在头面，重者可延及躯干和四肢，患儿常有家族过敏史，多见于人工哺育的婴儿。本病病因病机：由于禀性不耐，脾胃运化失职，内有胎火湿热，外受风热湿邪，两者蕴阻肌肤而成；或因消化不良、食物过敏、衣服摩擦、肥皂水洗涤刺激等诱发。

V002-N01039.label: 奶癣
V002-N01039.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N01039.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N01039.label: 奶癣
V002-N01039.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜儿科类

V002-N01039.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01039.label: 奶癣
V002-N01039.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01039.definition: A condition that commonly affects infants or young children. It is characterized by dry or wet skin rashes on the face, torso, and hands and feet, coupled with exudation, skin tearing due to scratching, restlessness, and night crying. Often results from food or drug allergies or wind, damp or heat affecting the skin.

V002-N01037.label: 臀红
V002-N01037.path: 第7部分：儿科学｜新生儿疾病
V002-N01037.definition: 以臀部、会阴、大腿尿布包裹部位内侧皮肤及外阴黏膜出现红斑、糜烂、渗液为主要表现的小儿皮肤病。

V002-N01037.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N01037.label: 臀红
V002-N01037.path: 中医儿科学｜新生儿疾病
V002-N01037.definition: 以臀部、会阴、大腿内侧皮肤及外阴黏膜出现红斑、糜烂、渗液为主要表现的新生儿疾病。

V002-N01037.label: 臀红
V002-N01037.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证
V002-N01037.definition: 因尿布浸渍所致。以婴儿臀部、会阴、阴囊、大腿内侧皮肤出现红斑、糜烂、渗液为主要表现的小儿皮肤疾病。

V002-N01037.label: 小儿湮尻疮
V002-N01037.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N01037.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01037.label: 小儿湮尻疮
V002-N01037.aliases: 臀红； Nappy/diaper dermatitis disorder； Red skin around the nappy/diaper
V002-N01037.pinyinNames: xiao dong yan kao chuang; xiǎo ér yān kāo chuāng
V002-N01037.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01037.definition: Characterized by sore, red and irritated skin on the convex surfaces of the buttocks and the bulge of the groin. Often occurs when the baby’s skin become exposed to urine and faeces in a nappy/diaper.

V002-N00999.label: 小儿惊风
V002-N00999.pinyinNames: xiao dong jing feng; xiao er jing feng
V002-N00999.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N00999.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00999.label: 小儿惊风
V002-N00999.pinyinNames: xiǎo ér jīng fēng; xiao dong jing feng; xiao er jing feng
V002-N00999.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00999.definition: A collective term of infantile unconsciousness, convulsions or seizures due to external contraction or internal dysfunctions. It includes acute infantile convulsion, chronic infantile convulsion and chronic spleen wind.

V002-N01001.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N01001.label: 慢惊风
V002-N01001.path: 中医儿科学｜儿科学心肝病
V002-N01001.definition: 病势缓慢，以反复抽痉，嗜睡或昏迷为主要表现的惊风。

V002-N01001.label: 慢惊风
V002-N01001.definition: 病势缓慢，以反复抽痉，昏迷或瘫痪为主症 的惊风。

V002-N01001.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01001.label: 慢惊风
V002-N01001.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜神经病学表现｜惊厥
V002-N01001.definition: 因气血亏虚，或由急惊风转化而成，于多种疾病中出现手足蠕动、或抽搐时作时止、神疲面白、大便色青等为主要表现的痉病类疾病。

V002-N01001.label: 慢惊风
V002-N01001.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证｜惊风
V002-N01001.definition: 来势缓慢，以反复抽痉、昏迷或瘫痪为主症，预后差。

V002-N01001.label: 慢惊风

V002-N01001.label: 慢惊
V002-N01001.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N01001.label: 慢惊风
V002-N01001.englishNames: chronic infantile convulsion; Recurrent convulsion disorder; Chronic infantile convulsion
V002-N01001.pinyinNames: man jing feng; màn jīng fēng
V002-N01001.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01001.definition: Characterized by repeated twitching of hands and feet, intermittent convulsions, fatigue, a pale face, sleepiness with eyes unclosed, vomiting and diarrhoea of bluish stools. Often results from healthy qi deficiency, damage to spleen yang or internal stirring of liver wind. It may also develop from acute infantile convulsion.

V002-N01001.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V002-N01001.label: 慢惊风
V002-N01001.definition: repeated infantile convulsion of gradual onset, associated with loss of consciousness or paralysis and poor prognosis

V002-N01002.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01002.label: 慢惊风
V002-N01002.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜神经病学表现｜惊厥
V002-N01002.definition: 因气血亏虚，或由急惊风转化而成，于多种疾病中出现手足蠕动、或抽搐时作时止、神疲面白、大便色青等为主要表现的痉病类疾病。

V002-N01002.label: 慢脾风

V002-N01002.pinyinNames: man pi feng; man jing feng
V002-N01002.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病｜小儿惊风

V002-N01002.label: 慢脾风
V002-N01002.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜儿科类

V002-N01002.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01002.label: 慢脾风
V002-N01002.englishNames: Chronic spleen wind; chronic convulsion due to spleen disorder; chronic spleen wind
V002-N01002.pinyinNames: màn pí fēng; man pi feng; man jing feng
V002-N01002.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01002.definition: A critical condition characterized by head shaking with closed eyes, dark bluish face and lips, sweats on the forehead, drowsiness, cold limbs, twitching or convulsion of the limbs, and vomiting of clear water. Often results from excessive or chronic vomiting or diarrhoea damaging spleen yang or surge of internal liver wind.

V002-N01002.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01002.label: 慢脾风
V002-N01002.englishNames: chronic spleen wind; chronic convulsion due to spleen disorder

V002-N01002.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01002.label: 慢脾风
V002-N01002.englishNames: chronic spleen wind; chronic convulsion due to spleen disorder
V002-N01002.definition: a critical case of chronic infantile convulsion marked by yang debilitation and yin exuberance, usually occurring after protracted vomiting and diarrhea with spleen qi deficiency and stirring of liver wind

V002-N01000.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01000.label: 急惊风
V002-N01000.path: 第7部分：儿科学｜心肝系病｜惊风
V002-N01000.definition: 以发病急骤，发热、抽搐、昏迷为特征的惊风。

V002-N01000.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N01000.label: 急惊风
V002-N01000.path: 中医儿科学｜儿科学心肝病
V002-N01000.definition: 以发病急骤，发热、抽搐、昏迷为主要表现的惊风。

V002-N01000.label: 急惊风
V002-N01000.definition: 以发病急骤，高热抽搐，昏迷为特征的惊风。

V002-N01000.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01000.label: 急惊风
V002-N01000.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜神经病学表现｜惊厥
V002-N01000.definition: 多因感受时邪，肠胃湿热积滞，以及惊恐、痰食等所致。于多种疾病中突然出现神昏、目直、牙关紧闭、颈项强直、四肢抽搐为主要表现的痉病类疾病。

V002-N01000.label: 急惊风
V002-N01000.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证｜惊风
V002-N01000.definition: 来势急骤，以高热伴抽风、昏迷为特征。多由外感时邪疫疠，内蕴痰热食积以及暴受惊恐引起。

V002-N01000.label: 急惊风
V002-N01000.englishNames: acute infantile convulsion; Acute convulsion disorder
V002-N01000.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病｜小儿惊风

V002-N01000.label: 急惊风
V002-N01000.englishNames: acute infantile convulsion; Acute convulsion disorder
V002-N01000.path: 传统医学疾病｜儿童期与青少年期病类

V002-N01000.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N01000.label: 急惊
V002-N01000.aliases: 抽风； 急惊风； 惊厥
V002-N01000.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N01000.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01000.label: 急惊风
V002-N01000.englishNames: acute infantile convulsion; Acute convulsion disorder; Acute infantile convulsion
V002-N01000.pinyinNames: ji jing feng; jí jīng fēng
V002-N01000.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01000.definition: Characterized by a sudden onset of fever, loss of consciousness, blank staring, trismus, neck stiffness and convulsions of the limbs. Often results from seasonal pathogens, heat or indigestion in the stomach, fear/fright and phlegm accumulation that affects the heart and liver.

V002-N01000.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01000.label: 急惊风

V002-N01000.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01000.label: 急惊风
V002-N01000.definition: infantile convulsion of acute onset, accompanied by high fever and loss of consciousness

V002-N01041.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N01016.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01016.label: 积滞
V002-N01016.path: 第7部分：儿科学｜脾胃系病
V002-N01016.definition: 乳食内积，脾胃受损,以小儿乳食减少,口中气味,大便酸腐，腹胀，腹痛，泄泻或便秘,呕吐为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01016.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N01016.label: 积滞
V002-N01016.path: 中医儿科学｜儿科学脾胃病
V002-N01016.definition: 因乳食内积，脾胃受损所致，以小儿腹胀腹痛，泄泻或便秘，呕吐，为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01016.label: 积滞
V002-N01016.definition: 因乳食内积，脾胃受损所致，以小儿腹泻或 便秘，呕吐，腹胀腹痛为主要表现的肠胃疾 病。

V002-N01016.label: 小儿食积
V002-N01016.aliases: 积； 积滞； 积滞证
V002-N01016.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证
V002-N01016.definition: 是由乳食喂养不当，停积脾胃，运化失健引起的一种病证。以不思乳食，腹胀嗳腐，大便不调为特征。多见于婴幼儿。常在感冒、泄泻、疳证中合并出现。

V002-N01016.label: 积滞
V002-N01016.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N01016.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N01016.label: 积滞
V002-N01016.path: 分类与代码表｜必要信息（基本症状）｜骨干症状｜脾胃系症状类

V002-N01016.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N01016.label: 积滞
V002-N01016.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜儿科类

V002-N01016.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01016.label: 积滞
V002-N01016.englishNames: indigestion; retention of food; Paediatric indigestion; stagnation of food
V002-N01016.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01016.definition: Characterized by abdominal distension, fullness and pain, accompanied by vomiting, acid reflux, diarrhoea or constipation. Some children may also present with disturbed sleep, teeth grinding and finger-sucking. Over time, indigestion may develop into malnutrition. It is often caused by milk stagnation due to inappropriate feeding or food stagnation in the spleen and stomach due to improper diet.

V002-N01017.label: 乳积
V002-N01017.definition: 1岁以下小儿因伤乳所致的积滞。

V002-N01017.label: 乳积
V002-N01017.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证
V002-N01017.definition: 1岁以下小儿因伤乳所致的积滞。

V002-N01017.label: 乳积
V002-N01017.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病｜积滞

V002-N01017.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01017.label: 乳积
V002-N01017.englishNames: infantile dyspepsia; Milk accumulation; milk dyspepsia
V002-N01017.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01017.definition: Characterized by frequent foul breath or vomiting of undigested milk. Associated symptoms may include abdominal distension, diarrhoea, crying for no reason, poor sleep, hot breath and dry stools. Often results from improper breast feeding that damages the spleen and stomach and causes milk to stagnate in the stomach and intestines.

V002-N01018.label: 食积
V002-N01018.definition: 1岁以上小儿因伤食所致的积滞。

V002-N01018.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01018.label: 食积
V002-N01018.aliases: 乳食内积； Syndrome Of Food Retention
V002-N01018.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜虚实证候｜实证
V002-N01018.definition: 由暴饮暴食、过食肥甘厚味或酗酒，以致饮食停滞于胃肠道不能及时运化，遂形成食积证。临床表现为胃脘胀满作痛，嗳腐吞酸，纳呆厌食，恶心或吐出酸腐不化的食物，舌苔腻浊垢，脉滑有力，为食滞于胃脘；脐腹胀满作痛，肠鸣而矢气频传，大便不爽，泄出糊状、水样粪便而臭如败卵，或便秘，苔微黄而根部厚腻，脉沉滑，为食滞于肠道。

V002-N01018.label: 食积
V002-N01018.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证

V002-N01018.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病｜积滞

V002-N01018.path: 传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾系病类

V002-N01018.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01018.label: 食积
V002-N01018.englishNames: food dyspepsia; food accumulation; Food retention disorder; Spleen system disorders; dyspepsia; Food stagnation
V002-N01018.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01018.definition: Characterized by abdominal distension and fullness, belching, acid reflux, decreased appetite, and strong-odoured stools. Associated symptoms may include abdominal pain, crying and irregular bowel movements. Often occurs when improper diet damages the spleen and stomach and food is retained in the stomach and intestines.

V002-N01018.definition: a diseased state characterized by the accumulation of undigested food in the stomach and intestines, causing abdominal distension and pain, vomiting, diarrhea and anorexia

V002-N01034.label: 小儿乳蛾
V002-N01034.englishNames: infantile tonsillitis; infantile nippled moth; Paediatric tonsillitis
V002-N01034.pinyinNames: xiao dong ru dong; xiao er ru e; xiǎo ér rǔ é
V002-N01034.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01034.definition: Characterized by red, swollen tonsil with yellow and white pus-filled spots. Over time, the tonsil may become enlarged and hard on palpation. High fever, sore throat, swollen lymph nodes (glands) in the neck, difficulty swallowing and body aches may be present. It is often caused by pathogenic factors affecting the tonsil, ascending of toxic heat in the lung and stomach, fire (due to yin deficiency of the lung and kidney) scorching the tonsil, malnourishment of the tonsil due to weakness of the spleen and stomach, or retention of phlegm stasis in the throat.

V002-N01011.definition: Characterized by a sallow complexion, muscle wasting and bulging abdomen. Often results from improper feeding, congenital weakness or deficiency of the spleen and stomach. These factors may cause the failure of qi, blood and nutrients to nourish the zang–fu organs, hence delaying the growth and development of babies.

V002-N01011.definition: An intermediate stage of infantile malnutrition characterized by emaciation, a sallow complexion, bulging abdomen, veins showing through the skin, poor spirit, and restlessness. Often results from improper feeding or food stagnation in the stomach and intestines.

This condition is often caused by damp heat, emotional disturbance, genetic deficiency or qi deficiency of the lung and spleen that result in malnourishment of the bones, tendons and muscles.

V002-N01032.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证
V002-N01032.definition: 小儿口疮以齿龈、舌体、两颊、上颚等处出现黄白色溃疡，疼痛流涎，或伴发热、周身不适为特征。小儿口疮发生的原因有外因及内因之分，内因责之于素体积热或阴虚，外因责之于感受外邪。本病病变部位在心、脾胃、肾，病机关键是火邪灼伤口舌。

V002-N00998.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00998.label: 小儿哮喘
V002-N00998.definition: 发生于小儿的以喉中哮鸣有声,呼吸困难,甚则喘息不得平卧为主要表现、反复发作的疾病。

V002-N00998.label: 小儿哮喘
V002-N00998.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证
V002-N00998.definition: 哮喘是小儿时期常见的一种反复发作的哮鸣气喘性肺系疾病。哮指声响言，喘指气息言，哮必兼喘，故通称哮喘。临床以反复发作性喘促气急，喉间哮鸣，呼吸延长，严重者不能平卧，张口抬肩，摇身撷肚，唇口青紫为特征。常在夜半至清晨发作或加剧。哮喘的病因既有外因，也有内因。内因责之于先天禀赋有异，素体肺、脾、肾三脏功能不足，痰饮留伏于肺，成为哮喘之夙根。外因责之于感受外邪，接触异物、异味以及嗜食咸酸等，其中感受外邪是最常见的诱因。

V002-N00998.label: 小儿哮喘
V002-N00998.pinyinNames: xiao dong xiao chuan; xiao er xiao chuan
V002-N00998.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N00998.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00998.label: 小儿哮喘
V002-N00998.definition: an infantile disease characterized by paroxysmal labored breathing accompanied by a whistling sound

V002-N00997.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00997.label: 肺炎喘嗽
V002-N00997.definition: 发生于小儿的以发热，咳嗽，痰壅，气急为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00997.label: 肺炎喘嗽
V002-N00997.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证
V002-N00997.definition: 是小儿时期常见的肺系疾病之一，为感受外邪，郁闭肺络所致。以发热，咳嗽，气急，鼻煽为主要症状，重者涕泪俱闭，面色苍白发绀。

V002-N00997.label: 肺风痰喘
V002-N00997.englishNames: dyspnea with phlegm due to lung wind
V002-N00997.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N00997.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00997.label: 小儿肺风痰喘
V002-N00997.aliases: 肺风痰喘； 肺炎喘嗽
V002-N00997.pinyinNames: xiǎo ér fèi fēng tán chuǎn
V002-N00997.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00997.definition: Characterized by fever, cough, panting, nasal flaring and profuse phlegm. In severe cases, consistent high fever, unconsciousness, convulsions and seizures might occur. Often occurs when wind cold or warmth affects the descending and dispersing of lung qi.

V002-N00997.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00997.label: 肺炎喘嗽
V002-N00997.englishNames: Cough of Pneumonia; pneumonia with dyspnea and cough
V002-N00997.pinyinNames: fei yan ke sou; fei yan chuan sou

V002-N00997.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V002-N01003.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N01026.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01026.label: 小儿尿频
V002-N01026.definition: 发生于小儿的以小便次数过多为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01026.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N01026.label: 小儿尿频
V002-N01026.path: 中医儿科学｜儿科学肾病
V002-N01026.definition: 发生于小儿的以小便次数过多为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01026.label: 小儿尿频
V002-N01026.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证
V002-N01026.definition: 尿频是小儿常见的一种泌尿系疾病，以小便频急而数为特征。小儿尿频的发生分内因和外因两个方面。外因责之于湿热，多因外感湿热，或坐地潮湿、粪便污染感受湿热邪毒，或因有积滞内蕴化为湿热；内因责之于脾肾亏虚，多由先天禀赋不足，素体虚弱，或后天失调，导致脾肾气虚。尿频的病位在肾与膀胱。

V002-N01026.label: 小儿尿频
V002-N01026.pinyinNames: xiao dong niao pin; xiao er niao pin
V002-N01026.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N01026.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N01026.label: 小儿尿频
V002-N01026.aliases: 淋证； 溲数； 小便数
V002-N01026.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N01026.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01026.label: 小儿尿频
V002-N01026.englishNames: infantile frequen urination; infantile frequent urination; Paediatric frequent urination
V002-N01026.pinyinNames: xiao dong niao pin; xiao er niao pin; xiǎo ér niào pín
V002-N01026.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01026.definition: Characterized by increased urination frequency with small amount of urine volume. Urgent, painful urination may also occur. It is often caused by impaired qi transformation of the urinary bladder due to retention of damp heat in the lower jiao, pinworm, stones or emotional disturbance.

V002-N01028.label: 小儿水肿病
V002-N01028.pinyinNames: xiao er shui zhong bing; xiao dong shui zhong bing
V002-N01028.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N01023.path: 第7部分：儿科学｜脾胃系病
V002-N01023.definition: 发生于小儿的以胃皖以下、脐之两旁及耻骨以上部位疼痛为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01023.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N01023.label: 小儿腹痛
V002-N01023.path: 中医儿科学｜儿科学脾胃病
V002-N01023.definition: 发生于小儿的以腹部疼痛为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01023.label: 小儿腹痛
V002-N01023.aliases: 盘肠气痛； 小儿腹痛病
V002-N01023.englishNames: abdominal pain in children; infantile abdominal pain
V002-N01023.pinyinNames: xiao dong fu tong; xiao er fu tong

V002-N01007.label: 夜啼
V002-N01007.path: 第7部分：儿科学｜心肝系病
V002-N01007.definition: 以婴儿日间安静，夜间啼哭不安为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01007.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N01007.label: 夜啼
V002-N01007.path: 中医儿科学｜儿科学心肝病
V002-N01007.definition: 以婴儿日间安静，夜间啼哭不安为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01007.label: 夜啼
V002-N01007.definition: 以新生儿日间安静，夜间啼哭不安为主要表 现的疾病。

V002-N01007.label: 夜啼
V002-N01007.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医儿科疾病
V002-N01007.definition: 因脾寒、心热、惊恐等所致。以1岁以内婴儿经常在夜间啼哭不停，甚至通宵达旦，而白天如常为主要表现的小儿疾病。

V002-N01007.label: 夜啼
V002-N01007.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证
V002-N01007.definition: 因脾寒、心热、惊恐等所致。以1岁以内婴儿经常在夜间啼哭不停，甚至通宵达旦，而白天如常为主要表现的小儿疾病。

V002-N01007.label: 夜啼
V002-N01007.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜小儿症状

V002-N01007.label: 夜啼

V002-N01007.path: 传统医学疾病｜儿童期与青少年期病类

V002-N01007.label: 夜啼
V002-N01007.englishNames: Night Crying; nocturnal crying; night crying; Night crying disorder; nisht crying; Night crying
V002-N01007.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01007.definition: A condition that often occurs in babies under the age of one year. Characterized by continuous crying during or even through the night but appearing normal at daytime. Often results from spleen cold, heart heat and fear or fright that disturb the heart mind.

V002-N01007.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01007.label: 夜啼

V002-N01007.label: 夜啼
V002-N01007.definition: morbid night crying in babies, but quiet at daytime

V002-N00987.label: 小儿温疫类病
V002-N00987.pinyinNames: xiao er wen yi lei bing; xiao dong wen yi lei bing
V002-N00987.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语

V002-N00987.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00987.label: 小儿温疫类病
V002-N00987.englishNames: infantile pestilence; infantile pestilence diseases; Contagious diseases in children
V002-N00987.pinyinNames: xiao er wen yi lei bing; xiǎo ér wēn yì lèi bìng; xiao dong wen yi lei bing
V002-N00987.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00987.definition: A collective term of contagious paediatric diseases due to contraction of warm epidemic or pestilence.

V002-N00991.label: 小儿白喉
V002-N00991.pinyinNames: xiao dong bai hou; xiao er bai hou
V002-N00991.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿温疫类病

V002-N00991.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00991.label: 小儿白喉
V002-N00991.pinyinNames: xiao dong bai hou; xiǎo ér bái hóu; xiao er bai hou
V002-N00991.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00991.definition: An epidemic condition characterized by fever, sore throat, white film (pseudo-membrane) build up in the throat or nose. The layer of pseudo-film coating is hard to crack, and can cause bleeding after peeling off. In severe cases, difficulty in swallowing, breathing or shock may be present. The condition often begins with lung and stomach bacterial infection spreading to the throat area.

V002-N00992.label: 小儿天花
V002-N00992.pinyinNames: xiao dong tian hua; xiao er tian hua
V002-N00992.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿温疫类病

V002-N00992.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00992.label: 小儿天花
V002-N00992.aliases: 小儿痘疹； 百岁疮； 天行痘
V002-N00992.pinyinNames: xiao dong tian hua; xiǎo ér tiān huā; xiao er tian hua
V002-N00992.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00992.definition: An epidemic condition characterized by fever, cough, yawning, a red face, cold hands/feet/ears, followed by skin rashes. It usually lasts through six stages: fever, early rash, pustular rash, pustules, scabs, and resolving scabs. It is often caused by exposure to the smallpox virus.

V002-N00989.label: 小儿软脚瘟
V002-N00989.pinyinNames: xiao er ruan jiao wen; xiao dong ruan jiao wen
V002-N00989.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿温疫类病

V002-N00989.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00989.label: 小儿软脚瘟
V002-N00989.englishNames: infantile pestilent flaccidity of foot; Infantile paralysis
V002-N00989.pinyinNames: xiao er ruan jiao wen; xiao dong ruan jiao wen; xiǎo ér ruǎn jiǎo wēn
V002-N00989.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00989.definition: An infectious condition that starts with fever, sweating, headache, nausea, vomiting and diarrhoea. The fever may subdue after a few days and reappear, accompanied by neck stiffness, bulging fontanelle, hyperesthesia, refusing to be touched or hugged, and restlessness or drowsiness. Over time, the muscles become weak, steps floppy and poorly controlled, and can even end with physical handicap. Often occurs when epidemic summer heat and dampness enters the gastrointestinal tract thereafter affecting muscles or obstructing meridians. Alternatively, it may occur due to lack of yin fluids after a long period of illness and malnourishment of sinews.

V002-N00993.label: 手足口病
V002-N00993.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科时行疾病
V002-N00993.definition: 是由感受手足口病时邪（柯萨奇病毒A组、B组及新肠道病毒71型）引起的急性发疹性传染病，临床以手掌足跖、臀及口腔疱疹，或伴发热为特征。

V002-N00993.label: 手足口病
V002-N00993.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿温疫类病

V002-N00993.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00993.label: 手足口病
V002-N00993.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜儿科类

V002-N00988.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00988.label: 奶麻
V002-N00988.path: 第7部分：儿科学｜儿科时行病
V002-N00988.definition: 感染外邪，以哺乳期婴儿或幼儿初期骤起高热，热退后肌肤出现玫瑰色细散皮疹为主要表现的出疹性儿科时行病。

V002-N00988.label: 奶麻
V002-N00988.definition: 以哺乳期婴儿骤起高热，热退后肌肤出现玫 瑰色细散皮疹为主要表现的急性出疹性疾 病。

V002-N00988.label: 奶麻
V002-N00988.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科时行疾病
V002-N00988.definition: 是婴幼儿时期一种急性出疹性疾病。以突然高热，持续3~4天后体温骤降，同时出疹为特征。

V002-N00988.label: 奶麻
V002-N00988.aliases: 奶疹； 假麻； 假诊
V002-N00988.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿温疫类病

V002-N00988.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00988.label: 奶麻
V002-N00988.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜儿科类

V002-N00988.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00988.label: 奶麻
V002-N00988.aliases: 假麻； Pseudorubella； 奶疹； 假诊
V002-N00988.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00988.definition: Characterized by a sudden high fever and sometime with convulsion. Red skin rashes will appear all over the body after the fever disappeared in 3 to 5 days. Subsequently, rashes will resolve after 1 to 2 days. This condition often results from contraction of epidemic toxins.

V002-N00988.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00988.label: 假麻

V002-N00988.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00988.label: 奶麻
V002-N00988.aliases: BES020； 奶疹； 假麻； 假诊； 幼儿急疹
V002-N00988.englishNames: Papuled Disease Of The Newborn; roseola infantum

V002-N00990.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00990.label: 小儿疫毒痢
V002-N00990.path: 第7部分：儿科学｜儿科时行病
V002-N00990.definition: 感受痢疾时邪疫毒，以发病急骤,高热,烦躁口渴，腹痛剧烈，大便脓血，甚或神昏抽搐，肢厥为主要表现的小儿重度痢疾。

V002-N00990.label: 小儿疫毒痢
V002-N00990.englishNames: fulminant dysentery in children; infantile pestilent dysentery; infantile fulminant dysentery
V002-N00990.pinyinNames: xiao dong yi dong li; xiao er yi er li; xiao er yi du li
V002-N00990.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿温疫类病

V002-N00990.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00990.label: 小儿疫毒痢
V002-N00990.englishNames: infantile pestilent dysentery; fulminant dysentery in children; Paediatric bacillary dysentery; infantile fulminant dysentery
V002-N00990.pinyinNames: xiao dong yi dong li; xiǎo ér yì dú lì; xiao er yi er li; xiao er yi du li
V002-N00990.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00990.definition: An epidemic condition characterized by sudden high fever, restlessness, intense abdominal pain, and stools containing pus and blood. In severe cases, convulsions, shock and cold limbs may be present. Often occurs when epidemic damp heat damages the intestines or enters the pericardium and triggers liver wind.

V002-N00983.label: 小儿时令类病
V002-N00983.pinyinNames: xiao er shi ling lei bing; xiao dong shi ling lei bing
V002-N00983.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语

V002-N00983.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00983.label: 小儿时令类病
V002-N00983.englishNames: seasonal epidemic diseases in pediatrics; Epidemic diseases in children
V002-N00983.pinyinNames: xiao er shi ling lei bing; xiao dong shi ling lei bing; xiǎo ér shí lìng lèi bìng
V002-N00983.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00983.definition: A collective term of epidemic or seasonal paediatric conditions, including common cold, summer non-acclimatization, summer fever or chicken pox.

V002-N00985.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00985.label: 小儿疰夏
V002-N00985.definition: 小儿伤于暑湿，以夏季倦怠嗜卧，低热，纳差为主要表现的时令疾病。

V002-N00985.label: 小儿疰夏
V002-N00985.englishNames: summer nonacclimation in children; summer non-acclimatization in infant; infantile summer consumptive disease
V002-N00985.pinyinNames: xiao er zhu xia; xiao dong zhu xia
V002-N00985.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿时令类病

V002-N00984.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00984.label: 小儿感冒
V002-N00984.definition: 小儿感受外邪，以发热恶寒,头身疼痛,鼻塞流涕,咽痒咳嗽，甚或伴见高热、咽喉肿痛等为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00984.label: 小儿感冒
V002-N00984.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证

V002-N00972.definition: 多因胎热蕴于膀胱，或禀赋不足，膀眈气化不行，或因肾缺如及尿道畸形等所致。以婴儿出生36h后仍无尿液排出为主要表现的新生儿疾病。

V002-N00977.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医儿科疾病｜新生儿病证
V002-N00977.definition: 因胎儿期感受湿热，或湿浊瘀阻所致。以婴儿出现皮肤、粘膜、巩膜发黄为主要表现的疸病类疾病。

V002-N00977.definition: Characterized by yellowish colouration of the skin, mucosa, and sclera of a newborn baby which lasts more than two weeks after birth. Often results from contraction of damp heat during pregnancy, biliary track deformation, or gall bile blockage.

V002-N00978.label: 脐风
V002-N00978.englishNames: tetanus neonatorum; neonatal tetanus; neonnatal tetanus; umbilical wind
V002-N00978.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜新生儿类病

V002-N00978.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00978.definition: Characterized by cyanotic lips, lockjaw, and facial expression with an unnatural smile. In severe cases, tetanic convulsions and opisthotonus may be present. Often results from infection of the unhealed umbilical stump from wind-related pathogen.

V002-N00978.definition: a disease of the newborn characterized by cyanotic lips, lockjaw, generalized tonic spasm and tetanic convulsions, referring to neonatal tetanus

V002-N00974.label: 鹅口疮
V002-N00974.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医五官科疾病｜中医耳鼻咽喉科疾病｜中医口齿科疾病｜口疮
V002-N00974.definition: 因感受邪毒，心脾积热，上熏口舌所致。以口腔、舌上出现片状白屑、状如鹅口为主要表现的口腔疾病。

V002-N00974.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证
V002-N00974.definition: 由胎热内蕴，口腔不洁，感受秽毒之邪所致，以口腔、舌上满布白屑为主要临床特征的一种口腔疾病。因其状如鹅口，故称鹅口疮；因其色白如雪片，故又名雪口。其主要病变在心脾。

V002-N01253.definition: 以好发于下肢，色暗红、青筋垒垒，或盘曲成团为特征的瘤。

V002-N01253.label: 筋瘤
V002-N01253.path: 外科疾病｜外科其他疾病
V002-N01253.definition: 以好发于下肢，色暗红、温度稍高、青筋垒 垒，盘曲成团块，如蚯蚓聚结为主要表现的 静脉曲张性疾病。

V002-N01253.definition: 是体表静脉曲张交错而形成团块状的病变。其特点是好发于下肢，瘤体色暗红，湿度稍高，青筋垒垒，盘曲成团，如蚯蚓聚结。相当于西医的下肢静脉曲张。

V002-N01253.label: 筋瘤
V002-N01253.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜皮肤症状

V002-N01253.definition: Characterized by varicose veins that resemble earthworms, usually in the lower leg. The dilated veins often occur when standing for a long period of time causes qi and blood to stagnate or when anger damages the liver and liver fire consumes blood.

V002-N01252.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜瘤
V002-N01252.definition: 是皮下脂肪组织过度增生而形成的肿瘤。多由思虑过度或饮食劳倦伤脾，脾失运化，痰湿内生，脾气不行，津液凝聚为痰，痰气郁结，发为肉瘤。其特点是软似绵，肿似馒，皮色不变，不紧不宽，如肉之隆起。

V002-N01252.label: 肉瘤
V002-N01252.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜瘤类病

V002-N01267.label: 肝瘤
V002-N01267.definition: 以轻微右胁痞胀或疼痛，影像学检查示肝内肿块等为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01267.label: 肝瘤
V002-N01267.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证

V002-N01249.label: 气瘤
V002-N01249.path: 第2部分：外科学｜瘿瘤岩疾病｜瘤
V002-N01249.definition: 以肌肤间发生单个或多个柔软肿核，按之凹陷，放手突起，状若有气，皮色如常或有褐色斑为特征的瘤。

V002-N01249.label: 气瘤
V002-N01249.englishNames: tumor due to disorder of qi
V002-N01249.path: 外科疾病｜外科其他疾病
V002-N01249.definition: 以皮肤间发生单个或多个柔软肿核，按之凹 陷，放手凸起，状若有气，皮色如常或有褐色 斑为主要表现的瘤病。

V002-N01249.label: 气瘤
V002-N01249.englishNames: Qi Tumour; Tumour Due To Disorder Of Qi
V002-N01249.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜瘤
V002-N01249.definition: 是一种发于皮肤间的，皮下可触及的多发性肿物。可发生于体表各处，其特点是多发性肿块，浮浅在皮肤，瘤皮松垂，瘤体柔软，按之可瘪，纵之又起，宛如气注瘤中。相当于西医的多发性神经纤维瘤和神经纤维瘤病的神经纤维瘤结节。

V002-N01249.label: 气瘤

V002-N01249.definition: Characterized by single or multiple raised soft tumours that are indented upon pressure but bulging again when the pressure is released. The skin is either normal or with brown spots. They are often caused by over-exertion consuming lung qi or phlegm qi stagnation due to exposure to pathogenic factors.

V002-N01260.path: 第9部分：耳鼻喉科学｜鼻病
V002-N01260.definition: 以反复鼻出血，鼻内见表面较光滑的赤色肿物为主要表现的鼻病。

V002-N01260.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V002-N01260.label: 鼻血瘤
V002-N01260.definition: 以反复鼻出血，鼻内见表面较光滑的赤色肿物为主要表现的鼻病。

V002-N01260.label: 鼻血瘤
V002-N01260.definition: 以鼻腔赘生血络缠绕的赤色扁平肿块，触之 易出血不止为主要表现的瘤病类疾病。

V002-N01260.label: 鼻血瘤
V002-N01260.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医鼻疾病
V002-N01260.definition: 因先天原因，或后天损伤，是鼻腔血络淤滞所致。以鼻腔赘生血络缠绕的赤色扁平血块，触之易出血不止为主要表现的瘤病类疾病

V002-N01260.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜五官症状｜鼻症状

V002-N01260.pinyinNames: bí xuè liú; bi xue liu
V002-N01260.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01260.definition: Characterized by red, flat haemangioma inside the nasal cavity that may cause recurrent bleeding from the nose. It can be congenital or acquired through damage to the nasal cavity.

V002-N01274.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语

V002-N01274.definition: 以肿块生长于骨、坚硬如石为特征的瘤。

V002-N01274.label: 骨瘤
V002-N01274.path: 外科疾病｜外科其他疾病
V002-N01274.definition: 以肿块坚硬如石，紧贴于骨为主要表现的瘤 病或癌病类疾病。

V002-N01274.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜瘤
V002-N01274.definition: 骨组织发生异常的局限性肿大，形成质地坚硬的肿块，统称骨瘤。其特点是骨组织的异常肿大，疙瘩垒起，坚硬如石，紧贴于骨，推之不移。

V002-N01274.label: 骨瘤
V002-N01274.englishNames: stony tumor sticking to bone; bone tumor; osteoma

V002-N01254.label: 胶瘤

V002-N01254.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01254.definition: A condition characterized by round, smooth, hard cysts around the finger/wrist joints or tendons. They are often caused by phlegm and fluid retention.

V002-N01255.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语

V002-N01255.path: 第2部分：外科学｜瘿瘤岩疾病｜瘤
V002-N01255.definition: 以皮下出现圆形质软的肿块，溃破后可见粉渣样物溢出为特征的瘤。

V002-N01255.label: 脂瘤
V002-N01255.path: 外科疾病｜外科其他疾病
V002-N01255.definition: 以皮肤间出现圆形质软的肿块，溃破后可见 粉渣样物溢出为主要表现的瘤病。

V002-N01255.label: 脂瘤
V002-N01255.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜瘤
V002-N01255.definition: 多因痰气凝滞于皮肤之间所致，以皮肤间出现圆形形质软的肿块，溃破后可见粉渣样物溢出为主要表现的瘤病类疾病。

V002-N01255.englishNames: atheroma; sebaceous cyst; Skin tumour; adipose tumor
V002-N01255.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01255.definition: A condition characterized by round, soft tumours on the skin that may discharge powder-like stuff upon rupture. They are often caused by retention of phlegm and qi in the skin.

V002-N01255.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V002-N01251.definition: 多因火旺逼血聚于孙络所致。以皮肤上隆起鲜红或紫红色小瘤，境界分明，表面光滑为主要表现的瘤病类疾病。

V002-N01251.label: 血痣
V002-N01251.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜瘤类病

V002-N01251.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01251.definition: Characterized by enlarged superficial blood vessels in bright red or dark red colour that do not blanch on applying pressure. They are of variable size and have a smooth surface. Naevi are often caused by prolonged liver qi stagnation or blood heat.

V002-N01250.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语

V002-N01250.definition: 以病变局部色泽红赤或暗紫，或局限性柔软肿块，或边界不清为特征的瘤。

V002-N01250.label: 血瘤
V002-N01250.path: 外科疾病｜外科其他疾病
V002-N01250.definition: 以病变局部色泽鲜红或暗紫，或局限性柔软 肿块，边界不清，触之如海绵状为主要表现 的瘤病。

V002-N01250.label: 血瘤
V002-N01250.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜瘤
V002-N01250.definition: 是因体表血络扩张、纵横丛集而形成的一种体表肿瘤。其特点是病变局部色泽鲜红或暗紫，或局限性柔软肿块，边界不清，触之如海绵状。相当于西医的皮肤血管瘤，可分毛细血管瘤和海绵状血管瘤。

V002-N01250.label: 血瘤
V002-N01250.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜瘤类病

V002-N01250.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码

V002-N01250.definition: Characterized by a rubbery, bright red or dark purple soft nodule of extra blood vessels in the skin in neonates. It is often caused by hyperactivity of fetal fire and disordered blood flow.

V002-N01250.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V002-N01250.label: 血瘤
V002-N01250.definition: a vascular tumor composed of dilated blood vessels in the skin or subcutaneously

V002-N01257.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01257.label: 脑瘤
脑瘤
V002-N01257.definition: 发生于脑部的肿瘤疾患。

V002-N01257.label: 脑瘤
V002-N01257.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜脑系病证
V002-N01257.definition: 因痰浊凝结、气血瘀滞于脑部，赘生形成肿块。以部位固定的局限性头痛，颅骨外压痛，并出现脑部受压所致相应的麻木、瘫痪等为主要表现的瘤病类疾病。

V002-N01257.label: 脑瘤
V002-N01257.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜瘤类病

V002-N01261.label: 耳痔
V002-N01261.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜瘤类病

V002-N01261.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V002-N01261.definition: An aural polyp is a growth in the outside (external) ear canal. Often occurs when damp heat and phlegm fire ascend to cause qi and blood to stagnate in the ear canal.

V002-N01256.label: 发瘤
V002-N01256.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜瘤
V002-N01256.definition: 多因胎中积热，使瘀血、痰浊凝滞肌肤。以皮肤间出现内含粉质、毛发的囊性肿块为主要表现的瘤病类疾病。

V002-N01256.label: 发瘤
V002-N01256.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜瘤类病

V002-N01256.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01256.definition: Characterized by cystic tumours in the skin that may contain powder-like stuff or hair growth. They are often caused by fetal heat and retention of stagnant blood or turbid phlegm in the skin.

V002-N01270.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01270.label: 石瘕
V002-N01270.path: 第6部分：妇科学｜妇科杂病
V002-N01270.definition: 以胞宫长有包块，质地坚硬，固定不移为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01270.label: 石瘕
V002-N01270.definition: 发生于妇女胞宫宫体的瘤病。

V002-N01270.definition: 指妇女胞中结块，伴有或胀、或痛、或满，甚或出血的病证。多因七情内伤，导致气滞，痰凝、血瘀，壅阻经脉，结于下腹部所致。

V002-N01270.label: 石瘕
V002-N01270.englishNames: stony uterine mass; Strong Uterine Mass
V002-N01270.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医妇产科疾病｜妇科杂病
V002-N01270.definition: 多因气血瘀滞等，使胞宫宫体生瘤所致。以月经周期提前，经期延长，经量增多为主要表现的妇科疾病。

V002-N01270.label: 石瘕
V002-N01270.englishNames: stony conglomeration; stony uterine mass; Uterine mass disorder
V002-N01270.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜瘤类病

V002-N01270.definition: A condition that may cause earlier period, prolonged period, and heavy menstrual volume. In severe cases, individual may have solid, bulky masses that can enlarge the uterus. They often occur as a result of stagnation of qi and blood.

V002-N01271.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01271.definition: Soft, round and smooth lumps that generally do not affect menstruation. They often result from retention of stagnant blood and turbid phlegm.

V002-N01275.label: 癌类病
V002-N01275.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语

V002-N01275.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01275.label: 岩类病
V002-N01275.aliases: 癌症； 岩病； Carcinoma； Cancer
V002-N01275.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01275.definition: Any solid lumps on the body surface, internal organs and tissues that look and feel like rocks, coupled with obstruction, pain, bleeding, rapid weight loss as well as positive findings of tumour markers, gene detection or biopsy. Contributing factors may include irregular lifestyle, emotional stagnation, family history, contaminated food or environment or chronic inflammation. These factors may cause qi and blood to stagnate and intertwine with toxic phlegm.

V002-N01307.definition: 是发生在肛管直肠的恶性肿瘤，病至后期，因肛门狭窄犹如锁住肛门一样，故称为锁肛痔。

V002-N01291.path: 第9部分：耳鼻喉科学｜口腔病
V002-N01291.definition: 生于口唇部位，以初起下唇为无痛性局限性硬结，或似乳头、蕈状突出，溃烂后翻花如杨梅为主要表现的恶性肿瘤。

V002-N01291.definition: 生于口唇部位，形似蚕茧的岩。相当于唇癌。

V002-N01291.label: 唇菌
V002-N01291.definition: 生于唇部，其状如菌的癌病类疾病。

V002-N01291.label: 茧唇

V002-N01291.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01291.definition: Characterized by presence of outgrowths, oozing, scabbing and thickening in the lips. Over time, everted lower lip, skin peeling and distending pain may occur. Often occurs when damp heat of the spleen and stomach ascends to the lips.

V002-N01291.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准

肝癌
V002-N01300.definition: 发生于肝脏的癌病类疾病。

V002-N01300.aliases: 肥气； 积气； 痞气
V002-N01300.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证
V002-N01300.definition: 以脏腑气血亏虚为本，气、血、湿、热、瘀、毒互结为标，主病在肝，渐为癥积而成。临床以右胁肿硬疼痛，消瘦，食欲不振，乏力，或有黄疸或昏迷等为主要表现。是目前临床常见的恶性肿瘤之一

V002-N01295.definition: 多因过食粗糙、刺激、质硬、霉变等食物，或食管慢性病变等，食管长期受到刺激，邪毒郁热内蕴，气血瘀滞，日久而成。以进行性饮食梗塞，咽下疼痛为主要表现，发生于食管的癌病类疾病。

V002-N01295.label: 食管癌
V002-N01295.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜癌类病

V002-N01306.definition: 可能与过食肥甘、霉变食物，或与大肠慢性病变的长期刺激等有关，日久恶变而成。以大便变形或夹有脓血，下腹痛，触及下腹包块为主要表现，发生于肠道的癌病类疾病。

V002-N01306.label: 肠癌
V002-N01306.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜癌类病

V002-N01308.label: 子岩
V002-N01308.path: 第2部分：外科学｜泌尿生殖系统疾病
V002-N01308.definition: 以肾子(睾丸和附睾)出现无痛性、表面不平的坚硬肿块,增长迅速为主要表现的癌病。

V002-N01308.label: 子岩

V002-N01308.definition: 因瘀血、浊气凝聚，日久恶变而成。以肾子（睾丸）出现无痛性、表面不平的坚硬肿块，增长迅速为主要表现的癌病类疾病。

V002-N01308.label: 子岩
V002-N01308.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜癌类病

V002-N01308.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01308.definition: Characterized by solid, rough-surfaced lumps in the testicle, which may or may not cause pain. The lump may grow rapidly and become attached to the scrotum. It is often caused by undescended testis, inflammation or retention of stagnant blood or turbid phlegm in the testicle.

V002-N01298.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证
V002-N01298.definition: 或称支气管肺癌，是由于正气内虚，邪毒外侵，痰浊内聚，气滞血瘀，阻结于肺，肺失肃降所致，以咳嗽、咯血、胸痛、发热、气急为主要临床表现的恶性疾病。

V002-N01309.definition: 为发生于阴茎头部的岩，因阴茎属肾且其溃后如翻花之状，故又名肾岩翻花。其特点是阴茎头部表面有丘疹、结节、疣状等坚硬物，溃后如翻花。

V002-N01309.label: 肾岩翻花
V002-N01309.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜泌尿、男性前阴病
V002-N01309.definition: 因肝肾素亏，或忧思郁怒，相火内炽，肝经血燥，火邪郁结，逐渐恶变而成。以阴茎龟头出现丘疹、结节状坚硬物等，溃后如翻花状，有特异恶臭和脓性分泌物为主要表现，发生于阴茎的癌病类疾病。

V002-N01309.label: 肾岩翻花
V002-N01309.aliases: 肾癌翻花； 阴茎癌； 阴茎岩
V002-N01309.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜癌类病

V002-N01309.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01309.label: 肾岩翻花
V002-N01309.aliases: 肾癌翻花； 阴茎癌； 阴茎岩
V002-N01309.pinyinNames: shen yan fan hua; shèn yán fān huā
V002-N01309.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01309.definition: Characterized by papulae or solid nodules on the skin or in the tissues of the penis, accompanied by foul smelling discharge from the penis. It is often caused by constitutional deficiency of the liver and kidney, exuberant ministerial fire due to worry or anger, blood dryness in liver meridian and stagnant pathogenic fire.

V002-N01309.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01309.label: 肾岩

V002-N01303.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01303.label: 肾癌
V002-N01303.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肾膀胱病

V002-N01303.label: 肾癌
V002-N01303.definition: 发生于肾脏的癌病类疾病。

V002-N01303.label: 肾癌
V002-N01303.englishNames: Carcinoma of Kidney; Carunoma of Penis; Renal Cancer
V002-N01303.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证
V002-N01303.definition: 可能因外邪侵入，或毒物长久刺激，损伤肾络，伤阴耗气，逐渐恶变而成。以尿血，腰痛，上腹或腰部肿块为基本表现，发生于肾脏的癌病类疾病。

V002-N01303.label: 肾癌
V002-N01303.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜癌类病

V002-N01299.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01299.label: 胃癌
胃癌
V002-N01299.definition: 发生于胃部的癌病类疾病。

V002-N01299.label: 胃癌
V002-N01299.englishNames: Carcinoma of Stomach; Carcinoma Ventriculi; Gastric Cancer
V002-N01299.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证
V002-N01299.definition: 可能与生活环境、饮食因素、胃的慢性病变刺激等有关，痰浊邪毒瘀血结聚胃脘，日久恶变而成。以进行性胃脘痛，食少，消瘦，便血等为常见症状，发生于胃脘的癌病类疾病。

V002-N01299.label: 胃癌
V002-N01299.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜癌类病

V002-N01301.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01301.label: 胆癌
胆癌
V002-N01301.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证
V002-N01301.definition: 其原因可能与饮食不当，情志刺激，胆腑慢性病变等有关。以右上腹痛，黄疸，胆囊肿硬等为主要表现，发生于胆的癌病类疾病。

V002-N01301.label: 胆癌
V002-N01301.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜癌类病

V002-N01283.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01283.label: 恶性淋巴瘤
V002-N01283.path: 第1部分：内科学｜气血津液病
V002-N01283.definition: 原发于淋巴结或淋巴组织的肿瘤或类似肿瘤的恶性疾病。

V002-N01283.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01283.label: 失荣
V002-N01283.path: 第2部分：外科学｜瘿瘤岩疾病｜岩
V002-N01283.definition: 以岩转移颈部出现肿块，面容憔悴，形体消瘦，犹如树木之枝枯皮焦、失去荣华为主要表现的恶性肿瘤。

V002-N01283.label: 失荣
V002-N01283.path: 外科疾病｜外科其他疾病
V002-N01283.definition: 以生于颈部，晚期致使患者面容憔悴，形体 消瘦，犹如树木之枝枯皮焦、失去荣华为主 要表现的恶性肿瘤。

V002-N01283.label: 失荣
V002-N01283.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜岩
V002-N01283.definition: 是发于颈部的原发性或继发性岩，因其晚期伴面容憔悴，形体消瘦，状如失去活力的树木，枝枯皮焦，故称为失荣。

V002-N01283.label: 失荣
V002-N01283.englishNames: cervical malignancy with cachexia; cervical carcinoma with cachexia
V002-N01283.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜癌类病

V002-N01283.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01283.label: 失荣
V002-N01283.englishNames: cervical malignancy with cachexia; cervical carcinoma with cachexia; Cervical malignancy with cachexia
V002-N01283.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01283.definition: This refers to advanced malignant tumour of the cervical lymph node, either primary or metastatic. During the early stage, individuals may present with deep-rooted, solid, immobile nodules in the cervical area or behind the ear, without skin discolouration. Over time, the nodules increased with mild pain and dark purple skin discolouration, flat or sunken lesion with a rough surface resembling a cauliflower, coupled with pain and discharge of strong-odoured pus and blood. Associated symptoms may include restlessness, weight loss and haggardness. Often occurs when phlegm fire stagnates in the cervical area. The phlegm results from worry or anxiety damaging the spleen. The fire is transformed from liver qi stagnation.

V002-N01283.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01283.label: 失荣
V002-N01283.englishNames: cervical malignancy with cachexia; cervical carcinoma with cachexia

V002-N01283.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01283.label: 失荣
V002-N01283.englishNames: cervical malignancy with cachexia; cervical carcinoma with cachexia
V002-N01283.definition: advanced case of malignant tumor of the cervical lymph node, either primary or metastatic, accompanied by cachexia

V002-N01313.label: 子宫内膜癌
V002-N01313.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜癌类病

V002-N01302.label: 胰癌
V002-N01302.definition: 发生于胰腺部位的癌病。

V002-N01302.label: 胰癌
V002-N01302.definition: 发生于胰的癌病类疾病。

V002-N01302.label: 胰癌
V002-N01302.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证
V002-N01302.definition: 可能与长期嗜烟酒、进食霉变食物或肥甘油腻等有关，以脘腹痛，纳呆，消瘦，黄疸等为主要表现，发生于胰的癌病类疾病。

V002-N01302.label: 胰癌
V002-N01302.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜癌类病

V002-N01310.label: 外阴癌
V002-N01310.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜癌类病

V002-N01304.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01304.label: 膀胱癌
V002-N01304.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肾膀胱病

V002-N01304.label: 膀胱癌
V002-N01304.definition: 发生于膀胱的癌病类疾病。

V002-N01304.label: 膀胱癌
V002-N01304.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜癌类病

V002-N01290.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01290.label: 牙岩
V002-N01290.path: 第9部分：耳鼻喉科学｜口腔病

V002-N01290.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V002-N01290.label: 牙岩
V002-N01290.path: 中医耳鼻喉科学｜口腔病

V002-N01290.label: 牙岩
V002-N01290.definition: 生于牙龈处的癌病类疾病。

V002-N01290.label: 牙岩
V002-N01290.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医口齿科疾病
V002-N01290.definition: 因热毒痰火聚结牙龈，逐渐恶变而成。以牙龈赘生肿块，坚硬、出血、溃烂为主要表现的癌病类疾病。

V002-N01290.label: 牙岩
V002-N01290.englishNames: gingival carcinoma; carinoma of gum; rock-like gum; gum cancer
V002-N01290.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜癌类病

V002-N01296.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01296.label: 乳疳
V002-N01296.path: 第2部分：外科学｜乳房疾病
V002-N01296.definition: 以乳晕部生疮肿，糜烂结痂，经年不愈，或腐去半截乳头，状如莲蓬，痛楚难忍为主要表现的癌病。

V002-N01296.label: 乳疳
V002-N01296.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜乳房疾病
V002-N01296.definition: 因肝郁化火，湿热蕴结所致。以乳晕部生疮肿，糜烂结痴，经年不愈，或腐去半截乳头，状如蓬蓬，痛楚难忍为特征，发生于乳晕部的癌病类疾病。

V002-N01296.label: 乳疳
V002-N01296.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜癌类病

V002-N01296.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01296.label: 乳疳
V002-N01296.englishNames: mammary necrosis; erosive mammary ulceration; Eczematous carcinoma of nipple
V002-N01296.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01296.definition: Characterized by nipple ulceration or oozing. Alternatively, necrosis of the nipple with intolerable pain may occur. It is often caused by liver qi stagnation transforming into fire and accumulation of damp heat. The symptoms usually affect the nipple and then spread to the areola and then the breast. It is common for the symptoms to wax and wane.

V002-N01297.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01297.label: 乳岩
V002-N01297.path: 第2部分：外科学｜乳房疾病
V002-N01297.definition: 以乳房部结块，质地坚硬，高低不平，病久肿块溃烂,脓血污秽恶臭,疼痛日增为主要表现的癌病。

V002-N01297.label: 乳癌
V002-N01297.definition: 以乳房部结块，质地坚硬，高低不平，病久肿 块溃烂，脓血污秽恶臭，疼痛口增为主要表 现，发生于乳房的癌病类疾病。

V002-N01297.label: 乳岩
V002-N01297.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜乳房疾病
V002-N01297.definition: 是乳房部的恶性肿瘤。其特点是乳房部出现无痛，无热，皮色不变，而质地坚硬的肿块，或推之不移，或表面不光滑，凹凸不平，或乳头溢血，晚期溃烂，凹似岩穴，凸如泛莲。

V002-N01297.label: 乳癌
V002-N01297.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜癌类病

V002-N01297.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01297.label: 乳岩
V002-N01297.englishNames: breast cancer; Rocky mass in the breast; rocky mass in the breast/breast cancer; carcinoma of breast
V002-N01297.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01297.definition: Characterized by solid, immobile breast lumps, coupled with skin changes on the breast with quality resembling the peel of an orange, followed by discharge of pus and blood, increased pain and weight loss. Often results from emotional disturbance, disharmony between the Chong and Ren meridians and qi stagnation intertwined with phlegm stasis.

V002-N01297.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01297.label: 乳岩
V002-N01297.englishNames: rocky mass in the breast/breast cancer; Breast  Carcinoma; carcinoma of breast

V002-N01297.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01297.label: 乳岩
V002-N01297.englishNames: rocky mass in the breast/breast cancer; Breast  Carcinoma; carcinoma of breast
V002-N01297.definition: malignant tumor occurring in the mammary region

V002-N01282.label: 恶核
V002-N01282.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜经络肢体病证
V002-N01282.definition: 因气机郁结，或精气亏虚，温毒内伏，瘀痰凝滞所致。以肢体出现无痛性瘰疬肿块，胁下肿块，或有发热等为主要表现的癌病类疾病。

V002-N01282.label: 恶核
V002-N01282.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜癌类病

V002-N01282.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01282.label: 恶核
V002-N01282.pinyinNames: dong he; e he; è hé
V002-N01282.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01282.definition: Characterized by painless scrofula lumps, coupled with fever and weight loss. Often results from qi stagnation, essential qi deficiency or retention of cancer toxin and phlegm stasis in the surface of the body.

V002-N01277.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01277.label: 翻花疮
V002-N01277.definition: 以生疮溃后，努肉突出，其状如菌，破溃蚀烂,生长迅速，触之出血为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N01277.label: 翻花疮
V002-N01277.englishNames: Carcinoma of the Skin; Luxuriant Granulation
V002-N01277.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N01277.definition: 因肝虚血燥，邪毒结聚皮肤，逐渐恶变而成。以生疮溃后胬肉突出.其状如菌，生长迅速，损破后流血不止为主要表现的癌病类疾病。

V002-N01277.label: 翻花疮
V002-N01277.englishNames: cauliflower-like sore; squamous cell carcinoma; proliferative sore
V002-N01277.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜癌类病

V002-N01277.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01277.label: 翻花疮
V002-N01277.englishNames: proliferative sore; Squamous cell carcinoma; cauliflower-like sore; squamous cell carcinoma
V002-N01277.pinyinNames: fan hua chuang; fān huā chuāng
V002-N01277.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01277.definition: Characterized by rapid growth of pterygium and persistent bleeding upon rupture. It is often caused by liver deficiency and blood dryness, and over time, build up of toxins under the skin.

V002-N01288.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01288.label: 鼻咽癌
V002-N01288.path: 第9部分：耳鼻喉科学｜咽喉病
V002-N01288.definition: 发于鼻咽部的恶性肿瘤。

V002-N01288.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V002-N01288.label: 鼻咽癌
V002-N01288.path: 中医耳鼻喉科学｜咽喉病
V002-N01288.definition: 发于鼻咽部的恶性肿瘤。

V002-N01288.label: 颃颡岩
V002-N01288.definition: 生于鼻咽部的癌病类疾病。

V002-N01288.label: 鼻咽癌
V002-N01288.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证
V002-N01288.definition: 是指发生于鼻咽部的癌肿。临床上以血涕、鼻塞、耳鸣耳聋、颈部恶核及头痛等为主要症状。

V002-N01288.label: 颃颡岩
V002-N01288.aliases: 鼻咽癌； 控脑砂； 颃颡癌
V002-N01288.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜癌类病

V002-N01288.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N01288.label: 颃颡岩
V002-N01288.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜五官科类｜鼻瘤

V002-N01289.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01289.label: 咽喉菌
V002-N01289.path: 第9部分：耳鼻喉科学｜咽喉病
V002-N01289.definition: 咽菌和喉菌的合称。发生于咽喉部的恶性肿瘤。

V002-N01289.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V002-N01289.label: 咽喉菌
V002-N01289.path: 中医耳鼻喉科学｜咽喉病
V002-N01289.definition: 发生于咽喉部的恶性肿瘤。

V002-N01289.label: 咽菌
V002-N01289.definition: 生于咽部，其状如菌的癌病类疾病。

V002-N01289.label: 喉菌
V002-N01289.definition: 生于喉部，其状如菌的癌病类疾病。

V002-N01289.label: 咽喉菌
V002-N01289.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医咽喉疾病
V002-N01289.definition: 发生于咽喉部的癌肿。临床上以咽喉异物感或疼痛、声音嘶哑、咯痰带血、颈部恶核为主要症状，若肿块堵塞声门，可出现喉鸣及呼吸困难，甚至危及生命。

V002-N01289.label: 咽喉菌
V002-N01289.aliases: 咽菌； 喉菌； 喉岩
V002-N01289.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜癌类病

V002-N01289.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N01289.label: 咽菌
V002-N01289.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜五官科类

V002-N01289.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01289.label: 咽喉菌
V002-N01289.aliases: 咽菌； 喉菌； 喉岩
V002-N01289.englishNames: throat cancer; throat carcinoma; Throat cancer
V002-N01289.pinyinNames: yan hou jun; yān hóu jūn
V002-N01289.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01289.definition: Characterized by sore throat, dysphagia, a foreign body sensation in the throat, presence of lumps in the throat with a rough surface. It is often caused by qi stagnation, blood stasis and retention of turbid phlegm in the throat for a long period of time.

V002-N01289.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01289.label: 喉菌
V002-N01289.englishNames: throat cancer; carcinoma of throat; carcinoma of larynx
V002-N01289.path: 眼、耳鼻喉科病｜耳鼻喉科病

V002-N01289.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01289.label: 喉菌
V002-N01289.path: 临床各科｜耳鼻喉口齿科
V002-N01289.definition: malignant tumor of the throat in the shape of mushroom

V002-N01305.label: 尿道癌
V002-N01305.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜癌类病

V002-N01285.label: 眼科癌病
V002-N01285.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜癌类病

V002-N01292.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01292.label: 舌岩
V002-N01292.path: 第2部分：外科学｜瘿瘤岩疾病｜岩

V002-N01292.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01292.label: 舌菌
V002-N01292.path: 第9部分：耳鼻喉科学｜口腔病
V002-N01292.definition: 生于舌部，其状如菌的癌。

V002-N01292.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V002-N01292.label: 舌菌
V002-N01292.path: 中医耳鼻喉科学｜口腔病
V002-N01292.definition: 生于舌部，其状如菌的癌。

V002-N01292.label: 舌菌
V002-N01292.definition: 生于舌部，其状如菌的癌病类疾病。

V002-N01292.label: 舌菌
V002-N01292.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜岩
V002-N01292.definition: 为生在舌部的恶性肿瘤，因其形状似菌，故称舌菌。亦称舌岩、舌疳。其特点是早期舌体肿物形如豆粒而质硬，溃烂后形成坚硬高低不平的溃疡，恶性度高；晚期常累及颈、颌部，预后不佳。

V002-N01292.label: 舌菌
V002-N01292.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜舌诊症状｜舌形症状

V002-N01292.label: 舌岩
V002-N01292.aliases: 舌菌； 舌疳； 舌癌
V002-N01292.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜癌类病

V002-N01292.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01292.label: 舌菌
V002-N01292.englishNames: tongue cancer; carcinoma of tongue; tongue carcinoma

V002-N01292.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01292.label: 舌菌
V002-N01292.englishNames: tongue cancer; Carcinoma  Of  The Tongue
V002-N01292.path: 临床各科｜耳鼻喉口齿科
V002-N01292.definition: cancer of the tongue like a mushroom with a big head and thin stalk

V002-N01278.label: 石疽
V002-N01278.englishNames: Indurated Mass of the Body Surface; Stony Cellulitis; Strong Mass
V002-N01278.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N01278.definition: 因痰凝湿热蕴结，气血瘀滞，日久坚积不散所致。以肌肤结块坚硬不消，隐痛或不痛为主要表现，发生于肌肤的癌病类疾病。

V002-N01278.label: 石疽
V002-N01278.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜癌类病

V002-N01278.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N01278.label: 石疽
V002-N01278.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类｜瘤

V002-N01278.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01278.label: 石疽
V002-N01278.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01278.definition: Characterized by solid, persistent lumps on the skin with presence or absence of dull pain. Often results from chronic accumulation of phlegm and damp heat as well as stagnation of qi and blood.

V002-N01279.label: 上石疽
V002-N01279.englishNames: Upper Stony Cellulitis; Upper Stony Cellulitis at Sides of the Neck; Upper Strong Mass Behind the Ear
V002-N01279.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病｜石疽
V002-N01279.definition: 发于耳下、颈部，结块坚硬不痛，表面光滑为主症的石疽。

V002-N01279.label: 上石疽
V002-N01279.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜癌类病｜石疽

V002-N01279.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01279.label: 上石疽
V002-N01279.englishNames: upper stony nodule; Upper hard nodules
V002-N01279.pinyinNames: shang shi ju; shàng shí jū
V002-N01279.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01279.definition: Characterized by solid, painless, and smooth-surfaced nodules behind the ear or in the neck.

V002-N01280.label: 中石疽
V002-N01280.englishNames: Indurated Mass Between the Waist and Hip; Middle Stony Cellulitis
V002-N01280.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病｜石疽
V002-N01280.definition: 发于一侧胯部，结块坚硬，屈髋拘痛为主症的石疽。

V002-N01280.label: 中石疽
V002-N01280.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜癌类病｜石疽

V002-N01280.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01280.label: 中石疽
V002-N01280.englishNames: middle stony nodule; Middle hard nodules
V002-N01280.pinyinNames: zhong shi ju; zhōng shí jū
V002-N01280.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01280.definition: Characterized by solid nodules on one side of the groin. Pain occurs on hip flexion.

V002-N01281.label: 下石疽
V002-N01281.englishNames: Cellulitis of the Knees; Indurated Mass of the Knee(s); Lower Stony Cellulitis
V002-N01281.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病｜石疽
V002-N01281.definition: 发于膝部，结块隐痛，久不化脓为主症的石疽。

V002-N01281.label: 下石疽
V002-N01281.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜癌类病｜石疽

V002-N01281.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01281.label: 下石疽
V002-N01281.englishNames: lower stony nodule; Lower hard nodules
V002-N01281.pinyinNames: xia shi ju; xià shí jū
V002-N01281.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01281.definition: Characterized by nodules in the knee that causes dull pain and delayed pus formation.

V002-N01294.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01294.label: 石瘿
V002-N01294.path: 第2部分：外科学｜瘿瘤岩疾病｜瘿
V002-N01294.definition: 以颈前单侧或双侧结块坚硬如石，不可移动为主要表现的瘿。

V002-N01294.label: 石瘿
V002-N01294.path: 外科疾病｜外科其他疾病
V002-N01294.definition: 以颈靥部结块坚硬如石，不可移动为主要表 现的瘿。

V002-N01294.label: 石瘿
V002-N01294.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜瘿
V002-N01294.definition: 石瘿是指颈靥部结块坚硬如石，不可移动者的恶性肿瘤。相当于西医的甲状腺腺癌。其特点是甲状腺部单侧或双侧肿块，坚硬如石，高低不平，不能随吞咽动作而上下移动，以及部分晚期患者发生周围或远处转移而出现相应的症状。

V002-N01294.label: 石瘿
V002-N01294.englishNames: stony goiter(thyroid carcinoma); stony goiter; thyroid carcinoma
V002-N01294.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜癌类病

V002-N01294.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N01294.label: 石瘿
V002-N01294.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类｜瘿

V002-N01294.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01294.label: 石瘿
V002-N01294.englishNames: stony goiter(thyroid carcinoma); stony goiter; Stony goitre (thyroid cancer); thyroid carcinoma
V002-N01294.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01294.definition: Characterized by solid, rock-like, immobile and irregular lumps in front of the neck. Often results from qi stagnation of the liver and spleen and intertwined stasis and phlegm over a long period of time.

V002-N01294.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01294.label: 石瘿
V002-N01294.englishNames: stony goiter; Indurated Goiter; Stony Goiter; stony goiter(thyroid carcinoma)

V002-N01294.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01294.label: 石瘿
V002-N01294.englishNames: stony goiter; Indurated Goiter; Stony Goiter; stony goiter(thyroid carcinoma)
V002-N01294.definition: enlarged thyroid, nodulated and as hard as stone, mostly referring to carcinoma of the thyroid

V002-N01314.label: 输卵管癌
V002-N01314.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜癌类病

V002-N01239.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01239.label: 积聚
V002-N01239.path: 第1部分：内科学｜气血津液病
V002-N01239.definition: 积证和聚证的合称。以腹内结块，或痛或胀为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01239.label: 积聚
V002-N01239.path: 内科疾病｜气血津液疾病
V002-N01239.definition: 以腹内结块，或痛或胀为主要表现的疾病。 腹内结块，固定不移，并伴胀痛或刺痛为特 征者称为积。腹中气聚，攻窜胀痛，时作时 止为特征者称为聚。

V002-N01239.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01239.label: 癥瘕
V002-N01239.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肝胆病｜肝病
V002-N01239.definition: 指腹腔内有包块肿物结聚的疾病。一般以坚硬不移，痛有定处的为癥；聚散无常，痛无定处的为瘕。

V002-N01239.label: 积聚
V002-N01239.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证
V002-N01239.definition: 因情志失调、饮食所伤、外邪侵袭或病后体虚改善至肝脾受损、脏腑失和、气机阻滞、瘀血内结，或痰湿凝滞，而成积聚。症见腹内结块，或胀或痛等。

V002-N01239.label: 癥瘕
V002-N01239.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医妇产科疾病｜妇科杂病
V002-N01239.definition: 妇女下腹有结块，或胀、或满、或痛者，称为“癥瘕”。癥与瘕，按其病变性质有所不同。癥，坚硬成块，固定不移，推揉不散，痛有定处，病属血分；瘕，痞满无形，时聚时散，推揉转动，痛无定处，病属气分。

V002-N01239.label: 癥瘕
V002-N01239.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜躯体症状｜胸腹症状

V002-N01239.label: 积聚类病
V002-N01239.aliases: 癥瘕； 积聚； 痃癖
V002-N01239.englishNames: category of abdominal mass accumulation diseases
V002-N01239.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语

V002-N01239.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N01239.label: 癥瘕
V002-N01239.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜妇科类｜其他

V002-N01239.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N01239.label: 癥瘕
V002-N01239.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜伴随产物

V002-N01239.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N01239.label: 积聚
V002-N01239.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜伴随产物

V002-N01239.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01239.label: 积聚类病
V002-N01239.aliases: 癥瘕； 积聚； 痃癖
V002-N01239.englishNames: abdominal mass diseases; category of abdominal mass accumulation diseases; Abdominal masses
V002-N01239.pinyinNames: ji ju lei bing; jī jù lèi bìng
V002-N01239.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01239.definition: Tangible or intangible abdominal masses that can cause abdominal distension and pain. Contributing factors include emotional disturbance, stagnation of qi and blood, food retention, or qi deficiency coupled with external contraction of pathogenic factors.

V002-N01239.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01239.label: 积聚

V002-N01239.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01239.label: 癥瘕

V002-N01243.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01243.label: 肥气
V002-N01243.path: 第1部分：内科学｜气血津液病｜积证
V002-N01243.definition: 肝之积证。以左胁下有块如覆杯，或可有头足,如龟鳖状，久不愈，咳嗽，呕逆,疟疟，脉弦细等为特征的积证。

V002-N01243.label: 肝癌
V002-N01243.aliases: 肥气； 积气； 痞气
V002-N01243.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证
V002-N01243.definition: 以脏腑气血亏虚为本，气、血、湿、热、瘀、毒互结为标，主病在肝，渐为癥积而成。临床以右胁肿硬疼痛，消瘦，食欲不振，乏力，或有黄疸或昏迷等为主要表现。是目前临床常见的恶性肿瘤之一

V002-N01243.label: 肝积
V002-N01243.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证
V002-N01243.definition: 因多种原因导致肝络淤滞不通，肝体失却柔润，疏泄失职。以右胁痛，或胁下肿块，腹胀纳少及肝瘀征候为主要表现的积聚类疾病。

V002-N01243.label: 肥气
V002-N01243.englishNames: Lump Located at the Left Hypochondrium
V002-N01243.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01243.definition: 因疟疾、蛊虫病等，使瘀血内积，新血不生。以左胁下肿块，腹胀膨隆，出血为主要表现的积聚类疾病。

V002-N01243.label: 肥气
V002-N01243.englishNames: liver amassment; lump at the left hypochondrium
V002-N01243.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜积聚类病

V002-N01243.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01243.label: 肥气
V002-N01243.englishNames: liver amassment; lump at the left hypochondrium; Masses in the liver
V002-N01243.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01243.definition: Masses in the liver (right subcostal region) can cause abdominal distension, bulging and bleeding. They often result from accumulation of stagnant blood due to malaria, schistosomiasis, etc.

V002-N01241.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01241.label: 聚证
V002-N01241.path: 第1部分：内科学｜气血津液病
V002-N01241.definition: 以腹中气聚，攻窜胀痛，时作时止为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01241.label: 聚病
V002-N01241.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜积聚类病

V002-N01241.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01241.label: 聚病
V002-N01241.englishNames: mobile abdominal mass disease; Intangible masses; abdominal accumulation disease
V002-N01241.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01241.definition: Masses that are mobile and can cause migratory pain. They often result from qi stagnation. Contributing factors may include emotional disturbance, an improper diet or irregular lifestyle.

V002-N01246.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01246.label: 息贲
V002-N01246.path: 第1部分：内科学｜气血津液病｜积证
V002-N01246.definition: 肺之积证。以寒热，喘息，咳嗽，右胁下包块，大小如杯为特征的积证。

V002-N01246.label: 肺积
V002-N01246.englishNames: abdominal mass due to lung disorder
V002-N01246.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜积聚类病

V002-N01246.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01246.label: 肺积
V002-N01246.englishNames: Masses in the lung; abdominal mass due to lung disorder
V002-N01246.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01246.definition: Characterized by rapid, rushing breathing and masses in the right subcostal region. Associated symptoms may include fever, chills, chest tightness, hiccups and coughing with expectoration of pus and blood. They often result from dysfunctions of the zang–fu organs or stagnation of qi and blood. They can also be triggered by exogenous pathogenic factors.

V002-N01244.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01244.label: 痞气
V002-N01244.path: 第1部分：内科学｜气血津液病｜积证
V002-N01244.definition: 脾之积证。以胃皖部有块如覆盘，久不愈，令人四肢不收，发黄疸等为特征的积证。

V002-N01244.label: 肝癌
V002-N01244.aliases: 肥气； 积气； 痞气
V002-N01244.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证
V002-N01244.definition: 以脏腑气血亏虚为本，气、血、湿、热、瘀、毒互结为标，主病在肝，渐为癥积而成。临床以右胁肿硬疼痛，消瘦，食欲不振，乏力，或有黄疸或昏迷等为主要表现。是目前临床常见的恶性肿瘤之一

V002-N01244.label: 痞气
V002-N01244.englishNames: spleen amassment; mass due to qi stagnation
V002-N01244.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜积聚类病

V002-N01244.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01244.label: 痞气
V002-N01244.englishNames: mass due to qi stagnation; spleen amassment; Masses in the spleen
V002-N01244.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01244.definition: Masses in the spleen manifest as raised lumps in the gastric region. They often result from spleen deficiency coupled with qi stagnation.

V002-N01245.label: 食瘕
V002-N01245.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01245.definition: 因身体瘦弱、劳倦太过、久病重病，使脾虚失运，或因腹部手术之后、暴饮暴食、腹内肿块挤压等，使胃气阻滞，饮食停聚，胃气不降而成。以脘部触及痞块，脘腹疼痛，呕吐等为主要表现的积聚类疾病。

V002-N01245.label: 食瘕
V002-N01245.englishNames: abdominal mass due to improper food
V002-N01245.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜积聚类病

V002-N01245.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01245.label: 食瘕
V002-N01245.englishNames: abdominal mass due to improper diet; Stomach masses due to food retention; abdominal mass due to improper food
V002-N01245.pinyinNames: shí jiǎ; shi jia; shi xia
V002-N01245.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01245.definition: Characterized by palpable lumps in the gastric region, abdominal pain and vomiting. Often results from food retention and failure of stomach qi to descend. Contributing factors may include general weakness, over-exertion, abdominal surgery, binge eating or abdominal masses.

V002-N01240.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01240.label: 积证
V002-N01240.path: 第1部分：内科学｜气血津液病
V002-N01240.definition: 以腹内结块，固定不移，伴胀痛或刺痛为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01240.label: 积病
V002-N01240.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜积聚类病

V002-N01240.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01240.label: 积病
V002-N01240.englishNames: abdominal mass disease; immobile abdominal mass disease; Tangible masses
V002-N01240.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01240.definition: Masses that are immobile and can cause abdominal distension and pain in fixed positions. They often result from blood stasis. Contributing factors may include parasitic worms, food retention, dry faeces or phlegm retention.

V002-N01242.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01242.label: 伏梁
V002-N01242.path: 第1部分：内科学｜气血津液病｜积证
V002-N01242.definition: 心之积证。以心下悸动，腹痛，从心下至脐有包块突起为特征的积证。

V002-N01242.label: 伏梁
V002-N01242.englishNames: Cardiac Mass; Mass Located in the Upper Abdomen
V002-N01242.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01242.definition: 因秽浊之邪结伏肠道，阻滞气血运行，秽浊与气血搏结日久而成。以腹痛，腹泻，右下腹包块为主要表现的积聚类疾病。

V002-N01242.vocabName: 简帛医药文献词典（2018）（未校勘）
V002-N01242.label: 伏梁
V002-N01242.path: 上編 簡帛醫學詞語｜病症詞語
V002-N01242.definition: 小腹部瘫腫、潰疡並見的病症。

V002-N01242.label: 伏梁
V002-N01242.aliases: 伏梁积气； 心积伏梁
V002-N01242.englishNames: disease due to latent stagnation of qi and blood; heart amassment
V002-N01242.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜积聚类病

V002-N01242.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01242.label: 伏梁
V002-N01242.aliases: 伏梁积气； 心积伏梁； 伏梁气； Masses accumulating below the cardiac region (Crohn’s disease or regional enteritis)
V002-N01242.englishNames: disease due to latent stagnation of qi and blood; Masses in the upper abdomen; heart amassment
V002-N01242.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01242.definition: Masses in the upper abdomen can cause abdominal pain and diarrhoea with stools containing pus and blood. They often result from accumulation of foul turbidity and stagnant qi and blood.

V002-N01247.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01247.label: 奔豚
V002-N01247.path: 第1部分：内科学｜气血津液病｜积证
V002-N01247.definition: 肾之积证。肾脏阴寒之气上逆,或肝经气火冲逆,以有气从少腹上冲胸皖、咽喉,发时痛苦剧烈,心 悸头晕，久而喘咳、骨痿、少气等为特征的积证。

V002-N01247.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01247.label: 奔豚
V002-N01247.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病
V002-N01247.definition: 因惊恐恼怒，肝气郁结化热所致，以气从少腹上冲胸脘、咽喉为主要表现，发时痛苦剧烈，或有腹痛，或往来寒热，病延日久，可见咳逆、骨痿、少气等症。

V002-N01247.label: 奔豚
V002-N01247.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V002-N01247.definition: 古病名，见《灵枢》、《难经》、《金匮要略》等，为五积之一，属肾之积。《金匮要略》称之为“奔豚气”。豚，即小猪。奔豚一由于肾脏寒气上冲，一由于肝脏气火上逆，临床特点为发作性下腹气上冲胸，直达咽喉，腹部绞痛，胸闷气急，头昏目眩，心悸易惊，烦躁不安，发作过后如常，有的夹杂寒热往来或吐脓症状。因其发作时胸腹如有小豚奔闯，故名。从证候表现看，类于胃肠神经官能症，而出现肠道积气和蠕动亢进或痉挛状态。

V002-N01247.label: 奔豚
V002-N01247.aliases: 奔豚气； 贲豚； 贲豚气； 肾积气
V002-N01247.englishNames: running piglet; kidney amassment; Gas Rushing Syndrome; running-piglet
V002-N01247.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜积聚类病

V002-N01247.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N01247.label: 奔豚
V002-N01247.path: 分类与代码表｜必要信息（基本症状）｜骨干症状｜心神系症状类

V002-N01247.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01247.label: 奔豚
V002-N01247.aliases: 奔豚气； 贲豚； 贲豚气； 肾积气； Running piglet qi； ascending of yin cold qi from the kidney
V002-N01247.englishNames: running piglet; kidney amassment; Running piglet; running-piglet; Gas Rushing Syndrome
V002-N01247.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01247.definition: Characterized by qi rushing up from the lower abdomen to the chest and throat. Panic, abdominal pain or alternating chills and fever may also be present. Often results from ascending of yin cold qi from the kidney, fear/fright or ascending of liver qi along the meridian pathway.

V002-N00123.label: 中毒及意外伤害类术语
V002-N00123.conceptName: 中毒及意外伤害类术语
V002-N00123.preferredName: 中毒及意外伤害类术语
V002-N00123.englishNames: category of poisoning and accidental traumatic injury terminology
V002-N00123.pinyinNames: zhong er ji yi wai shang hai lei shu yu; zhong dong ji yi wai shang hai lei shu yu
matchedTerms: 中毒及意外伤害类术语

V002-N00245.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00245.label: 卒死
V002-N00245.definition: 以6 h以内不明原因突然发生的意识丧失，寸口、人迎、跌阳脉搏动消失,呼吸心跳暂停，全身青紫，瞳神散大，四肢厥冷等为主要表现的危急重证。

V002-N00245.label: 卒死
V002-N00245.path: 中医疾病｜中毒及意外伤害类术语

V002-N00245.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00245.label: 卒死
V002-N00245.pinyinNames: zu si; zú sǐ; cu si
V002-N00245.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00245.definition: Characterized by unexpected critical signs that occur within six hours. These include loss of consciousness, absence of pulsations at the radial, carotid and anterior tibial arteries, respiratory/cardiac arrest, cyanosis, pupil dilation and cold limbs. These signs are caused by separation between yin and yang.

V002-N00241.label: 水火烫伤
V002-N00241.aliases: 火疮； 火烧疮； 烧伤； 汤火疮； 汤泼火伤
V002-N00241.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜其他外科疾病
V002-N00241.definition: 燃烧物及灼热的液体、固体、气体以及电流等直接作用于人体，引起肌肤烫伤或烧伤，甚至火毒内攻脏腑。损伤的面积和程度与温度及作用时间相关。以伤处红肿灼痛、起泡、结焦痂，伴发热烦躁，口干尿黄，甚至神昏等为主要表现的损伤类疾病。

V002-N00241.label: 水火烫伤
V002-N00241.englishNames: scald or burn due to hot water or fire
V002-N00241.path: 中医疾病｜中毒及意外伤害类术语

V002-N00241.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00241.label: 水火烫伤
V002-N00241.englishNames: scald or burn due to hot water or fire; Burns and scalds
V002-N00241.pinyinNames: shui huo tang shang; shuǐ huǒ tàng shāng
V002-N00241.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00241.definition: Damage to the skin by heat: a burn is caused by dry heat such as fire, whereas a scald is caused by something wet, such as hot water or steam. In addition to skin damage (redness, swelling, pain, blisters or scabs), fire/heat may affect the zang–fu organs, resulting in fever, restlessness, a dry mouth, and yellow urine. In severe cases, loss of consciousness and delirium may be present.

V002-N00124.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00124.label: 药物中毒
V002-N00124.definition: 因误服大剂量药物，或治疗中错用误服及服用变质药物，或药物配伍失度等所致的中毒病。

V002-N00124.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00124.label: 药物中毒
V002-N00124.path: 中医内科学｜内科学中毒病
V002-N00124.definition: 因误服大剂量药物，或治疗中错用误服及服用变质药物，或药物配伍失度等所致的中毒病。

V002-N00124.label: 药毒类病
V002-N00124.pinyinNames: yao dong lei bing; yao er lei bing
V002-N00124.path: 中医疾病｜中毒及意外伤害类术语

V002-N00124.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00124.label: 药物中毒
V002-N00124.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜影响因素｜外在刺激因素

V002-N00124.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00124.label: 药毒类病
V002-N00124.englishNames: Drug poisoning; drug poisoning diseases; category of drug poisoning disease
V002-N00124.pinyinNames: yào dú lèi bìng; yao dong lei bing; yao er lei bing
V002-N00124.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00124.definition: A group of disorders caused by overdose, incorrect use, administration of inappropriately prepared or contaminated drugs or incompatible drug combination. Examples include gelsemium poisoning, Tripterygium wilfordii poisoning, aconite poisoning, almond poisoning, croton poisoning and arsenic poisoning.

V002-N00127.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00127.label: 乌头类中毒
V002-N00127.definition: 因服用过量乌头类药物所致的中毒病。

V002-N00127.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00127.label: 乌头类中毒
V002-N00127.path: 中医内科学｜内科学中毒病
V002-N00127.definition: 因服用过量乌头类药物所致的中毒病。

V002-N00127.label: 乌头类中毒
V002-N00127.path: 内科疾病｜内科其他疾病
V002-N00127.definition: 因服用过量乌头类药物所致的中毒类疾病。

V002-N00127.label: 乌头类中毒
V002-N00127.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中毒及其他病类
V002-N00127.definition: 因服用过量乌头、附子、天雄所致。以口唇、四肢麻木，头晕，言语不清，视力模糊，严重者出现心悸，血压下降，神昏，抽搐等症，甚至导致死亡的中毒类疾病。

V002-N00127.label: 乌头类中毒
V002-N00127.aliases: 乌头中毒； 附子中毒； 天雄中毒
V002-N00127.pinyinNames: wu tou lei zhong dong; wu tou lei zhong er
V002-N00127.path: 中医疾病｜中毒及意外伤害类术语｜药毒类病

V002-N00125.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00125.label: 钩吻中毒
V002-N00125.definition: 因误食钩吻所致，以呼吸困难，甚至呼吸停顿等为主要表现的中毒病。

V002-N00125.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）

V002-N00125.definition: 因吞食钩吻所致，以呼吸困难，甚至呼吸停顿等为主要表现的中毒病。

V002-N00125.label: 钩吻中毒
V002-N00125.path: 内科疾病｜内科其他疾病
V002-N00125.definition: 因吞食钩吻所致，以呼吸困难，甚至呼吸停 顿等为主要表现的中毒类疾病。

V002-N00125.label: 钩吻中毒
V002-N00125.aliases: 断肠草中毒； 水莽草中毒
V002-N00125.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中毒及其他病类
V002-N00125.definition: 因吞食钩吻所致。以呼吸困难，甚至呼吸停顿等为主要表现的中毒类疾病。

V002-N00125.label: 钩吻中毒
V002-N00125.aliases: 断肠草中毒； 水莽草中毒
V002-N00125.englishNames: gelsemism; gelsemium poisoning; gelsemium elegans poisoning
V002-N00125.pinyinNames: gou wen zhong dong; gou wen zhong er
V002-N00125.path: 中医疾病｜中毒及意外伤害类术语｜药毒类病

V002-N00128.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00128.label: 杏仁中毒
V002-N00128.definition: 因误食苦杏仁过量所致的中毒病。

V002-N00128.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）

V002-N00128.path: 中医内科学｜内科学中毒病

V002-N00128.pinyinNames: xing ren zhong dong; xing ren zhong er
