V002-N00126.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00126.label: 雷公藤中毒
V002-N00126.definition: 因误服或服用雷公藤过量所致，以剧烈腹痛，指甲青紫等为主要表现的中毒病。

V002-N00126.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00126.label: 雷公藤中毒
V002-N00126.path: 中医内科学｜内科学中毒病
V002-N00126.definition: 因误食或服用雷公藤过量所致，以剧烈腹痛，指甲青紫等为主要表现的中毒病。

V002-N00126.label: 雷公藤中毒
V002-N00126.path: 内科疾病｜内科其他疾病
V002-N00126.definition: 因误食雷公藤所致，以剧烈腹痛，指甲青紫 等为主要表现的中毒类疾病。

V002-N00126.label: 雷公藤中毒
V002-N00126.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中毒及其他病类
V002-N00126.definition: 因误食雷公藤所致。以剧烈腹痛，指甲青紫等为主要表现的中毒类疾病。

V002-N00126.label: 雷公藤中毒
V002-N00126.aliases: 黄藤木中毒； 红药中毒
V002-N00126.pinyinNames: lei gong teng zhong dong; lei gong teng zhong er
V002-N00126.path: 中医疾病｜中毒及意外伤害类术语｜药毒类病

V002-N00140.label: 恶虫叮咬伤
V002-N00140.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00140.definition: 因蚊子、臭虫、跳蚤等叮咬，虫毒侵袭肌肤所致。以皮肤见红色疹点启痒等为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00140.label: 虫螫伤类病
V002-N00140.path: 中医疾病｜中毒及意外伤害类术语

V002-N00140.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00140.label: 虫螫伤类病
V002-N00140.aliases: 虫螫； 恶虫叮咬伤； Insect stings/bites
V002-N00140.englishNames: category of insect bite disease; insect bite diseases; Insect stings
V002-N00140.pinyinNames: chong zhe shang lei bing; chóng shì shāng lèi bìng
V002-N00140.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00140.definition: A group of disorders caused by insect stings and characterized by local itching, pain, redness and rashes/papulae.

V002-N00146.label: 蠼螋伤
V002-N00146.path: 中医疾病｜中毒及意外伤害类术语｜虫螫伤类病

V002-N00146.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00146.label: 蠼螋伤
V002-N00146.englishNames: staphylinid injury; Rove beetle injuries; anisolobis sting
V002-N00146.pinyinNames: qu sou shang; qú sōu shāng
V002-N00146.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00146.definition: Exposure to pederin, a strong toxin in the blood of rove beetle, may cause a burning pain, itching, linear red spots or pustules.

V002-N00149.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00149.label: 水毒
V002-N00149.definition: 水毒(血吸虫尾)经皮肤侵入,毒损皮肤，以皮肤出现风团皮疹、瘙痒,数日后自行消失为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00149.label: 水毒
V002-N00149.path: 病因病机｜病因｜内毒外毒
V002-N00149.definition: 指于山中谷溪源处，因恶虫所致之毒。

V002-N00149.label: 水毒
V002-N00149.englishNames: Noxious Water Disease; Polluted Water Cansing a Disease; Water Poisons
V002-N00149.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00149.definition: 因水毒（血吸虫尾蚴）经皮肤侵入，毒损皮肤所致。以皮肤出现风团皮疹、瘙痒，数日后自行消失为主要表现的虫病类疾病。

V002-N00149.label: 水毒
V002-N00149.path: 中医疾病｜中毒及意外伤害类术语｜虫螫伤类病

V002-N00149.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00149.label: 水毒
V002-N00149.englishNames: Cutaneous schistosomiasis; schistosome cercarial dermatitis; water poison
V002-N00149.pinyinNames: shuǐ dú; shui dong; shui er
V002-N00149.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00149.definition: Exposure to cercariae of schistosoma in water may cause itchy skin wheals or rashes that resolve spontaneously after a couple of days.

V002-N00149.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00149.label: 水毒

V002-N00145.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00145.label: 松毛虫伤
V002-N00145.definition: 接触松毛虫体上的毒毛，以皮肤剧烈瘙痒、红肿，或起水疱为主要表现的中毒病。

V002-N00145.label: 松毛虫伤
V002-N00145.englishNames: pine caterpillar sting; pine caterpillar injury
V002-N00145.path: 中医疾病｜中毒及意外伤害类术语｜虫螫伤类病

V002-N00145.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00145.label: 松毛虫伤
V002-N00145.englishNames: pine caterpillar sting; Pine caterpillar injuries; pine caterpillar injury
V002-N00145.pinyinNames: song mao chong shang; sōng máo chóng shāng
V002-N00145.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00145.definition: Exposure to toxic hairs of pine caterpillars may cause intense itching, redness, swelling or blisters at the affected sites. Individuals may also experience joint redness, swelling, pain and restricted movement.

V002-N00142.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00142.label: 蜂螫伤
V002-N00142.definition: 蜂尾螯伤，毒液注入人体，或伴刺留皮内，以局部出现红肿刺痛，甚或有头晕恶心等为主要表现的急性中毒病。

V002-N00142.label: 蜂螫伤
V002-N00142.path: 中医疾病｜中毒及意外伤害类术语｜虫螫伤类病

V002-N00142.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00142.label: 蜂螫伤
V002-N00142.pinyinNames: feng zhe shang; fēng shì shāng
V002-N00142.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00142.definition: Bee/wasp stings may cause the venom or toxin to enter the body or remain in the skin. Individuals may experience pricking pain, scratching pain, a burning sensation, skin redness and oedema, papules or blisters at the sting sites. In severe cases, fever, dizziness, nausea, vomiting and low blood pressure may be present.

V002-N00143.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00143.label: 蝎螫伤
V002-N00143.definition: 蝎子尾部螯伤,毒液进入人体，以局部疼痛，甚或伴寒热、呕恶、抽搐等全身症状为主要表现的急性中毒病。

V002-N00143.label: 蝎螫伤
V002-N00143.path: 中医疾病｜中毒及意外伤害类术语｜虫螫伤类病

V002-N00143.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00143.label: 蝎螫伤
V002-N00143.englishNames: Scorpion sting; scorpion sting; scorpian sting
V002-N00143.pinyinNames: xiē shì shāng; xie zhe shang
V002-N00143.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00143.definition: Scorpion sting may cause the venom or toxin to enter the body. Individuals may experience severe pain, scratching pain, a burning sensation, skin redness/swelling or blisters as the bite sites. In severe cases, red streaks on the skin, enlarged lymph nodes, chills, fever, nausea, vomiting or respiratory paralysis may be present.

V002-N00148.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00148.label: 蚂蝗咬伤
V002-N00148.definition: 蚂蝗叮咬皮肤，以局部流血不止和轻微痒痛为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00148.label: 蚂蝗咬伤
V002-N00148.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00148.definition: 因蚂蝗叮咬皮肤，损伤血络所致。以局部流血不止和轻微疼痛为主要表现的出血性疾病。蚂蝗侵入鼻孔、阴道等处后，亦以引起该处出血不止为主症。

V002-N00148.label: 蚂蝗咬伤
V002-N00148.path: 中医疾病｜中毒及意外伤害类术语｜虫螫伤类病

V002-N00148.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00148.label: 蚂蝗咬伤
V002-N00148.englishNames: leech sting; leech bite; Leech bites
V002-N00148.pinyinNames: ma huang yao shang; mǎ huáng yǎo shāng
V002-N00148.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00148.definition: Leech bites may cause persistent bleeding at the site of bites with mild itching and pain.

V002-N00144.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00144.label: 蜘蛛咬伤
V002-N00144.definition: 有毒蜘蛛咬伤,毒汁进入人体，以局部刺痛或有水肿，可伴恶寒,呕吐、腹痛等全身症状为主要表现的急性中毒病。

V002-N00144.label: 蜘蛛咬伤
V002-N00144.path: 中医疾病｜中毒及意外伤害类术语｜虫螫伤类病

V002-N00144.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00144.label: 蜘蛛咬伤
V002-N00144.pinyinNames: zhi zhu yao shang; zhī zhū yǎo shāng
V002-N00144.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00144.definition: Spider bites may cause the venom to enter the body. Individuals may experience pricking pain, itching or oedema at the bite sites, accompanied by abdominal spasm/pain, muscle rigidity, and eyelid ptosis. Chills, vomiting, salivation or difficulty breathing may also be present.

V002-N00147.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00147.label: 射工伤
V002-N00147.definition: 接触蜊虫、刺毛虫虫体上的毒毛，以皮肤剧烈瘙痒、红肿,或起水疱为主要表现的中毒病。

V002-N00147.label: 射工伤
V002-N00147.path: 中医疾病｜中毒及意外伤害类术语｜虫螫伤类病

V002-N00147.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00147.label: 射工伤
V002-N00147.englishNames: caterpillar sting; pricked injury; Caterpillar stings
V002-N00147.pinyinNames: she gong shang; shè gōng shāng
V002-N00147.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00147.definition: Exposure to toxic hair of caterpillars may cause intense itching, redness, swelling, blisters or ulcers.

V002-N00141.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00141.label: 蜈蚣螫伤
V002-N00141.definition: 蜈蚣螯伤,毒汁注入皮肤，以局部出现咬伤瘀点，周围红肿疼痛，甚或伴全身症状为主要表现的急性中毒病。

V002-N00141.label: 蜈蚣螫伤
V002-N00141.path: 中医疾病｜中毒及意外伤害类术语｜虫螫伤类病

V002-N00141.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00141.label: 蜈蚣螫伤
V002-N00141.pinyinNames: wú gōng shì shāng; wu gong zhe shang
V002-N00141.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00141.definition: An injury resulting from the action of a centipede’s forcipules, pincer-like appendages that pierce the skin and inject venom into the wound. It is characterized by stasis spots, redness, swelling and pain and swelling in the area of the bite. Associated symptoms may include swollen, painful lymph nodes in the regions of the bitten limb, chills and fever.

V002-N00150.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00150.label: 野屎风
V002-N00150.definition: 接触有钩虫的粪毒，以虫毒侵入处皮肤出现风团皮疹、奇痒，数日内自行消失为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00150.label: 野屎风
V002-N00150.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00150.definition: 因接触有钩虫的粪毒，毒损皮肤所致。以足趾或手指间（虫毒侵入处）皮肤出现风团皮疹、奇痒，数日内自行消失为主要表现的虫病类疾病。

V002-N00150.label: 野屎风
V002-N00150.path: 中医疾病｜中毒及意外伤害类术语｜虫螫伤类病

V002-N00150.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00150.label: 野屎风
V002-N00150.englishNames: fecal contact dermatosis; hookworm dermatitis; Ancylostoma dermatitis
V002-N00150.pinyinNames: ye shi feng; yě shǐ fēng
V002-N00150.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00150.definition: A condition caused by exposure to the infestation of larvae of hookworms, especially Ancylostoma braziliense, when they penetrate the skin of their host. Individuals may experience extremely itchy skin wheals or rashes between the toes or fingers that resolve spontaneously after a couple of days.

V002-N00238.label: 冻伤
V002-N00238.path: 病因病机｜病因｜其他病因｜外伤
V002-N00238.definition: 是低温所造成的全身或局部的损伤。

V002-N00238.label: 冻伤类病
V002-N00238.pinyinNames: dong shang lei bing; er shang lei bing
V002-N00238.path: 中医疾病｜中毒及意外伤害类术语

V002-N00240.label: 冻疮
V002-N00240.aliases: Chilblain； 冻僵； 冻烂疮； 冻死； 水浸手； 水浸足
V002-N00240.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜其他外科疾病
V002-N00240.definition: 是指人体受寒邪侵袭，气血瘀滞，从而引起局部性或全身性的损伤。相当于西医的冻伤。临床上局部性者较轻，以局部肿胀、麻木、痛痒、青紫，或起水疱，甚则破溃成疮为表现。

V002-N00240.label: 冻僵
V002-N00240.path: 中医疾病｜中毒及意外伤害类术语｜冻伤类病

V002-N00240.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00240.label: 冻僵
V002-N00240.pinyinNames: dong jiang; er jiang; dòng jiāng
V002-N00240.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00240.definition: A condition caused by exposure to cold environment for prolonged periods. Individuals may experience pale skin, a cold feeling, chills, fever, excitation, elevated blood pressure and faster heart rate. When the core body temperature has decreased below 32°C, an indifferent expression, confusion, decreased breathing/heart rate, and muscle rigidity may occur. When the core body temperature has decreased below 29°C, slow reactions, loss of consciousness, and low blood pressure may be present. When the core body temperature has decreased below 26°C, ventricular fibrillation or respiratory/cardiac arrest may occur.

V002-N00240.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00240.label: 冻疮
V002-N00240.aliases: BWV000； 冻风； Chilblain； 冻僵； 冻烂疮； 冻死； 水浸手； 水浸足

V002-N00240.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00240.label: 冻疮
V002-N00240.aliases: BWV000； 冻风； Chilblain； 冻僵； 冻烂疮； 冻死； 水浸手； 水浸足
V002-N00240.definition: a lesion marked by swelling, numbness, cyanosis, blister or ulcerating sore attributed to exposure to cold that causes local stagnation of qi and blood

V002-N00239.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00239.label: 冻疮
V002-N00239.definition: 暴露部位遭受寒邪侵袭，以肿硬暗红发凉、瘙痒疼痛，甚至皮肤紫暗，溃烂为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00239.label: 冻疮
V002-N00239.aliases: Chilblain； 冻僵； 冻烂疮； 冻死； 水浸手； 水浸足
V002-N00239.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜其他外科疾病
V002-N00239.definition: 是指人体受寒邪侵袭，气血瘀滞，从而引起局部性或全身性的损伤。相当于西医的冻伤。临床上局部性者较轻，以局部肿胀、麻木、痛痒、青紫，或起水疱，甚则破溃成疮为表现。

V002-N00239.label: 冻疮
V002-N00239.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜皮肤症状

V002-N00239.label: 冻疮
V002-N00239.path: 中医疾病｜中毒及意外伤害类术语｜冻伤类病

V002-N00239.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00239.label: 冻疮
V002-N00239.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V002-N00239.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00239.label: 冻疮
V002-N00239.pinyinNames: dong chuang; er chuang; dòng chuāng
V002-N00239.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00239.definition: Characterized by redness, swelling, a cold feeling, itching and pain upon sudden exposure to low temperatures. Areas that are usually affected include the back of the hand/foot, ears and cheeks. In severe cases, blood blisters, blue-grey discolouration of the skin, ulceration or autoamputation may be present.

V002-N00239.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00239.label: 冻疮
V002-N00239.aliases: BWV000； 冻风； Chilblain； 冻僵； 冻烂疮； 冻死； 水浸手； 水浸足

V002-N00239.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00239.label: 冻疮
V002-N00239.aliases: BWV000； 冻风； Chilblain； 冻僵； 冻烂疮； 冻死； 水浸手； 水浸足
V002-N00239.definition: a lesion marked by swelling, numbness, cyanosis, blister or ulcerating sore attributed to exposure to cold that causes local stagnation of qi and blood

V002-N00129.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00129.label: 食物中毒
V002-N00129.definition: 因进食含有毒素或变质不洁食物，或食物加工不当所致，以腹痛、呕泻等为主要表现的中毒病。

V002-N00129.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00129.label: 食物中毒
V002-N00129.path: 中医内科学｜内科学中毒病
V002-N00129.definition: 因进食含有毒素或变质不洁食物，或食物加工不当所致，以腹痛、呕泻等为主要表现的中毒类疾病。

V002-N00129.label: 食物中毒
V002-N00129.path: 内科疾病｜内科其他疾病
V002-N00129.definition: 因进食含有毒素的食物所致，以腹痛、呕泻 等为主要表现的中毒类疾病。

V002-N00129.label: 食物中毒
V002-N00129.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中毒及其他病类
V002-N00129.definition: 凡食用有毒的植物、动物或其他食品所出现的中毒病证，称为食物中毒。

V002-N00129.label: 食毒类病
V002-N00129.pinyinNames: shi er lei bing; shi dong lei bing
V002-N00129.path: 中医疾病｜中毒及意外伤害类术语

V002-N00129.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00129.label: 食物中毒
V002-N00129.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜影响因素｜外在刺激因素

V002-N00129.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00129.label: 食毒类病
V002-N00129.englishNames: food poisoning; food poisoning diseases; Food poisoning
V002-N00129.pinyinNames: shi er lei bing; shi dong lei bing; shí dú lèi bìng
V002-N00129.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00129.definition: A group of disorders caused by ingestion of toxic/contaminated food or inappropriately processed food.

V002-N00131.label: 鱼蟹类中毒
V002-N00131.pinyinNames: yu xie lei zhong er; yu xie lei zhong dong
V002-N00131.path: 中医疾病｜中毒及意外伤害类术语｜食毒类病

V002-N00131.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00131.label: 鱼蟹类中毒
V002-N00131.englishNames: fish and crab poisoning; Fish and crab poisoning
V002-N00131.pinyinNames: yu xie lei zhong er; yu xie lei zhong dong; yú xiè lèi zhòng dú
V002-N00131.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00131.definition: Food poisoning caused by ingestion of contaminated or inappropriately cooked fish or crab. It is characterized by sudden cardiac/abdominal tightness and fullness, restlessness, vomiting, abdominal pain, and diarrhoea. Associated symptoms include dizziness, facial puffiness, red skin rashes and itching. In severe cases, palpitations, shortness of breath, rapid breathing or death may occur.

V002-N00132.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00132.label: 河豚中毒
V002-N00132.path: 中医内科学｜内科学中毒病
V002-N00132.definition: 因误食河豚所致的中毒类疾病。

V002-N00132.label: 河豚中毒
V002-N00132.pinyinNames: he tun zhong dong; he tun zhong er
V002-N00132.path: 中医疾病｜中毒及意外伤害类术语｜食毒类病｜鱼蟹类中毒

V002-N00132.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00132.label: 河豚中毒
V002-N00132.englishNames: balloon fish poisoning; Puffer fish poisoning; globefish poisoning
V002-N00132.pinyinNames: he tun zhong dong; hé tún zhòng dú; he tun zhong er
V002-N00132.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00132.definition: Food poisoning caused by ingestion of inappropriately cooked puffer fish. It is characterized by sudden vomiting, abdominal pain, diarrhoea and bloody stools, followed by a tingling sensation in the lips, tongue and extremities, eyelid ptosis, limb weakness/paralysis, and cardiac arrhythmias. In severe cases, respiratory or circulatory failure may be present.

V002-N00130.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00130.label: 食郁肉中毒
V002-N00130.definition: 因食密闭容器内生、熟变质肉类所致的中毒病。

V002-N00130.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00130.label: 食郁肉中毒
V002-N00130.path: 中医内科学｜内科学中毒病
V002-N00130.definition: 因食密闭容器内生、熟变质肉类所致的中毒病。

V002-N00130.label: 食郁肉中毒
V002-N00130.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中毒及其他病类
V002-N00130.definition: 因进食密闭容器内的变质肉类所致。以呕吐，烦躁不安为主症，甚至可致死亡的中毒类疾病。

V002-N00130.label: 食郁肉中毒
V002-N00130.pinyinNames: shi yu rou zhong er; shi yu rou zhong dong
V002-N00130.path: 中医疾病｜中毒及意外伤害类术语｜食毒类病

V002-N00133.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00133.label: 毒蕈中毒
V002-N00133.definition: 因误食毒蕈所致，以胃肠、心脉、脑神、肝肾等受损为特点的中毒病。其临床表现因毒蕈所含成分及其毒性作用而异。

V002-N00133.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00133.label: 毒蕈中毒
V002-N00133.path: 中医内科学｜内科学中毒病
V002-N00133.definition: 因误食毒蕈所致，以胃肠、心脉、脑神、肝肾等受损为特点的中毒类疾病。其临床表现因毒蕈所含成分及其毒性作用而异。

V002-N00133.label: 毒蕈中毒
V002-N00133.path: 内科疾病｜内科其他疾病
V002-N00133.definition: 因误食毒蕈所致，以胃肠、心脉、脑神、肝肾 等受损为特点的中毒类疾病。其临床表现 因毒蕈所含成分及其毒性作用而异。

V002-N00133.label: 毒蕈中毒
V002-N00133.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中毒及其他病类
V002-N00133.definition: 因误食毒蕈所致。其症状因毒蕈所含成分及其毒性作用而异，以胃肠、心脉、脑神、肝肾等受损所致的不同临床表现为特点的中毒类疾病。

V002-N00133.label: 毒蕈中毒
V002-N00133.pinyinNames: dong xun zhong dong; du xun zhong er
V002-N00133.path: 中医疾病｜中毒及意外伤害类术语｜食毒类病

V002-N00133.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00133.label: 毒蕈中毒
V002-N00133.englishNames: poisonous mushroom poisoning; mushroom poisoning; Mushroom poisoning
V002-N00133.pinyinNames: dong xun zhong dong; du xun zhong er; dú xùn zhòng dú
V002-N00133.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00133.definition: Food poisoning caused by ingestion of toxic substances present in mushrooms. Symptoms of mushroom poisoning may vary from headache, vomiting, abdominal pain, diarrhoea, jaundice, drowsiness and visual hallucination to mental confusion or sudden death, depending on how severe the toxin affects the gastrointestinal tract, heart, brain, liver or kidney.

V002-N00134.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00134.label: 菜乌紫病
V002-N00134.path: 中医内科学｜内科学中毒病
V002-N00134.definition: 因进食新腌制的蔬菜所致，以皮肤、黏膜紫绀等为主要表现的中毒类疾病。

V002-N00134.label: 菜乌紫病
V002-N00134.englishNames: Poisoning in Case of Eating Vegetable Which Being Bloat
V002-N00134.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中毒及其他病类
V002-N00134.definition: 因进食新腌制的蔬菜所致。以皮肤、粘膜紫绀为主要表现的中毒类疾病。

V002-N00134.label: 菜乌紫病
V002-N00134.path: 中医疾病｜中毒及意外伤害类术语｜食毒类病

V002-N00134.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00134.label: 菜乌紫病
V002-N00134.englishNames: pickle disease; pickles cyanosis; Pickles cyanosis
V002-N00134.pinyinNames: cai wu zi bing; cài wū zǐ bìng
V002-N00134.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00134.definition: Food poisoning caused by ingestion of newly pickled vegetables.

V002-N00151.label: 创伤类病
V002-N00151.path: 中医疾病｜中毒及意外伤害类术语

V002-N00151.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00151.label: 创伤类病
V002-N00151.englishNames: traumatic diseases; category of traumatic disease; Traumatic injuries
V002-N00151.pinyinNames: chuang shang lei bing; chuāng shāng lèi bìng
V002-N00151.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00151.definition: Injuries caused by violent forces, metallic tools, firearms or animal bites. They vary from bone/tendon injuries to tissue or organ ruptures.

V002-N00200.label: 筋骨病
V002-N00200.englishNames: disease related to sinews and bones
V002-N00200.path: 中医疾病｜中毒及意外伤害类术语｜创伤类病

V002-N00216.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00216.label: 腰肌劳损
V002-N00216.definition: 腰部肌肉及其附着点的积累性损伤，引起局部慢性无菌性炎症，以腰部隐痛、反复发作、劳累后加重为主要临床表现的疾病。

V002-N00216.label: 腰肌劳损
V002-N00216.definition: 以腰部隐痛反复发作，劳累后加重，休息后 缓解等为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00216.label: 腰肌劳损
V002-N00216.englishNames: lumhar muscle strain; lumbar muscle strain
V002-N00216.path: 中医疾病｜中毒及意外伤害类术语｜创伤类病｜筋骨病

V002-N00217.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00217.label: 骶髂关节损伤
V002-N00217.definition: 外力所致骶骼关节及其韧带损伤，以骶髂部疼痛和功能障碍为主要临床表现的疾病。

V002-N00217.label: 骶髂关节损伤

V002-N00217.label: 骶髂关节损伤

V002-N00205.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00205.label: 颈椎病
V002-N00205.definition: 颈椎间盘及其继发性椎间关节退行性变所致脊髓、神经、血管损害而出现相应症状和体征的疾病。

V002-N00205.label: 颈椎病
V002-N00205.definition: 因颈椎间盘变性、颈椎骨质增生所引起的， 以颈肩痛，放射到头枕部或上肢，甚重者出 现双下肢痉挛，行走困难，以致于四肢瘫痪 为主要表现的综合征。少数有眩晕。

V002-N00205.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00205.label: 颈椎病
V002-N00205.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医骨伤科疾病｜骨质增生
V002-N00205.definition: 因颈椎间盘变性、颈椎骨质增生所引起的，以颈肩痛、放射到头枕部或上肢、甚重者出现双下肢痉挛、行走困难、以致于四肢瘫痪为主要表现的综合征。少数有眩晕。

V002-N00205.label: 项痹
V002-N00205.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜经络肢体病证｜痹病｜顽痹
V002-N00205.definition: 因长期低头工作，年老正虚，经气不利等所致。以项部经常疼痛麻木，连及头、肩、上肢，并可伴有眩晕等为主要表现的肢体痹病类疾病。

V002-N00205.label: 颈椎病
V002-N00205.englishNames: Cervical Spondylosis; cervical spondylopathy; cervical spondylosis
V002-N00205.path: 中医疾病｜中毒及意外伤害类术语｜创伤类病｜筋骨病

V002-N00205.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00205.label: 项痹
V002-N00205.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00205.definition: Characterized by neck rigidity, stiffness and impaired movement, and soreness and pain in the neck, shoulder and arm. Associated symptoms may include dizziness, headache, arm numbness, muscular atrophy, leg weakness, unstable walking, disturbed bladder/bowel functions and paralysis. Often occurs when tendon/bone injury or degenerative changes irritate or compress the spinal cord, nerves and vessels. Contributing factors include ageing, chronic strain/injury, and contraction of external pathogenic factors.

V002-N00206.definition: 睡眠后，颈部出现以酸痛、活动不利等为主要临床表现的疾病。

V002-N00206.definition: 以颈部疼痛，颈项僵硬，转测不便为主要表 现的颈部软组织急性扭伤或炎症。

V002-N00206.definition: 因睡眠姿势不当或睡中感受风寒所致，以睡后一侧颈项疼痛、酸胀、活动不利为主要表现的肢体痹病类疾病。

V002-N00206.label: 落枕
V002-N00206.englishNames: Have a Stiff Neck; Sprained Neck; Stiff Neck
V002-N00206.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜经络肢体病证｜痹病

V002-N00206.definition: A condition characterized by pain or soreness that limits neck movement. Often results from inappropriate pillow height, poor sleep posture or external contraction of wind cold.

V002-N00215.definition: 间接暴力引起腰部的急性软组织损伤，以僵硬、疼痛、活动受限为主要临床表现的疾病。

V002-N00215.definition: 以腰部不适或腰部持续性剧痛，不能行走和 翻身，咳嗽、呼吸等腹部用力活动疼痛加重 等为主要表现的腰部肌肉、韧带、筋膜、小关 节突等组织急性扭伤。

V002-N00219.definition: 外力致踝部扭转的急性软组织损伤，以踝部疼痛、肿胀及活动障碍为主要临床表现的疾病。

V002-N00219.label: 踝关节扭伤
V002-N00219.definition: 以踝部肿胀、压痛，足着地或被动外翻时疼 痛加剧为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00201.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语

V002-N00201.definition: 因间接暴力或慢性积累性外力作用下引起筋的形态结构、功能状态和位置关系发生异常,以患处局部疼痛、活动不利，可触及结节、条索样改变为特征的疾病。

V002-N00201.label: 筋出槽
V002-N00201.path: 中医疾病｜中毒及意外伤害类术语｜创伤类病｜筋骨病

V002-N00201.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00201.definition: A condition characterized by local pain, impaired movement, hypertonia, nodules, ropiness, and tenderness. Often occurs when indirect or chronic external force impact damages the structure, function and position of the tendons.

V002-N00201.definition: injury of the subcutaneous tissue, including muscle, sinew, tendon sheath, ligament, joint capsule, synovial bursa, intervertebral disc, peripheral nerve, and blood vessel

V002-N00214.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语

V002-N00214.definition: 以骨量减少、骨的微观结构退化为特征的，致使骨的脆性增加以及易于发生骨折的一种全身性骨骼疾病。

V002-N00214.label: 骨质疏松
V002-N00214.definition: 以慢性腰背疼痛，甚则畸形、骨折为主要表 现的一种全身性骨量减少性疾病。

V002-N00214.label: 骨质疏松症

V002-N00212.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00212.label: 腰椎滑脱症
V002-N00212.definition: 腰椎相邻椎体间发生滑移，导致神经根或马尾神经受压，出现以腰痛或下肢麻木、疼痛为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00212.label: 腰椎滑脱症
V002-N00212.definition: 腰椎椎体（多为腰椎4.5）因失去椎弓根的 连系而向前滑脱，导致椎管内马尾神经或神 经根受压，腰椎承受力变异，出现以腰痛或 下肢麻痹、疼痛为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00212.label: 腰椎滑脱症
V002-N00212.path: 中医疾病｜中毒及意外伤害类术语｜创伤类病｜筋骨病｜腰椎病

V002-N00211.pinyinNames: yao zhui jian  pan tu chu zheng; yao zhui jian pan tu chu zheng

V002-N00213.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00213.label: 腰椎椎管狭窄症
V002-N00213.definition: 腰椎椎管、神经根管及椎间孔的骨性或纤维性结构变形或狭窄，而引起神经根或马尾神经受压，并产生相应的临床症状的疾病。

V002-N00213.label: 腰椎椎管狭窄症
V002-N00213.definition: 腰椎椎管、神经根通道及椎间孔隧道的变形 或狭窄而引起马尾神经或神经根受压井产 生以长期腰痛、腿痛、间歇性破行为主要表 现的疾病。

V002-N00203.label: 肩周炎
V002-N00203.definition: 以肩部逐渐产生疼痛，夜间为甚，逐渐加重， 肩关节活动功能受限而且日益加重，致一定 某种程度后逐渐缓解，直至最后完全复原为 主要表现的肩关节囊及其周围韧带、肌腱和 滑囊的慢性特异性炎症。

V002-N00203.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00203.label: 肩凝症
V002-N00203.aliases: 冻结肩； 漏肩风； 五十肩
V002-N00203.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医骨伤科疾病
V002-N00203.definition: 肩部受风着寒而致，患病后常见肩关节僵硬，活动受限，好象冻结了一样。

V002-N00203.label: 肩痹
V002-N00203.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜经络肢体病证｜痹病｜顽痹
V002-N00203.definition: 因体虚、劳损而风寒侵袭肩部，使经气不利。以肩部长期固定疼痛，活动受限为主要表现的肢体痹病类疾病。

V002-N00203.label: 漏肩风
V002-N00203.aliases: 冻结肩； 肩痹； 肩周炎； 冷凝肩

V002-N00203.label: 漏肩风

V002-N00203.pinyinNames: lou jian feng; lòu jiān fēng
V002-N00203.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00203.definition: A condition characterized by shoulder soreness, heaviness and pain that aggravate at night, and impaired movement of the affected side. Alternatively, atrophy of shoulder muscles may be present. Often results from chronic strain, contraction of external wind, cold or dampness, trauma or degenerative changes.

V002-N00235.definition: 疯犬咬伤后引起的，以烦躁，怕风，恐水，畏 光，痉挛抽搐，终致瘫痪而危及生命为主要 表现的疾病。

V002-N00235.label: 狂犬病

V002-N00235.definition: 疯犬咬伤致人中毒发狂的一种急性危重病证，称为狂犬病。

V002-N00235.label: 狂犬病
V002-N00235.path: 中医疾病｜中毒及意外伤害类术语｜创伤类病｜虫兽咬伤病

V002-N00235.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00235.label: 狂犬病
V002-N00235.pinyinNames: kuang quan bing; kuáng quǎn bìng
V002-N00235.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00235.definition: Characterized by restlessness, aversion to wind, hydrophobia, photophobia and spasms/convulsions. In severe cases, agitation, loss of consciousness, paralysis or death may occur. This condition can affect humans and other mammals. It is caused by bites from infected dogs. The toxin then enters the bloodstream and triggers the liver wind.

V002-N00234.label: 毒蛇咬伤
V002-N00234.englishNames: venomous snake bite; poisonous snake bite; Venomous snake bites
V002-N00234.pinyinNames: dong she yao shang; dú shé yǎo shāng; er she yao shang
V002-N00234.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00234.definition: An injury caused by the bite of a venomous snake. The toxins may enter the Ying nutrients and blood and affect the zang–fu organs, resulting in chills, fever, nausea, vomiting, headache and dizziness. In severe cases, individuals may experience bleeding, loss of consciousness and convulsions.

V002-N00135.definition: 因过量吸入一氧化碳,以头晕、头痛、恶心、呕吐、心慌、无力、烦躁或意识模糊,甚至神志不清，血压下降,出现深昏迷,呼吸短浅,四肢冰凉,脉搏细数，二便失禁,生理腱反射消失等为主要表现的中毒病。

V002-N00242.label: 电击伤
V002-N00242.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中毒及其他病类
V002-N00242.definition: 身体某部分接触电源，或为雷雨时闪电直接击中人体所致。以电流造成脑神、心脉损害等为主要表现的损伤类疾病。电击伤的程度不一，预后也不一致，轻者仅有局部麻木或震颤，不足为害；重者呼吸心搏骤停；遭受雷击者常立即死亡，体表亦被烧焦。

V002-N01229.label: 唇风
V002-N01229.path: 中医耳鼻喉科学｜口腔病
V002-N01229.definition: 以唇部红肿、疼痒，日久破裂流水为主要表现的口腔病。

V002-N01229.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01229.label: 唇风
V002-N01229.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医五官科疾病｜中医耳鼻咽喉科疾病｜中医口齿科疾病｜唇疾病
V002-N01229.definition: 因风热湿邪外侵，或脾胃湿热内蕴，上蒸口唇所致。以口唇红肿、痛痒、日久破裂流水，或脱屑脱皮，或有嘴唇不时润动为主要表现的口腔疾病。

V002-N01229.label: 唇风
V002-N01229.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医口齿科疾病
V002-N01229.definition: 因风热湿邪外袭或阴虚血燥所致的以口唇红肿、痛痒、破裂流水、脱屑或嘴唇不时瞤动为主要特征的疾病。

V002-N01229.aliases: 唇疮； 唇风； 唇肿； 茧唇； 口唇潮红； 驴嘴风

V002-N01229.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01229.definition: Characterized by lip skin peeling, dryness and rhagadia. It is often caused by damp heat in the spleen and stomach, coupled with exposure to wind.

V002-N01229.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01229.label: 唇风
V002-N01229.aliases: Lip Exfoliative Inflammation； 驴嘴风； 唇燥裂； Exfoliative cheilitis

V002-N01229.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01229.definition: Characterized by red, swollen, itchy and painful lips with cracks and exudation. Individuals may also experience peeling lips and twitching of lips. Often results from contraction of exogenous wind heat and dampness or ascending of accumulated damp heat in the spleen and stomach.

V002-N01221.definition: 齿龈出血称为齿衄。又称为牙衄、牙宣。

V002-N01221.label: 牙宣
V002-N01221.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医口齿科疾病
V002-N01221.definition: 因胃火上炎，燔灼龈肉，或脏腑虚损，龈肉失养所致。以龈肉萎缩，牙根宣露，牙齿松动，齿龈间渗出脓血为主要表现的牙齿疾病

V002-N01221.label: 牙宣
V002-N01221.aliases: 食床； 齿挺； 齿龈宣露
V002-N01221.englishNames: periodontal disease; gingival atrophy; Gingival Atrophy; gum atrophy
V002-N01221.path: 中医疾病｜口齿病类术语

V002-N01221.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01221.label: 牙宣
V002-N01221.aliases: 食床； 齿挺； 齿龈宣露
V002-N01221.englishNames: periodontal disease; gingival atrophy; Gingival Atrophy; gum atrophy; Gingival recession
V002-N01221.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01221.definition: Characterized by the exposure in the roots of the teeth caused by a loss of gum tissue and/or retraction of the gingival margin from the crown of the teeth. Individuals may also experience loose teeth and gum bleeding. Often occurs when stomach fire ascends to scorch the gum or malnourishment of the gum due to deficiency of the zang–fu organs.

V002-N01221.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01221.label: 牙宣
V002-N01221.aliases: BRK040； 食床； 齿挺； 齿龈宣露
V002-N01221.path: 眼、耳鼻喉科病｜耳鼻喉科病

V002-N01221.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01221.label: 牙宣
V002-N01221.aliases: 食床； 齿挺； 齿龈宣露
V002-N01221.path: 临床各科｜耳鼻喉口齿科
V002-N01221.definition: exposure of the root surfaces of teeth due to the drawing back of gingivae from the necks of teeth

V002-N01230.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V002-N01230.label: 唇裂
V002-N01230.path: 中医耳鼻喉科学｜耳鼻喉科诊断
V002-N01230.definition: 口唇干燥、皲裂、出血的表现。

V002-N01230.label: 口唇焦裂
V002-N01230.aliases: 唇焦； 唇焦干； 唇裂； 唇燥； 唇燥裂； 唇肿裂； 口唇皲裂
V002-N01230.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜五官症状｜口唇症状
V002-N01230.definition: 口唇黏膜严重干燥，脱屑、开裂的表现。

V002-N01230.label: 唇裂
V002-N01230.path: 中医疾病｜口齿病类术语

V002-N01230.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01230.label: 口唇焦裂
V002-N01230.englishNames: Chapped lips; dry and withered lips
V002-N01230.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V002-N01230.definition: The lips appear dry, peeling or chapped. In severe cases, the lips may turn red, swollen or bleeding. Often results from heat accumulating in the spleen and stomach, insufficiency of yin fluids or dry heat consuming bodily fluids.

V002-N01234.label: 舌痈
V002-N01234.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜舌诊症状｜舌形症状

V002-N01234.label: 舌痈
V002-N01234.path: 中医疾病｜口齿病类术语

V002-N01234.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01234.label: 舌痈
V002-N01234.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01234.definition: Characterized by localized redness, swelling and pain with a burning sensation. Alternatively, discharge of pus, fever, thirst and constipation may be present. It is often caused by ascending of heart fire or stomach fire, or deficiency fire scorching the tongue.

V002-N01234.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01234.label: 舌痈
V002-N01234.path: 临床各科｜耳鼻喉口齿科

V002-N01231.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01231.label: 茧唇
V002-N01231.path: 第2部分：外科学｜瘿瘤岩疾病｜岩
V002-N01231.definition: 生于口唇部位，形似蚕茧的岩。

V002-N01231.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01231.label: 唇菌
V002-N01231.path: 第9部分：耳鼻喉科学｜口腔病
V002-N01231.definition: 生于口唇部位，以初起下唇为无痛性局限性硬结，或似乳头、蕈状突出，溃烂后翻花如杨梅为主要表现的恶性肿瘤。

V002-N01231.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V002-N01231.label: 茧唇
V002-N01231.path: 中医耳鼻喉科学｜口腔病
V002-N01231.definition: 生于口唇部位，形似蚕茧的岩。相当于唇癌。

V002-N01231.label: 茧唇
V002-N01231.path: 外科疾病｜外科其他疾病
V002-N01231.definition: 生于口唇部位，以初起下唇为无痛性局限性 硬结，或似乳头、蕈状突出，溃烂后翻花如杨 梅为主要表现的恶性肿瘤。

V002-N01231.label: 茧唇
V002-N01231.englishNames: Carcinoma  Of  The  Lip; Cocoon  Lip
V002-N01231.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜岩
V002-N01231.definition: 发生在口唇部位的恶性肿瘤，因其厚硬，白皮皱裂如蚕茧，故称茧唇。其特点是初起下唇为无痛性局限性硬结，或似乳头、  状突出，溃烂后翻花如杨梅。

V002-N01231.label: 口唇红肿
V002-N01231.aliases: 唇疮； 唇风； 唇肿； 茧唇； 口唇潮红； 驴嘴风
V002-N01231.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜五官症状｜口唇症状
V002-N01231.definition: 嘴唇颜色红赤过于正常人且伴有肿胀的表现。

V002-N01231.label: 茧唇
V002-N01231.aliases: 唇菌； 唇岩； 唇癌
V002-N01231.englishNames: lip cancer; cocoon lip; carcinoma of lips
V002-N01231.path: 中医疾病｜口齿病类术语

V002-N01231.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01231.label: 茧唇
V002-N01231.aliases: 唇癌； 唇菌； 唇岩
V002-N01231.englishNames: lip cancer; Lip ulcer; cocoon lip; carcinoma of lips
V002-N01231.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01231.definition: Characterized by presence of outgrowths, oozing, scabbing and thickening in the lips. Over time, everted lower lip, skin peeling and distending pain may occur. Often occurs when damp heat of the spleen and stomach ascends to the lips.

V002-N01231.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01231.label: 茧唇
V002-N01231.englishNames: cocoon lip; Carcinoma  Of  The  Lip; Cocoon  Lip; lip cancer

V002-N01231.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01231.label: 茧唇
V002-N01231.englishNames: cocoon lip; Carcinoma  Of  The  Lip; Cocoon  Lip; lip cancer
V002-N01231.definition: malignant tumor occurring in the labial region

V002-N01220.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01220.label: 牙咬痈
V002-N01220.path: 第9部分：耳鼻喉科学｜口腔病
V002-N01220.definition: 痈肿发生于磨牙后区上下牙龈咬合处，以智齿周围软组织红肿、疼痛、积脓，甚则腮颊俱肿，张口受限，甚则口噤不开为主要表现的牙病。

V002-N01220.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V002-N01220.label: 牙咬痈
V002-N01220.path: 中医耳鼻喉科学｜口腔病
V002-N01220.definition: 痈肿发生于磨牙后区上下牙龈咬合处，以真牙(智齿)周围软组织红肿、疼痛、积脓，甚则腮颊俱肿，张口受限，甚则口噤不开为主要表现的牙病。

V002-N01220.label: 牙咬痈
V002-N01220.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医口齿科疾病
V002-N01220.definition: 因热毒蕴结于真牙处，血败肉腐而成。以发热口臭，一侧真牙尽牙处齿龈红肿热痛，张口困难，溃后溢脓为主要表现的痈病类疾病

V002-N01220.label: 牙咬痈
V002-N01220.englishNames: wisdom tooth pericoronitis; acute wisdom tooth pericoronitis; pericoronitis of wisdom tooth
V002-N01220.path: 中医疾病｜口齿病类术语

V002-N01220.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01220.label: 牙咬痈
V002-N01220.englishNames: acute wisdom tooth pericoronitis; pericoronitis of wisdom tooth; wisdom tooth pericoronitis; Pericoronitis of wisdom tooth
V002-N01220.pinyinNames: ya yao yong; yá yǎo yōng
V002-N01220.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01220.definition: Characterized by fever, foul breath, swollen gum tissue, pain, and pus formation. In severe cases, swollen cheeks, difficulty opening mouth and discharge of pus after rupture. It is often caused by retention of toxic heat in the wisdom teeth.

V002-N01220.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01220.label: 牙咬痈
V002-N01220.path: 眼、耳鼻喉科病｜耳鼻喉科病

V002-N01225.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V002-N01225.label: 走马疳
V002-N01225.path: 中医耳鼻喉科学｜口腔病
V002-N01225.definition: 以牙龈肿烂，口气臭秽，潮热，进食困难，甚则齿缝出血，牙齿松动，牙龈紫黑，腐败溃烂，溃疡较深，表面有灰黄色假膜，周边红肿明显，极易出血，甚则穿腮破唇，龈脱骨暴，进展急如走马，病势速而险为主要表现的口腔病。

V002-N01225.label: 走马牙疳
V002-N01225.definition: 以牙龈紫黑，腐败溃烂，甚则穿腮破唇，龈脱 骨暴，进展急如走马，病势速而险为主要表 现的疾病。

V002-N01225.label: 走马牙疳
V002-N01225.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医口齿科疾病
V002-N01225.definition: 因感受时行疫疠，或疹痘余毒未清、邪毒上攻所致。以龈肉或颊部肌膜腐溃泌脓，或流紫黑血水、气味臭秽，发病迅速，势如走马，甚至唇腐、腮穿、齿落为主要表现的疮疡类疾病。

V002-N01225.label: 走马牙疳
V002-N01225.path: 中医疾病｜口齿病类术语

V002-N01225.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01225.label: 走马牙疳
V002-N01225.englishNames: acute gangrenous stomatitis; Acute ulcerative gingivitis; noma
V002-N01225.pinyinNames: zou ma ya gan; zǒu mǎ yá gān
V002-N01225.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01225.definition: Characterized by sudden onset of gum or buccal mucosa necrosis, bleeding (dark, purple blood), and a foul breath. In severe cases, individuals may experience paresthesia of the lips, infection of the mandible, or loose teeth. Often results from contraction of seasonal pathogens or retained toxins of smallpox.

V002-N01225.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01225.label: 走马牙疳
V002-N01225.path: 眼、耳鼻喉科病｜耳鼻喉科病

V002-N01228.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01228.label: 唇湿
V002-N01228.definition: 以唇红部红斑脱屑、干燥皸裂，微感灼痛，脱屑后见鲜红肉面为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N01228.label: 唇湿
V002-N01228.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N01228.definition: 因脾胃湿热，复感风邪所致。以唇红部红斑脱屑、干燥皲裂，微感灼痛，脱屑后见鲜红肉面为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N01228.label: 唇湿
V002-N01228.path: 中医疾病｜口齿病类术语

V002-N01228.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01228.label: 唇湿
V002-N01228.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01228.definition: Characterized by lip skin peeling, dryness and rhagadia. It is often caused by damp heat in the spleen and stomach, coupled with exposure to wind.

V002-N01232.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01232.label: 涎石
V002-N01232.path: 第9部分：耳鼻喉科学｜口腔病
V002-N01232.definition: 结石阻塞，以进食时，舌下、颌下或腮部出现肿胀疼痛，进食后症状逐渐减轻或消失为主要表现的口腔病。

V002-N01232.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V002-N01232.label: 涎石
V002-N01232.path: 中医耳鼻喉科学｜口腔病
V002-N01232.definition: 结石阻塞，以进食时，舌下、颌下或腮部出现肿胀疼痛，进食后症状逐渐减轻或消失为主要表现的口腔病。

V002-N01232.label: 涎石
V002-N01232.definition: 以X线检查见舌下、颌下或腮部有结石阴 影，自觉胀痛为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01232.label: 涎石
V002-N01232.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医口齿科疾病
V002-N01232.definition: 因邪气阻滞，涎液排出不畅，久之裹结成石。以X线检查见舌下、颌下或腮部有结石影，自觉胀痛为主要表现的结石类疾病。

V002-N01232.label: 涎石
V002-N01232.path: 中医疾病｜口齿病类术语

V002-N01237.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01237.label: 连舌
V002-N01237.path: 第9部分：耳鼻喉科学｜口腔病
V002-N01237.definition: 以舌系带过短致舌体转动伸缩不灵，妨碍饮食,吐字不清为主要表现的口腔病。

V002-N01237.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V002-N01237.label: 连舌
V002-N01237.path: 中医耳鼻喉科学｜口腔病
V002-N01237.definition: 以舌系带过短致舌体转动伸缩不灵，妨碍饮食，吐字不清为主要表现的口腔病。

V002-N01237.label: 绊舌
V002-N01237.definition: 因舌系带过短，舌头不能自由伸出口外，舌尖不能上抬，致使舌头转动伸缩不灵，甚至妨碍吮乳，或说话吐词不清的表现。

V002-N01237.label: 绊舌
V002-N01237.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜舌诊症状｜舌态症状
V002-N01237.definition: 因舌系带过短，舌头不能自由伸出口外，舌尖不能上抬，致使舌头转动伸缩不灵，甚至妨碍吮乳，或说话吐词不清的表现。

V002-N01237.label: 结舌
V002-N01237.path: 中医疾病｜口齿病类术语

V002-N01237.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01237.label: 结舌
V002-N01237.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01237.definition: Characterized by tongue stiffness that affects eating or speaking. Often occurs when an unusually short, thick lingual frenulum decreases the mobility of the tongue tip.

V002-N01237.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01237.label: 连舌

V002-N01237.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01237.label: 绊舌

V002-N01237.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01237.label: 绊舌
V002-N01237.path: 临床各科｜耳鼻喉口齿科
V002-N01237.definition: restricted movement of the tongue, often resulting from short lingual frenulum

V002-N01236.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01236.label: 木舌
V002-N01236.path: 第9部分：耳鼻喉科学｜口腔病
V002-N01236.definition: 以舌体肿胀，木硬满口，不能转动，疼痛剧烈为主要表现的口腔病。

V002-N01236.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V002-N01236.label: 木舌
V002-N01236.path: 中医耳鼻喉科学｜口腔病
V002-N01236.definition: 以舌体肿胀，木硬满口，不能转动，疼痛剧烈为主要表现的口齿病。

V002-N01236.label: 木舌
V002-N01236.definition: 多见于小儿，以舌体肿胀，木硬满口，不能转 动，无疼痛为主要表现的舌体疾病。

V002-N01236.label: 木舌
V002-N01236.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医口齿科疾病
V002-N01236.definition: 多见于小儿，以舌体肿胀，木硬满口，不能转动，无疼痛为主要表现的舌体疾病。

V002-N01236.label: 肿胀舌
V002-N01236.aliases: 木舌； 舌胀大； 舌肿； 舌肿强； 舌肿胀； 胀大舌
V002-N01236.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜舌诊症状｜舌形症状
V002-N01236.definition: 舌体肿大满嘴，甚至不能闭口，伸出则难以缩回。

V002-N01236.label: 木舌
V002-N01236.path: 中医疾病｜口齿病类术语

V002-N01236.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01236.label: 木舌

V002-N01236.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01236.label: 木舌
V002-N01236.definition: swollen, hardened tongue, stiff as a piece of wood, seen in glossitis of the newborn

V002-N00107.label: 寄生虫病类术语
V002-N00107.pinyinNames: ji sheng chong bing lei shu yu

V002-N00118.label: 包虫病
V002-N00118.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜寄生虫病
V002-N00118.definition: 因包虫卵在人体内发育为幼虫，主要寄着于肝肺等处，与痰瘀水湿相搏结而形成的包块。以局部囊肿，检查有包虫征候为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00118.label: 包虫病
V002-N00118.path: 中医疾病｜寄生虫病类术语

V002-N00118.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00118.label: 包虫病
V002-N00118.pinyinNames: bāo chóng bìng; bao chong bing
V002-N00118.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00118.definition: A zoonotic parasitosis contracted by infection with the eggs of the parasites (hydatid cyst). It is characterized by painless, movable nodules or cysts with normal skin colour. Associated symptoms may include fever, cough, haemoptysis, abdominal pain and bloody stools. The nodules occur when hydatid cysts remain in the liver, lung and intestines and bind with phlegm, stasis and water dampness.

V002-N00110.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00110.label: 囊虫病
V002-N00110.definition: 感染囊虫所致的寄生虫病。

V002-N00110.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00110.label: 小儿囊虫病
V002-N00110.path: 第7部分：儿科学｜小儿虫病
V002-N00110.definition: 小儿感染囊虫引起的以皮下触及痰核包囊，痫病时作，视力障碍等为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00110.label: 囊虫病
V002-N00110.path: 内科疾病｜内科其他疾病
V002-N00110.definition: 感染囊虫引起的寄生虫病。

V002-N00110.label: 囊虫病
V002-N00110.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜寄生虫病
V002-N00110.definition: 因绦虫卵在人体内发育为幼虫，与痰浊相搏，寄生于肌肤，脑，眼等处。以痰核包囊，脑系症状（如痫病），视力障碍，检查发现囊虫等为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00110.label: 囊虫病
V002-N00110.path: 中医疾病｜寄生虫病类术语

V002-N00110.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00110.label: 囊虫病
V002-N00110.pinyinNames: nang chong bing; náng chóng bìng
V002-N00110.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00110.definition: A parasitic condition caused by eating food or drinking water contaminated by tapeworm eggs from human faeces. It is mainly found in children and characterized by palpable subcutaneous solid lumps, seizures, visual impairment and presence of tapeworms. The tapeworm eggs enter the intestine and develop into larvae, which binds with phlegm turbidity and affect the skin, brain and eyes.

V002-N00111.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00111.label: 钩虫病
V002-N00111.definition: 感染钩虫所致的寄生虫病。

V002-N00111.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00111.label: 小儿钩虫病
V002-N00111.path: 第7部分：儿科学｜小儿虫病
V002-N00111.definition: 小儿感染钩虫引起的以善食易饥，疲乏，皮肤萎黄、浮肿，粪便检查有钩虫卵，伴见贫血、嗜食异物等为主要表现,影响小儿生长发育的寄生虫病。

V002-N00111.label: 钩虫病
V002-N00111.path: 内科疾病｜内科其他疾病
V002-N00111.definition: 感染钩虫引起的寄生虫病。

V002-N00111.label: 黄胖病
V002-N00111.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜传染病
V002-N00111.definition: 钩虫由皮肤侵入，寄生于小肠，湿热虫毒内蕴，脾虚失运，气血亏虚。以善食易饥，疲乏，皮肤萎黄，浮肿，大便检查有钩虫卵为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00111.label: 钩虫病
V002-N00111.aliases: 小儿钩虫病； 黄胖病； 黄肿病
V002-N00111.path: 中医疾病｜寄生虫病类术语

V002-N00111.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00111.label: 钩虫病
V002-N00111.aliases: 小儿钩虫病； 黄胖病； 黄肿病； Paediatric ancylostomiasis
V002-N00111.pinyinNames: gou chong bing; gōu chóng bìng
V002-N00111.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00111.definition: A parasitic condition caused by infection with Ancylostoma sp. hookworms. It is characterized by fast hunger after eating food, fatigue, sallow skin, oedema and presence of hookworm larvae in the stools. Alternatively, anaemia or abnormal food preference may be present. In children, this condition may cause poor growth and development. The hookworms enter the body through contact with contaminated faeces or soil, remain in the small intestine and bind with damp heat to consume qi and blood.

V002-N00113.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00113.label: 姜片虫病
V002-N00113.definition: 感染姜片虫所致的寄生虫病。

V002-N00113.label: 姜片虫病
V002-N00113.path: 内科疾病｜内科其他疾病
V002-N00113.definition: 感染姜片虫引起的寄生虫病。

V002-N00113.label: 赤虫病
V002-N00113.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜寄生虫病
V002-N00113.definition: 因吞食粘有赤虫（姜片虫）幼虫的水生植物后，赤虫寄生于人体小肠，以至气机阻滞，脾失健运。以大便检查有姜片虫卵，一般表现有腹痛腹泻，面黄体瘦，甚至影响小儿生长发育为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00113.label: 姜片虫病
V002-N00113.aliases: 小儿姜片虫病； 赤虫病； 扁虫病
V002-N00113.path: 中医疾病｜寄生虫病类术语

V002-N00113.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00113.label: 姜片虫病
V002-N00113.aliases: 小儿姜片虫病； 赤虫病； 扁虫病； paediatric fasciolopsiasis
V002-N00113.pinyinNames: jiang pian chong bing; jiāng piàn chóng bìng
V002-N00113.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00113.definition: A parasitic condition caused by infection with the intestinal fluke Fasciolopsis buski. It is characterized by presence of flukes or their eggs in the faeces, abdominal pain, diarrhoea, a sallow complexion and weight loss. In children, this condition may cause poor growth and development. It occurs when people eat aquatic plants that have Fasciolopsis sp. encysted on them, which remain in the small intestine to obstruct the flow of qi and affect the transportation and transformation of the spleen.

V002-N00112.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00112.label: 蛲虫病
V002-N00112.definition: 感染烧虫所致的寄生虫病。

V002-N00112.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00112.label: 小儿蛲虫病
V002-N00112.path: 第7部分：儿科学｜小儿虫病
V002-N00112.definition: 小儿感染烧虫引起的以夜间肛门或阴部奇痒难忍，或因抓搔引起肛周糜烂、湿疹或出血为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00112.label: 蛲虫病
V002-N00112.path: 内科疾病｜内科其他疾病
V002-N00112.definition: 感染蛲虫引起的寄生虫病。

V002-N00112.label: 蛲虫病
V002-N00112.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜寄生虫病
V002-N00112.definition: 吞食蛲虫卵后，致蛲虫寄生于肠道下端，袭扰大肠、肛门。以肛门奇痒，夜卧不安，在肛周或大便中找到蛲虫或蛲虫卵为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00112.label: 蛲虫病
V002-N00112.path: 中医疾病｜寄生虫病类术语

V002-N00112.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00112.label: 蛲虫病
V002-N00112.aliases: 小儿蛲虫病； Paediatric pinworm infection
V002-N00112.pinyinNames: nao chong bing; náo chóng bìng
V002-N00112.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00112.definition: A parasitic condition caused by ingesting the eggs of pinworms. It is mainly found in children and characterized by severe itching in the anal or vaginal area. Secondary anal erosion, eczema or bleeding may develop in the areas that are constantly scratched. This condition is usually first identified when live, thin, white pinworms are noticed in the faeces.

V002-N00119.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00119.label: 血吸虫病
V002-N00119.definition: 感染血吸虫所致的寄生虫病。

V002-N00119.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00119.label: 小儿血吸虫病
V002-N00119.path: 第7部分：儿科学｜小儿虫病
V002-N00119.definition: 小儿感染血吸虫引起的以皮肤瘙痒，咳嗽，腹痛、腹泻,胁下痞块，消瘦，腹水等为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00119.label: 小儿血吸虫病
V002-N00119.definition: 发生于小儿的血吸虫病。

V002-N00119.label: 血吸虫病
V002-N00119.path: 内科疾病｜内科其他疾病
V002-N00119.definition: 感染血吸虫引起的寄生虫病。

V002-N00119.label: 蛊虫病
V002-N00119.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜寄生虫病
V002-N00119.definition: 蛊毒由皮毛侵入肺部，下涉肠道，淤积肝络，阻碍气血水液运行。以皮肤瘙痒，咳嗽，腹痛腹泻，胁下痞块，消瘦，腹水，大便检查见蛊虫[血吸虫]卵等为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00119.label: 血吸虫病
V002-N00119.aliases: 小儿血吸虫病； 蛊虫病
V002-N00119.path: 中医疾病｜寄生虫病类术语

V002-N00119.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00119.label: 血吸虫病
V002-N00119.aliases: 小儿血吸虫病； 蛊虫病； Snail fever； Paediatric schistosomiasis
V002-N00119.pinyinNames: xue xi chong bing; xuè xī chóng bìng
V002-N00119.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00119.definition: A parasitic condition caused by schistosomes. It is characterized by skin itching, cough, abdominal pain, diarrhoea, masses in the subcostal region, weight loss, ascites, and presence of schistosome eggs in stools. This condition is contracted by contact with fresh water organisms contaminated with the parasites. Once the parasites enter the body, they may affect the flow of qi, blood and body fluids in the lung, intestines or liver.

V002-N00122.label: 晚期血吸虫病
V002-N00122.englishNames: advanced stage of schistosomiasis; advanced schistosomiasis
V002-N00122.pinyinNames: wan qi xue xi chong bing
V002-N00122.path: 中医疾病｜寄生虫病类术语｜血吸虫病

V002-N00122.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00122.label: 晚期血吸虫病
V002-N00122.aliases: 晚期蛊虫病； Advanced snail fever
V002-N00122.englishNames: Advanced schistosomiasis; advanced schistosomiasis; advanced stage of schistosomiasis
V002-N00122.pinyinNames: wan qi xue xi chong bing; wǎn qī xuè xī chóng bìng
V002-N00122.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00122.definition: Late-stage schistosomiasis characterized by extreme weight loss, positive finding of the rectal mucosa biopsy, ascites, varicose abdominal veins, liver cirrhosis and splenomegaly. Often occurs when prolonged schistosomiasis causes qi and blood to stagnate in the liver and intestines.

V002-N00121.label: 慢性血吸虫病
V002-N00121.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜寄生虫病｜蛊虫病

V002-N00121.label: 慢性血吸虫病
V002-N00121.pinyinNames: man xing xue xi chong bing
V002-N00121.path: 中医疾病｜寄生虫病类术语｜血吸虫病

V002-N00120.label: 急性血吸虫病
V002-N00120.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜寄生虫病｜蛊虫病

V002-N00120.label: 急性血吸虫病
V002-N00120.pinyinNames: ji xing xue xi chong bing
V002-N00120.path: 中医疾病｜寄生虫病类术语｜血吸虫病

V002-N00115.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00115.label: 肺吸虫病
V002-N00115.definition: 感染肺吸虫所致的寄生虫病。

V002-N00115.label: 肺吸虫病
V002-N00115.path: 内科疾病｜内科其他疾病
V002-N00115.definition: 感染肺吸虫引起的寄生虫病。

V002-N00115.label: 肺虫病
V002-N00115.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜寄生虫病
V002-N00115.definition: 因进食含有肺（吸）虫幼虫的生石蟹、  蜞等之后，虫毒蕴结肺络等处。以咳嗽、胸痛、咯铁锈色痰，大便或痰中检查有肺吸虫卵等为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00115.label: 肺吸虫病
V002-N00115.path: 中医疾病｜寄生虫病类术语

V002-N00115.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00115.label: 肺吸虫病
V002-N00115.pinyinNames: fei xi chong bing; fèi xī chóng bìng
V002-N00115.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00115.definition: A parasitic condition caused by an infection with the lung fluke. It is characterized by cough, chest pain, and expectoration of discoloured sputum containing clumps of eggs. Epilepsy, paralysis or subcutaneous nodules may also be present. This condition often results from ingestion of river crabs, crayfish or amphibious crabs contaminated with larvae of Paragonimiasis sp. As a result, the adult worms remain in the lung or affect the brain or subcutaneous tissues.

V002-N00114.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00114.label: 丝虫病
V002-N00114.definition: 感染丝虫所致的寄生虫病。SZIC

V002-N00114.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00114.label: 小儿丝虫病
V002-N00114.path: 第7部分：儿科学｜小儿虫病
V002-N00114.definition: 小儿感染丝虫引起的以发热，下肢皮肤红肿灼痛，睾丸肿痛，小便混浊，下肢及阴囊肿大为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00114.label: 丝虫病
V002-N00114.path: 内科疾病｜内科其他疾病
V002-N00114.definition: 感染丝虫引起的寄生虫病。

V002-N00114.label: 丝虫病
V002-N00114.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜寄生虫病
V002-N00114.definition: 因携带丝虫幼虫的蚊叮咬后，虫毒侵入，结于肢体经络，湿热瘀滞，内伤脾肾，脂液失摄。以发热，下肢皮肤红肿灼痛，睾丸肿痛，小便混浊，下肢及阴囊肿大，检查发现虫体或微丝蚴为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00114.label: 丝虫病
V002-N00114.path: 中医疾病｜寄生虫病类术语

V002-N00114.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00114.label: 丝虫病
V002-N00114.pinyinNames: si chong bing; sī chóng bìng
V002-N00114.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00114.definition: A parasitic condition mainly found in children caused by an infection with roundworms of the Filarioidea family. It is characterized by fever, skin redness, oedema and burning pain in the lower extremities, testicular pain and swelling, turbid urine, scrotal swelling and identification of microfilariae. This condition is often spread by blood-feeding black flies and mosquitoes. As a result, the microfilariae enter the body and causes damp heat to affect the spleen and kidney.

V002-N00117.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00117.label: 肝吸虫病
V002-N00117.definition: 肝吸虫寄生于肝内胆道，以胁痛,腹痛，腹泻，食少,黄疸，胁下痞块，检查获肝吸虫卵等为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00117.label: 肝虫病
V002-N00117.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜寄生虫病
V002-N00117.definition: 进食未熟而含有肝虫(华支睾吸虫)幼虫的鱼虾之后，肝虫寄生于肝内胆道，湿热虫毒蕴结，肝胆疏泄失常。以胁痛，腹痛，食少，黄疸，胁下痞块，检查获肝虫[华支睾吸虫]卵为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00117.label: 肝吸虫病
V002-N00117.path: 中医疾病｜寄生虫病类术语

V002-N00117.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00117.label: 肝吸虫病
V002-N00117.pinyinNames: gān xī chóng bìng; gan xi chong bing
V002-N00117.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00117.definition: A parasitic condition caused by Fasciola hepatica. It is characterized by pain in the subcostal region, abdominal pain, diarrhoea, a poor appetite, jaundice, masses in the subcostal region and the presence of the eggs of the liver fluke. This condition is often contracted by ingestion of undercooked fish or shrimps. The liver flukes lodge in the bile duct and bind with damp heat to affect the normal functioning of the liver and gallbladder.

V002-N00109.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00109.label: 绦虫病
V002-N00109.definition: 感染绦虫所致的寄生虫病。

V002-N00109.label: 寸白虫病
V002-N00109.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科时行疾病
V002-N00109.definition: 因食寸白虫幼虫而使之寄生于小肠，以致阻滞脾气，耗吸营养。以腹痛腹泻，善食而瘦，大便检查有绦虫卵等为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00109.label: 绦虫病
V002-N00109.aliases: 小儿绦虫病； 寸白虫病
V002-N00109.path: 中医疾病｜寄生虫病类术语

V002-N00109.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00109.label: 绦虫病
V002-N00109.aliases: 寸白虫病； 小儿绦虫病； Paediatric taeniasis
V002-N00109.pinyinNames: tao chong bing; tāo chóng bìng
V002-N00109.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00109.definition: A parasitic condition contracted after eating undercooked pork, beef or fish infected with tapeworms belonging to the genus Taenia. It is mainly found in children and characterized by abdominal pain, diarrhoea, weight loss, or presence of tapeworms or larvae in the faeces. The tapeworms remain in the small intestine, obstruct spleen qi and prevent the absorption of nutrients.

V002-N00108.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00108.label: 蛔虫病
V002-N00108.definition: 感染蛔虫所致的寄生虫病。

V002-N00108.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00108.label: 小儿蛔虫病
V002-N00108.path: 第7部分：儿科学｜小儿虫病
V002-N00108.definition: 小儿感染蛔虫引起的以食欲不振,脐周疼痛,甚则体瘦、腹大，巩膜、面颊、指甲有虫斑，大便排出蛔虫为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00108.label: 蛔虫病
V002-N00108.path: 内科疾病｜内科其他疾病
V002-N00108.definition: 感染蛔虫引起的寄生虫病。

V002-N00108.label: 蛔虫病
V002-N00108.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜寄生虫病
V002-N00108.definition: 吞食粘有蛔虫卵的不洁食物，化生湿热，损伤脾胃，蛔虫得以繁殖并寄居肠道，耗吸营养。以食欲不振，脐周疼痛，甚或体瘦腹大，大便排虫或检查有蛔虫卵为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00108.label: 蛔虫病
V002-N00108.path: 中医疾病｜寄生虫病类术语

V002-N00108.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00108.label: 小儿蛔虫病
V002-N00108.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜儿科类

V002-N00108.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00108.label: 蛔虫病
V002-N00108.pinyinNames: huí chóng bìng; hui chong bing
V002-N00108.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00108.definition: A parasitic condition mainly found in children and characterized by a poor appetite, periumbilical pain, underweight, swelling of the abdomen, and worms in stools. The roundworm may infest the bile ducts, pancreas or appendix and cause severe complications. The parasite is acquired through ingestion of embryonated eggs in contaminated food. After the eggs are swallowed, they live and remain in the intestines, where they hatch into larvae. Over time, they transform into damp heat to damage the spleen and stomach and absorb nutrients.

V002-N00116.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00116.label: 鞭虫病
V002-N00116.definition: 感染鞭虫所致的寄生虫病。

V002-N00116.label: 鞭虫病
V002-N00116.path: 内科疾病｜内科其他疾病
V002-N00116.definition: 感染鞭虫引起的寄生虫病。

V002-N00116.label: 鞭虫病
V002-N00116.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜寄生虫病
V002-N00116.definition: 吞食含有鞭虫卵的食物后，鞭虫寄生于肠道，耗吸水谷精微，使气血亏损。以神疲，乏力，食少，腹痛腹泻，大便检查有鞭虫卵为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00116.label: 鞭虫病
V002-N00116.path: 中医疾病｜寄生虫病类术语

V002-N00116.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00116.label: 鞭虫病
V002-N00116.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病

V002-N00553.label: 皮肤黏膜病类术语
V002-N00553.englishNames: category of skin and membrane diseases terminology
V002-N00553.pinyinNames: pi fu nian mo bing lei shu yu

V002-N00554.label: 皮肤类病
V002-N00554.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语

V002-N00554.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00554.label: 皮肤类病
V002-N00554.englishNames: skin diseases; Skin conditions; category of skin disease
V002-N00554.pinyinNames: pi fu lei bing; pí fū lèi bìng
V002-N00554.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00554.definition: A group of acute or chronic skin conditions caused by exposure to sunlight, rain, wind cold, wind heat, summer heat and dampness and water dampness, insect bites/stings, allergic reactions to pollen, dust or drugs, or fetal toxin retention.

V002-N00632.label: 药毒
V002-N00632.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00632.definition: 是指药物通过口服、注射或皮肤粘膜直接用药等途径，进入人体内所引起的皮肤或粘膜的急性炎症反应。亦称药疹。

V002-N00632.label: 药疹
V002-N00632.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00632.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00632.label: 药毒
V002-N00632.aliases: 药疹； Drug eruption； 膏药风
V002-N00632.englishNames: Drug-induced dermatitis; dermatitis medicamentosa; medicinal toxicity
V002-N00632.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00632.definition: Characterized by an adverse drug reaction of the skin and mucous membranes. With a latent period, drug eruption may cause extensive, symmetrical itchy maculae or blisters. Some may also have fever. It is often caused by oral administration, injection or topical application of medications.

V002-N00632.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00632.label: 药毒
V002-N00632.englishNames: Drug; Drug Poisoning; dermatitis medicamentosa; medicinal toxicity

V002-N00603.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00603.label: 黧黑斑
V002-N00603.definition: 以面部出现大小形状不一的黄褐色或灰褐色斑片，枯暗不泽为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00603.label: 黧黑斑
V002-N00603.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00603.definition: 因水不制火，或血弱不华所致。以妇女面部出现大小形状不一的黄褐色或灰黑色斑，不高出皮肤，色枯不泽为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00603.label: 黧黑斑
V002-N00603.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00603.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00603.label: 黧黑斑
V002-N00603.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V002-N00608.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00608.label: 溻皮疮
V002-N00608.definition: 以婴儿周身皮肤出现红斑及水疱,表皮大片脱落，露出鲜红色肉面为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00608.label: 溻皮疮
V002-N00608.englishNames: Exfoliative Dermatitis; Syphilitic Skin Damage in Fetus
V002-N00608.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00608.definition: 因胎毒蕴结所致。以婴儿周身皮肤出现红斑及起泡，表皮大片脱落，露出鲜红色肉面为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00608.label: 溻皮疮
V002-N00608.englishNames: dermatitis exfoliativa neonatorum; infantile exfoliative dermatitis
V002-N00608.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00607.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00607.label: 火斑疮
V002-N00607.definition: 以长期火毒久炙肌肤,受损处出现持久性暗红色斑点、自觉灼痒为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00607.label: 火斑疮
V002-N00607.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00607.definition: 因长期受温热作用，火毒久炙肌肤所致。以受损处皮肤出现持久性暗红色斑点，自觉灼痒为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00607.label: 火斑疮
V002-N00607.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00616.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00616.label: 瓜藤缠
V002-N00616.definition: 以绕足胫生红斑结节数个，肿痛，日久可溃烂流脓血，缠绵难愈为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00616.label: 瓜藤缠
V002-N00616.definition: 发于下肢的红癍结节性皮肤血管炎性皮肤 病。

V002-N00616.label: 瓜藤缠
V002-N00616.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00616.definition: 瓜缠藤是一种发生于下肢的结节红斑性、皮肤血管炎性皮肤病。因数枚结节，状如藤系瓜果缠绕腿胫而得名。本病相当于西医学的结节性红斑。临床特点是：散在性皮下结节，鲜红至紫红色，大小不等，疼痛或压痛，好发于小腿伸侧。多见于青年女性，以春秋季发病者为多。常见病因病机有：素体血分有热，外感湿邪，湿与热结，或脾虚失运，水湿内生，湿郁化热，湿热下注，气滞血瘀，瘀阻经络而发；或体虚之人气血不足，卫外不固，寒湿之邪乘虚外袭，客于肌肤腠理，流于经络，气血瘀滞而发。

V002-N00616.label: 瓜藤缠
V002-N00616.englishNames: vine tangling; erythema nodosum; melon-vine vasculitis nodularis
V002-N00616.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00616.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00616.label: 瓜藤缠
V002-N00616.englishNames: vine tangling; erythema nodosum; melon-vine vasculitis nodularis; Melon vine-like nodules
V002-N00616.pinyinNames: gua teng chan; guā téng chán
V002-N00616.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00616.definition: Characterized by tender, red (broad bean-sized) nodules or lumps on both shins that resemble fruits growing on vines. Often results from downward flow of damp heat or chronic stasis transforming into heat.

V002-N00616.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00616.label: 瓜藤缠
V002-N00616.englishNames: erythema nodosum; Erythema Nodosum; vine tangling

V002-N00616.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00616.label: 瓜藤缠
V002-N00616.englishNames: erythema nodosum; Erythema Nodosum; vine tangling
V002-N00616.definition: a skin disease which most often affects young women and is characterized by the development of crops of transient, inflammatory nodules that are usually tender, multiple, and bilateral, most commonly located on the shins

V002-N00589.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00589.label: 风瘙痒
V002-N00589.definition: 以遍身瘙痒，并无疮疥，搔之不止为主要表现的感觉异常性皮肤疾病。

V002-N00589.label: 风瘙痒
V002-N00589.definition: 无原发性皮肤损害，而以瘙痒为主要症状的 皮肤感觉异常的皮肤病。

V002-N00589.label: 皮肤瘙痒症
V002-N00589.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00589.definition: 自觉皮肤瘙痒的症状。多因风邪外袭，或因血热内扰，或血虚失养等所致。常见于各种皮肤疾病，以及食物过敏、药物过敏、经前隐疹、妊娠风疹、阴痒等病。

V002-N00589.label: 风瘙痒
V002-N00589.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00589.definition: 因湿蕴于肌肤，或血虚风燥所致。以阵发性皮肤剧痒，搔抓形成抓痕、血痂，皮肤干燥增厚为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00589.label: 皮肤瘙痒
V002-N00589.aliases: Itching of the Skin； 风瘙痒； 肌肤瘙痒； 皮肤剧烈瘙痒； 皮肤轻度瘙痒； 皮肤痒； 皮肤阵发性瘙痒； 全身皮肤瘙痒； 身痒； 痒风； 足趾间奇痒
V002-N00589.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜瘙痒
V002-N00589.definition: 全身皮肤瘙痒不适的表现。

V002-N00589.label: 风瘙痒
V002-N00589.englishNames: wind itching; pruritus cutanea; pruritus cutis; pruritus due to wind (cutaneous pruritus); pruritus due to wind pathogen
V002-N00589.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00589.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00589.label: 风瘙痒
V002-N00589.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V002-N00589.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00589.label: 风瘙痒
V002-N00589.englishNames: Pruritus Cutis; pruritus due to wind (cutaneous pruritus); pruritus due to wind pathogen

V002-N00555.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00555.label: 热疮
V002-N00555.definition: 以皮肤黏膜交界处发生成簇水疱、糜烂、结痂、痒痛相兼为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00555.label: 热疮
V002-N00555.definition: 以皮肤黏膜交界处发生成簇水泡、糜烂、溃 破、结痂，疼痛相兼为主要表现的急性疱疹 性皮肤病。

V002-N00555.label: 热疮
V002-N00555.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00555.definition: 热疮是发热后或高热过程中在皮肤粘膜交界处所发生的急性疱疹性皮肤病。相当于西医学的单纯疱疹。其特点是：皮损为成群的水疱，有的互相融合，多在1周后痊愈，易于复发。常见病因病机：外感风温热毒，阻于肺胃二经，蕴蒸皮肤而生；或由肝经湿热下注，阻于阴部而成疮；或因反复发作，热邪伤津，阴虚内热所致。

V002-N00555.label: 热疮
V002-N00555.englishNames: heat sore; herpes simplex; heat sore (herpes simplex)
V002-N00555.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00555.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00555.label: 热气疮
V002-N00555.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V002-N00555.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00555.label: 热疮
V002-N00555.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V002-N00555.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00555.label: 热气疮
V002-N00555.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V002-N00555.definition: Hot, painful millet-sized blisters around the mouth border, lips and nose. They often result from external contraction of wind or ascending of heat accumulated in the lung and stomach.

V002-N00555.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00555.label: 热疮
V002-N00555.englishNames: herpes simplex; Fever Blister; heat sore (herpes simplex); heat sore

V002-N00555.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00555.label: 热疮
V002-N00555.englishNames: herpes simplex; Fever Blister; heat sore (herpes simplex); heat sore
V002-N00555.definition: the development of fluid-filled vesicles on the margin of skin and mucous membrane as a concomitant of fever, usually referring to herpes simplex

V002-N00595.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00595.label: 油风
V002-N00595.definition: 以毛发突然成片脱落，头皮光亮而软为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00595.label: 毛发脱落
V002-N00595.aliases: Falling off the Hair； Lose One； 发脱； 脱发
V002-N00595.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜毛发症状
V002-N00595.definition: 人体的体毛，如头发，也包括眉毛、阴毛及腋毛异常脱落的表现。

V002-N00595.label: 油风
V002-N00595.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00595.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00595.label: 毛发脱落
V002-N00595.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N00595.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00595.label: 脱发
V002-N00595.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N00595.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00595.label: 油风

V002-N00595.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00595.label: 油风
V002-N00595.definition: a disease marked by sudden patchy loss of hair, which usually occurs in sharply defined areas, referring to alopecia areata

V002-N00592.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00592.label: 蛇皮癣
V002-N00592.definition: 以四肢、躯干皮肤干涩少汗，有蛇皮样鳞屑为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00592.label: 蛇皮癣
V002-N00592.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00592.definition: 因血虚风燥，皮肤失于濡养，或为遗传所致。以四肢、躯干皮肤干涩少汗，有蛇皮样鳞屑为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00592.label: 蛇皮癣
V002-N00592.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00592.label: 蛇皮癣
V002-N00592.path: 传统医学疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜皮肤黏膜系统病类

Individuals may experience chills and high fever. Often results from liver fire and extreme heat in the liver and spleen meridians.
