V002-N00629.definition: 因寒冷风燥酸碱侵袭，肌肤血行不畅，肤失濡养所致。以手足部皮肤粗糙、皲裂、疼痛，裂缝中渗血为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00629.label: 手足皲裂
V002-N00629.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00617.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00617.label: 红蝴蝶疮
V002-N00617.definition: 以面及手等暴露部位皮肤红斑、鳞屑、萎缩、状似蝴蝶，可累及全身多脏器的自身免疫性结缔组织疾病。

V002-N00617.label: 红蝴蝶疮
V002-N00617.definition: 以面及手等暴露部位皮肤红斑、鳞屑、萎缩， 状似蝴蝶，可累及全身多脏器的自身免疫性 结缔组织疾病。

V002-N00617.label: 红蝴蝶疮
V002-N00617.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00617.definition: 红蝴蝶疮是一种可累及皮肤和全身多脏器的自身免疫性疾病。相当于西医学的红斑狼疮。临床常见类型为盘状红蝴蝶疮和系统性红蝴蝶疮。其特点是：盘状红蝴蝶疮好发于面颊部，主要表现为皮肤损害，多为慢性局限性；系统性红蝴蝶疮除有皮肤损害外，常同时累及全身多系统、多脏器，病变呈进行性经过，预后较差。总由先天禀赋不足，肝肾亏虚而成。本病病情常虚实互见，变化多端。六淫侵袭，劳倦内伤，七情郁结、妊娠分娩、日光暴晒、内服药物都可成为发病的诱因。

V002-N00617.label: 红蝴蝶疮
V002-N00617.englishNames: red butterfly sore; lupus erythematosus; red-butterfly lupus erythematosus
V002-N00617.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00617.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00617.label: 红蝴蝶疮
V002-N00617.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V002-N00617.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00617.label: 红蝴蝶疮
V002-N00617.englishNames: red butterfly sore; lupus erythematosus; red-butterfly lupus erythematosus; Red butterfly-like sore
V002-N00617.pinyinNames: hong hu die chuang; hóng hú dié chuāng
V002-N00617.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00617.definition: Characterized by red rashes on the face or hands with scaling and atrophy that resemble a butterfly. Individuals may also experience joint pain. Often results from qi stagnation and blood stasis due to yin–yang disorder or wind heat accumulating in the skin.

V002-N00617.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00617.label: 红蝴蝶疮
V002-N00617.englishNames: Lupus Erythematosus Cutaneous; lupus erythematosus; red butterfly sore

V002-N00604.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00604.label: 粉花疮
V002-N00604.definition: 以面施脂粉后皮肤出现红斑、水疱、瘙痒等为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00604.label: 粉花疮
V002-N00604.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00604.definition: 因面施脂粉等所致。以皮肤红肿、水疱、瘙痒等为主要表现的接触过敏性皮肤疾病。

V002-N00604.label: 粉花疮
V002-N00604.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00602.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00602.label: 雀斑
V002-N00602.definition: 以面部出现淡褐斑点，色如雀卵为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00602.label: 雀斑
V002-N00602.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00602.definition: 因肾阴不能荣华于面，或风火郁滞孙络所致。以妇女面部出现褐色斑点，形如雀卵之色为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00602.label: 雀斑
V002-N00602.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00599.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00599.label: 肺风粉刺
V002-N00599.definition: 以颜面、胸、背等处生丘疹如刺，可挤出碎米样粉脂为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00599.label: 粉刺
V002-N00599.definition: 发生于颜面、胸、背等处的一种毛囊、皮脂腺 的慢性炎症性皮肤病。

V002-N00599.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00599.label: 痤疮，寻常
V002-N00599.definition: 发生于颜面、胸背等处毛囊与皮脂腺的慢性炎症性皮肤病。皮损丘疹如刺，可挤出白色碎米样粉汁。

V002-N00599.label: 粉刺
V002-N00599.aliases: 肺风粉刺； 酒刺； 面疮； 青春痘； 青春疙瘩
V002-N00599.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00599.definition: 粉刺是一种以颜面、胸、背等处见丘疹顶端如刺状，可挤出白色碎米样粉汁为主的毛囊、皮脂腺的慢性炎症。中医文献中又称“肺风粉刺”、“面疮”、“酒刺”，俗称“青春疙瘩”、“青春痘”。本病相当于西医学的痤疮。临床特点是：丘疹、脓疱等皮疹多发于颜面、前胸、后背等处，常伴有皮脂溢出。常见病因病机：素体阳热偏盛，肺经蕴热，复受风邪，熏蒸面部而发；或过食辛辣肥甘厚味，肠胃湿热互结，上蒸颜面而致；或脾气不足，运化失常，湿浊内停，郁久化热，热灼津液，煎炼成痰，湿热瘀痰凝滞肌肤而发。

V002-N00599.label: 粉刺
V002-N00599.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00599.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00599.label: 痤疮
V002-N00599.aliases: 黑头粉刺； 粉刺； comedo
V002-N00599.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00599.definition: A skin condition characterized by noticeable expansion of the pores on the face, chest and back, coupled with blackheads. Often results from wind heat affecting the lung meridian, damp heat in the stomach and intestines or spleen deficiency.

V002-N00599.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00599.label: 粉刺
V002-N00599.aliases: BWP200； 酒刺； 肺风粉刺； 面疮； 青春痘； 青春疙瘩

V002-N00599.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00599.label: 粉刺
V002-N00599.aliases: BWP200； 酒刺； 肺风粉刺； 面疮； 青春痘； 青春疙瘩
V002-N00599.definition: a chronic inflammatory disease of the follicles and sebaceous glands, occurring on the face, chest and back

V002-N00600.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00600.label: 痤疮，寻常
V002-N00600.definition: 发生于颜面、胸背等处毛囊与皮脂腺的慢性炎症性皮肤病。皮损丘疹如刺，可挤出白色碎米样粉汁。

V002-N00600.label: 面部痤疮
V002-N00600.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜头面症状｜面部症状｜面部皮损

V002-N00600.label: 痤疮
V002-N00600.path: 诊察对象｜望诊对象｜皮肤｜皮损

V002-N00600.label: 痤疮
V002-N00600.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病｜粉刺

V002-N00600.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00600.label: 痤疮
V002-N00600.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V002-N00600.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00600.label: 痤疮
V002-N00600.aliases: 黑头粉刺； 粉刺； comedo
V002-N00600.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00600.definition: A skin condition characterized by noticeable expansion of the pores on the face, chest and back, coupled with blackheads. Often results from wind heat affecting the lung meridian, damp heat in the stomach and intestines or spleen deficiency.

V002-N00640.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00640.label: 大脚风
V002-N00640.definition: 以下肢皮肤紧张发亮，按之有压痕，继而皮厚、粗糙，下肢增粗变硬、状如象皮为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00640.label: 大脚风
V002-N00640.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜外伤性疾病与周围血管疾病
V002-N00640.definition: 多因风湿热邪留恋，气血阻塞不通所致。以下肢皮肤紧张发亮，按之有压痕，继而皮厚、粗糙，下肢增粗变硬、状如象皮为主要表现的肿病类疾病。

V002-N00640.label: 大脚风
V002-N00640.englishNames: swollen foot wind wilting; elephantiasis of leg
V002-N00640.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00640.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00640.label: 大脚风
V002-N00640.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V002-N00640.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00640.label: 大脚风
V002-N00640.englishNames: swollen foot wind wilting; Elephant skin-like leg; swollen foot wind flaccidity; elephantiasis of leg
V002-N00640.pinyinNames: da jiao feng; dà jiǎo fēng
V002-N00640.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00640.definition: Characterized by tight, shiny and swollen skin in the lower leg, followed by thickening and darkening of the skin that resembles elephant skin. It is often caused by wind, dampness and heat obstructing the flow of qi and blood due to filariasis or recurrent erysipelas.

V002-N00587.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00587.label: 瘾疹
V002-N00587.definition: 以皮肤出现红色或苍白色风团,时隐时现为主要表现的瘙痒性过敏性皮肤疾病。

V002-N00587.label: 瘾疹
V002-N00587.definition: 皮肤出现红色或苍白色风团，瘙痒时隐时现 为主要表现的过敏性皮肤病。

V002-N00587.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00587.label: 瘾疹
V002-N00587.definition: 因风邪外侵所致。以身体瘙痒、搔之出现红斑隆起、形如豆瓣、堆累成片、发无定处、忽隐忽现、退后不留痕迹为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00587.label: 瘾疹
V002-N00587.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00587.definition: 瘾疹是一种皮肤出现红色或苍白色风团，时隐时现的瘙痒性、过敏性皮肤病。相当于西医学的荨麻疹。其特点是：皮肤上出现瘙痒性风团，发无定处，骤起骤退，退后不留痕迹。本病病因病机：先天禀赋不足，卫外不固，风邪乘虚侵袭所致；或表虚不固，风寒、风热外袭，客于肌表，致使营卫失调而发；或饮食不节，过食辛辣肥厚，或有肠道寄生虫，使肠胃积热，复感风邪，内不得疏泻，外不得透达，郁于皮毛腠理之间而发。此外，情志内伤，冲任不调，肝肾不足，血虚生风生燥，阻于肌肤也可发生。

V002-N00587.label: 瘾疹
V002-N00587.aliases: 风瘾疹； 风疹块； Urticant Eruptions； 风㾦癗
V002-N00587.englishNames: urticaria; Urticaria; hidden rashes; hidden rash
V002-N00587.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00587.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00587.label: 瘾疹
V002-N00587.aliases: 风瘾疹； 风疹块； Hives； 风？（病晶）； Urticant Eruptions； 风㾦癗
V002-N00587.englishNames: urticaria; Urticaria; hidden rashes; hidden rash
V002-N00587.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00587.definition: Characterized by rashes with red, raised, itchy bumps that may also burn or sting. These rashes come and go, and do not leave any skin changes. Often results from contraction of exogenous wind, non-acclimatization, or an allergic reaction.

V002-N00587.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00587.label: 瘾疹
V002-N00587.aliases: BWP110； 风疹块； 风瘾疹； Urticant Eruptions

V002-N00587.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00587.label: 瘾疹
V002-N00587.aliases: BWP110； 风疹块； 风瘾疹； Urticant Eruptions
V002-N00587.definition: an allergic disorder of the skin, marked by red or pale wheals, intermittent, associated with intense itching

V002-N00588.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00588.label: 土风疮
V002-N00588.path: 第3部分：皮肤科学｜疾病｜瘾疹
V002-N00588.definition: 感染湿热虫毒，以皮肤出现丘疹、风团、水疱,乍发乍瘥为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00588.label: 土风疮
V002-N00588.definition: 因水土不服，感染湿热虫邪所致的以皮肤现 丘疹、风团、水疮，乍发乍瘥为主要表现的皮 肤疾病。

V002-N00588.label: 土风疮
V002-N00588.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00588.definition: 因水土不服，染受湿热虫邪所致。以皮肤现丘疹、风团、水疱，乍发乍瘥为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00588.label: 土风疮
V002-N00588.englishNames: local wind sore; urticaria populosa; urticaria papulosa; unaccustomed sore
V002-N00588.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病｜瘾疹

V002-N00631.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00631.label: 漆疮
V002-N00631.definition: 以皮肤、黏膜接触漆等外界物质后皮肤出现红斑、丘疹、渗出、脱屑、瘙痒等为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00631.label: 漆毒
V002-N00631.path: 病因病机｜病因｜内毒外毒
V002-N00631.definition: 指禀赋畏漆者可感受而成病的漆气毒邪。

V002-N00631.label: 漆疮
V002-N00631.englishNames: Dermatitis Rhus; Lacquer Sore; Rhus Dermatitis
V002-N00631.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00631.definition: 因禀赋不耐，接触漆毒所致。以接触漆后皮肤红肿、灼痒，甚至起水泡为主要表现的过敏性疾病。

V002-N00631.label: 漆疮
V002-N00631.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00631.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00631.label: 漆疮
V002-N00631.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类｜毒性皮炎

V002-N00631.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00631.label: 漆疮
V002-N00631.englishNames: lacquer sore; contact dermatitis; Lacquer sore
V002-N00631.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00631.definition: Characterized by skin redness, swelling, itching, a burning sensation and blisters after contact to various lacquers. It is often caused by congenital weakness coupled with exposure to lacquers.

V002-N00625.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00625.label: 狐惑
V002-N00625.definition: 湿热毒邪入内，或感染虫毒，伤及气血，以目赤眦黑、口腔咽喉及前后阴腐蚀溃疡为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00625.label: 狐惑
V002-N00625.definition: 以口咽、阴部蚀烂，目赤如鸠眼，小腿结节红 斑等为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00625.label: 狐惑
V002-N00625.englishNames: Syndrome Characterized by Ulceration of Throat, Anus and External Genitals
V002-N00625.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00625.definition: 因肝肾阴虚，湿热毒结，或脾肾阳虚所致。以口咽、阴部蚀烂，目赤如鸠眼，小腿结节红斑等为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00625.label: 狐惑
V002-N00625.englishNames: fox-creeper disease; Behcet’s syndrome; erosion of throat, anus and genitalia; huhuo disease; Behcet's syndrome
V002-N00625.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00625.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00625.label: 狐惑
V002-N00625.englishNames: fox-creeper disease; Behcet’s syndrome; erosion of throat, anus and genitalia; erosion of throat,anus and genitalia; huhuo disease; Behcet's syndrome; Hu Huo
V002-N00625.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00625.definition: Characterized by mind wandering, drowsiness, a poor appetite, restlessness, red eyes and sores on the throat and sex organs. Often results from retained damp heat.

V002-N00625.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00625.label: 狐惑
V002-N00625.englishNames: fox-creeper disease; Syndrome Characterized by Ulceration of Throat, Anus and External Genitals; Behcet’s syndrome
V002-N00625.definition: a disease characterized by erosion of the mouth, throat and genitalia, red eyes and black canthi, resembling Behcet’s syndrome

V002-N00611.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00611.label: 天疱疮
V002-N00611.definition: 以皮肤燎浆水疱,小如芡实，大似桃李，皮破津水，缠绵不愈为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00611.label: 天疱疮
V002-N00611.definition: 以皮肤起燎浆水泡，小如芡实，大如杏核，皮 破流津，缠绵不愈为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00611.label: 天疱疮
V002-N00611.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00611.definition: 因心火脾湿，兼感风热暑湿之邪，熏蒸肌肤所致。以皮肤起燎浆水泡，小如芡实，大如杏核，皮破流津，缠绵不愈为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00611.label: 天疱疮
V002-N00611.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00611.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00611.label: 天疱疮
V002-N00611.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V002-N00611.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00611.label: 天疱疮
V002-N00611.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N00611.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00611.label: 天疱疮
V002-N00611.englishNames: lingering pemphigus; Pemphigus; pemphigus and pemphigoid
V002-N00611.pinyinNames: tian pao chuang; tiān pào chuāng
V002-N00611.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00611.definition: Commonly affects children in summer or autumn. Characterized by initial skin blisters that contain pus and have an inflamed base, which often begin on the scalp and torso. Some individuals may also experience skin lesions that do not cause itch or pain. Often results from summer heat and dampness that affects the lung meridian and scorches the skin.

V002-N00630.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00630.label: 臭汗症
V002-N00630.aliases: 狐臭； 腋臭； Bromhidrosis； Osmidrosis
V002-N00630.definition: 腋下汗气阵阵膻臊难闻，多因湿热郁蒸所致。

V002-N00630.label: 狐臭
V002-N00630.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中毒及其他病类

V002-N00630.label: 狐臭
V002-N00630.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00630.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00630.label: 狐臭
V002-N00630.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00630.definition: Characterized by unpleasant smell due to stale perspiration under the arms (or other body parts such as areola, umbilicus or external genitalia). It can be hereditary or acquired due to disharmony between qi and blood and internal retention of damp heat.

V002-N00622.label: 蝣蜒疮
V002-N00622.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00622.definition: 因正虚而毒火稽留分肉之间，或湿热盘踞经隧所致。以肢体出现疱疹或脓疱，溃破成疡，边高中低、边暗中红，附有黄绿色脓液或死肉，状如蝣蜒爬行为主要表现的疮疡类疾病。

V002-N00622.label: 蝣蜒疮
V002-N00622.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00590.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00590.label: 顽湿聚结
V002-N00590.definition: 以四肢散发豆粒大灰褐色坚实结节，瘙痒抓后有血痂为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00590.label: 顽湿聚结
V002-N00590.englishNames: accumulation of lingering dampness; prurigo nodularis
V002-N00590.definition: 以四肢散发豆粒大灰褐色坚实给节，瘙痒， 抓后有血痂为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00590.label: 顽湿结聚
V002-N00590.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00590.definition: 因风湿聚于肤表所致。以四肢散发豆粒大灰褐色坚实结节，痛痒，抓后有血痴为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00590.label: 顽湿聚结
V002-N00590.englishNames: accumulation of obstinate dampness; accumulation of stubborn dampness; prurigo nodularis; accumulation of lingering dampness
V002-N00590.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00591.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00591.label: 血风疮
V002-N00591.path: 第3部分：皮肤科学｜疾病｜湿疮
V002-N00591.definition: 以遍身生疮，形如粟米，瘙痒无度，抓破时津脂水，浸淫成片为特征的湿疮。

V002-N00591.label: 血风疮
V002-N00591.englishNames: Itching Eruptions Due to Blood-heat or Wind-heat
V002-N00591.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00591.definition: 因血虚受风，蕴热化燥，瘀阻经络所致。以下肢及躯干下部出现紫色斑疹，或融合成片，皮厚如苔癣，瘙痒为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00591.label: 血风疮
V002-N00591.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00591.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00591.label: 血风疮
V002-N00591.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类｜湿疹

V002-N00610.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00610.label: 紫癜风
V002-N00610.definition: 以皮肤出现紫红色扁平皮疹，瘙痒，可发生于全身各处，常累及口腔为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00610.label: 紫癜风
V002-N00610.definition: 以皮肤出现紫红色扁平皮疹，瘙痒，可发生 于全身各处，常累及口腔为主要表现的皮肤 疾病。

V002-N00610.label: 紫癜风
V002-N00610.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00610.definition: 因阴虚内热，或湿热凝滞，复感风邪所致。以皮肤出现紫红色扁平皮疹，瘙痒，可发生于全身各处，常累及口腔为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00610.label: 紫癜风
V002-N00610.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00610.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00610.label: 紫癜风
V002-N00610.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V002-N00610.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00610.label: 紫癜风
V002-N00610.englishNames: tinea versicolor; lichen planus; Allergic purpura
V002-N00610.pinyinNames: zi dian feng; zǐ diàn fēng
V002-N00610.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00610.definition: Characterized by itchy, flat purple red rashes that can occur in any body parts, including the oral cavity. Often results from internal heat due to yin deficiency or retention of damp heat, coupled with contraction of exogenous wind.

V002-N00619.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00619.label: 流皮漏
V002-N00619.definition: 以颜面及身体其他部位出现褐红色小结节,融合成片、结痂出脓、坏死溃疡,愈后形成萎缩性瘢痕为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00619.label: 流皮漏
V002-N00619.definition: 以颜面及身体其他部位出现褐红色小结节， 融合成片、结痂出脓、坏死溃疡，愈后形成萎 缩性瘢痕为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00619.label: 流皮漏
V002-N00619.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00619.definition: 因湿热淤阻，气血亏虚所致。以颜面及身体其他部位出现褐红色小结节，融合成片、结痴出脓、坏死溃疡，愈后形成萎缩性瘢痕为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00619.label: 流皮漏
V002-N00619.englishNames: lupus vulgaris; cutaneous necrotic ulceration; spreading skin ulcer
V002-N00619.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00594.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00594.label: 白疕
V002-N00594.definition: 以皮损状如松皮，形如疹疥，搔起白皮为主要表现的红斑鳞屑性皮肤疾病。

V002-N00594.label: 白疕
V002-N00594.definition: 皮损状如松皮，形如疹疥，搔起白皮的红癍 鳞屑性皮肤病。

V002-N00594.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00594.label: 银屑病
V002-N00594.definition: 因禀赋素弱，或血虚风燥，湿滞血瘀所致。以皮肤起多形红斑、银屑，刮去鳞屑可见点状出血为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00594.label: 白疕
V002-N00594.aliases: 白壳疮； 疕风； 干癣； 蛇虱
V002-N00594.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00594.definition: 白疕是一种以红斑为主、丘疹、鳞屑损害为主要表现的慢性复发性炎症性皮肤病。因刮去鳞屑可见点状出血点，如匕首刺伤皮肤之状而得名。中医学文献记载有“松皮癣”、“干癣”、“蛇虱”、“白壳疮”等病名。本病相当于西医的银屑病。临床特点是：红斑基础上覆盖多层松散的银白色鳞屑，刮去鳞屑有薄膜及露水珠样出血点，病程较长，反复发作。本病多因素体营血亏损，血热内蕴，化燥生风，肌肤失养而成。

V002-N00594.label: 白疕
V002-N00594.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00594.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00594.label: 白疕
V002-N00594.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V002-N00594.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00594.label: 白疕
V002-N00594.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00594.definition: Characterized by red, scaling plaques on the skin, often covered with loose, silver-coloured scales. These lesions have clear boundaries and commonly affect the scalp, back and the extensor surface of the arms and legs. They sometimes crack and bleed. Often results from congenital weakness or malnourishment of the skin due to blood deficiency, invasion of wind dryness, dampness retention or blood stasis.

V002-N00594.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00594.label: 白疕
V002-N00594.aliases: 白壳疮； 松皮癣； 疕风； 干癣； 蛇虱
V002-N00594.definition: a chronic skin disease marked by rounded, circumscribed, erythematous, dry, scaling patches, covered by silvery white, lamellar scales, resembling the bark of a pine tree

V002-N00614.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00614.label: 松皮癣
V002-N00614.definition: 以皮肤丘疹、结节、肥厚，触之硬固，皮色暗褐，状如苍松之皮，瘙痒为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00614.label: 松皮癣
V002-N00614.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00614.definition: 因湿热郁肤，留滞不去所致。以四肢皮肤丘疹、结节、肥厚，触之硬固，皮色暗褐如松皮，瘙痒为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00614.label: 松皮癣
V002-N00614.englishNames: pine bark plaque; skin amyloidosis; pine-bark psoriasis
V002-N00614.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00614.label: 白疕
V002-N00614.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00614.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00614.label: 松皮癣
V002-N00614.englishNames: pine bark plaque; skin amyloidosis; Loose skin tinea; pine-bark psoriasis
V002-N00614.pinyinNames: song pi xuan; sōng pí xuǎn
V002-N00614.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00614.definition: Characterized by itchy, thickened and solid papules or nodules with a dark, brown colour that resemble the bark of a pine tree. Often results from damp heat retained in the skin.

V002-N00614.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准

V002-N00614.aliases: 白壳疮； 松皮癣； 疕风； 干癣； 蛇虱
V002-N00614.definition: a chronic skin disease marked by rounded, circumscribed, erythematous, dry, scaling patches, covered by silvery white, lamellar scales, resembling the bark of a pine tree

V002-N00612.label: 类天疱疮
V002-N00612.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00601.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00601.label: 酒糟鼻
V002-N00601.path: 第9部分：耳鼻喉科学｜鼻病
V002-N00601.definition: 以鼻准赤色、丘疹，甚至局部皮肤增厚为主要表现的鼻病。

V002-N00601.label: 酒齄鼻
V002-N00601.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00601.definition: 酒齄鼻是发生于鼻及面部中央以红斑和毛细血管扩张为特点的慢性皮肤病。因鼻色紫红如酒渣，故名酒齄鼻。中医文献又称之为“赤鼻”，俗称“红鼻头”、“酒糟鼻”。临床特点是：鼻及颜面中央部持续红斑和毛细血管扩张，伴丘疹、脓疱、鼻赘。本病由肺胃积热上蒸，复遇风寒外袭，血瘀凝结而成；或嗜酒之人酒气熏蒸，热毒凝结于鼻，复遇风寒之邪，交阻肌肤所致；或热毒日久瘀阻鼻面，气滞血瘀，毒邪聚而不散所致。皮损以红斑为主，好发于鼻尖、鼻翼、两颊、前额等部位，少数鼻部正常而只发于两颊和额部。

V002-N00601.label: 酒齄鼻
V002-N00601.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00601.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00601.label: 酒糟鼻
V002-N00601.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V002-N00557.label: 黄水疮
V002-N00557.definition: 以皮肤脓疱、结痂、破流黄水，浸淫成疮，瘙痒为主要表现的传染性皮肤疾病。

V002-N00557.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00557.label: 浸淫疮
V002-N00557.path: 第3部分：皮肤科学｜疾病｜湿疮
V002-N00557.definition: 以皮疹浸淫全身，滋水较多为特征的湿疮。

V002-N00557.label: 黄水疮
V002-N00557.definition: 以生于皮肤的脓疱、结痂、流黄水，浸淫成 片，瘙痒为主要表现的皮肤病。

V002-N00557.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00557.label: 黄水疮
V002-N00557.aliases: 滴脓疮； 脓疱疮； 脓窝疮； Impetigo
V002-N00557.definition: 因脾肺湿热与外邪相加所致。以生于皮肤的脓疱、结痂、流黄水、浸淫成片、瘙痒为主要表现的皮肤病。

V002-N00557.label: 黄水疮
V002-N00557.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病

V002-N00557.label: 黄水疮
V002-N00557.aliases: 浸淫疮； 滴脓疮； 脓窝疮； 脓疱疮； Impetigo
V002-N00557.englishNames: Impetigo disorder; yellow-water sore（impetigo); yellow fluid ulcers; impetigo; Yellow Fluid Ulcers
V002-N00557.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00557.label: 黄水疮
V002-N00557.aliases: 浸淫疮； 滴脓疮； 脓窝疮； 脓疱疮； Impetigo
V002-N00557.englishNames: Impetigo disorder; yellow-water sore（impetigo); yellow fluid ulcers; impetigo; Yellow Fluid Ulcers
V002-N00557.path: 传统医学疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜皮肤黏膜系统病类

V002-N00557.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00557.label: 黄水疮
V002-N00557.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V002-N00557.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00557.label: 浸淫疮
V002-N00557.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类｜湿疹

V002-N00557.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00557.label: 黄水疮
V002-N00557.aliases: 浸淫疮； 滴脓疮； 脓窝疮； Impetigo disorder； 脓疱疮； Impetigo
V002-N00557.englishNames: Yellow-water sore; impetigo; Impetigo disorder; yellow-water sore（impetigo); yellow fluid ulcers; Yellow Fluid Ulcers
V002-N00557.pinyinNames: huáng shuǐ chuāng; huang shui chuang
V002-N00557.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00557.definition: Characterized by itchy or painful small vesicles that may develop into scab-like, yellowish crust. Often occurs when exogenous summer heat and dampness obstructs the flow of qi and fumigates the skin.

V002-N00597.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00597.label: 白屑风
V002-N00597.definition: 以头面部等处皮肤出现糠秕状白屑，瘙痒为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00597.label: 白屑风
V002-N00597.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00597.definition: 因风热血燥，肌肤先养，湿热蕴肤所致。以头部、颜面等处皮肤出现糠状白屑.瘙痒为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00597.label: 面游风
V002-N00597.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00597.definition: 面游风是因皮肤油腻，瘙痒潮红，叠起白屑，多发于面部而得名，是发生在皮脂溢出部位的慢性炎症性皮肤病。中医又称“白屑风”。本病相当于西医学的脂溢性皮炎。临床特点是：多发于头部至颜面部，皮肤多脂油腻，出现红斑白屑，脱而复生。本病主要因素体湿热内蕴，感受风邪所致。风热之邪外袭，郁久耗伤阴血，阴伤血燥；或平素血燥之体，复感风热之邪，血虚生风，风热燥邪蕴阻肌肤，肌肤失于濡养而致；或由于恣食肥甘油腻、辛辣之品，以致脾胃运化失常，化湿生热，湿热蕴阻肌肤而成。

V002-N00597.label: 白屑风
V002-N00597.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00597.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00597.label: 面游风
V002-N00597.englishNames: seborrheic dermatitis; Seborrheic  Dermatitis; Seborrheic Eczema; facial seborrheic dermatitis; facial wandering wind

V002-N00597.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00597.label: 面游风
V002-N00597.englishNames: seborrheic dermatitis; Seborrheic  Dermatitis; Seborrheic Eczema; facial seborrheic dermatitis; facial wandering wind
V002-N00597.definition: a chronic inflammation of the skin marked by excessive secretion of sebum

V002-N00578.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00578.label: 牛皮癣
V002-N00578.definition: 常发于颈项、肘部等处，以状如牛皮,顽硬且坚为主要表现的慢性瘙痒性皮肤疾病。

V002-N00578.label: 摄领疮
V002-N00578.definition: 常发于颈项领口之处，皮肤 状如牛皮，厚而且坚的慢性瘙痒性皮肤病。

V002-N00578.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00578.label: 银屑病
V002-N00578.definition: 因禀赋素弱，或血虚风燥，湿滞血瘀所致。以皮肤起多形红斑、银屑，刮去鳞屑可见点状出血为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00578.label: 牛皮癣
V002-N00578.aliases: 摄领疮； 顽癣； 银屑病
V002-N00578.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00578.definition: 牛皮癣是一种皮肤状如牛颈之皮，厚而且坚的慢性瘙痒性皮肤病。相当于西医学的慢性单纯性苔藓，又名神经性皮炎。其特点是：皮损多是圆形或多角形的扁平丘疹融合成片，剧烈瘙痒，搔抓后皮肤肥厚，皮沟加深，皮嵴隆起，极易形成苔藓样变。初起为风湿热之邪阻滞肌肤或硬领等外来机械刺激所引起；病久耗伤阴液，营血不足，血虚生风生燥，皮肤失去濡养而成。肝火郁滞，情志不遂，郁闷不舒，或紧张劳累，心火上炎，以致气血运行失职，凝滞肌肤，每易成为诱发的重要因素，且致病情反复。

V002-N00578.label: 摄领疮
V002-N00578.englishNames: neurodermatitis; cervical neurodermatitis; nape sores; neurodermatitis of nape
V002-N00578.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00578.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00578.label: 牛皮癣
V002-N00578.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V002-N00578.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00578.label: 摄领疮
V002-N00578.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类｜牛皮癣

V002-N00578.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00578.label: 顽癣
V002-N00578.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类｜牛皮癣

V002-N00578.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00578.label: 摄领疮
V002-N00578.aliases: 牛皮癣； 顽癣； Oxhide lichen
V002-N00578.englishNames: Collar sore; neurodermatitis; cervical neurodermatitis; nape sores; neurodermatitis of nape
V002-N00578.pinyinNames: she ling chuang; shè lǐng chuāng
V002-N00578.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00578.definition: Characterized by severe painful or itchy, symmetric scaly plaques. The itch-scratch cycle causes the skin to become thick and leathery, typically on the neck, elbow, arms, legs and lumbosacral region. Often results from wind dampness affecting the skin, liver hyperactivity due to blood deficiency or malnourishment of the skin due to fluids consumption.

V002-N00578.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00578.label: 摄领疮
V002-N00578.englishNames: cervical neurodermatitis; nape sores; neurodermatitis of nape

V002-N00578.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00578.label: 牛皮癣

V002-N00586.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00586.label: 汗淅疮
V002-N00586.definition: 因出汗多淹淅皮肤,以患处皮肤潮红、浸软、糜烂渗液、灼痒为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00586.label: 汗淅疮
V002-N00586.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00586.definition: 因出汗多而久不洗浴，湿热淹淅皮肤所致。以患处皮肤潮红、浸软、糜烂渗液、灼痒为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00586.label: 汗淅疮

V002-N00558.definition: 以发生在皮肤浅表的良性赘生物为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00558.label: 疣
V002-N00558.definition: 发生在皮肤浅表的良性赘生物。

V002-N00558.label: 胞生痰核
V002-N00558.aliases: 睑板腺囊肿； 睥生痰核； 霰粒肿； 疣病
V002-N00558.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医眼疾病｜胞睑疾病
V002-N00558.definition: 胞生痰核是指胞睑内生硬核，触之不痛，皮色如常的眼病。临床多由恣食炙煿厚味，脾失健运，湿痰内聚，上阻胞睑脉络，于气血混结而成本病。

V002-N00558.label: 疣
V002-N00558.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00558.definition: 是一种发生在皮肤浅表的良性赘生物。因其皮损形态及发病部位不同而名称各异，如发于手背、手指、头皮等处者，称千日疮、疣目、枯筋箭或瘊子；发于颜面、手背、前臂等处者，称扁瘊；发于胸背中有脐窝的赘疣，称鼠乳；发于足跖部者，称跖疣；发于颈周围及眼睑部位，呈细软丝状突起者，称丝状疣或线瘊。本病西医学亦称疣，一般分为寻常疣、扁平疣、传染性软疣、掌跖疣和丝状疣等。本病病因病机：多由风热毒邪搏于肌肤而生；活怒动肝火，肝旺血燥，筋气不荣，肌肤不润所致。跖疣多由局部气血凝滞而成，外伤、摩擦常为其诱因。

V002-N00563.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00563.label: 臊瘊
V002-N00563.definition: 以发生于外阴等处皮肤黏膜交界处的疣状突起，呈菜花状，表面湿润，易出血为主要表现的性病。

V002-N00563.label: 尖锐湿疣
V002-N00563.aliases: 臊疣； 瘙瘊； 生殖器疣； 性病疣
V002-N00563.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜性传播疾病
V002-N00563.definition: 尖锐湿疣：尖锐湿疣又称生殖器疣、性病疣，是人类乳头瘤病毒引起的一种良性赘生物。属中医“瘙疣”、“瘙瘊”的范畴。其特点是皮肤黏膜交界处，尤其是外阴、肛周出现淡红色或污秽色表皮赘生物。本病主要为性滥交或房室不洁，感受秽浊之毒，毒邪蕴聚，酿生湿热，湿热下注皮肤黏膜而产生赘生物。

V002-N00563.label: 臊疣
V002-N00563.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00563.definition: 因内蕴湿热，外感邪毒所致。发生于会阴等处皮肤粘膜交界处的疣状突起，呈菜花状，表面湿润，易出血为主要表现，具有传染性的疣病类疾病。

V002-N00563.label: 臊疣
V002-N00563.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病｜疣病

V002-N00562.label: 线瘊

V002-N00562.definition: 多因风邪搏于肌肤，兼感邪毒所致。以好发于眼睑、颈、额部等处皮肤之单个细软的丝状突起，并无痛痒为主要表现的疣病类疾病。

V002-N00561.label: 鼠乳

V002-N00560.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00560.definition: Characterized by small, smooth flattened and slightly raised warts on the face or dorsum of the hands. They are often caused by damp heat affecting the skin, coupled with exposure to toxins.

V002-N00560.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00560.label: 扁瘊

V002-N00635.label: 疥疮
V002-N00635.definition: 由疥螨引起的传染性皮肤病。

V002-N00635.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00635.label: 疥疮
V002-N00635.definition: 因疥虫侵袭皮肤所致。以指缝、腕、肘窝、脐周、阴股部等处皮肤发生疱疹，夜间痒甚，可找到疥虫为主要表现的传染性皮肤疾病。有干、湿、虫、砂、脓疥之分。

V002-N00635.label: 疥疮
V002-N00635.aliases: 虫疥； 癞疥； 千疤疥
V002-N00635.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00635.definition: 疥疮是由疥虫（疥螨）寄生在人体皮肤所引起的一种接触传染性皮肤病。其特点是夜间剧痒，在皮损处有灰白色、浅黑色或普通皮色的隧道，可找到疥虫。俗称虫疥、癞疥、干疤疥等。皮疹主要为红色小丘疹、丘疱疹、小水疱、隧道、结节和结痂。

V002-N00635.label: 疥疮
V002-N00635.aliases: 疥癞； 疥疮病； 疥癣疮
V002-N00635.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00635.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00635.label: 疥疮
V002-N00635.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V002-N00635.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00635.label: 疥疮
V002-N00635.aliases: 疥癞； 疥疮病； 疥癣疮
V002-N00635.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00635.definition: A condition caused by the mite Sarcoptes scabiei. It initially causes tiny, red papules, blisters, pustules or burrows on the wrist, armpit, umbilicus or medial side of the thigh. Scratching-related secondary infection may cause eczematous rash or lichenification. Individuals may experience mild itching during the day but severe itch at night. There are five types of scabies: dry, dampness, mites, sand and suppuration.

V002-N00635.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00635.label: 疥疮

V002-N00635.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00635.label: 疥疮
V002-N00635.definition: a contagious skin disease caused by mites

V002-N00623.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00623.label: 蟹足肿
V002-N00623.definition: 以皮肤上出现高出皮面而坚实的疤痕疙瘩，形如蟹足为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00623.label: 蟹足肿
V002-N00623.definition: 以皮肤上出现高出皮面而坚实的疤痕疙瘩， 形如蟹足为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00623.label: 蟹足肿
V002-N00623.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00623.definition: 因创伤后气血瘀滞，或自发而引起。以皮肤上出现高出皮面而坚实的疤痕，形如蟹足为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00623.label: 蟹足肿
V002-N00623.englishNames: crab feet swelling; keloid; claw keloid
V002-N00623.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00620.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00620.label: 白驳风
V002-N00620.definition: 以皮肤见大小形态不一的白斑，无痒痛为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00620.label: 白驳风
V002-N00620.definition: 以皮肤见大小不一的白斑，周边可有色素沉 着变黑，并不痒痛为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00620.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00620.label: 白癜风
V002-N00620.definition: 皮肤变白、大小不同、形态各异的局限性或泛发性色素脱失性斑片。

V002-N00620.label: 白驳风
V002-N00620.aliases: 白驳； 白癜； 白癜风； 斑白； 斑驳
V002-N00620.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00620.definition: 白驳风是指以皮肤出现大小不同、形态各异的白斑为主要临床表现的后天性局限性色素脱失性皮肤病。中医文献中又有“白癜”、“白驳”、“斑白”、“斑驳”等名称。本病相当于西医的白癜风。临床特点是：皮肤白斑可发生于任何部位、任何年龄，单侧或对称，大小不等，形态各异，与周围正常皮肤的交界处有色素沉淀圈，边界清楚；亦可泛发全身；慢性病程，易诊难治。本病总由气血失和、脉络瘀阻所致。

V002-N00620.label: 白驳风
V002-N00620.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00620.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00620.label: 白癜风
V002-N00620.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V002-N00620.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00620.label: 白驳风
V002-N00620.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V002-N00620.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00620.label: 白驳风
V002-N00620.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00620.definition: Characterized by pale plaques of depigmented skin that do not cause itch or pain. Often results from disharmony between qi and blood, coupled with contraction of exogenous wind.

V002-N00596.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00596.label: 发蛀脱发
V002-N00596.definition: 以头发细软、稀疏、脱落，或伴有油腻瘙痒，白屑增多为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00596.label: 发蛀脱发
V002-N00596.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00596.definition: 因湿热上蒸，或阴虚血弱所致。以头发细软、稀疏、脱落，并有油腻，或为干燥的红黄色鳞屑斑，头皮瘙痒为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00596.label: 发蛀脱发
V002-N00596.englishNames: insect bitten alopecia; androgenetic alopecia; atrophic alopecia
V002-N00596.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00566.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00566.label: 癣
V002-N00566.definition: 发生在皮表、黏膜、毛发、指(趾)甲,以皮损边缘清楚，略高出皮面，边缘周围有丘疹、水疱、脓疱、结痂、鳞屑等，自觉瘙痒为主要表现的浅部真菌性皮肤疾病。

V002-N00566.label: 癣
V002-N00566.definition: 发生在表皮、毛发、指（趾）甲的浅部真菌皮 肤病。

V002-N00566.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00566.label: 癣
V002-N00566.definition: 发生在表皮、毛发、指（趾）甲的浅部真菌皮肤病。

V002-N00566.label: 癣
V002-N00566.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00566.definition: 是发生在表皮、毛发、指（趾）甲的浅部真菌性皮肤病。皮肤浅部癣之病因总由生活起居不慎，感染真菌，复因风、湿、热邪外袭，郁于腠理，淫于皮肤所致。病发于头皮、毛发，则发为白秃疮、肥疮；病发于趾丫，则发为脚湿气；发于手掌部，为鹅掌风；发于体表、股阴间，则为紫白癜风、圆癣、阴癣等。如表现为发热起疹，瘙痒脱屑者，多为风热盛所致；若见渗流滋水，瘙痒结痂者，多为湿热盛引起；若见皮肤肥厚、燥裂、瘙痒者，多由郁热化燥，气血不和，肤失营养所致。

V002-N00566.label: 癣
V002-N00566.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00566.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00566.label: 癣
V002-N00566.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00566.definition: Characterized by skin thickening coupled with scaling and exudation.

V002-N00566.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00566.label: 癣

V002-N00575.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00575.label: 圆癣
V002-N00575.path: 第3部分：皮肤科学｜疾病｜癣
V002-N00575.definition: 发生于面部、颈部、躯干及四肢近端，以疹如钱币有匡廓，瘙痒为特征的癣。

V002-N00575.label: 圆癣
V002-N00575.definition: 发生于面部、躯干及四肢近端，呈圆状的癣 病。

V002-N00575.label: 圆癣
V002-N00575.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病｜癣
V002-N00575.definition: 因湿热内蕴，外感邪毒所致。以皮肤平滑处起红疹、水疱、结痂、脱屑，呈环状有框廓，瘙痒为主要表现的癣病类疾病。

V002-N00575.label: 圆癣
V002-N00575.englishNames: tinea circinata; round tinea(tinea circinata); Tinea circinate disorder
V002-N00575.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病｜癣

V002-N00575.label: 圆癣
V002-N00575.englishNames: tinea circinata; round tinea(tinea circinata); Tinea circinate disorder
V002-N00575.path: 传统医学疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜皮肤黏膜系统病类

V002-N00575.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00575.label: 圆癣
V002-N00575.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类｜疮癞

V002-N00575.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00575.label: 圆癣
V002-N00575.aliases: 钱癣； 金钱癣； Tinea corporis disorder； Coin-shaped tinea
V002-N00575.englishNames: tinea circinata; round tinea(tinea circinata); Tinea circinate disorder; Tinea corporis
V002-N00575.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00575.definition: Characterized by itchy, red rashes, blisters, crusting and scaling with a ring, especially on glabrous (hairless) skin. Often results from internal build up of damp heat and contraction of exogenous pathogens.

V002-N00575.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00575.label: 圆癣
V002-N00575.englishNames: Bodily Tinea; round tinea(tinea circinata); tinea circinata

V002-N00569.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00569.label: 鹅掌风
V002-N00569.path: 第3部分：皮肤科学｜疾病｜癣
V002-N00569.definition: 以手掌部皮肤粗糙、肥厚、干裂为特征的癣。

V002-N00569.label: 鹅掌风
V002-N00569.definition: 发生于手掌部的浅部真菌皮肤病。

V002-N00569.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00569.label: 鹅掌风
V002-N00569.definition: 因风湿蕴肤，或血虚风燥所致。以手掌水疱脱屑、粗糙、变厚、干燥皲裂，自觉痒痛为主要表现的癣病类疾病。

V002-N00569.label: 鹅掌风
V002-N00569.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病｜癣
V002-N00569.definition: 因风湿蕴肤，或血虚风燥所致。以手掌水疱脱屑、粗糙、变厚、干燥皴裂，自觉痒痛为主要表现的癣病类疾病。

V002-N00569.label: 鹅掌风

V002-N00569.label: 鹅掌风

V002-N00569.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00569.definition: Characterized by blisters on the palm with scaling, roughness, thickening and cracking. Often results from external contraction of damp heat or get from others who have the infection.

V002-N00569.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00569.label: 鹅掌风

V002-N00576.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00576.label: 阴癣
V002-N00576.path: 第3部分：皮肤科学｜疾病｜癣
V002-N00576.definition: 好发于臀股部，以半环形红斑、丘疹、水疱、结痂、瘙痒、边界清楚为特征的癣。

V002-N00576.label: 阴癣
V002-N00576.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病｜癣
V002-N00576.definition: 因阴部湿热，染受邪毒所致。好发于沟股尾端及臀部、大腿内侧，以皮肤丘疹、水疱、结痂、痛痒为主要表现的癣病类疾病。

V002-N00576.label: 阴癣
V002-N00576.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病｜癣

V002-N00576.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00576.label: 阴癣
V002-N00576.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类｜疮癞

V002-N00576.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00576.label: 阴癣
V002-N00576.englishNames: inguinal tinea; tinea inguinalis; Tinea cruris
V002-N00576.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00576.definition: Characterized by itchy skin papules, blisters and crusting on the groin, buttocks and medial aspects of the thigh. Often results from damp heat affecting the groin area.

V002-N00571.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00571.label: 灰指甲
V002-N00571.path: 第3部分：皮肤科学｜疾病｜癣
V002-N00571.definition: 以指(趾)甲增厚色灰，或出现中空碎屑，失去光泽为特征的癣。

V002-N00571.label: 灰指甲
V002-N00571.definition: 以指甲增厚色黑灰，或出现黄白斑点，失去 光泽为主要表现的癣病类疾病。

V002-N00571.label: 灰趾甲
V002-N00571.definition: 以趾甲增厚色黑灰，或出现黄白斑点，失去 光泽为主要表现的癣病类疾病。

V002-N00571.label: 灰指甲
V002-N00571.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00571.definition: 因肝血不足，爪失所养，外感邪毒，多由鹅掌风日久延及爪甲所致。以指甲增厚色灰，或出现黄白斑点，失去光泽为主要表现的癣病类疾病。

V002-N00571.label: 灰指甲
V002-N00571.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病｜癣

V002-N00573.label: 脚蚓
V002-N00573.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00573.definition: 因湿热内蕴，外受风邪所致。以足蹠及足缘皮肤角化干燥、片状脱屑、奇痒，冬季易皲裂疼痛为主要表现的癣病类疾病。

V002-N00573.label: 脚蚓
V002-N00573.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病｜癣

V002-N00573.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00573.label: 脚蚓
V002-N00573.englishNames: earthworm tinea pedis; Keratotic tinea pedis
V002-N00573.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00573.definition: Characterized by plantar keratinization, dryness and patchy skin peeling, coupled with intense itching and susceptibility to painful rhagadia in winter. It is often caused by internal damp heat coupled with exposure to wind.

V002-N00568.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00568.label: 肥疮
V002-N00568.path: 第3部分：皮肤科学｜疾病｜癣
V002-N00568.definition: 多生小儿头上，以瘙痒不疼，抓破津水,结黄脓痂，日久漫延,发焦脱落为特征的癣。

V002-N00568.label: 肥疮
V002-N00568.definition: 以头部初起红丘疹，继而流水给黄痂，中有 毛发穿过，脱发后头皮光亮为主要表现的癣 病。

V002-N00568.label: 肥疮
V002-N00568.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病｜癣
V002-N00568.definition: 因剃发感染，风热化虫所致。以头部初起红丘疹，继而流水结黄痂，中有毛发穿过，脱发后头皮光亮为主要表现的癣病类疾病。

V002-N00568.label: 肥疮
V002-N00568.englishNames: fat sore; fat sore (tinea favosa); favus; tinea favosa
V002-N00568.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病｜癣

V002-N00568.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00568.label: 肥疮
V002-N00568.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类｜疮癞

V002-N00568.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00568.label: 肥疮
V002-N00568.englishNames: fat sore; fat sore (tinea favosa); Scalp ringworm; favus; tinea favosa
V002-N00568.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00568.definition: Characterized by itchy (painless) red papules with yellowish discharge and a hair projecting in the centre. A shining bare patch (scar) lacking any hair may occur after the scab and scutulum have dropped off. It is often caused by ascending damp heat in the spleen and stomach or getting an infection as a result of a hair cut.

V002-N00568.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00568.label: 肥疮
V002-N00568.englishNames: fat sore; Tinea Favosa; fat sore (tinea favosa); favus

V002-N00568.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00568.label: 肥疮
V002-N00568.englishNames: fat sore; Tinea Favosa; fat sore (tinea favosa); favus
V002-N00568.definition: a type of ringworm characterized by formation of yellow cup-shaped crusts, referring to tinea favosa

V002-N00574.label: 脚气疮
V002-N00574.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00574.definition: 因湿热风邪搏结于下肢所致。好发于胫前或其侧面，以呈对称分布的疹点，糜烂渗液，皮肤增厚，瘙痒为主要表现的癣病类疾病。

V002-N00574.label: 脚气疮
V002-N00574.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病｜癣

V002-N00574.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00574.label: 脚气疮
V002-N00574.englishNames: beriberi sore; Ringworm of the leg
V002-N00574.pinyinNames: jiao qi chuang; jiǎo qì chuāng
V002-N00574.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00574.definition: Characterized by symmetrical itchy skin lesions with thickened skin on the leg. It commonly affects the anterior or lateral aspects of the shin. Often results from retention of wind, damp and heat in the leg.

V002-N00572.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00572.label: 脚湿气
V002-N00572.path: 第3部分：皮肤科学｜疾病｜癣
V002-N00572.definition: 发生于足跖趾丫，以趾间浸渍糜烂，渗流滋水，足跖水疱，角化过度，脱屑,瘙痒等为特征的癣。注：相当于足癣。

V002-N00572.label: 田螺疱
V002-N00572.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00572.definition: 因湿热多汗，外寒闭塞所致。以足蹠部多汗、水疱破烂，甚至渗液，肿胀疼痛为主要表现的癣病类疾病。

V002-N00572.label: 田螺疱
V002-N00572.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病｜癣

V002-N00572.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00572.label: 田螺疱
V002-N00572.pinyinNames: tian luo pao; tián luó pào
V002-N00572.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00572.definition: Characterized by excess sweating, blisters and oozing on the feet. In severe cases, local swelling and pain may be present. It is often caused by damp heat, sweating and exposure to cold.

V002-N00572.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00572.label: 脚湿气
V002-N00572.aliases: 臭田螺； Athlete’s foot； 田螺疱
V002-N00572.englishNames: foot dampness qi(tinea pedis); tinea pedis; Foot dampness itch disorder; Tinea pedis
V002-N00572.pinyinNames: jiao shi qi; jiǎo shī qì
V002-N00572.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00572.definition: Characterized by intensely itchy blisters with ulceration, oozing and scaling on the feet. Often results from downward flow of damp heat or living in humid places.

V002-N00570.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00570.label: 脚湿气
V002-N00570.path: 第3部分：皮肤科学｜疾病｜癣
V002-N00570.definition: 发生于足跖趾丫，以趾间浸渍糜烂，渗流滋水，足跖水疱，角化过度，脱屑,瘙痒等为特征的癣。注：相当于足癣。

V002-N00570.label: 脚湿气
V002-N00570.definition: 发生于趾丫，以趾间浸渍糜烂，渗流滋水，角 化过度，脱屑，瘙痒等为主要表现的癣病。

V002-N00570.label: 脚湿气
V002-N00570.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病｜癣
V002-N00570.definition: 因湿热下注，或血虚风燥，兼感邪毒所致。以足丫水疱、浸渍糜烂，自觉剧痒为主要表现的癣病类疾病。

V002-N00570.label: 脚湿气
V002-N00570.englishNames: foot dampness qi(tinea pedis); tinea pedis; Foot dampness itch disorder
V002-N00570.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病｜癣

V002-N00570.label: 脚湿气
V002-N00570.englishNames: foot dampness qi(tinea pedis); tinea pedis; Foot dampness itch disorder
V002-N00570.path: 传统医学疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜皮肤黏膜系统病类

V002-N00577.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00577.label: 紫白癜风
V002-N00577.path: 第3部分：皮肤科学｜疾病｜癣
V002-N00577.definition: 发生于颈项、躯干、四肢近心端等多汗部位，以紫白相兼,有麸皮样鳞屑为特征的癣。

V002-N00577.label: 紫白癜风
V002-N00577.definition: 发生于颈项、躯干、四肢近心端等多汗部位， 呈紫白相兼斑片的癣病。

V002-N00577.label: 汗斑
V002-N00577.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00577.definition: 因热天汗多，邪毒感染所致。以颈肩、胸背等处皮肤出现紫白相兼斑片，表面脱屑为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00577.label: 紫白癜风
V002-N00577.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病｜癣
V002-N00577.definition: 因热天汗多，邪毒感染所致。以颈肩、胸背等处皮肤出现紫白相兼斑片，表面脱屑为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00577.label: 紫白癜风
V002-N00577.englishNames: sweat strain; tinea versicolor; purple vitiligo
V002-N00577.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病｜癣

V002-N00577.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00577.label: 紫白癜风
V002-N00577.englishNames: sweat strain; tinea versicolor; purple vitiligo; Tinea versicolour
V002-N00577.pinyinNames: zi bai dian feng; zǐ bái diàn fēng
V002-N00577.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00577.definition: Characterized by scattered or merged hypopigmentation macules on the neck, shoulder, chest, back and upper arms, coupled with chaff-like scaling. Often results from excess sweating.

V002-N00577.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00577.label: 紫白癜风
V002-N00577.englishNames: tinea versicolor; Tinea Versicolor; purple vitiligo

V002-N00577.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00577.label: 紫白癜风
V002-N00577.englishNames: tinea versicolor; Tinea Versicolor; purple vitiligo
V002-N00577.definition: a non-inflammatory disorder characterized by multiple macular patches of all sizes and shapes, varying from white in pigmented skin to tan or brown in pale skin, usually seen on the neck, trunk and proximal ends of limbs that are apt to sweat

V002-N00567.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00567.label: 白秃疮
V002-N00567.path: 第3部分：皮肤科学｜疾病｜癣
V002-N00567.definition: 以头皮覆盖灰白色鳞屑斑片，毛发折断，发根部有白色鞘膜为特征的癣。

V002-N00567.label: 白秃疮
V002-N00567.definition: 以头皮有圆形或不规则的覆盖灰白色鳞屑 的斑片为主要表现的皮肤病。

V002-N00567.label: 白秃疮
V002-N00567.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病｜癣
V002-N00567.definition: 因剃发感染，风热凝滞所致。以头部脱片状白屑，久则发失光泽、折断，自觉瘙痒为主要表现的皮肤病。

V002-N00567.label: 白秃疮
V002-N00567.englishNames: white bald scalp sore(tinea alba); tinea blanca; tinea capitis
V002-N00567.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病｜癣

V002-N00567.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00567.label: 白秃疮
V002-N00567.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类｜疮癞

V002-N00567.label: 白秃疮
V002-N00567.englishNames: white bald scalp sore(tinea alba); tinea blanca; tinea capitis; White ringworm
V002-N00567.pinyinNames: bai tu chuang; bái tū chuāng
V002-N00567.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00567.definition: Characterized by the presence of dandruff on the scalp. Over time, lustreless, broken hair with itching may occur. It is often caused by wind heat retention after infection during hair cutting.

V002-N00567.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00567.label: 白秃疮
V002-N00567.englishNames: Tinea Capitis; white bald scalp sore(tinea alba); tinea blanca

V002-N00579.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00579.label: 湿疮
V002-N00579.definition: 以多形损害，对称分布，剧烈瘙痒，渗出倾向，反复发作，易成慢性等为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00579.label: 湿疮
V002-N00579.definition: 以对称分布，多形损害，剧烈瘙痒，倾向湿 润，反复发作，易成慢性等为主要表现的过 敏性炎症皮肤病。

V002-N00579.label: 湿疮
V002-N00579.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00579.definition: 湿疮是一种过敏性炎症性皮肤疾患。相当于西医学的湿疹。其特点是：皮损对称分布，多形损害，剧烈瘙痒，有渗出倾向，反复发作，易成慢性等。本病病因病机：由于禀赋不耐，饮食失节，或过食辛辣刺激荤腥动风之物，脾胃受损，失其健运，湿热内生，又兼外受风邪，内外两邪相搏，风湿热邪浸淫肌肤所致。指出本病的发生与心、肺、肝、脾四经又密切的关系。

V002-N00579.englishNames: Dampness sore disorder; eczema; dampness sore
V002-N00579.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00579.label: 湿疮
V002-N00579.englishNames: Dampness sore disorder; eczema; dampness sore
V002-N00579.path: 传统医学疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜皮肤黏膜系统病类

V002-N00581.label: 旋耳疮
V002-N00581.englishNames: eczema of external ear; ear eczema; Ear sore; Ear Eczema; eczema of ear
V002-N00581.pinyinNames: xuan dong chuang; xuan er chuang; xuán ěr chuāng
V002-N00581.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00581.definition: Characterized by skin redness, oozing, ulceration and discharge of bloody pus. In severe cases, it may cause breaking of the ear crease with sharp pain. It is often caused by otitis media or ascending of damp heat along the pathways of the liver, gallbladder and spleen meridians.

V002-N00580.label: 眉疮

V002-N00613.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00613.label: 火赤疮
V002-N00613.path: 第3部分：皮肤科学｜疾病｜天疱疮
V002-N00613.definition: 以皮肤红斑、大疱薄，或水疱成群、呈环状排列,瘙痒难忍为特征的天疱疮。

V002-N00613.label: 火赤疮
V002-N00613.definition: 以皮肤红斑、大疱壁薄，或水疱成群、呈环状 排列，瘙痒难忍为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00613.label: 火赤疮
V002-N00613.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00613.definition: 因心火炽盛，或脾虚湿盛所致。以皮肤红斑、大疱壁薄，或水疱成群、呈环状排列，瘙痒难忍为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00613.label: 火赤疮
V002-N00613.englishNames: redfire ulcers; dermatitis herpetiformis; itching pemphigus; red-fire sore
V002-N00613.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00613.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00613.label: 火赤疮
V002-N00613.englishNames: redfire ulcers; dermatitis herpetiformis; red-fire sore; itching pemphigus; Fire red sore
V002-N00613.pinyinNames: huo chi chuang; huǒ chì chuāng
V002-N00613.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00613.definition: Characterized by intolerably itchy blisters filled with a watery fluid. Often results from exuberant heart fire or internal dampness due to spleen deficiency.

V002-N00606.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00606.label: 水渍疮
V002-N00606.definition: 以长期水湿浸渍，趾(指)间皮肤发白起皱、瘙痒，甚至糜烂疼痛为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00606.label: 水渍疮
V002-N00606.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病

V002-N00618.label: 蝶疮流注
V002-N00618.englishNames: Multiple Metastatic Abscess of Lupus Erythematosus Cutaneous
V002-N00618.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00618.definition: 可能因素体不耐，风热邪毒侵袭等，以致蝶斑疮毒流窜结注，深蕴营血，损害多个脏器及皮肤与关节所致。以发热、蝶斑及全身受害脏器症状为主要表现的流注性疾病。

V002-N00618.label: 蝶疮流注
V002-N00618.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00598.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00598.label: 面游风
V002-N00598.definition: 多发生于面部，以皮肤油腻或干燥,红斑上结黄痂或起白屑，瘙痒为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00598.label: 面游风
V002-N00598.definition: 因皮脂分泌过多引起的慢性、亚急性炎性皮 肤病。

V002-N00598.label: 面游风
V002-N00598.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00598.definition: 面游风是因皮肤油腻，瘙痒潮红，叠起白屑，多发于面部而得名，是发生在皮脂溢出部位的慢性炎症性皮肤病。中医又称“白屑风”。本病相当于西医学的脂溢性皮炎。临床特点是：多发于头部至颜面部，皮肤多脂油腻，出现红斑白屑，脱而复生。本病主要因素体湿热内蕴，感受风邪所致。风热之邪外袭，郁久耗伤阴血，阴伤血燥；或平素血燥之体，复感风热之邪，血虚生风，风热燥邪蕴阻肌肤，肌肤失于濡养而致；或由于恣食肥甘油腻、辛辣之品，以致脾胃运化失常，化湿生热，湿热蕴阻肌肤而成。

V002-N00598.label: 面游风
V002-N00598.englishNames: facial seborrheic dermatitis; seborrheic dermatitis; facial seborrheic eczema; facial wandering wind
V002-N00598.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00598.englishNames: seborrheic dermatitis; Seborrheic  Dermatitis; Seborrheic Eczema; facial seborrheic dermatitis; facial wandering wind

V002-N00628.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00628.label: 手足逆胪
V002-N00628.definition: 以甲际后缘表皮多呈三角形剥离，触之疼痛为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00628.label: 手足逆胪

V002-N00605.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00605.label: 日晒疮
V002-N00605.definition: 以日晒后皮肤出现红斑、丘疹、水疱、脱皮、灼痛瘙痒为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00605.label: 日晒疮
V002-N00605.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00605.definition: 皮肤因日光曝晒所致。以出现红斑、丘疹、水疱、脱皮，灼痛瘙痒为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00605.label: 日晒疮
V002-N00605.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00605.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码

V002-N00615.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00615.label: 猫眼疮
V002-N00615.definition: 以皮肤红斑、丘疹,部分中央有水疱,形如猫眼,光彩闪烁,无脓无血为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00615.label: 猫眼疮
V002-N00615.definition: 以皮肤红癍向周围扩展呈环状，中央水疱似 猫眼虹彩状为主要表现的急性自限性炎症 性皮肤病。

V002-N00615.label: 猫眼疮
V002-N00615.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00615.definition: 猫眼疮是一种以靶形或虹膜状红斑为主，兼有丘疹或疱疹等多形性损害的急性炎症性皮肤病，古时又称之为“雁疮”或“寒疮”。本病相当于西医学的多形性红斑。临床特点是：发病急骤，皮损为红斑、丘疹、水疱等多形性损害，典型皮损有虹膜样特征性红斑，易复发；重症可有严重的黏膜、内脏损害。本病多由素体禀赋不耐，腠理不固，感受不耐之物，搏于肌肤而发；或阳气不足，卫外不固，风寒、风热之邪侵袭肌肤而发；或因过食辛辣肥甘，损伤脾胃，湿浊内生，蕴久化热，湿热蕴阻肌肤而发；或素体湿热内蕴，复感毒邪，热毒内蕴，燔灼营血，以致火毒炽盛，蕴结肌肤而发。

V002-N00615.label: 猫眼疮
V002-N00615.englishNames: cat eye-like sore(erythema multiforme); cat’s eye sore; erythema multiforme; cat eye’s sore; cat-eye sore
V002-N00615.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00615.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00615.label: 猫眼疮

V002-N00615.label: 猫眼疮
V002-N00615.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N00615.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00615.label: 猫眼疮
V002-N00615.englishNames: Cat’s eye-shaped sore; cat eye-like sore(erythema multiforme); cat’s eye sore; erythema multiforme; cat eye’s sore; cat-eye sore; cat's eye sore
V002-N00615.pinyinNames: māo yǎn chuāng; mao yan chuang
V002-N00615.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00615.definition: Characterized by red, cat’s eye-shaped skin rash with rings. It commonly affects the hands and feet. Some individuals may also get it on the lips and genital area. This skin condition often occurs when wind, cold, dampness or heat enters the Ying nutrients and blood phases.

V002-N00615.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00615.label: 猫眼疮
V002-N00615.englishNames: erythema multiforme; Erythema Multiform; Multiform Erythema; cat eye-like sore(erythema multiforme); cat’s eye sore

V002-N00615.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00615.label: 猫眼疮
V002-N00615.englishNames: erythema multiforme; Erythema Multiform; Multiform Erythema; cat eye-like sore(erythema multiforme); cat’s eye sore
V002-N00615.definition: an acute self-limited inflammatory skin disease characterized by sudden onset of erythematous macular, bullous, papular, or vesicular eruption

V002-N00621.label: 乌白癞
V002-N00621.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00621.definition: 因湿热瘀毒结于肤表所致。以皮损部位瘙痒，出现苔癣样或鱼鳞样斑块、表面光滑为主要表现的皮肤疾病。色素沉着者为乌癞；色素减退者为白癞。

V002-N00621.label: 乌白癞
V002-N00621.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00556.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00556.label: 蛇串疮
V002-N00556.definition: 以集簇性水疱等沿身体单侧，断续排列成带,宛如蛇形，四畔が红，伴疼痛为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00556.label: 蛇串疮
V002-N00556.definition: 以成簇水疱沿身体单侧呈带状分布，排列宛 如蛇形，疼痛剧烈为主要表现的急性疱疹性 皮肤病。

V002-N00556.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00556.label: 缠腰火丹
V002-N00556.aliases: 火带疮； 蛇串疮； Serpiginous Belt Eruption
V002-N00556.definition: 皮肤上出现簇集性水泡，呈带状分布，痛如火燎的急性疱疹性皮肤病。其皮损特点常见成簇水疱沿身体一侧呈带状分布，宛如蛇行，皮损最多见于腰肋间。

V002-N00556.label: 蛇串疮
V002-N00556.aliases: 缠腰火丹； 火带疮； 蛇丹； 蜘蛛疮
V002-N00556.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00556.definition: 蛇串疮是一种皮肤上出现成簇水疱，多呈带状分布，痛如火燎的急性疱疹性皮肤病。相当于西医学的带状疱疹。其特点是：皮肤上出现红斑、水疱或丘疱疹，累累如串珠，排列成带状，沿一侧周围神经分布区出现，局部刺痛或伴臖核肿大。本病多发于胸胁部，故又名缠腰火丹，亦称为火带疮、蛇丹、蜘蛛疮等。本病病因病机：由于情志内伤，肝气郁结，久而化火，肝经火毒蕴积，夹风邪上窜头面而发；或夹湿邪下注，发于阴部及下肢；火毒炽盛者多发于躯干。年老体弱者常因血虚肝旺，湿热毒蕴，导致气血凝滞，经络阻塞不通，以致疼痛剧烈，病程迁延。总之，本病初期以湿热火毒为主，后期是正虚血瘀兼夹湿邪为患。

V002-N00556.label: 蛇串疮
V002-N00556.aliases: 蛇丹； 缠腰火丹； 缠腰龙

V002-N00633.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病

Some may also have fever. It is often caused by oral administration, injection or topical application of medications.

V002-N00626.definition: 以足部皮厚增生，其根深嵌入肉里，顶起硬结，形似鸡眼，行走挤压时痛甚为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00626.label: 鸡眼
V002-N00626.definition: 以患处皮厚增生，其根深嵌入肉里，顶起硬 结，形似鸡眼，行走挤压时痛甚为主要表现 的皮肤病。

V002-N00626.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00626.definition: 因足部（亦偶见于手部）长期受挤压、摩擦所致。以患处皮厚增生，其根深嵌入肉里，顶起硬结，形似鸡眼，行走挤压时痛甚为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00626.label: 鸡眼
V002-N00626.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00626.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00626.definition: Characterized by thick, hardened and elevated skin bump that develop in response to repetitive friction and pressure. Corns can be painful when pressed and often develop on the feet and toes (occasionally on the hands and fingers).

V002-N00593.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00593.label: 风热疮
V002-N00593.definition: 以疹色如玫瑰，脱屑似糠秕为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V002-N00593.label: 风热疮
V002-N00593.definition: 癍疹色红如玫瑰，脱屑如糠秕的急性自限性 皮肤病。

V002-N00593.label: 风热疮
V002-N00593.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00593.definition: 风热疮是一种斑疹色红如玫瑰、脱屑如糠秕的急性自限性皮肤病。亦称风痒。相当于西医学的玫瑰糠疹。其特点是初：初发时多在躯干部先出现玫瑰红色母斑，上有糠秕样鳞屑，继则分批出现较多、形态相仿而较小子斑。过食辛辣炙煿，或情志抑郁化火，导致血分蕴热，热伤阴液而化燥生风，复感风热外邪，内外合邪，风热凝滞，郁闭肌肤，闭塞腠理而发病。

V002-N00593.label: 风热疮
V002-N00593.englishNames: windheat sores; pityriasis rosea; wind-heat sore(pityriasis rosea); wind heat-sore
V002-N00593.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V002-N00782.definition: 是指直肠内粘膜上的赘生物。相当于西医的直肠、结肠息肉。是常见的直肠结肠良性肿瘤，可分为单发性和多发性两类，前者多见于儿童，后者多见于青、壮年。若很多息肉积聚在一段或全段大肠者，称息肉病。

Often results from overeating of oily, sweet, hot and spicy food, excessive alcohol drinking, anal tears, deficiency of the lung and spleen, or downward flow of damp heat to affect the anus.

V002-N00785.definition: Characterized by pain, hot and a weight-bearing sensation within the anus that radiates toward the perineum or buttocks after bowel movements, red, swollen anal sinus, and purulent discharge. Often results from dry faeces, diarrhoea, retained faeces in the anal sinus, or downward flow of damp heat.

V002-N00781.definition: 以肛乳头纤维结缔组织增生，可有排便不畅 或下坠感、里急后重感，或见痔核脱出肛外 为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00781.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜肛肠类病｜痔疮｜混合痔

V002-N00774.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00774.definition: Characterized by varicose dilatation of a vein above the dentate line, bloody stools and prolapsed haemorrhoids. Internal haemorrhoids often result from deficiency of the zang–fu organs, an improper diet, sitting or standing for an extended period of time, weight-bearing or constipation.

V002-N00774.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00774.label: 内痔
V002-N00774.englishNames: internal hemorrhoid; Interal Piles; Internal Hemorrhoids

V002-N00774.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00774.label: 内痔
V002-N00774.englishNames: internal hemorrhoid; Interal Piles; Internal Hemorrhoids
V002-N00774.definition: varicose dilatation of a vein of the superior hemorrhoidal plexus, situated proximal to the pectinate line

V002-N00775.label: 翻花痔
V002-N00775.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜肛门直肠疾病｜痔
V002-N00775.definition: 内痔脱出后，因肛门肌肉挛急而不能复位。以痔核充血、水肿、溢水，突出肛门外而不能回复，局部剧痛为主要表现的痔病类疾病。

V002-N00775.label: 翻花痔
V002-N00775.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜肛肠类病｜痔疮｜内痔

V002-N00776.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V002-N00776.label: 外痔
V002-N00776.path: 中医肛肠科学｜肛肠科学疾病
V002-N00776.definition: 生于肛管齿线以下，以肛门异物感或肿痛为主要表现的痔。包括结缔组织性外痔、静脉曲张性外痔和血栓性外痔等。

V002-N00776.label: 外痔
V002-N00776.definition: 生于肛管齿线之下的痔。

V002-N00776.label: 外痔
V002-N00776.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜肛门直肠疾病｜痔
V002-N00776.definition: 是指发生于肛管齿线之下，由痔外静脉丛扩大曲张或痔外静脉破裂或反复炎症纤维增生而成的疾病。其特点是自觉肛门坠胀、疼痛，有异物感。

V002-N00776.label: 外痔
V002-N00776.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜肛肠类病｜痔疮

V002-N00776.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00776.label: 外痔
V002-N00776.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜肛肠科类｜痔疮

V002-N00776.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00776.label: 外痔
V002-N00776.englishNames: external hemorrhoids; external hemorrhoid; External haemorrhoids
V002-N00776.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00776.definition: Characterized by varicose dilatation of a vein below the dentate line, a weight-bearing sensation, pain and a foreign body sensation within the anus. External haemorrhoids often results from downward flow of damp heat or skin friction or tear around the anus.

V002-N00776.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00776.label: 外痔
V002-N00776.englishNames: external hemorrhoid; External Hemorrhoids; External Pile; external hemorrhoids

V002-N00776.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00776.label: 外痔
V002-N00776.englishNames: external hemorrhoid; External Hemorrhoids; External Pile; external hemorrhoids
V002-N00776.definition: varicose dilatation of a vein of the inferior hemorrhoidal plexus, situated distal to the pectinate line

V002-N00779.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00779.label: 葡萄痔
V002-N00779.path: 第4部分：肛肠科学｜疾病｜痔漏｜痔｜狐痔外痔
V002-N00779.definition: 以肛缘血络破裂，血液外溢于肤滕，瘀血凝聚，生成紫黯色形如葡萄状肿物为特征的外痔。

V002-N00779.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V002-N00779.label: 葡萄痔
V002-N00779.path: 中医肛肠科学｜肛肠科学疾病
V002-N00779.definition: 以肛缘血络破裂，血液外溢于肤腠，瘀血凝聚，生成紫黯色形如葡萄状肿物为主要表现的痔。相当于血栓性外痔。

V002-N00779.label: 葡萄痔
V002-N00779.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜肛肠类病｜痔疮｜外痔

V002-N00778.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00778.label: 气痔
V002-N00778.path: 第4部分：肛肠科学｜疾病｜痔漏｜痔｜狐痔外痔
V002-N00778.definition: 以齿线以下的静脉丛发生扩大曲张，肛缘形成柔软静脉团块为特征的外痔。

V002-N00778.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V002-N00778.label: 气痔
V002-N00778.path: 中医肛肠科学｜肛肠科学疾病

V002-N00778.label: 气痔
V002-N00778.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜肛肠类病｜痔疮｜外痔

V002-N00777.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00777.label: 鸡冠痔
V002-N00777.path: 第4部分：肛肠科学｜疾病｜痔漏｜痔｜狐痔外痔
V002-N00777.definition: 由急、慢性炎症反复刺激，以肛缘皮肤发生结缔组织增生、肥大，痔内无曲张静脉丛为特征的外痔。

V002-N00777.label: 皮痔
V002-N00777.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜肛肠类病｜痔疮｜外痔

V002-N00783.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00783.label: 肛裂
V002-N00783.definition: 肛管的皮肤全层纵行裂开并形成溃疡的疾病。

V002-N00783.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V002-N00783.label: 肛裂
V002-N00783.path: 中医肛肠科学｜肛肠科学疾病
V002-N00783.definition: 肛管的皮肤全层纵行裂开并形成感染性溃疡的疾病。

V002-N00783.label: 肛裂
V002-N00783.definition: 以肛门周期性疼痛，即排便时阵发性刀割样 疼痛，便后数分钟缓解，随后又持续剧烈疼 痛可达数小时，伴有习惯性便秘，便时出血 为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00783.label: 肛裂
V002-N00783.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜肛门直肠疾病
V002-N00783.definition: 是指肛管的皮肤全层裂开，并形成溃疡的炎症性疾病。其特点是肛周期性疼痛，出血，便秘。在肛门部疾患中，其发病率仅次于痔疮。

V002-N00783.label: 肛裂
V002-N00783.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜二阴症状｜肛门症状

V002-N00783.aliases: 裂痔； 钩肠痔； 裂肛
V002-N00783.englishNames: anal fissure; Anal fissure; fissured anus; Fissured anus disorder
V002-N00783.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00783.definition: Characterized by a break or tear in the skin of the anal canal. It may cause pain during or after defaecation and bleeding. Often results from heat in the intestine, insufficiency of yin fluids or downward flow of damp heat.

V002-N00641.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00641.label: 疮疡
V002-N00641.path: 第2部分：外科学｜疮疡类疾病
V002-N00641.definition: (1)各种致病因素侵袭人体后引起的体表化脓性疾病。(2)一切体表外科疾患。

V002-N00641.label: 疮疡
V002-N00641.definition: 各种致病因素侵袭人体后引起的体表化脓 性疾病。

V002-N00641.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00641.label: 疮疡
V002-N00641.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医外科疾病
V002-N00641.definition: 指发于皮肉筋骨之间的化脓性外科疾患。常见类型有痈、疽、疔、疖等。广义指一切外科疾病，狭义指体表感染因素引起的化脓性疾病。

V002-N00641.label: 疮疡
V002-N00641.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病
V002-N00641.definition: 是各种致病因素侵袭人体后引起的体表化脓性疾病，包括急性和慢性两大类，是中医外科范围中最普遍最常见的疾病。

V002-N00641.label: 疮疡
V002-N00641.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜皮肤症状

V002-N00641.label: 疮疡
V002-N00641.path: 诊察对象｜望诊对象｜皮肤｜皮损

V002-N00641.label: 疮疡类病
V002-N00641.englishNames: category of carbuncle and ulceration disease
V002-N00641.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语

V002-N00641.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码

V002-N00641.label: 疮疡类病
V002-N00641.englishNames: category of carbuncle and ulceration disease; carbuncle and ulceration diseases; Sores and ulcers
V002-N00641.pinyinNames: chuang yang lei bing; chuāng yáng lèi bìng
V002-N00641.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00641.definition: A collective term for acute or chronic suppurative skin conditions caused by pathogenic fire heat scorching the blood or wind, cold and dampness obstructing the flow of qi and blood. These include furuncles, deep-rooted boils, abscesses, effusion, gangrene, deep abscesses, chalazion, scrofula, shank sores, fistulas and ulcerations.

V002-N00641.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00641.label: 疮疡

V002-N00641.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00641.label: 疮疡
V002-N00641.definition: a general term for suppurative diseases of the body surface

V002-N00749.label: 臖核
V002-N00749.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜疮疡类病

V002-N00766.label: 漏
V002-N00766.definition: 常流脓水，淋漓不断，不能收口的溃疡疮口，是瘘管或窦道的外口。

V002-N00766.label: 漏
V002-N00766.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜皮肤症状
V002-N00766.definition: 常流脓水，淋漓不断，不能收口的溃疡疮口，是瘘管或窦道的外口。

V002-N00766.label: 瘘病
V002-N00766.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜疮疡类病

V002-N00766.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00766.label: 瘘病
V002-N00766.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00766.definition: A group of disorders characterized by delayed wound healing, dribbling of pus or recurrent ulcerations. They often result from deficiency of qi and blood.

V002-N00766.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00766.label: 漏

V002-N00766.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00766.label: 漏
V002-N00766.definition: an abnormal passage leading from an abscess or hollow organ to the body surface

V002-N00767.label: 瘘管
V002-N00767.definition: 体表与内脏或深层组织之间的病理性管道，有内口与外口。

V002-N00767.label: 瘘管
V002-N00767.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡
V002-N00767.definition: 溃疡形成管道，疮孔处流脓经久淋漓不断，体表与脏腔之间相通，具有内口和外口的瘘病类疾病。

V002-N00767.label: 瘘管
V002-N00767.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜疮疡类病｜瘘病

V002-N00767.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00767.label: 瘘管
V002-N00767.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00767.definition: Characterized by an abnormal ulcerative opening that forms from a deep abscess to the surface of the body. Often results from a deficiency of qi and blood, coupled with retention of toxins.

V002-N00768.label: 窦道
V002-N00768.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡
V002-N00768.definition: 是一种只有外口而无内孔相通的病理性盲管。其特点是管道由深部组织通向体表，只有一个外口，与内脏不相通连。多数窦道细而狭长，或直或弯。属中医漏管范畴。

V002-N00768.label: 窦道
V002-N00768.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜皮肤症状｜疮疡

V002-N00768.label: 窦道
V002-N00768.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜疮疡类病｜瘘病

V002-N00768.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00768.label: 窦道
V002-N00768.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V002-N00768.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00768.label: 窦道
V002-N00768.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00768.definition: Characterized by a deep, complicated ulcerative channel that connects with an abscess or suppurating area due to delayed healing of thoracic/abdominal surgical wounds. Often results from a deficiency of qi and blood, coupled with retention of toxins.

V002-N00750.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00750.label: 瘰疬
V002-N00750.path: 第2部分：外科学｜疮疡类疾病｜痨病［外科学］
V002-N00750.definition: 以颈部缓慢出现豆粒大小圆滑肿块，累累如串珠，不红不痛，溃后脓水清稀，夹有败絮状物，易成窦道为主要表现的痨病。

V002-N00750.label: 瘰疬
V002-N00750.path: 外科疾病｜外科其他疾病
V002-N00750.definition: 以颈部缓慢出现豆粒大小圆滑肿块，累累如 串珠，不红不痛，溃后脓水清稀，夹有败絮状 物，易成瘘管为主要表现的结核类疾病。

V002-N00750.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00750.label: 瘰疬
V002-N00750.aliases: 马刀夹瘿； 马刀瘰疬； 湿瘰疬； 鼠疮； 重台瘰疬
V002-N00750.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医外科疾病
V002-N00750.definition: 多因肝郁气滞，痰湿凝聚，或因阴虚火旺，感染痨虫，痰火凝结所致。以颈部缓慢出现豆粒大小圆滑肿块、累累如串珠、不红不痛、溃后脓水清稀、夹有败絮状物、易成瘘管为主要表现的痨病类疾病。

V002-N00750.label: 瘰疬
V002-N00750.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡
V002-N00750.definition: 是指多发生在颈部的慢性炎症性疾病。因其结核累累如贯珠之状，故名瘰疠。相当于西医的颈部淋巴结结核。其特点是多见于体弱儿童或青年，好发于颈部及耳后，病程进展缓慢。初起时结核如豆，不痛不红，缓缓增大，融合成串，溃后脓水清稀，夹有败絮样物，此愈彼溃，经久难敛，形成窦道，愈后形成凹陷性疤痕。

V002-N00750.label: 瘰疬
V002-N00750.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜颈项症状

V002-N00750.label: 瘰疬
V002-N00750.aliases: 马刀夹瘿； 马刀瘰疬； 湿瘰疬； 鼠疮； 重台瘰疬
V002-N00750.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜疮疡类病

V002-N00750.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00750.label: 瘰疬
V002-N00750.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N00750.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00750.label: 瘰疬
V002-N00750.aliases: 马刀夹瘿； 马刀瘰疬； 湿瘰疬； 鼠疮； 重台瘰疬
V002-N00750.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00750.definition: Characterized by localized smooth, bead-like lumps that are neither reddish nor painful. These lumps may cause discharge of thin, clear pus and form sinuses or fistulas. Often results from yin deficiency of the lung and kidney, liver qi stagnation transforming into fire, or retention of turbid phlegm. Alternatively, it may also occur as a result of fire hyperactivity due to yin deficiency, tuberculosis and phlegm fire retention in the neck, armpit and hip.

V002-N00741.path: 第2部分：外科学｜疮疡类疾病
V002-N00741.definition: 以脓肿好发于肌肉深部，漫肿疼痛，皮色如常，此处未愈，他处又发为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00741.label: 流注
V002-N00741.definition: 发于肌肉深部的多发性脓肿。

V002-N00741.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡

V002-N00741.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡
V002-N00741.definition: 是发于肌肉深部的多发性脓肿。相当于西医的脓血症、肌肉深部脓肿和髂窝脓肿。其特点是初起漫肿疼痛，皮色如常，好发于四肢、躯干肌肉丰厚的深处，常此处未愈他处又起。

V002-N00758.definition: 发生于小腿下三分之一处的皮肤和肌肉间， 经久不易收口，既敛又每因碰撞而复发为主 要表现的慢性疮疡类疾病。

V002-N00758.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表

V002-N00758.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡
V002-N00758.definition: 因小腿皮肤破损染毒，湿热下注，或瘀久化热等所致。发生于小腿下三分之一处的皮肤和肌肉间，经久不易收口，即敛又每因碰撞而复发为主要表现的慢性疮疡类疾病。

V002-N00758.label: 臁疮
V002-N00758.aliases: 裤口疮； 裤口毒； 烂腿； 老烂脚； 裙边疮； 裙风
V002-N00758.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜外伤性疾病与周围血管疾病
V002-N00758.definition: 是指发生在小腿下部的慢性溃疡。又称裤口毒、裙边疮。其特点是溃疡发生前患部有长期皮肤瘀斑、粗糙表现，溃疡发生后疮面经久不能愈合，或溃疡愈合后易因损伤而复发。

V002-N00758.label: 臁疮
V002-N00758.englishNames: shank sore; chronic shank ulcer; ecthyma; chronic ulcer of shank; Chronic Ulcer of Shank

V002-N00650.definition: 好发于颜面、四肢，以形小根深，坚硬如钉， 肿痛灼热，反应剧烈，易于走黄、损筋伤骨为 主要表现的疮疡。

V002-N00673.label: 疔疮走黄
V002-N00673.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡｜疔疮
V002-N00673.definition: 因疔疮火毒炽盛，早期失治未能及时控制，或因挤压等，使邪毒走散入血，内攻脏腑所致。以原发病灶疮顶陷黑无脓、肿势散漫、迅速向周围扩散，并有寒战高热、烦躁、甚至神昏谵语等全身症状的疔疮类疾病。

V002-N00673.pinyinNames: dīng chuāng zǒu huáng; ding chuang zou huang
V002-N00673.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00673.definition: Characterized by swollen sores or ulcers that rapidly spread over the surrounding area. The sores/ulcers appear black on the top and contain no pus. Systemic symptoms include chills, high fever, restlessness, unconsciousness and delirium. Often results from delayed treatment of boils or toxins entering the blood and zang–fu organs upon squeezing.

V002-N00651.definition: Characterized by rapid occurrence of solid, deep-rooted boils on the face that are shaped like nails and the same size as millets. They often result from exposure to toxic fire heat, insect bites, skin lesion or localized stagnation of qi and blood. Squeezing a boil may cause serious complications.

V002-N00671.definition: 是发于四肢呈红丝显露，迅速向上走窜的急性感染性疾病。可伴恶寒发热等全身症状，邪毒重者可内攻脏腑，发生走黄。相当于西医的急性淋巴管炎。

V002-N00674.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00674.label: 炭疽
V002-N00674.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00674.definition: An infectious disease characterized by skin lesion that eventually forms an ulcer with an eschar and surrounding swelling. This condition may also affect the lungs, intestines, brain and other parts of the body. The bacterium Bacillus anthracis may enter the body via the skin, mouth or nose and cause qi and blood to stagnate. Often results from contact with infected animals, handling infectious animal products or ingestion of undercooked foods of (infectious) animal origin.

V002-N00674.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00674.label: 疫疔
V002-N00674.englishNames: cutaneous anthrax; pestilent ding; Cutaneous anthrax; pestilent boil; pestilent furuncle
V002-N00674.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00674.definition: Characterized by skin blisters with eschar (a black centre), surrounding swelling and necrotic tissues. It may also cause systemic symptoms involving the lung, intestines and brain. Contributing factors may include handling contaminated hair products of infected animals and ingestion of undercooked meat of infected animals.

V002-N00674.definition: an infectious disease characterized by small pruritic papular lesions of the head, face and limbs, which enlarge, ulcerate, discharge bloody serum, associated with severe systemic symptoms such as septicemia, high fever, vomiting, sweating, headache

It includes cervical abscess, gluteal abscess, abscess of the calf and effusions on the back of the hands/feet.

V002-N00703.definition: Characterized by localized red, swollen, warm and painful sores/ulcers that are soft and headless. They may form pus that is easy to rupture and easy to heal. Often occurs when toxic heat affects qi and blood. A large abscess is known as an effusion.

V002-N00712.englishNames: [headed]carbuncle; headed carbuncle (carbuncle); headed gangrene; carbuncle; Carbuncle; ［headed］ carbuncle
V002-N00712.pinyinNames: you tou ju; yǒu tóu jū
V002-N00712.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00712.definition: Characterized by a cluster of red, swollen, warm and painful boils filled with purulent exudate. They may spread to deeper and surrounding areas that resemble a honeycomb (>9cm or even >30cm in diameter). In severe cases, it may cause inward collapse of abscess toxins. Carbuncles often result from stagnation of qi and blood in the skin due to external contraction of wind heat, damp heat and toxic fire.

V002-N00732.label: 附骨疽
V002-N00732.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡｜疽｜无头疽
V002-N00732.definition: 是一种毒邪深沉、附骨而生的化脓性疾病，生在大腿外侧者。

V002-N00732.label: 附骨疽
V002-N00732.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡｜疽｜无头疽
V002-N00732.definition: 是一种毒邪深袭，附着于骨的化脓性疾病。相当于西医的急、慢性化脓性骨髓炎。其特点是多发于四肢长骨，局部胖肿，附筋着骨，推之不移，疼痛彻骨，溃后脓水淋漓，不易收口，可成窦道，损伤筋骨。

V002-N00735.definition: 生于髋部环跳穴处，以漫肿疼痛，影响髋关节活动，全身症状严重，溃脓难收，并易致残为特征的无头疽。

V002-N00735.label: 环跳疽
V002-N00735.definition: 生于髋部环跳穴处，以漫肿疼痛，影响髋关 节活动，全身症状严重，溃脓难收，并易致残 为主要表现的无头疽。

V002-N00735.label: 环跳疽

V002-N00735.definition: 是指发生在髋关节的急性化脓性疾病。相当于西医的化脓性髋关节炎。其特点是好发于儿童，局部漫肿疼痛，影响关节屈伸活动，全身症状严重，溃脓后难以收敛，容易造成残废。

V002-N00686.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡｜痈
V002-N00686.definition: 多因心脾湿热、火毒，结于脐中，或因脐部抓搔染毒所致。生于脐部的痈病类疾病。

V002-N00686.label: 脐痈
V002-N00686.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡｜痈
V002-N00686.definition: 是指生于脐部的急性化脓性疾病。本病溃后能较快收口愈合者，乃属痈范围，相当于西医的脐炎。若溃后久不收敛，甚至成瘘者，相当于西医的脐肠管异常、脐尿管异常继发感染。其特点是初起脐部微肿，渐大如瓜，脓稠无臭则易敛，脓水臭秽则可成漏。

V002-N00686.label: 脐痈
V002-N00686.englishNames: umbilical carbuncle; umbilical abscess; Umbilical Carbuncle; umbilical carbuncle (omphalitis)
V002-N00686.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜疮疡类病｜痈

V002-N00686.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM

V002-N00686.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00686.definition: Characterized by abscess formation in the umbilical region. Often occurs when damp heat and toxic fire remain in the umbilicus. It may also be secondary to infection upon scratch.

V002-N00686.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准

V002-N00765.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00765.label: 青筋腿
V002-N00765.path: 第2部分：外科学｜周围血管疾病
V002-N00765.definition: 以下肢出现浅静脉明显怒张、迁曲，如蚯蚓状为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00765.label: 青筋腿
V002-N00765.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜外伤性疾病与周围血管疾病
V002-N00765.definition: 多因久站久立，气虚血瘀，或外受寒湿，气血凝滞，筋脉怒张所致。以下肢内侧于站立时出现青筋隆起如蚯蚓状为主要表现的脉管疾病。

V002-N00765.label: 青筋腿
V002-N00765.englishNames: varicose vein of leg; legs with varicosis
V002-N00765.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜疮疡类病

V002-N00765.label: 青筋腿
V002-N00765.englishNames: varicose vein of leg; legs with varicosis; Varicose veins of the leg
V002-N00765.pinyinNames: qing jin tui; qīng jīn tuǐ
V002-N00765.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00765.definition: Characterized by enlarged and twisted (like an earthworm) veins when standing. Often results from standing for an extended period of time, blood stasis due to qi deficiency, or stagnation of qi and blood due to external contraction of cold dampness.

V002-N00747.definition: 以不明原因所致的体表局部骤发肿痛为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00747.label: 无名肿毒
V002-N00747.englishNames: Innominate Swelling and Pain; Innominate Toxic Swelling; Pyogenic Infections
V002-N00747.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡
V002-N00747.definition: 多因外感风邪，或寒热客于经络所致。以体表局部骤发肿痛为主要表现的疮疡类病变。

V002-N00747.label: 无名肿毒

V002-N00747.pinyinNames: wu ming zhong er; wu ming zhong dong

V002-N00762.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00762.label: 脱疽
V002-N00762.path: 第2部分：外科学｜周围血管疾病
V002-N00762.definition: 发生于四肢末端,以局部疼痛、坏死,严重时趾(指)节坏死脱落为主要的慢性周围血管疾病。

V002-N00762.label: 脱疽
V002-N00762.path: 外科疾病｜外科其他疾病
V002-N00762.definition: 发生于四肢末端，严重时趾（指）节坏疽脱落 的一种慢性周围血管疾病。

V002-N00762.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00762.label: 脱疽
V002-N00762.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡
V002-N00762.definition: 因先天不足，正气虚弱，寒湿之邪侵袭，瘀阻脉络，气血不畅，甚或痹阻不通所致。以初起肢冷麻木、后期趾节坏死脱落、黑腐溃烂、疮口经久不愈为主要表现的脉管疾病。

V002-N00762.label: 脱疽
V002-N00762.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜外伤性疾病与周围血管疾病
V002-N00762.definition: 是发于四肢末端，严重时趾（指）节坏疽脱落的一种慢性周围血管疾病。又称为脱骨疽，其特点是好发于四肢末节，下肢多于上肢。初期患肢末端发凉、怕冷、苍白、麻木，可伴间歇性跛行，继则疼痛剧烈，日久患趾（指）坏死发黑，甚至趾（指）节脱落。

V002-N00762.label: 脱疽
V002-N00762.englishNames: Gangrene disorder; digital gangrene; Gangrene of Digit; toe or finger gangrene; gangrene; gangrene of digit
V002-N00762.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜疮疡类病

V002-N00762.label: 脱疽
V002-N00762.englishNames: Gangrene disorder; digital gangrene; Gangrene of Digit; toe or finger gangrene; gangrene; gangrene of digit
V002-N00762.path: 传统医学疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜皮肤黏膜系统病类

V002-N00762.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00762.label: 脱疽
V002-N00762.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V002-N00762.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00762.label: 脱疽
V002-N00762.englishNames: Digital gangrene; Gangrene disorder; digital gangrene; Gangrene of Digit; toe or finger gangrene; gangrene; gangrene of digit
V002-N00762.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00762.definition: Characterized by limb coldness, numbness and sudden pain during walking, followed by intermittent claudication, severe pain, a change in skin colour to red or black, and eventually toe/finger necrosis. Often results from deficiency of anti-pathogenic qi, cold retention and blood stasis due to yang deficiency, toxic heat retention due to yin deficiency, or stagnation of qi and blood.

V002-N00762.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00762.label: 脱疽
V002-N00762.aliases: BWC200； 脱骨疽； Finger Toe Gangrene
V002-N00762.englishNames: digital gangrene; Gangrene of Digit; gangrene of digit

V002-N00762.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00762.label: 脱疽
V002-N00762.aliases: BWC200； 脱骨疽； Finger Toe Gangrene
V002-N00762.englishNames: digital gangrene; Gangrene of Digit; gangrene of digit
V002-N00762.definition: gangrene of the extremities, especially referring to thromboangiitis

V002-N00746.path: 第2部分：外科学｜疮疡类疾病
V002-N00746.definition: 以颐颌肿胀疼痛，张口受限，伴发热为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00746.label: 发颐
V002-N00746.definition: 以颐颌肿胀疼痛、张口受限、伴有高热为主 要表现的疮疡类疾病。

V002-N00746.label: 发颐
V002-N00746.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡
V002-N00746.definition: 是指热性病后余毒结聚于颐颌之间的急性化脓性疾病。相当于西医的急性化脓性腮腺炎。其特点是颐颌间肿胀能，张口受限，全身症状明显，病势严重者常可出现内陷变证。

V002-N00746.label: 发颐
V002-N00746.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜疮疡类病

V002-N00746.label: 发颐
V002-N00746.definition: inflammation of the parotid gland associated with suppuration

V002-N00793.label: 生殖病类术语
V002-N00793.pinyinNames: sheng zhi bing lei shu yu

V002-N00794.label: 男性生殖病
V002-N00794.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语

V002-N00794.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00794.label: 男性生殖病
V002-N00794.englishNames: Male genital disorders; male reproductive diseases; category of male reproductive disease
V002-N00794.pinyinNames: nan xing sheng zhi bing; nán xìng shēng zhí bìng
V002-N00794.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00794.definition: A group of male reproductive dysfunctions due to congenital development, postnatal malnutrition, sexual indulgence or consumption of qi, blood, yin and yang due to chronic conditions. These include disorders of the male external genitalia, sterility, and sperm disorders.

V002-N00795.label: 男性前阴类病
V002-N00795.pinyinNames: nan xing qian yin lei bing
V002-N00795.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜男性生殖病

V002-N00795.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00795.label: 男性前阴类病
V002-N00795.englishNames: Disorders of the male external genitalia; male genital diseases; category of genital disease
V002-N00795.pinyinNames: nan xing qian yin lei bing; nán xìng qián yīn lèi bìng
V002-N00795.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00795.definition: A group of disorders of the male external genitalia caused by congenital underdevelopment, trauma, damp heat affecting the testis or scrotum or the liver meridian, or toxic phlegm accumulating in the external genitalia.

V002-N00797.label: 子痈
V002-N00797.path: 外科疾病｜外科其他疾病
V002-N00797.definition: 以睾丸肿痛为主要表现的痈。

V002-N00797.label: 子痈
V002-N00797.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜泌尿、男性前阴病
V002-N00797.definition: 是指睾丸及附睾的化脓性疾病

V002-N00797.label: 子痈
V002-N00797.englishNames: testicle carbuncle; epididymitis and orchitis; testicular abscess; epididy mitis and orchitis
V002-N00797.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜男性生殖病｜男性前阴类病

V002-N00797.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00797.label: 子痈
V002-N00797.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜男科类

V002-N00797.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00797.label: 子痈
V002-N00797.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类｜痈

V002-N00797.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00797.label: 子痈
V002-N00797.englishNames: testicle carbuncle; epididymitis and orchitis; testicular abscess; epididy mitis and orchitis; Inflammatory infection of the testis and epididymis
V002-N00797.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00797.definition: Characterized by testicle swelling and tenderness. Alternatively, individuals may experience dull pain in the scrotum of the affected side that radiates to the groin, coupled with a weight-bearing sensation or fever. Often occurs when damp heat, phlegm and stagnant blood retain in the testis or epididymis. Contributing factors may include damp heat or cold dampness affecting the testicle, improper diet (e.g. overeating of hot, spicy or oily food), sexual indulgence, liver qi stagnation transforming into fire or trauma.

V002-N00797.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00797.label: 子痈

V002-N00798.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00798.label: 急性子痈
V002-N00798.englishNames: acute testicular abscess;acute epididymitis and orchitis
V002-N00798.path: 第2部分：外科学｜泌尿生殖系统疾病｜子痛
V002-N00798.definition: 以急起恶寒发热，肾子(睾丸和附睾)肿痛、灼热，阴囊皮肤紧张光亮为特征的子痈。

V002-N00798.label: 急性子痈
V002-N00798.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜泌尿、男性前阴病｜子痈
V002-N00798.definition: 因湿热下注厥阴之络，气滞血凝所致。以急起恶寒发热，肾子肿痛，灼热，阴囊皮肤紧张光亮，化脓或不化脓为主要表现的痈病类疾病

V002-N00798.label: 急性子痈
V002-N00798.englishNames: acute testicular abscess; acute epididymitis and orchitis; acute scrotal carbuncle
V002-N00798.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜男性生殖病｜男性前阴类病｜子痈

V002-N00799.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00799.label: 慢性子痈
V002-N00799.englishNames: chronic testicular abscess;chronic epididymitis and orchitis
V002-N00799.path: 第2部分：外科学｜泌尿生殖系统疾病｜子痛
V002-N00799.definition: 以慢性发作,肾子(睾丸和附睾)仅有硬结、疼痛不著、不红不热,病程较长,溃后脓稀为特征的子痈。

V002-N00799.label: 慢性子痈
V002-N00799.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜泌尿、男性前阴病｜子痈
V002-N00799.definition: 因肝肾阴亏，痰湿凝聚所致，或由急性子痈转变而成。以慢性发作，肾子仅有硬结，疼痛不著，不红不热，病程较长，溃后脓稀为主要表现的痈病类疾病

V002-N00799.label: 慢性子痈
V002-N00799.englishNames: chronic testicular abscess; chronic epididymitis and orchitis; chronic scrotal carbuncle
V002-N00799.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜男性生殖病｜男性前阴类病｜子痈

V002-N00805.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00805.label: 子痰
V002-N00805.path: 第2部分：外科学｜泌尿生殖系统疾病

V002-N00805.label: 子痰
V002-N00805.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜泌尿、男性前阴病
V002-N00805.definition: 是发生于附睾部，属于疮痨性质的慢性化脓性疾病。中医文献称肾漏、穿囊漏。其特点是患病的附睾逐渐增大，但无明显疼痛，无明显发热。

V002-N00805.label: 子痰
V002-N00805.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜男性生殖病｜男性前阴类病

V002-N00805.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00805.label: 子痰
V002-N00805.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜男科类

V002-N00805.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00805.label: 子痰
V002-N00805.englishNames: tuberculosis of epididymis; Tuberculosis of the testicle
V002-N00805.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00805.definition: Characterized by slowly progressive and painless lumps on the testicle. Over time, pus discharge upon rupture may be present. Often results from deficiency of healthy qi, insufficiency of the liver and kidney and retention of turbid phlegm in the testicle.

V002-N00805.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00805.label: 子痰
V002-N00805.englishNames: Tuberculosis Of  Epididymis; tuberculosis of epididymis

V002-N00796.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00796.label: 子隐
V002-N00796.path: 第2部分：外科学｜泌尿生殖系统疾病｜不育［外科学］
V002-N00796.definition: 以阴囊一侧或双侧未触及睾丸为主要表现的男性前阴疾病。

V002-N00796.label: 子隐
V002-N00796.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜泌尿、男性前阴病
V002-N00796.definition: 因先天不足所致。以阴囊一侧或双侧未触及睾丸为主要表现的男性前阴疾病。

V002-N00796.label: 子隐
V002-N00796.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜男性生殖病｜男性前阴类病

V002-N00796.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00796.label: 子隐
V002-N00796.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00796.definition: A condition that testis on one or both sides is/are not palpable. Often occurs as a result of congenital anomaly.

V002-N00803.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00803.label: 肾囊风
V002-N00803.path: 第3部分：皮肤科学｜疾病｜湿疮
V002-N00803.definition: 发生于阴囊部，以红斑、丘疹、渗出、肥厚，伴有瘙痒等为特征的湿疮。

V002-N00803.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00803.label: 绣球风
V002-N00803.definition: 因肝经湿热下注，风邪外袭所致。以阴囊皮肤潮红、起疹、湿润或有渗液，剧烈瘙痒，痛如火燎为主要表现的湿疮类疾病。

V002-N00803.definition: 因肝经湿热下注，风邪外袭所致。以阴囊皮肤潮红、起疹、湿润或有渗液，剧烈瘙痒，痛如火燎为主要表现的湿疮类疾病。

V002-N00803.label: 阴囊瘙痒
V002-N00803.aliases: 绣球风； 阴囊风； 阴下湿痒
V002-N00803.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜瘙痒
V002-N00803.definition: 属于二阴症状。是指阴囊皮肤瘙痒异常而言。

V002-N00803.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜男性生殖病｜男性前阴类病
