V002-N00307.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00307.label: 反胃［病］
V002-N00307.definition: 以皖腹痞胀，朝食暮吐，暮食朝吐，甚或食入不久即吐为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00307.label: 反胃
V002-N00307.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N00307.definition: 同饮食不当、饥饱无常，或嗜食生冷，或忧愁思虑，损伤脾阳，脾胃虚寒，不能腐熟水谷。症见饮食入胃，宿谷不化，经过良久，由胃反出的病证。

V002-N00307.label: 反胃病
V002-N00307.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00307.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00307.label: 反胃
V002-N00307.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N00307.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00307.label: 反胃病
V002-N00307.pinyinNames: fan wei bing; fǎn wèi bìng
V002-N00307.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00307.definition: Characterized by vomiting in the evening of food eaten in the morning and vomiting in the morning of food eaten in the evening. In severe cases, vomiting immediately after eating, gastric stuffiness, abdominal distension and indigestion may be present. Often results from an upward flow of rebellious stomach qi due to chronic gastrointestinal conditions, surgery, abdominal tumour or retention of food and phlegm in the stomach.

V002-N00307.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00307.label: 胃反

V002-N00308.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00308.label: 噎膈
V002-N00308.definition: 以吞咽不利，饮食梗塞难下为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00308.label: 噎膈
V002-N00308.definition: 以吞咽不顺，饮食梗塞难下为主要表现的疾 病。

V002-N00308.label: 吞食梗塞
V002-N00308.definition: 吞咽食物时梗噎不顺，甚或隔阻不通的表现。

V002-N00308.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00308.label: 噎膈
V002-N00308.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜脾胃病
V002-N00308.definition: 吞咽不顺、饮食梗塞难下的症状，常见于食管病变。

V002-N00308.label: 噎膈
V002-N00308.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N00308.definition: 由七情内伤、酒食不节、久病年老致气痰瘀交阻，津气耗伤，胃失通降而发本病。症见吞咽食物哽咽不顺，饮食难下，或食而复出的疾患。

V002-N00308.label: 噎膈病
V002-N00308.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00308.label: 噎膈
V002-N00308.path: 传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾系病类

V002-N00308.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00308.label: 噎膈病
V002-N00308.pinyinNames: ye ge bing; yē gé bìng
V002-N00308.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00308.definition: Characterized by difficulty in swallowing, vomiting immediately after eating food or inability to swallow solid food (a feeling of food stuck or held up before it either passes into the stomach or is regurgitated). Often occurs when phlegm qi stagnation (plum pit qi), stagnant fire, blood stasis or cancer toxin obstructs the oesophagus.

V002-N00308.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00308.label: 噎膈

V002-N00308.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00308.label: 吞食梗塞
V002-N00308.englishNames: blockage when swallowing; blockage in deglutition

V002-N00308.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00308.label: 吞食梗塞
V002-N00308.englishNames: blockage when swallowing; blockage in deglutition
V002-N00308.definition: difficulty or even inability to swallow

V002-N00320.label: 类霍乱
V002-N00320.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N00320.definition: 因食入含有邪毒的食物，或因寒湿暑热等邪内侵，使胃肠气机紊乱，运化失常所致。以突发腹痛，呕吐，腹泻为主要表现的胃肠疾病。

V002-N00320.label: 类霍乱
V002-N00320.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00320.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00320.label: 类霍乱
V002-N00320.pinyinNames: lei huo luan; lèi huò luàn
V002-N00320.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00320.definition: An acute condition characterized by sudden abdominal pain, vomiting and diarrhoea. Often results from stomach/intestine qi disorder due to ingestion of contaminated food or exposure to summer (damp) heat or cold dampness.

V002-N00346.label: 肠郁
V002-N00346.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N00346.definition: 因情志不舒，气机郁滞，使肠道运化失常。以腹痛、腹泻或便秘为常见表现的郁病类疾病。

V002-N00346.label: 肠郁
V002-N00346.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00346.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00346.label: 肠郁
V002-N00346.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00346.definition: Characterized by abdominal pain and alternating diarrohea with constipation. The symptoms are closely associated with fluctuating emotions. Often results from qi stagnation due to emotional disturbance.

V002-N00340.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00340.label: 膈疝
V002-N00340.definition: 以胃体逆入胸膈，皖膈部痞胀疼痛，呕吐等为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00340.label: 膈疝
V002-N00340.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N00340.definition: 因痰气阻滞，胃失和降，进而使部分胃体逆入胸膈，壅塞气机。以脘膈部痞胀疼痛，呕吐等为主要表现的疝病类疾病。

V002-N00340.label: 膈疝
V002-N00340.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00340.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00340.label: 膈疝
V002-N00340.englishNames: diaphragm hernia; disphragmatic hernia; diaphragmatic hernia; Diaphragmatic hernia
V002-N00340.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00340.definition: Characterized by sudden distension and pain in the diaphragmatic area and severe vomiting. It results either from congenital defect or postnatal injuries.

V002-N00335.label: 脾胀
V002-N00335.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00335.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00335.label: 脾胀
V002-N00335.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00335.definition: Characterized by abdominal distension, discomfort of the four limbs, body heaviness, and splashing sound in the abdomen. A poor appetite, hiccups, restlessness and insomnia may also be present. Often occurs when cold damp affects the transportation and transformation of the spleen.

V002-N00324.label: 饥疝
V002-N00324.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00324.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00324.label: 饥疝
V002-N00324.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00324.definition: Characterized by rapid hunger after eating food, followed by stomach ache that alleviates with eating food or warmth. Often results from cold qi retention in the stomach and heart meridians due to constitutional yang deficiency or ingestion of raw, cold food.

V002-N00328.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00328.label: 胃痞
V002-N00328.definition: 以胃皖部痞塞、满闷不舒，触之无形、按之柔软、压之无痛，纳食减少为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00328.label: 胃胀
V002-N00328.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N00328.definition: 因胃病日久，脾胃失健，或湿浊痰瘀内蕴，阻滞气机所致。以长期脘腹痞胀作痛、嘈杂，或有浮肿等为主要表现的内脏胀[著]病类疾病。

V002-N00328.label: 心下痞
V002-N00328.aliases: 脘闷； 脘痞； 脘痞堵闷； 脘胀； 胃堵闷； 胃脘部堵塞感； 胃脘部胀满； 胃脘堵闷； 胃脘痞满； 胃脘痞闷； 胃脘痞胀； 胃脘胀满； 胃胀； 心下急； 心下急满； 心下坚； 心下满； 心下痞硬
V002-N00328.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜痞满
V002-N00328.definition: 自觉心下胃脘部满闷堵塞、按之却柔软不痛的表现。

V002-N00328.label: 胃胀病
V002-N00328.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00328.label: 胃胀
V002-N00328.path: 传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾系病类

V002-N00328.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00328.label: 胃胀病
V002-N00328.pinyinNames: wei zhang bing; wèi zhàng bìng
V002-N00328.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00328.definition: Characterized by persistent stomach stuffiness, distension, pain and discomfort. Associated symptoms include acid reflux and oedema. Often results from dysfunctional spleen and stomach or internal turbid phlegm obstructing the flow of qi.

V002-N00349.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00349.label: 肠痈
V002-N00349.path: 第2部分：外科学｜其他｜内痈

V002-N00349.label: 肠痈
V002-N00349.path: 外科疾病｜外科其他疾病
V002-N00349.definition: 以发热，右少腹疼痛拘急，或触及包块为主 要表现的疾病。

V002-N00349.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00349.label: 肠痈
V002-N00349.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡｜痈
V002-N00349.definition: 因热毒内聚，淤结肠中，而生痈成脓。以发热、右少腹疼痛拘急，或触及包块为主要表现的内脏痈病类疾病。

V002-N00349.label: 肠痈
V002-N00349.englishNames: Acute Appendicitis; Intestinal Abscess; Intestinal Carbuncle
V002-N00349.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜其他外科疾病
V002-N00349.definition: 因热毒内聚，淤结肠中，而生痈成脓。以发热，右少腹疼痛拘急，或触及包块为主要表现的内脏痈病类疾病。

V002-N00349.label: 肠痈
V002-N00349.englishNames: intestinal abscess; Intestinal abscess disorder; Acute Appendicitis; acute appendicitis
V002-N00349.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00349.label: 肠痈
V002-N00349.englishNames: intestinal abscess; Intestinal abscess disorder; Acute Appendicitis; acute appendicitis
V002-N00349.path: 传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾系病类

V002-N00349.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00349.label: 肠痈
V002-N00349.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V002-N00349.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00349.label: 肠痈
V002-N00349.englishNames: intestinal abscess; Intestinal abscess; Intestinal abscess disorder; Acute Appendicitis; acute appendicitis
V002-N00349.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00349.definition: Characterized by fever, right lower abdominal pain and contracture, abdominal tenderness or palpable lumps. Often results from toxic heat accumulating in the intestines.

V002-N00349.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00349.label: 肠痈
V002-N00349.englishNames: intestinal abscess; Acute Appendicitis; acute appendicitis
V002-N00349.definition: a localized pyogenic inflammation of the intestine, referring to acute appendicitis

V002-N00347.label: 肠痹
V002-N00347.englishNames: Syndrome Affecting Large and Small Intestines with Abdominal Distention and Diarrhea; Syndrome Caused by Stagnation of Intestine-energy
V002-N00347.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N00347.definition: 多由腹部手术后，或因肠道、腹部的病变，或是全身疾患、瘫痪等的影响，使肠体麻痹，气机不通所致。以腹胀如鼓，腹痛，呕吐，便秘，无肠鸣、矢气为主要表现的内脏痹病类疾病。

V002-N00347.label: 肠痹
V002-N00347.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00347.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00347.label: 肠痹
V002-N00347.englishNames: intestinal impediment; Functional intestinal obstruction; intestinal painful impediment
V002-N00347.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00347.definition: Characterized by polydipsia, dysuria, diarrhoea and abdominal distension/pain. Often occurs when wind, cold and dampness obstructs the flow of intestinal qi and water.

V002-N00347.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00347.label: 肠痹

V002-N00342.label: 食管痹
V002-N00342.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N00342.definition: 多因饮食不慎，情志失调，或因食管受损后形成瘢痕等，导致气机阻滞，胃气上逆。以间歇性进食梗塞，呕吐为主要表现的内脏痹病类疾病。

V002-N00342.label: 食管痹
V002-N00342.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00342.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00342.label: 食管痹
V002-N00342.pinyinNames: shi guan bi; shí guǎn bì
V002-N00342.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00342.definition: Characterized by intermittent dysphagia and vomiting. Contributing factors may include improper diet, emotional disturbance or damage to the oesophagus. These factors cause qi stagnation and ascending of stomach qi.

V002-N00341.label: 食管瘅
V002-N00341.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N00341.definition: 因染受邪毒，或因刺激性饮食及毒品的损伤，或因郁热内蕴，以及长期胃气上逆等，使食管受损，脉络瘀滞。以胸骨后灼热感与疼痛、嘈杂等为主要表现的内脏瘅[热]病类疾病。

V002-N00341.label: 食管瘅
V002-N00341.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00341.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00341.label: 食管瘅
V002-N00341.pinyinNames: shi guan dan; shí guǎn dān
V002-N00341.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00341.definition: Characterized by chest pain behind the sternum with a burning sensation, stomach discomfort and acid reflux. Contributing factors may include exposure to pathogenic factors/ irritating/drugs, internal heat or a prolonged ascending of rebellious stomach qi.

V002-N00351.label: 萎黄病
V002-N00351.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00351.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00351.label: 萎黄病
V002-N00351.pinyinNames: wei huang bing; wěi huáng bìng
V002-N00351.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00351.definition: Characterized by dry, sallow complexion, pale eyelids and finger/toe nails, dizziness and fatigue. Chapped lips, poor memory and difficulty concentrating may be present. Contributing factors may include malnutrition, weakness of the spleen and stomach, food retention, parasites or heavy menstruation.

V002-N00309.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00309.label: 卒腹痛
V002-N00309.definition: 以突发腹部剧痛，难以忍受为主要表现的危急重病。

V002-N00309.label: 卒腹痛
V002-N00309.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00309.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00309.label: 卒腹痛
V002-N00309.englishNames: sudden abdominal pain; Sudden abdominal pain
V002-N00309.pinyinNames: zu fu tong; cù fù tòng
V002-N00309.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00309.definition: Characterized by sudden intolerable and progressively aggravated abdominal pain or colic. Contributing factors may include stagnant qi and blood in the stomach and intestines due to six exogenous pathogenic factors, food poisoning, parasites, stagnant food, stones or dry faeces.

V002-N00310.label: 气腹痛
V002-N00310.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N00310.definition: 因饮食不慎、感受寒邪、情志刺激等，使胃肠气机阻滞而发。以突起腹部阵发性剧痛为主要表现，而检查无形质改变的痛病类疾病。

V002-N00310.label: 气腹痛
V002-N00310.englishNames: abdominal pain due to qi stagnation
V002-N00310.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病｜卒腹痛

V002-N00310.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00310.label: 气腹痛
V002-N00310.englishNames: abdominal pain due to qi stagnation; Qi stagnation-induced abdominal pain
V002-N00310.pinyinNames: qi fu tong; qì fù tòng
V002-N00310.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00310.definition: A paroxysmal abdominal pain with no physical changes. Often results from stomach/intestine qi stagnation due to improper diet, exposure to cold, emotional disturbance.

V002-N00330.label: 胃疡
V002-N00330.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N00330.definition: 多因情志郁怒，饮食不节，或因外邪侵扰，药物刺激等，使脾胃失健，胃络受损而出现溃疡。以经常性胃脘疼痛为主要表现的内疡类疾病。

V002-N00330.label: 胃疡
V002-N00330.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00330.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00330.label: 胃疡
V002-N00330.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00330.definition: Characterized by frequent gastric pain/discomfort, acid reflux or black stools. Contributing factors may include liver qi stagnation, improper diet, exposure to external pathogenic factors or drug-related side-effects. These factors may affect the functions of the spleen and stomach and impair stomach collaterals.

V002-N00325.label: 食后困顿
V002-N00325.aliases: 饭后困倦嗜睡； 饭醉； 谷劳
V002-N00325.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜睡眠症状
V002-N00325.definition: 属于胸腹症状。饭后困倦嗜睡，或进餐中疲困难支而停食入睡者。

V002-N00325.label: 谷劳
V002-N00325.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00325.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00325.label: 谷劳
V002-N00325.englishNames: Fatigue after eating food; cereal consumptive disease
V002-N00325.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00325.definition: Characterized by drowsiness after eating food and heaviness of the limbs. Abdominal fullness, rapid hunger and a poor appetite may also be present. Often results from deficiency of the spleen and stomach.

V002-N00331.label: 胃痈
V002-N00331.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00334.label: 胃瘅
V002-N00334.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N00334.definition: 因各种原因刺激胃体，使胃之络脉受损。以骤起脘痛，或以呕血或黑便为主要表现的内脏瘅[热]病类疾病。

V002-N00334.label: 胃瘅
V002-N00334.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00334.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00334.label: 胃瘅
V002-N00334.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00334.definition: An acute condition characterized by sudden stomach ache, vomiting of blood, and black stools. Often results from irritation to the stomach and damage to stomach collaterals.

V002-N00336.label: 酒癖
V002-N00336.path: 病因类｜饮食失宜｜饮食偏嗜｜酒客
V002-N00336.definition: 饮酒成习的乖癖嗜好。易致酒癖病、酒瘕病、酒臌病。

V002-N00336.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00336.label: 酒癖
V002-N00336.definition: 以嗜酒无度,皖胁疼痛，胁下痞块，口渴、烦热，日渐消瘦，可伴见面发赤斑，肝掌,蜘蛛痣，黄疸等为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00336.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00336.label: 偏食
V002-N00336.aliases: 酒癖； 饮食偏嗜； Food Preferences
V002-N00336.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医儿科疾病｜伤食｜饮食不节
V002-N00336.definition: 对某一种类型的食物过分偏爱和进食。

V002-N00336.label: 酒癖
V002-N00336.aliases: 酒毒； 嗜酒； 饮酒过量
V002-N00336.englishNames: Alcohol Dependence; Alcoholic Abdominal Mass; Alcoholic Mass
V002-N00336.path: 病因病机｜病因｜内伤病因｜饮食失宜｜饮食偏嗜

V002-N00336.label: 酒癖
V002-N00336.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00336.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00336.label: 酒癖
V002-N00336.englishNames: alcoholophilia; Alcohol-induced masses; alcohol-induced masses; alcohol-induced mass
V002-N00336.pinyinNames: jiu pi; jiu xian; jiǔ pǐ
V002-N00336.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00336.definition: Characterized by pain and masses in the subcostal region, thirst, restlessness, and gradual weight loss. Red spots on the face, red palms, spider angioma and jaundice may be present. Contributing factors may include retention of alcoholic toxin, phlegm and stasis in the subcostal region due to prolonged alcohol drinking, damp heat accumulating in the spleen and stomach and disharmony between qi and blood.

V002-N00336.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00336.label: 酒癖
V002-N00336.englishNames: liquor addiction; alcohol addiction; alcoholic abdominal mass

V002-N00336.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00336.label: 酒癖
V002-N00336.englishNames: liquor addiction; alcohol addiction; alcoholic abdominal mass
V002-N00336.definition: the state of heavy dependence on alcohol

V002-N00326.label: 胃络痛
V002-N00326.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N00326.definition: 因各种不良因素的长期刺激，使胃之气机紊乱，络脉失和。以无规律的胃脘疼痛、痞胀等为主要表现的痛病类疾病。

V002-N00326.label: 胃络痛
V002-N00326.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00326.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00326.label: 胃络痛
V002-N00326.pinyinNames: wèi luò tòng; wei luo tong
V002-N00326.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00326.definition: Characterized by irregular stomach ache, stuffiness and distension. Often results from stomach qi disorder and disharmony of stomach collaterals.

V002-N00323.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00323.label: 伤食
V002-N00323.definition: 饮食不节所致，以恶心厌食，暖腐吐馒，皖腹胀痛等为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00323.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00323.label: 伤食
V002-N00323.aliases: 食滞； 停食； Impairment by Overeating
V002-N00323.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医儿科疾病
V002-N00323.definition: 因饮食不慎，进食过饱，或因脾胃不健，感受风寒，再加饮食失调，使食积胃肠，运化不及所致，以恶心厌食、嗳腐吐馊、脘腹胀痛等为主要表现的胃肠积滞性疾病。

V002-N00323.label: 饮食失宜
V002-N00323.path: 病因病机｜病因｜内伤病因
V002-N00323.definition: 指饮食不节、饮食不洁，饮食偏嗜等饮食失于常度的致病因素。

V002-N00323.label: 伤食
V002-N00323.englishNames: Affected by Improper Diet; Dyspepsia Caused by Excessive Eating of Im-proper Diet; Impairment by Overeating; Injury from Diet
V002-N00323.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N00323.definition: 因饮食不慎，进食过饱，或因脾胃不健，感受风寒，再加饮食失调，使食积胃肠，运化不及所致。以恶心厌食，嗳腐吐馊，脘腹胀痛等为主要表现的胃肠积滞性疾病。

V002-N00323.label: 伤食病
V002-N00323.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00323.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00323.label: 伤食
V002-N00323.englishNames: food damage; Food damage; food damage (dyspepsia)
V002-N00323.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00323.definition: Characterized by nausea, aversion to food, belching, a foul breath, gastric stuffiness and abdominal distension. Often occurs when binge eating damages the spleen and stomach or food retention coupled with external contraction of wind cold impairs the transportation and transformation of the stomach and intestines.

V002-N00323.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00323.label: 伤食

V002-N00332.label: 胃饮
V002-N00332.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N00332.definition: 因腹部手术后，或因胃反等病，脾胃受损，运化输布失常，导致水饮停聚于胃肠。以脘腹痞胀，腹中水声漉漉，呕吐水液等为主要表现的痰饮类疾病。

V002-N00332.label: 胃饮
V002-N00332.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00332.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00332.label: 胃饮
V002-N00332.englishNames: stomach fluid retention; Fluid retention in the stomach
V002-N00332.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00332.definition: Characterized by abdominal distension, splashing sound in the abdomen and vomiting of watery fluids. Often results from water/fluid retention in the stomach and intestines due to abdominal surgery or acid reflux.

V002-N00321.label: 食亦
V002-N00321.englishNames: disease characterized by polyhagia and emaciation
V002-N00321.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N00321.definition: 因胃肠及胆腑湿热，肝脾不和，运化传导异常，食物经胃肠移易而过，食虽多而不生肌肉。以发作性多食为主症，但检查无特殊改变的脾系疾病。

V002-N00321.label: 食亦
V002-N00321.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00321.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00321.label: 食亦
V002-N00321.englishNames: weight loss depsite excessive appetite; emaciation due to improper food; Excessive hunger
V002-N00321.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00321.definition: Characterized by increased appetite, rapid hunger after eating food, weight loss, lassitude and dry stools. Contributing factors may include an improper diet, over ingestion of oily, sweet food, or excessive alcohol drinking. These factors may cause damp heat to accumulate in the stomach, intestines and gallbladder, which in turn affects the normal conduction of the gallbladder and stomach.

V002-N00348.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00348.label: 肠结
V002-N00348.definition: 以腹胀如鼓，腹痛，呕吐，便秘，无肠鸣，矢气为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00348.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00348.label: 关格
V002-N00348.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肾病
V002-N00348.definition: 以小便不通与呕吐并见为主要表现的疾病。小便不通称为关，呕吐不止称为格。

V002-N00348.label: 肠结
V002-N00348.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N00348.definition: 多因腹部手术损伤，或实邪内积，使肠体活动异常而搏结不通，气机阻塞所致。以腹痛、呕吐，腹胀，便秘为主要表现的内脏痹病类疾病。

V002-N00348.label: 关格
V002-N00348.englishNames: block and repulsion (disease); anuria and vomiting; obstruction and rejection; Block and repulsion disorder; dysuria and frequent vomiting; Anuria and Vomiting
V002-N00348.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V002-N00348.label: 肠结
V002-N00348.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00348.label: 关格
V002-N00348.englishNames: block and repulsion (disease); anuria and vomiting; obstruction and rejection; Block and repulsion disorder; dysuria and frequent vomiting; Anuria and Vomiting
V002-N00348.path: 传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾系病类

V002-N00348.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00348.label: 大便干结
V002-N00348.aliases: 肠结； 大便燥结； 干结便
V002-N00348.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N00348.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00348.label: 关格
V002-N00348.englishNames: block and repulsion (disease); anuria and vomiting; urinary retention and vomiting; obstruction and rejection; Block and repulsion disorder; dysuria and frequent vomiting; block and repulsion disease/disorder; Anuria and Vomiting; Urinary block and vomiting
V002-N00348.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00348.definition: A critical condition characterized by urinary retention and persistent vomiting, coupled with skin itching, and a strong-odoured breath. In severe cases, convulsions of the hands and feet, drowsiness and mental cloudiness may be present. Often occurs in late-stage oedema, urinary retention or strangury. Contributing factors may include impaired qi transformation due to yin/yang failure of the spleen and kidney and toxic, turbid dampness attacking the stomach. Alternatively, it may also occur when dampness transforms into heat and stirs wind, or in severe cases, to disturb the heart mind.

V002-N00348.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00348.label: 肠结
V002-N00348.englishNames: intestinal painful impediment; intestinal binding; Intestinal obstruction
V002-N00348.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00348.definition: Characterized by paroxysmal abdominal colic, abdominal bloating, absence of bowel sounds, flatus, and constipation. Often occurs when abdominal surgery, tumour compression or carcinoma toxins obstruct the flow of intestinal qi.

V002-N00314.label: 泄泻病
V002-N00314.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00314.label: 泄泻
V002-N00314.aliases: 泄泻病； 下利； 腹泻； Diarrhea
V002-N00314.path: 传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾系病类

V002-N00314.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00314.label: 泄泻病
V002-N00314.pinyinNames: xie xie bing; xiè xiè bìng
V002-N00314.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00314.definition: Characterized by increased frequency of bowel movements, loose stools, stools containing undigested food or watery stools. Contributing factors may include external contraction of wind, cold, damp or heat, an improper diet, emotional disturbance or yang qi deficiency of the spleen and kidney.

V002-N00319.label: 大瘕泄
V002-N00319.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证｜泄泻
V002-N00319.definition: 因情志刺激，饮食失调，湿热内蕴等，使大肠气机阻滞，络脉受损，传导失常，久之脾肾亏虚所致。以腹泻，腹痛，里急后重，便中夹有粘液脓血为主要表现的内脏胀[著]病类疾病。

V002-N00319.label: 大瘕泄
V002-N00319.pinyinNames: da xia xie; da jia xie
V002-N00319.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病｜泄泻病

V002-N00319.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00319.label: 大瘕泄
V002-N00319.pinyinNames: da xia xie; da jia xie; dà jiǎ xiè
V002-N00319.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00319.definition: Characterized by diarrhoea, abdominal pain, tenesmus and stools that contain mucus or blood. Often occurs when internal build up of damp heat (due to emotions or improper diet) obstructs the flow of intestinal qi and impairs intestinal collaterals. Over time, individuals may develop deficiency of the spleen and kidney.

V002-N00316.label: 久泻
V002-N00316.englishNames: Long-lasting Diarrhea; Permanent Diarrhea; Protracted Diarrhea
V002-N00316.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证｜泄泻
V002-N00316.definition: 因腹泻日久，脾肾虚弱，或肝脾不调所致。以腹泻持续或反复超过2个月以上为主要表现的泄泻类疾病。

V002-N00316.label: 泄泻
V002-N00316.aliases: 大便次数增多； 腹泻； 久痢； 久泄不止； 久泻； 飱泄； 泄下
V002-N00316.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜二便症状｜大便症状
V002-N00316.definition: 粪便稀薄，排便次数增加的表现，是多种类似症状的统称。

V002-N00316.label: 久泻
V002-N00316.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病｜泄泻病

V002-N00316.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00316.label: 久泄
V002-N00316.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00316.definition: Diarrhoea that recurs or lasts longer than two months. It is often caused by deficiency of the spleen and kidney or disharmony between the liver and spleen.

V002-N00316.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00316.label: 久泄

V002-N00316.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00316.label: 久泻

V002-N00317.label: 泄泻
V002-N00317.aliases: 洞泻； 后泄； 濡泄； 飧泄； 鹜溏； 下利； 泄； 注下
V002-N00317.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N00317.definition: 感受外邪、饮食所伤、情志失调及脏腑虚弱，导致脾胃运化功能失职，湿邪内盛。症见排便次数增多，粪质稀薄或完谷不化，甚至泻出如水样等。

V002-N00317.label: 飧泄
V002-N00317.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病｜泄泻病

V002-N00317.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00317.label: 飧泄
V002-N00317.englishNames: diarrhea with undigested food; Diarrhoea with undigested food
V002-N00317.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00317.definition: A type of diarrhoea characterized by repeated, food-related diarrhoea that contains undigested food. Contributing factors may include yang qi deficiency of the spleen and stomach. an improper diet or external wind, cold, damp or heat affecting the stomach and intestines.

V002-N00317.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00317.label: 飧泄

V002-N00317.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00317.label: 飧泄
V002-N00317.definition: diarrhea marked by watery stool containing undigested food

V002-N00315.label: 暴泻
V002-N00315.definition: 以急起腹痛、腹泻为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00315.label: 暴泻
V002-N00315.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证｜泄泻
V002-N00315.definition: 因邪袭肠道，传化失调，水谷清浊不分。以急起腹痛、腹泻为主要表现的泄泻类疾病。

V002-N00315.label: 暴泻
V002-N00315.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病｜泄泻病

V002-N00315.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00315.label: 暴泻
V002-N00315.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00315.definition: An acute condition characterized by sudden abdominal pain and diarrhoea. Vomiting and fever may also be present. Often results from improper diet or exposure to wind, cold or damp heat.

V002-N00315.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00315.label: 暴泻

V002-N00315.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00315.label: 暴泻
V002-N00315.definition: a pathological change characterized by sudden onset of diarrhea with profuse discharge

V002-N00318.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00318.label: 五更泻
V002-N00318.aliases: 晨泄； 鸡鸣泄； 肾泄； 五更泄； Dawn Diarrhea
V002-N00318.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医儿科疾病｜泄泻
V002-N00318.definition: 黎明前腹痛作泄，泄后则安，伴形寒肢冷，腰膝酸软者。

V002-N00318.label: 五更泻
V002-N00318.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜二便症状｜大便症状｜泄泻

V002-N00318.label: 五更泻
V002-N00318.aliases: 晨泄； 鸡鸣泄； 肾泄； 五更泄； Dawn Diarrhea
V002-N00318.englishNames: diarrhea before dawn; Enterorrhea before Dawn
V002-N00318.pinyinNames: wu geng xie; wu jing xie
V002-N00318.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病｜泄泻病

V002-N00318.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00318.label: 五更泻
V002-N00318.aliases: 晨泄； 鸡鸣泄； 肾泄； 五更泄； Dawn Diarrhea
V002-N00318.englishNames: diarrhea before dawn; Early morning (Cock’s crow) diarrhoea; Enterorrhea before Dawn
V002-N00318.pinyinNames: wu geng xie; wǔ gēng xiè; wu jing xie
V002-N00318.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00318.definition: A type of diarrhoea characterized by diarrhoea upon abdominal pain before dawn and the pain alleviates after bowel movements. Associated symptoms include cold intolerance, cold limbs, low back/knee soreness with a cold sensation and fatigue. Often results from congenital deficiency, kidney deficiency, or internal yin cold due to decline of the vital fire.

V002-N00338.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00338.label: 脾水
V002-N00338.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肾膀胱病｜水肿［病］
V002-N00338.definition: 脾阳困虚，不能运化，水湿内停，以腹部胀大，四肢沉重，食少，面色萎黄，尿少，脉濡为特征的水肿病。

V002-N00338.label: 脾水
V002-N00338.englishNames: edema due to dysfunction of spleen
V002-N00338.definition: 脾不能运化水湿所致的水肿病。

V002-N00338.label: 脾水
V002-N00338.englishNames: Edema with the Spleen Involved; Spleenish Edema; Splenic Edema
V002-N00338.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N00338.definition: 因胃肠肝胆的慢性病变，使脾虚不运，营气亏少，水湿内停。以水肿，腹胀，疲乏等为主要表现的水肿类疾病。

V002-N00338.label: 脾水
V002-N00338.englishNames: spleen edema; edema due to dysfunction of spleen
V002-N00338.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00338.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00338.label: 脾水
V002-N00338.englishNames: Oedema due to spleen deficiency; spleen edema; edema due to dysfunction of spleen
V002-N00338.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00338.definition: Characterized by increased abdominal size, oedema, scanty urine, and heaviness of the limbs. A poor appetite and a sallow complexion may be present. Often results from spleen yang deficiency and water retention due to chronic stomach, intestine, liver or gallbladder problems.

V002-N00345.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00345.label: 胰痈
V002-N00345.definition: 痈生于胰，以腹痛，发热，上腹包块为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00345.label: 胰痈
V002-N00345.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N00345.definition: 常继发于胰瘅之后，邪毒蕴胰，气血败腐。以腹痛，发热，上腹包块为主要表现的内脏痈病类疾病。

V002-N00345.label: 胰痈
V002-N00345.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00345.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00345.label: 胰痈
V002-N00345.englishNames: pancreatic abscess; Pancreatic abscess; pancreas abscess
V002-N00345.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00345.definition: Characterized by a history of severe pancreas heat for 2–3 weeks, coupled with high fever, persistent upper abdominal pain that radiates to the back and left lower back, and a palpable cystic lump in the upper abdomen with a fixed location, a sense of mobility and tenderness. Jaundice may also be present. Often secondary to pancreas heat, it develops when retained toxins in the pancreas cause decay of qi and blood.

V002-N00344.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00344.label: 胰瘅
V002-N00344.definition: 以急起上腹剧痛，伴恶心呕吐，发热，尿血淀粉酶增高为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00344.label: 胰瘅
V002-N00344.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N00344.definition: 因酗酒或暴食，或情志刺激，或继发于胆石、蛔厥等病之后，湿热邪毒壅积于胰所致。以急起上腹剧痛，伴恶心呕吐，发热，尿血淀粉酶增高为主要表现的内脏瘅[热]病类疾病。

V002-N00344.label: 胰瘅
V002-N00344.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00344.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00344.label: 胰瘅
V002-N00344.englishNames: pancreas heat disease; Pancreas heat; pancreatic fever
V002-N00344.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00344.definition: Characterized by sudden, severe upper abdominal pain, coupled with nausea, vomiting, fever and increased amylase in urine. Often results from excessive alcohol use, binge eating, or extreme emotions. It may also be secondary to gallstones or ascaris-induced colic, which results in retention of damp heat in the pancreas.

V002-N00313.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00313.label: 脾约
V002-N00313.definition: 胃强脾弱，脾虚津少,以小便数，大便硬，数日不行,口干腹胀，纳食尚可等为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00313.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00313.label: 便秘
V002-N00313.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜排便异常
V002-N00313.definition: 大便秘结不通，排便时间延长，或时间虽不延长但排便困难的症状。胃肠积热，或阳虚寒凝，或气血阴津亏损，或腹内癥块阻结等，均可导致便秘。便秘除常见于肠道病变外，肛门部的病变、肌痿、风痱、肠外肿块压迫、温热病过程中、过服止泻药或温燥之品、腹部手术之后、全身衰惫状态等均可出现便秘。

V002-N00313.label: 脾约
V002-N00313.englishNames: Constipation caused by Functional Disorder of the Spleen
V002-N00313.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N00313.definition: 多因燥热内结，阴津亏少，或脾虚失运，阴寒凝滞等，使肠道传导迟缓所致。以经常大便干结，排便困难，排便间隔时间延长为主要表现的内脏痹病类疾病。

V002-N00313.label: 脾约
V002-N00313.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病｜便秘病

V002-N00313.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00313.label: 大便艰难
V002-N00313.aliases: 不大便； 不更衣； 大便难； 脾约
V002-N00313.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N00313.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00313.label: 脾约
V002-N00313.englishNames: splenic constipation; spleen constipation; Splenic constipation
V002-N00313.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00313.definition: Characterized by dry stools, difficult, and infrequent bowel movements. Associated symptoms include abdominal distension, a dry mouth, and frequent urination. Contributing factors may include internal dry heat, age-related deficiency of yin fluids or yin cold retention due to spleen deficiency.

V002-N00313.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00313.label: 脾约

V002-N00339.label: 脾痿
V002-N00339.englishNames: Numbness and Flaccidity of the Muscles due to Disorder of the Spleen
V002-N00339.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N00339.definition: 因胃肠的慢性久病，或因它脏病变影响，进食过少等，使脾气痿弱，精微匮乏，机体失却充养。以食少，腹胀，腹泻，疲乏，消瘦等为主要表现的内脏痿病类疾病。

V002-N00339.label: 脾消
V002-N00339.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00339.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00339.label: 脾消
V002-N00339.englishNames: spleen flaccidity; Wasting of the spleen
V002-N00339.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00339.definition: A chronic condition characterized by wasting of the limbs, fatigue, diarrhoea, and strong-odoured oily or foamy stools. A poor appetite, abdominal distension, muscle pain, oedema, spoon nails and clubbed fingers/toes may be present. Often results from poor digestion and absorption (malnourishment of the body) due to chronic problems of the stomach, intestine or other organs.

V002-N00327.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00327.label: 胃痞
V002-N00327.definition: 以胃皖部痞塞、满闷不舒，触之无形、按之柔软、压之无痛，纳食减少为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00327.label: 胃痞
V002-N00327.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N00327.definition: 因胃病日久，脾胃气虚，胃络失养而萎缩。以长期食少，胃部痞胀，腹泻，消瘦乏力为主要表现的内脏痿病类疾病。

V002-N00327.label: 胃痞病
V002-N00327.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00327.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00327.label: 胃痞病
V002-N00327.aliases: 胃痞； 痞满； Gastric fullness
V002-N00327.pinyinNames: wei pi bing; wèi pǐ bìng
V002-N00327.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00327.definition: Characterized by stomach stuffiness and distension without tenderness. Associated symptoms include a low food intake, abdominal diarrhoea, weight loss and weakness. Often results from qi deficiency of the spleen and stomach and malnourishment/atrophy of stomach collaterals.

V002-N00329.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00329.label: 胃缓
V002-N00329.definition: 以皖腹坠胀作痛，食后或站立时为甚等为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00329.label: 胃缓
V002-N00329.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N00329.definition: 多因长期饮食失调，或因劳倦太过等，使中气亏虚，脾气下陷，肌肉瘦削不坚，固护升举无力，以致胃体下坠。以脘腹坠胀作痛，食后或站立时为甚的劳病类疾病。

V002-N00329.label: 胃缓
V002-N00329.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00329.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00329.label: 胃缓
V002-N00329.englishNames: stomach prolapse; down-bearing stomachache; Stomach prolapse
V002-N00329.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00329.definition: Characterized by a painful, downbearing sensation of the abdomen that aggravates after eating food or in a standing position. Muscle wasting may also be present. Often results from spleen qi sinking due to improper diet or overexertion.

V002-N00306.label: 呃逆病
V002-N00306.definition: 以见呃有声，声音短促，持续不能自制为主 要表现的特发性疾病。

V002-N00306.label: 呃逆病
V002-N00306.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00306.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00306.label: 呃逆病
V002-N00306.pinyinNames: e ni bing; è nì bìng
V002-N00306.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00306.definition: Characterized by involuntary brief “hic” sounds and, sometimes, gastric discomfort. Often results from an upward flow of rebellious stomach qi due to ingestion of cold, spicy food or intense emotions affecting the diaphragm.

V002-N00322.label: 厌食病
V002-N00322.definition: 以长期厌恶饮食，消瘦疲乏为主要表现的疾 病。

V002-N00322.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00322.label: 厌食
V002-N00322.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜脾胃病
V002-N00322.definition: 因娇生惯养，脾胃气虚，或因情志不畅，惧怕肥胖而节食等，日久而成。以长期厌恶饮食、消瘦疲乏为主要表现的郁病类疾病。

V002-N00322.label: 厌食
V002-N00322.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N00322.definition: 因娇生惯养，脾胃气虚，或因情志不畅，惧怕肥胖而节食等，日久而成。以长期厌恶饮食，消瘦疲乏为主要表现的郁病类疾病。

V002-N00322.label: 厌食
V002-N00322.aliases: 不能食； 不能饮食； 不食； 食不下； 食欲缺乏； 畏食
V002-N00322.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜饮食口味症状｜饮食症状
V002-N00322.definition: 对饮食有厌恶感，不愿进食的表现。

V002-N00322.label: 厌食病
V002-N00322.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00322.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00322.label: 厌食
V002-N00322.path: 分类与代码表｜必要信息（基本症状）｜骨干症状｜脾胃系症状类

V002-N00322.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00322.label: 厌食
V002-N00322.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N00322.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00322.label: 厌食
V002-N00322.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V002-N00322.definition: A symptom of aversion to food or the smell of food. Often results from damp heat in the spleen and stomach or in the liver and gallbladder.

V002-N00322.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00322.label: 厌食病
V002-N00322.englishNames: Loss of appetite; anorexia disease; anorexia
V002-N00322.pinyinNames: yàn shí bìng; yan shi bing
V002-N00322.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00322.definition: Characterized by ingestion of small amount of food, aversion to food, a poor appetite, weight loss, fatigue, and a body weight that is 75–85% below the standard weight. In severe cases, malnutrition and anaemia may also be present. Often results from qi deficiency of the spleen and stomach and stomach yin deficiency due to poor eating habits, dieting or acute/chronic diseases.

V002-N00322.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00322.label: 厌食

V002-N00322.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00322.label: 厌食
V002-N00322.definition: a diseased state in children characterized by loss of appetite for food

V002-N00333.label: 胃石病
V002-N00333.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00333.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00333.label: 胃石病
V002-N00333.englishNames: mobile stomach lumps; stomach stone disease; Gastroliths
V002-N00333.pinyinNames: wei shi bing; wèi shí bìng
V002-N00333.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00333.definition: Characterized by palpable lumps in the upper abdomen, accompanied by stomach ache, nausea, vomiting, and a poor appetite. Often results from swallowing of hair, ingestion of minerals or excessive ingestion of food rich in tannic acid such as persimmon, hawthorn or date plum.

V002-N00337.label: 脾瘅
V002-N00337.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00337.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00337.label: 脾瘅
V002-N00337.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00337.definition: Characterized by overeating, overweight, belly fat and a sweet, greasy taste in the mouth. Often results from overeating of oily, sweet food and physical inactivity.

V002-N00350.label: 小肠瘅
V002-N00350.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N00350.definition: 本有湿热内蕴，邪毒内结，气血瘀滞，肠络受损，再加饮食不洁而诱发。以骤发腹痛，腹泻便血，发热等为主要表现的内脏瘅[热]病类疾病。

V002-N00350.label: 小肠瘅
V002-N00350.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00350.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00350.label: 小肠瘅
V002-N00350.englishNames: small intestinal heat disease; Acute haemorrhagic necrotizing enterocolitis
V002-N00350.pinyinNames: xiao chang dan; xiǎo cháng dān
V002-N00350.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00350.definition: An acute condition characterized by sudden abdominal pain, diarrhoea, fever and blood in stools. Often results from internal damp heat, stagnation of qi and blood and ingestion of contaminated food.

V002-N00343.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00343.label: 胰胀
V002-N00343.definition: 以反复发作的皖腹痛胀，消瘦，腹泻等为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00343.label: 胰胀
V002-N00343.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N00343.definition: 多因胰、胆等现的长期影响，邪毒蕴胰，使胰体受损，脾失健运。以反复发作的脘腹痛胀，消瘦，腹泻等为主要表现的内脏胀[著]病类疾病。

V002-N00343.label: 胰胀
V002-N00343.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N00343.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00343.label: 胰胀
V002-N00343.englishNames: pancreatic distension; Pancreatic distension; pancreas distension
V002-N00343.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00343.definition: Characterized by weight loss and repeated abdominal pain, distension and diarrhoea. Often results from toxic pathogenic factors affecting the pancreas and spleen.

V002-N00375.label: 肾系病
肾系病

V002-N00375.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00375.definition: Dysfunctions of the kidney system and meridians due to six exogenous pathogenic factors, emotional disturbance, over-exertion, water retention and stagnant blood.

V002-N00397.definition: 以阴茎久举不痿，精液自泄为主要表现的疾 病。

V002-N00397.label: 强中
V002-N00397.aliases: 阳强； Persistent erection disorder； 强中病
V002-N00397.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00397.definition: Characterized by abnormally prolonged erection of the penis. Contributing factors may include liver fire, stasis, damp heat, overuse of aphrodisiac drugs or sexual indulgence. These factors may cause internal toxic fire and trigger ministerial fire to consume kidney yang and result in hyperactivity of deficiency yang.

V002-N00389.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00389.label: 关格
V002-N00389.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肾膀胱病
V002-N00389.definition: 关与格的合称。以小便不通(关)与呕吐不止(格)并见为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00389.label: 关格
V002-N00389.definition: 以小便不通与呕吐并见为主要表现的疾病。 小便不通称为关，呕吐不止称为格。

V002-N00389.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00389.label: 关格
V002-N00389.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肾病
V002-N00389.definition: 以小便不通与呕吐并见为主要表现的疾病。小便不通称为关，呕吐不止称为格。

V002-N00389.label: 关格
V002-N00389.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜诊断原理｜异常脉象
V002-N00389.definition: 指脉象。指人迎与寸口脉俱盛极，系阴阳离决的危象。;是病证名。小便不通与呕吐不止并见的病证。小便不通名关，呕吐不已名格。;是病理名。指阴阳均偏盛，不能相互营运的严重病理情况。

V002-N00389.label: 关格
V002-N00389.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V002-N00389.definition: 是指由于脾肾阴阳衰惫，气化不利，浊邪内蕴而致小便不通与呕吐并见的病证。多见于水肿、癃闭、淋证等病的晚期。

V002-N00389.label: 关格
V002-N00389.englishNames: block and repulsion (disease); anuria and vomiting; obstruction and rejection; Block and repulsion disorder; dysuria and frequent vomiting; Anuria and Vomiting
V002-N00389.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V002-N00389.label: 关格
V002-N00389.englishNames: block and repulsion (disease); anuria and vomiting; obstruction and rejection; Block and repulsion disorder; dysuria and frequent vomiting; Anuria and Vomiting
V002-N00389.path: 传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾系病类

V002-N00389.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00389.label: 关格
V002-N00389.englishNames: block and repulsion (disease); anuria and vomiting; urinary retention and vomiting; obstruction and rejection; Block and repulsion disorder; dysuria and frequent vomiting; block and repulsion disease/disorder; Anuria and Vomiting; Urinary block and vomiting
V002-N00389.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00389.definition: A critical condition characterized by urinary retention and persistent vomiting, coupled with skin itching, and a strong-odoured breath. In severe cases, convulsions of the hands and feet, drowsiness and mental cloudiness may be present. Often occurs in late-stage oedema, urinary retention or strangury. Contributing factors may include impaired qi transformation due to yin/yang failure of the spleen and kidney and toxic, turbid dampness attacking the stomach. Alternatively, it may also occur when dampness transforms into heat and stirs wind, or in severe cases, to disturb the heart mind.

V002-N00389.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00389.label: 关格

V002-N00394.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00394.label: 肾衰
V002-N00394.definition: 肾气虚衰，气化失司,浊湿毒邪不得排泄，以突发少尿,甚或无尿，或多尿,精神萎靡，面色无华，口有尿味，恶心，呕吐，食欲不振等为特征的危急重病。

V002-N00394.label: 肾衰
V002-N00394.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V002-N00394.definition: 可由暴病及肾，损伤肾气，或肾病日久，致肾气衰竭，气化失司，湿浊尿毒不得下泄，以急起少尿甚或无尿，继而多尿，或以精神萎靡，面色无华，口有尿味等为常见症状的脱病类疾病。

V002-N00394.label: 肾衰病
V002-N00394.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V002-N00394.label: 肾衰

V002-N00395.label: 急性肾衰
V002-N00395.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病｜肾衰病

V002-N00396.label: 慢性肾衰
V002-N00396.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病｜肾衰病

V002-N00387.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00387.label: 癃闭
V002-N00387.englishNames: dribbling urinary block disease/disorder;dribbling and retention of urine
V002-N00387.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肾膀胱病
V002-N00387.definition: 以小便量少，点滴而出，甚至闭塞不通为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00387.label: 癃闭
V002-N00387.definition: 以小便量少，点滴而出，甚至闭塞不通为主 要表现的疾病。

V002-N00387.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00387.label: 癃闭
V002-N00387.aliases: 尿闭； 小便不通； Retention of Urine
V002-N00387.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肾病
V002-N00387.definition: 因败精阻塞、阴部手术等，使膀胱气化失司，水道不利，以小便量少、点滴而出、甚至闭塞不通为主要表现的内脏痹病类疾病。

V002-N00387.label: 癃闭
V002-N00387.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V002-N00387.definition: 是由于肾和膀胱气化失司而导致尿量减少，排尿困难，甚则小便闭塞不通主症的一种病证。其中又以小便不利，点滴而短少，病势较缓者称为“癃”；以小便闭塞，点滴全无，病势较急者称为“闭”。癃和闭虽有区别，但都是指排尿困难，只有程度上的不同，因此多合称为癃闭。

V002-N00387.label: 小便不通
V002-N00387.aliases: 胞痹； 闭癃； 不得解； 不得小便； 癃闭； 溺闭； 溺癃； 溺溲不通； 尿闭； 无尿； 小便闭； 小水不通
V002-N00387.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜二便症状｜小便症状
V002-N00387.definition: 小便排出困难，严重者点滴难出的表现。

V002-N00387.label: 癃闭
V002-N00387.englishNames: dribbling urinary block (disease); retention of urine; Dribbling urinary block disorder; dribbling and retention of urine; dribbing urinary block
V002-N00387.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V002-N00387.label: 癃闭
V002-N00387.englishNames: dribbling urinary block (disease); retention of urine; Dribbling urinary block disorder; dribbling and retention of urine; dribbing urinary block
V002-N00387.path: 传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾系病类

V002-N00387.label: 小便不利
V002-N00387.aliases: 癃闭； 排尿困难； 小便不通
V002-N00387.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N00387.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00387.label: 癃闭
V002-N00387.englishNames: Urinary retention; dribbling urinary block (disease); dribbing urinary block; retention of urine; Dribbling urinary block disorder; dribbling and retention of urine; dribbling urinary block disease/disorder
V002-N00387.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00387.definition: Characterized by scanty urine, dripping urination and lower abdominal distension/pain. In severe cases, individuals may experience an inability to empty the bladder. Contributing factors may include damp heat in the urinary bladder, stagnant blood, stones or tumours obstructing the urethra, kidney yang failing to perform qi transformation, kidney yin deficiency or surgery.

V002-N00386.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00386.label: 尿崩
V002-N00386.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肾膀胱病
V002-N00386.definition: 以尿多如崩，尿清如水，烦渴多饮为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00386.label: 尿崩
V002-N00386.definition: 以尿多如崩，尿清如水，烦渴多饮为主要表 现的肾系疾病。

V002-N00386.label: 尿崩
V002-N00386.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V002-N00386.definition: 因肾虚下元不固，或脑神等病变及肾，肾之气化失司，水津直趋膀胱而下泄。以尿多如崩，尿清如水，烦渴多饮为主要表现的肾系疾病。

V002-N00386.label: 尿崩
V002-N00386.englishNames: profuse urination; diabetes insipidus; flooding urination; Flooding urine disorder; profuse urine
V002-N00386.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V002-N00386.label: 尿崩
V002-N00386.englishNames: profuse urination; diabetes insipidus; flooding urination; Flooding urine disorder; profuse urine
V002-N00386.path: 传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾系病类

V002-N00386.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00386.label: 尿崩
V002-N00386.englishNames: flooding urination disease/disorder; flooding urination; profuse urination; diabetes insipidus; Flooding urine disorder; Profuse urination (diabetes insipidus); profuse urine
V002-N00386.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00386.definition: Characterized by large amounts of dilute urine and excessive thirst. Often occurs when the kidney fails to perform the qi transformation of the urinary bladder.

V002-N00393.label: 肾厥
V002-N00393.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V002-N00393.definition: 因肾脏的严重病变，致肾气衰竭，气化失司，湿浊尿毒内蕴，上泛而蒙闭脑神。在肾病症状基础上，出现以神识昏蒙为主要表现的肾病及脑的厥病类疾病。

V002-N00393.label: 肾厥
V002-N00393.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V002-N00393.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00393.label: 肾厥
V002-N00393.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00393.definition: A severe condition characterized by mental cloudiness in patients with chronic kidney diseases. Often results from kidney qi exhaustion and turbid dampness misting the mind.

V002-N00391.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00391.label: 肾痈
V002-N00391.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肾膀胱病
V002-N00391.definition: 以痈生于京门穴处，高热，腰痛为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00391.label: 肾痈
V002-N00391.definition: 以高热，腰痛为主要表现的内脏痈病类疾 病。

V002-N00391.label: 肾痈
V002-N00391.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V002-N00391.definition: 因热毒壅滞于肾，使血败肉腐，形成痈脓。以高热，腰痛等为主要表现的内脏痈病类疾病。

V002-N00391.label: 肾痈
V002-N00391.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V002-N00391.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00391.label: 肾痈
V002-N00391.englishNames: kidney abscess; renal carbuncle; Renal abscess
V002-N00391.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00391.definition: A condition (secondary to abscess in Jingmen (GB 25) or other body parts) characterized by sudden chills, fever, and severe lower back pain. Weak, hesitant urine stream, painful urination and pain in the renal area and costovertebral angle to percussion may also be present. Often occurs when toxins from the abscess affects the kidney.

V002-N00390.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00390.label: 肾热病
V002-N00390.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肾膀胱病
V002-N00390.definition: 邪热伤肾，以发热恶寒，腰部胀痛，尿热，尿频，尿急，尿痛等为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00390.label: 肾瘅
V002-N00390.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V002-N00390.definition: 因湿热温毒等邪侵及于肾所致。以发热，腰痛，排尿异常等为主要表现的内脏瘅[热]病类疾病。

V002-N00390.label: 肾瘅
V002-N00390.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V002-N00390.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00390.label: 肾瘅
V002-N00390.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00390.definition: Characterized by fever, lower back painlower back pain and abnormal urination. Often occurs when damp heat or toxic warmth affects the kidney.

V002-N00392.label: 肾垂
V002-N00392.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V002-N00392.definition: 因素体虚弱，或劳倦内伤，气虚下陷，无力系肾，以致在直立时肾脏下降至下腹部或盆腔内。以腰部下坠感及疼痛，或反复尿血为主要表现的劳病类疾病。

V002-N00392.label: 肾垂
V002-N00392.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V002-N00392.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00392.label: 肾垂
V002-N00392.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00392.definition: Characterized by a bearing-down sensation and lower back pain. Alternatively, recurrent bloody urine may be present. Often occurs when constitutional weakness or overexertion causes qi to sink.

V002-N00383.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00383.label: 精癃
V002-N00383.path: 第2部分：外科学｜泌尿生殖系统疾病
V002-N00383.definition: 年老肾虚，精室肥大，以尿频，排尿困难，滴沥不尽，甚或尿闭为主要表现的男性生殖器疾病。

V002-N00383.label: 精癃
V002-N00383.path: 外科疾病｜外科其他疾病
V002-N00383.definition: 年老肾虚，精室肥大，以排尿困难，滴沥不 尽，甚或尿闭为主要表现的前列腺疾病。

V002-N00383.label: 精癃
V002-N00383.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜泌尿、男性前阴病

V002-N00376.definition: Characterized by frequent, urgent, hesitant and painful urination. The pain during urination may radiate to the low back and abdomen. Contributing factors may include damp heat affecting the lower jiao, deficiency of the spleen and kidney, liver qi stagnation, tuberculosis, stones or tumours. These factors may impair the qi transformation of the urinary bladder.

V002-N00377.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00377.definition: Characterized by lower abdominal distension and fullness, frequent, hesitant, painful or dripping urination. Contributing factors may include liver qi stagnation or age-related qi deficiency of the spleen and kidney. These factors may impair the qi transformation or opening and closing of the urinary bladder.

V002-N00379.definition: Characterized by painful urination with blood in urine. Often occurs when damp heat or cold damp affects the bladder and enters the bloodstream to cause the blood to move recklessly. It may also occur when qi fails to control blood within the vessels or when qi deficiency results in blood stagnation.

V002-N00381.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00381.definition: Characterized by recurrent, fatigue-induced frequent, urgent, painful and dripping urination, lower back painlower back pain, and lassitude. Associated symptoms may include tidal, low-grade fever and weight loss. Contributing factors may include retention of toxins due to chronic strangury, excessive worries or mental exertion damaging the heart and spleen, sexual indulgence damaging the kidney or tuberculosis affecting the opening and closing of the urinary bladder.

V002-N00382.label: 石淋

V002-N00378.label: 热淋
V002-N00378.aliases: 急淋； 湿热淋； Heat stranguria disorder； Damp heat stranguria； acute stranguria
V002-N00378.englishNames: heat strangury; heat stranguria; Heat stranguria disorder; Heat strangury
V002-N00378.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00378.definition: Characterized by frequent, urgent and painful urination with scanty, red urine and a burning sensation. Associated symptoms may include fever, chills, lower back painlower back pain, lower abdominal cramps, distension and pain, a yellow, greasy tongue coating and a slippery, rapid pulse. Often occurs when damp heat affects the kidney and urinary bladder.

V002-N00378.label: 热淋

V002-N00380.definition: 以小便浑浊如米泔水或滑腻如膏脂为主要表现的淋证。

V002-N00380.label: 膏淋
V002-N00380.definition: 以小便浑浊如米泔水或滑腻如膏脂为主要 表现的淋证。

V002-N00380.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00380.label: 膏淋
V002-N00380.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肾病｜淋证

V002-N00380.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜排尿障碍
V002-N00380.definition: 尿中混有杂物，外观浑浊如米泔、牛乳状。

V002-N00380.label: 膏淋
V002-N00380.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证｜淋证
V002-N00380.definition: 湿热下注，阻滞络脉，脂汁外溢，以小便浑浊，乳白或如米泔水，上有浮油，置之沉淀，或伴有絮状凝状物，或混有血液、血块，尿道热涩疼痛，尿时阻塞不畅，口干，苔黄腻，舌质红，脉濡数为病症的疾病。

V002-N00380.label: 膏淋
V002-N00380.englishNames: chylous stranguria; unctuous strangury; stranguria due to chyluria

V002-N00380.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00380.label: 膏淋
V002-N00380.englishNames: unctuous stranguria; Unctuous strangury; chylous stranguria; unctuous strangury; stranguria due to chyluria
V002-N00380.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00380.definition: Characterized by recurrent painful discharge of turbid, milky urine like rice water, cream or sauce, and back pain/soreness. Associated symptoms may include hesitant urination, oedema, fatigue, or anaemia. Symptoms can be induced or exacerbated by high-fat diet, fatigue or exposure to cold. Contributing factors may include damp heat due to deficiency of the spleen and kidney, filariasis, tuberculosis or tumours. These factors may impair the qi transformation of the lower jiao.

V002-N00388.label: 肾水病
V002-N00388.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V002-N00388.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00388.label: 肾水病
V002-N00388.englishNames: renal edema; kidney edema; Kidney water
V002-N00388.pinyinNames: shen shui bing; shèn shuǐ bìng
V002-N00388.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00388.definition: Characterized by persistent oedema, belly bulging, scanty urine, lower back painlower back pain, and a dark facial complexion, coupled with persistent proteinuria, haematuria, hypoproteinaemia and hyperlipidaemia. During an acute attack, kidney water is known as kidney wind. Often occurs when kidney yang fails to transform qi and circulate water due to recurrent oedema, coupled with wind heat or drug-related toxins damage the kidney.

V002-N00388.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00388.label: 肾风

V002-N00399.label: 尿道瘘
V002-N00399.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V002-N00399.definition: 因外力或手术等损伤，使尿道造成瘘管与外界相通。以有尿液自瘘管外口溢出为主要表现的瘘病类疾病。

V002-N00399.label: 尿道瘘
V002-N00399.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V002-N00398.label: 缩阴病
V002-N00398.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V002-N00398.definition: 因寒邪阻滞肝经，或阳虚筋脉失却温煦、阴虚筋脉失养，使宗筋拘急所致。以小腹剧痛，自觉阴茎、睾丸、阴囊突然内缩（妇女为阴户、乳房内缩）为主要表现的痛病类疾病。

V002-N00398.label: 阴缩
V002-N00398.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜二阴症状｜前阴症状

V002-N00398.label: 缩阴病
V002-N00398.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V002-N00398.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00398.label: 缩阴病
V002-N00398.pinyinNames: suo yin bing; suō yīn bìng
V002-N00398.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00398.definition: Characterized by intense lower abdominal pain, a subjective feeling of genital (penis, testis, scrotum, vulva or breasts) shrinking. Often occurs when cold obstructs the liver meridian or when yang fails to warm the external genitalia.

V002-N00274.label: 肝系病
V002-N00274.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语

V002-N00274.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00274.label: 肝系病
V002-N00274.englishNames: Liver system diseases; category of liver system disease; liver system diseases
V002-N00274.pinyinNames: gan xi bing; gān xì bìng
V002-N00274.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00274.definition: Dysfunctions of the liver system and meridians due to six exogenous pathogenic factors, emotional disturbance, overexertion, water retention and stagnant blood.

V002-N00297.label: 胆石病
V002-N00297.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病

V002-N00297.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00297.label: 胆石病
V002-N00297.pinyinNames: dan shi bing; dǎn shí bìng
V002-N00297.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00297.definition: Characterized by right upper abdominal distension/oppression or intolerable pain. Often results from excessive intake of fatty, oily food, retention of damp heat or parasites in the gallbladder. Associated symptoms include fever and obstructive jaundice.

V002-N00292.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00292.label: 肝厥
V002-N00292.path: 第1部分：内科学｜急症｜厥证
V002-N00292.definition: 肝气厥逆上冲所致的厥证。

V002-N00292.label: 肝厥
V002-N00292.definition: 在肝病基础上，出现以神志昏蒙为主要表现 的肝病及脑的厥病类疾病。

V002-N00292.label: 肝厥
V002-N00292.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证
V002-N00292.definition: 因肝气严重损害，浊毒痰火内盛，不得外泄而熏蒸、蒙闭脑神。在肝病症状基础上，出现以神识昏蒙为主要表现的肝病及脑的厥病类疾病。

V002-N00292.label: 肝厥病
V002-N00292.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病

V002-N00291.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00291.label: 肝痈
V002-N00291.definition: 以发热，右胁腹部疼痛拒按，右胁下肿块为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00291.label: 肝痈
V002-N00291.definition: 以急起发热疼痛，右胁下肿块为主要表现的 疾病。

V002-N00291.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00291.label: 肝痈
V002-N00291.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肝胆病｜肝病
V002-N00291.definition: 因邪热虫毒等淤积于肝，致气血腐败，酿成痈脓。以急起发热、右胁痛、右胁下肿块等为主要表现的内脏痈病类疾病。

V002-N00291.label: 肝痈
V002-N00291.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证
V002-N00291.definition: 因邪热虫毒等淤积于肝，致气血腐败，酿成痈疾。以急起发热，右胁痛，右胁下肿块等为主要表现的内脏痈病类疾病。

V002-N00291.label: 肝痈
V002-N00291.englishNames: liver abscess; Liver abscess disorder; Liver Abscess
V002-N00291.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病

V002-N00291.label: 肝痈
V002-N00291.englishNames: liver abscess; Liver abscess disorder; Liver Abscess
V002-N00291.path: 传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝系病类

V002-N00291.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00291.label: 肝痈
V002-N00291.englishNames: liver abscess; Liver abscess disorder; Liver abscess; Liver Abscess
V002-N00291.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00291.definition: Characterized by a sudden fever, gradually increased distending pain in the right subcostal region, and gradual weight loss. In severe cases, patients may experience severe abdominal pain following abscess rupture, coughing with phlegm that contains pus and blood, diarrhoea with stools that contain pus and blood and fainting. Often occurs when damp heat or parasitic toxin retains in the liver and form pus or abscess.

V002-N00293.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00293.label: 肝衰病
V002-N00293.definition: 以骤发疫黄,或肝癖久病,出现神志恍惚,幻觉,狂躁,恐惧，易激动，或淡漠少语等性格改变及行为失常，甚或伴见神昏，扑翼样震颤、阵发性惊厥等为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00293.label: 肝衰病
V002-N00293.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病

V002-N00293.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00293.label: 肝衰病
V002-N00293.pinyinNames: gan shuai bing; gān shuāi bìng
V002-N00293.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00293.definition: A severe liver condition caused by wind fire misting the mind due to viral infection, chronic diseases or excessive alcohol drinking. It is characterized by rapid-onset jaundice and changes in mental status such as mental confusion, hallucination, mania, fear, agitation or indifference with a reluctance to talk. In severe cases, coma, flapping tremor or paroxysmal convulsions may be present.

V002-N00290.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00290.label: 肝癖
V002-N00290.definition: 以胁胀或痛，皖痞，腹胀，伴见右胁下肿块，形体肥胖，倦怠乏力等为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00290.label: 肝癖
V002-N00290.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证
V002-N00290.definition: 因肝失疏泄，脾失健运，痰浊淤积于肝。以胁胀或痛，右胁下肿块为主要表现的积聚类疾病。

V002-N00290.label: 肝癖
V002-N00290.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病

V002-N00290.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00290.label: 肝癖
V002-N00290.pinyinNames: gan xian; gān pǐ; gan pi
V002-N00290.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00290.definition: Characterized by distension/pain in the subcostal region, abdominal bloating, palpable lumps in the right subcostal region, obesity and lassitude. Often results from disharmony between the liver and spleen and turbid phlegm accumulating in the liver due to over ingestion of sweet, fatty food and physical inactivity.

V002-N00299.label: 臌胀
V002-N00299.definition: 以腹胀如鼓，腹皮青筋显露，肤色苍黄为主 要表现的疾病。

V002-N00299.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00299.label: 臌胀
V002-N00299.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肝胆病｜肝病
V002-N00299.definition: 以腹胀如鼓、腹皮青筋显露、肤色苍黄为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00299.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00299.label: 虫臌
V002-N00299.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肝胆病｜肝病｜臌胀
V002-N00299.definition: 由寄生虫如血吸虫等引起的臌胀称“虫臌”，又称“蛊胀”，或简称为“蛊”。

V002-N00299.label: 鼓胀
V002-N00299.aliases: 单腹胀； 臌； 臌胀； 蜘蛛蛊
V002-N00299.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证
V002-N00299.definition: 因酒食不节、情志刺激、虫毒感染、病后续发导致肝脾肾受伤，气滞血结，水停腹中。症见腹胀大如鼓、皮色苍黄、脉络暴露等。在古医籍中又称单腹胀、臌、蜘蛛蛊等。

V002-N00299.label: 鼓胀
V002-N00299.aliases: 单腹胀大； 单胀； 腹如鼓； 腹水； 腹胀如鼓； 腹胀如水状； 鼓肠； 水蛊
V002-N00299.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜躯体症状｜胸腹症状
V002-N00299.definition: 腹大胀满，绷急如鼓，皮色苍黄，脉络显露的病证。

V002-N00299.label: 臌胀病
V002-N00299.aliases: 臌胀； 鼓胀； 蛊胀
V002-N00299.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病

V002-N00299.label: 虫臌
V002-N00299.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病｜臌胀病
