V002-N00299.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00299.label: 单腹胀大
V002-N00299.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N00299.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00299.label: 臌胀病
V002-N00299.aliases: 臌胀； 鼓胀； 蛊胀； 单腹胀； Tympanites disorder
V002-N00299.pinyinNames: gu zhang bing; gǔ zhàng bìng
V002-N00299.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00299.definition: Characterized by severe abdominal bulging (like a drum). Contributing factors may include excessive alcohol drinking, liver disease, tuberculosis, abdominal masses or schistosomiasis. This condition is subdivided into alcohol tympanites, water tympanites, qi tympanites, blood tympanites and parasitic tympanites.

V002-N00299.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00299.label: 虫臌
V002-N00299.englishNames: Parasitic tympanites; parasitic tympanites; Parasitic Tympanites
V002-N00299.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00299.definition: A type of tympanites characterized by frequent abdominal distension and pain, increased abdominal size, varicose abdominal veins, weight loss, fatigue, palpable subcostal masses, a sallow or dark grey facial complexion. Often results from qi stagnation, blood stasis and water retention due to parasitic toxins affecting the liver and spleen.

V002-N00299.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00299.label: 鼓胀

V002-N00303.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00303.label: 血臌
V002-N00303.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肝胆病｜肝病｜臌胀

V002-N00303.label: 血臌
V002-N00303.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证｜鼓胀
V002-N00303.definition: 因肝脾血瘀水停所致。症见腹部膨大、见青紫筋脉、腹内积块痛如针刺，面颈部赤丝血缕。

V002-N00303.label: 血臌
V002-N00303.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病｜臌胀病

V002-N00303.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00303.label: 血臌
V002-N00303.englishNames: Blood tympanites; blood tympanites; Blood Tympanites
V002-N00303.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00303.definition: A type of tympanites characterized by increased abdominal size, varicose abdominal veins, and scanty urine. Associated symptoms may include presence of vascular naevi on the face or chest, bleeding, vomiting of blood, and black stools. Often occurs when prolonged liver diseases, oedema, tuberculosis or abdominal masses cause qi, blood and water to stagnate in the abdomen.

V002-N00304.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00304.label: 虫臌
V002-N00304.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肝胆病｜肝病｜臌胀
V002-N00304.definition: 由寄生虫如血吸虫等引起的臌胀称“虫臌”，又称“蛊胀”，或简称为“蛊”。

V002-N00304.label: 虫臌
V002-N00304.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证｜鼓胀
V002-N00304.definition: 由寄生虫如血吸虫等引起的臌胀称“虫臌”，又称“蛊胀”，或简称为“蛊”。

V002-N00304.label: 虫臌
V002-N00304.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病｜臌胀病

V002-N00304.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00304.label: 虫臌
V002-N00304.englishNames: Parasitic tympanites; parasitic tympanites; Parasitic Tympanites
V002-N00304.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00304.definition: A type of tympanites characterized by frequent abdominal distension and pain, increased abdominal size, varicose abdominal veins, weight loss, fatigue, palpable subcostal masses, a sallow or dark grey facial complexion. Often results from qi stagnation, blood stasis and water retention due to parasitic toxins affecting the liver and spleen.

V002-N00302.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00302.label: 气鼓
V002-N00302.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肝胆病｜鼓胀［病］
V002-N00302.definition: 气机郁滞或气虚不行，以腹胀，甚则全身头面肿胀为主要表现的鼓胀病。

V002-N00302.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00302.label: 气臌
V002-N00302.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肝胆病｜肝病｜臌胀
V002-N00302.definition: 腹部高度胀大，如鼓之状者，以手叩之如鼓，无波动感，按之亦无凹痕者。

V002-N00302.label: 气臌
V002-N00302.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证｜鼓胀
V002-N00302.definition: 因肝郁气滞所致，症见腹部高度胀大，如鼓之状者，以手叩之如鼓，无波动感，按之亦无凹痕者。

V002-N00302.label: 气臌
V002-N00302.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病｜臌胀病

V002-N00302.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00302.label: 气臌
V002-N00302.englishNames: Qi Tympanites; qi tympanites; Qi tympanites
V002-N00302.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00302.definition: A type of tympanites characterized by increased abdominal size, tight abdominal skin and a sallow skin colour. Often results from qi stagnation in the abdomen due to emotional disturbance.

V002-N00300.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00300.label: 酒鼓
V002-N00300.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肝胆病｜鼓胀［病］
V002-N00300.definition: 长期嗜酒过度,肝、脾、肾功能失调，以腹部胀大，消瘦，体弱无力，厌食,齿蛆鼻血等为主要表现的鼓胀病。

V002-N00300.label: 酒臌
V002-N00300.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病｜臌胀病

V002-N00300.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00300.label: 酒臌
V002-N00300.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00300.definition: A type of tympanites characterized by increased abdominal size, general oedema, varicose abdominal veins, weight loss, fatigue, a poor appetite, and gum bleeding or nosebleed. Often results from retention of stagnant qi, blood and phlegm dampness in the subcostal region due to prolonged or excessive alcohol drinking.

V002-N00301.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00301.label: 水鼓
V002-N00301.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肝胆病｜鼓胀［病］
V002-N00301.definition: 肝脾受伤，水气内停，以腹满胀大为主要表现的鼓胀病。

V002-N00301.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00301.label: 水臌
V002-N00301.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肝胆病｜肝病｜臌胀
V002-N00301.definition: 腹部高度胀大，如鼓之状者，以手分置腹之两侧，一手轻拍，另一手可触到波动感，同时，按之如囊裹水，且腹壁有凹痕者。

V002-N00301.label: 水臌
V002-N00301.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证｜鼓胀
V002-N00301.definition: 因阳所振，水湿内停所致，症见腹部胀满膨大，或状如蛙腹，按之如囊裹水，常伴下肢浮肿。

V002-N00301.label: 水臌
V002-N00301.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病｜臌胀病

V002-N00301.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00301.label: 水臌
V002-N00301.englishNames: water tympanites; Fluid Tympanites; Water tympanites
V002-N00301.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00301.definition: A type of tympanites characterized by increased abdominal size, abdominal distension, varicose abdominal veins, a sallow skin colour, oedema and enlarged spleen. Contributing factors may include water retention in the abdomen due to spleen deficiency, prolonged alcohol drinking or kidney deficiency.

V002-N00288.label: 肝著
V002-N00288.definition: 以右胁痛、右胁下肿块为主要表现的肝系疾 病。

V002-N00288.label: 肝著
V002-N00288.englishNames: Distension due to the Liver Disorder
V002-N00288.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证
V002-N00288.definition: 因肝热病、肝瘟等之后，肝脏气血郁滞，著而不行。以右胁痛，右胁下肿块，用手按捺捶击稍舒，肝功能异常等为主要表现的内脏胀[著]病类疾病。

V002-N00288.label: 肝着
V002-N00288.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病

V002-N00288.label: 肝著
V002-N00288.englishNames: Liver distension disorder; stagnancy of liverqi and blood; liver fixity
V002-N00288.path: 传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝系病类

V002-N00288.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00288.label: 肝胀
V002-N00288.aliases: 肝着； 肝著； Liver distension disorder； Liver fixity
V002-N00288.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00288.definition: Characterized by pain and lumps in the right subcostal region that alleviate upon pressing or patting. Often occurs as a result of liver qi/blood stagnation.

V002-N00288.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00288.label: 肝着

V002-N00296.label: 胆疸
V002-N00296.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证｜黄疸
V002-N00296.definition: 因胆石、蛔虫、肿瘤、手术等阻压或损伤胆道，使胆汁排泄受阻，不能泄入肠道而淤积入血，溢于肌肤。以右胁下疼痛、黄疸为主要表现的疸病类疾病。

V002-N00296.label: 胆疸
V002-N00296.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病

V002-N00296.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00296.label: 胆疸
V002-N00296.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00296.definition: Characterized by right subcostal pain and jaundice. Often results from the inability of the bile to flow from the liver to the duodenum. Contributing factors may include gallstones, roundworms, tumour or surgeries.

V002-N00294.label: 胆瘅
V002-N00294.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证
V002-N00294.definition: 因湿热邪毒壅积于胆，胆汁及气血淤滞而化热。以右上腹痛，呕吐，发热等为主要表现的内脏瘅[热]病类疾病。

V002-N00294.label: 胆瘅
V002-N00294.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病

V002-N00294.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00294.label: 胆瘅
V002-N00294.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00294.definition: Characterized by right upper abdominal pain, nausea, vomiting, and occasionally fever. Often occurs when damp heat retains in the gallbladder or stagnant bile, qi and blood transform into heat.

V002-N00298.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00298.label: 蛔厥
V002-N00298.aliases: 因蛔虫窜入胆道所致的以疼痛、肢
V002-N00298.path: 第1部分：内科学｜虫病｜蛔虫病

V002-N00298.label: 蛔厥
V002-N00298.definition: 因蛔虫窜入胆道引起的痛病类疾病。

V002-N00298.label: 蛔厥
V002-N00298.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证
V002-N00298.definition: 因肠寒胃热，或肝胆气机紊乱，或因驱蛔不当，以致蛔虫窜入胆道而成。以突发上腹钻顶样绞痛，或伴呕蛔等为主要表现的痛病类疾病。

V002-N00298.label: 胆蛔病
V002-N00298.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病

V002-N00298.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00298.label: 蛔厥
V002-N00298.englishNames: cold limbs syndrome due to ascariasis; Biliary ascariasis; syncope due to ascariasis; cold limbs due to ascariasis
V002-N00298.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00298.definition: Characterized by a history of ascariasis, a sudden drilling upper abdominal colic pain, and vomiting. In severe cases, patients may present with vomiting of roundworms, cold sweats, cold limbs and fever. Contributing factors may include intestinal cold with stomach heat, reversed qi flow of the liver and gallbladder or roundworms entering the biliary tract due to incorrect roundworm-repelling methods.

V002-N00289.label: 肝著
V002-N00289.englishNames: Distension due to the Liver Disorder
V002-N00289.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证
V002-N00289.definition: 因肝热病、肝瘟等之后，肝脏气血郁滞，著而不行。以右胁痛，右胁下肿块，用手按捺捶击稍舒，肝功能异常等为主要表现的内脏胀[著]病类疾病。

V002-N00289.label: 肝胀
V002-N00289.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病

V002-N00289.label: 肝著
V002-N00289.englishNames: Liver distension disorder; stagnancy of liverqi and blood; liver fixity
V002-N00289.path: 传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝系病类

V002-N00289.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00289.label: 肝胀
V002-N00289.aliases: 肝着； 肝著； Liver distension disorder； Liver fixity
V002-N00289.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00289.definition: Characterized by pain and lumps in the right subcostal region that alleviate upon pressing or patting. Often occurs as a result of liver qi/blood stagnation.

V002-N00295.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00295.label: 胆胀
V002-N00295.definition: 以反复发作右上腹(胆区)疼痛、痞胀为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00295.label: 胆胀
V002-N00295.definition: 以反复发作右上腹疼痛、痞胀为主要表现的 胆道疾病。

V002-N00295.label: 胆胀
V002-N00295.englishNames: Distending Pain of Hypochondrium due to Gallbadder Disorder
V002-N00295.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证
V002-N00295.definition: 因湿热瘀滞等邪阻滞于胆，或因情志郁怒等刺激，使胆气郁滞不舒，以反复发作右上腹疼痛，痞胀等为主要表现的内脏胀（著）病类疾病。

V002-N00295.label: 胆胀病
V002-N00295.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病

V002-N00295.label: 胆胀
V002-N00295.path: 传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝系病类

V002-N00295.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00295.label: 胆胀
V002-N00295.englishNames: gallbladder distention; Gallbladder distension disorder; Gallbladder distention
V002-N00295.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00295.definition: Characterized by recurrent right upper abdominal pain with stuffiness and distension. Often results from retention of damp heat or phlegm stasis in the gallbladder or anger-related gallbladder qi stagnation.

V002-N00295.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00295.label: 胆胀

V002-N00281.label: 阳黄病
V002-N00281.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病｜黄疸病

V002-N00281.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00281.label: 阳黄病
V002-N00281.pinyinNames: yang huang bing; yáng huáng bìng
V002-N00281.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00281.definition: An acute condition characterized by bright yellow discolouration of the skin and sclera, dark, tea-like urine, and a decreased appetite. Associated symptoms may include fever, thirst, nausea, vomiting, distending pain in the subcostal region and white/light-coloured stools. Contributing factors may include external contraction of epidemic damp heat from improper diet, alcohol drinking, or stones/lumps forcing the bile to flow superficially.

V002-N00282.label: 阴黄病
V002-N00282.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病｜黄疸病

V002-N00282.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00282.label: 阴黄病
V002-N00282.pinyinNames: yin huang bing; yīn huáng bìng
V002-N00282.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00282.definition: A chronic condition characterized by dim yellow discolouration of the skin and sclera, dull pain in the subcostal region, lassitude, a poor appetite, abdominal distension or loose stools. Contributing factors may include persistent yang jaundice damaging anti-pathogenic qi, dampness retention or cold dampness affecting the spleen.

V002-N00283.label: 酒疸
V002-N00283.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病｜黄疸病

V002-N00283.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00283.label: 酒疸

V002-N00287.label: 黑疸
V002-N00287.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V002-N00287.definition: 因房事不节或痨、瘤等病，使脏气亏损，肾气衰败，血脉瘀阻所致。以疲乏无力，消瘦，肤色黧黑，血压降低等为主要表现的劳病类疾病。

V002-N00287.label: 黑疸
V002-N00287.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病｜黄疸病

V002-N00287.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00287.label: 黑疸
V002-N00287.englishNames: black jaundice; Darkening of the skin
V002-N00287.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00287.definition: Characterized by fatigue, weight loss, dark sallow discolouration of the skin and face, darkening of the forehead, black stools, itchy skin, and abdominal distension (as if there is water inside). Contributing factors may include deficiency of the liver and kidney due to chronic jaundice, internal phlegm, sexual indulgence, tuberculosis or tumour that consumes essential qi and obstructs blood vessels.

V002-N00287.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00287.label: 黑疸

V002-N00284.label: 肝黄
V002-N00284.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病｜黄疸病

V002-N00284.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00284.label: 肝黄
V002-N00284.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00284.definition: A type of jaundice caused by retention of damp heat and stasis in liver meridians due to excessive alcohol drinking, over-exertion or prolonged liver diseases. It is characterized by bluish or dark yellow complexion, weight loss, spasm of the extremities, and a dry tongue. Associated symptoms include bluish fingernails, eye redness or ascites with varicose abdominal veins.

V002-N00286.label: 蚕豆黄
V002-N00286.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证｜黄疸
V002-N00286.definition: 因食入新鲜蚕豆引起急性溶血所致。以黄疸，身痛，面白，心悸等为主要表现的疸病类疾病。

V002-N00286.label: 蚕豆黄
V002-N00286.pinyinNames: can dong huang; can er huang
V002-N00286.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病｜黄疸病

V002-N00286.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00286.label: 蚕豆黄
V002-N00286.pinyinNames: cán dòu huáng; can dong huang; can er huang
V002-N00286.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00286.definition: A type of haemolytic jaundice caused by ingestion of fresh fava beans. It is characterized by jaundice, pale face, body ache, abdominal pain, and urine in a colour resembling thick black tea or soy sauce. Associated symptoms include fever, nausea, vomiting, hypersomnia, palpitations, and scanty urine or urine retention.

V002-N00285.label: 血疸
V002-N00285.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证
V002-N00285.definition: 因输血、某些药物、蛇毒、疟疾等引起溶血所致。以黄疸，面白，头晕等为主要表现的疸病类疾病。

V002-N00285.label: 血疸
V002-N00285.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病｜黄疸病

V002-N00285.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00285.label: 血疸
V002-N00285.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00285.definition: A type of jaundice caused by medications, snake venom or malaria. It is characterized by jaundice, pale face and dizziness.

V002-N00275.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00275.label: 风眩
V002-N00275.definition: 风邪或风痰上扰清窍，以眩晕，头痛，脉弦等为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00275.label: 风眩
V002-N00275.englishNames: Dizziness Due to Wind-evil; Dizziness Due to Wind Pathogen
V002-N00275.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜脑系病证
V002-N00275.definition: 因肝肾阳亢阴亏，风阳上扰，气血逆乱所致。以眩晕，头痛，血压增高，脉弦等为主要表现的眩晕类疾病。

V002-N00275.label: 眩晕
V002-N00275.aliases: 癫眩； 掉眩； 风眩； 苦冒； 冒眩； 脑转； 时时自冒； 头目眩晕； 头眩； 头晕目眩； 头晕眼花； 眩冒； 眩运； 眴仆； 徇蒙招尤； 郁冒
V002-N00275.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜头面症状｜头部症状

V002-N00275.label: 风眩
V002-N00275.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病

V002-N00275.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00275.label: 风眩
V002-N00275.englishNames: wind vertigo; wind dizziness; Wind dizziness
V002-N00275.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00275.definition: Characterized by vertigo, headache, elevated blood pressure and a wiry pulse. Often results from yang hyperactivity due to liver/kidney yin deficiency, which further causes wind yang to ascend to disturb the heart mind.

V002-N00276.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00276.label: 痉病
V002-N00276.definition: 以项背强急，四肢抽搐，甚至口噤，角弓反张为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00276.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00276.label: 痉病
V002-N00276.path: 中医内科学｜内科学肢体病
V002-N00276.definition: 以项背强急，四肢抽搐，甚至口噤，角弓反张为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00276.label: 痉病
V002-N00276.definition: 以项背强急，四肢抽搐，甚至四噤，角弓反张 为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00276.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00276.label: 痉病
V002-N00276.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜肢体经络病证
V002-N00276.definition: 以项背强急、四肢抽搐、甚至口噤、角弓反张为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00276.label: 痉证
V002-N00276.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜经络肢体病证
V002-N00276.definition: 系指由于筋脉失养所引起的以项背强急，四肢抽搐，甚至角弓反张为主要特征的临床常见病。

V002-N00276.label: 痉病
V002-N00276.aliases: 痉证； 发痉； 风痉
V002-N00276.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病

V002-N00276.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00276.label: 痉病
V002-N00276.aliases: 痉证； Tetanus； 发痉； 风痉
V002-N00276.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00276.definition: Characterized by neck rigidity, and involuntary convulsions of the limbs. In severe cases, lockjaw or opisthotonos may also be present. Contributing factors may include six exogenous pathogenic factors or epidemic heat stirring liver wind or deficiency wind due to excessive sweating, loss of blood or chronic diarrhoea. These factors may cause malnourishment of the tendons and muscles and result in involuntary contractions.

V002-N00276.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00276.label: 痉病

V002-N00279.label: 肉痉
V002-N00279.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病｜痉病

V002-N00278.label: 虚痉
V002-N00278.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病｜痉病

V002-N00278.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00278.label: 虚痉
V002-N00278.englishNames: deficiency convulsion; Convulsions due to deficiency
V002-N00278.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00278.definition: Characterized by tremor of the hands/feet, and muscle spasm/pain. In severe cases, shaking of the head, convulsions, lassitude, fatigue, spontaneous sweating and dizziness may be present. Often occurs when chronic diseases consume yin fluids and result in internal stirring of deficiency wind or failure of qi and blood to nourish muscles or tendons.

V002-N00277.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00277.label: 刚痉
V002-N00277.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肢体病｜痉病
V002-N00277.definition: 以发热无汗，恶寒,颈项强急，头摇口噤，手足挛急或抽搐，甚则角弓反张，脉弦紧等为特征的痉病。

V002-N00277.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00277.label: 柔痉
V002-N00277.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肢体病｜痉病
V002-N00277.definition: 以身热汗出，颈项强急，头摇口噤,手足抽搐，甚则角弓反张，脉沉迟等为特征的痉病。

V002-N00277.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00277.label: 刚痉
V002-N00277.path: 中医内科学｜内科学肢体病
V002-N00277.definition: 以发热无汗，恶寒，颈项强急，头摇口噤，手足挛急或抽搐，甚则角弓反张，脉弦紧为主要表现的痉病。

V002-N00277.label: 外感痉病
V002-N00277.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病｜痉病

V002-N00277.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00277.label: 外感痉病
V002-N00277.aliases: 刚痉； 柔痉； Convulsive disorder； Convulsion disorder
V002-N00277.englishNames: exogenous convulsive disease; Convulsive disorders upon exposure to exogenous pathogens
V002-N00277.pinyinNames: wai gan jing bing; wài gǎn jìng bìng
V002-N00277.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00277.definition: Characterized by fever, aversion to heat (alternatively, aversion to cold may be present), neck rigidity, shaking of the head, lockjaw, and convulsions of the hands/feet. In severe cases, opisthotonos may be present. A hard convulsion has no sweating, whereas a soft convulsion has sweating. Often occurs when pathogenic wind cold, dampness, summer heat, damp heat or warmth affect the meridians or tendons. It may also occur when pathogenic heat enters the interior to stir liver wind, coupled with internal heat consuming yin fluids.

V002-N00247.label: 心系病
V002-N00247.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语

V002-N00247.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00247.label: 心系病
V002-N00247.englishNames: category of heart system disease; heart system diseases; Heart system disorders
V002-N00247.pinyinNames: xin xi bing; xīn xì bìng
V002-N00247.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00247.definition: Dysfunctions of the heart system and meridians due to six exogenous pathogenic factors, emotional disturbance, over-exertion, water retention and stagnant blood.

V002-N00267.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00267.label: 失志
V002-N00267.definition: 以狂言乱语，忽忽善忘，或见怯懦害怕，惊惕若捕，悲伤不乐为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00267.label: 失志病
V002-N00267.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病

V002-N00267.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00267.label: 失志
V002-N00267.englishNames: loss of will; Manic depression/ bipolar disorder
V002-N00267.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00267.definition: A condition characterized by alternating depression and elevated mood. During manic phases, individuals are often excitable and may speak in a rapid, uninterruptible manner. During depressive phases, individuals often present with a low mood or self-loathing. Forgetfulness, timidity, fear and jumpiness or easily startled may also be present. Often occurs when stagnant qi, phlegm and stasis disturbs the heart mind. Contributing factors may include emotional disturbance, feeling of guilty, improper diet or hereditary factors.

V002-N00258.label: 惊悸病
V002-N00258.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病

V002-N00258.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00258.label: 惊悸病
V002-N00258.englishNames: palpitation due to fright; Fright palpitations; fright-induced palpitations
V002-N00258.pinyinNames: jing ji bing; jīng jì bìng
V002-N00258.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00258.definition: Characterized by fright-induced palpitations, panic, jumpiness or easily startled, insomnia or dream-disturbed sleep. Often results from heart qi deficiency, fright, or phlegm heat disturbing the heart mind.

V002-N00269.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00269.label: 癫狂病
癫狂病
V002-N00269.definition: 以情感高潮与低落、躁狂与抑郁交替出现为 主要表现的脑神疾病。

V002-N00269.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00269.label: 癫狂
V002-N00269.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜心病
V002-N00269.definition: 多因情志不舒，气郁生痰、化火，扰乱神明。以情感高潮与低落、躁狂与抑郁交替出现为主要表现的脑神疾病。

V002-N00269.label: 癫狂病
V002-N00269.englishNames: manic and depressive psychosis; manicdepressive psychosis; manic depressive psychosis
V002-N00269.pinyinNames: dian kuang bing; dian  kuang bing
V002-N00269.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病

V002-N00272.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00272.label: 花癫
V002-N00272.path: 第1部分：内科学｜脑病｜癫狂病
V002-N00272.definition: 相火过旺，欲火妄炽，肝风易动，以情欲激动，性欲亢进，见异性则以为情人，甚则夜间四肢抽搐，牙关拘紧等为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00272.label: 发癫
V002-N00272.aliases: Depressive State； 呆病； 癫疾； 花痴； 文痴
V002-N00272.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜神志症状
V002-N00272.definition: 属于全身症状。是指精神抑郁，表情淡漠，沉默痴呆，语无伦次，净而少动的症状。

V002-N00272.label: 花癫
V002-N00272.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病｜癫狂病

V002-N00272.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00272.label: 花癫
V002-N00272.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00272.definition: A condition characterized by uncontrolled obsessions or abnormal behaviours about non-specific members of the opposite sex. It is often caused by liver qi stagnation transforming into fire or hyperactivity of ministerial fire.

V002-N00270.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00270.label: 癫病
V002-N00270.path: 第1部分：内科学｜脑病｜癫狂病
V002-N00270.definition: 以神志错乱，精神抑郁，表情淡漠，沉默呆滞，语无伦次，静而少动为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00270.label: 癫病
V002-N00270.definition: 以神志错乱，精神抑郁，表情淡漠，沉默呆 滞，语无伦次，静而少动为主要表现的癫狂 病。

V002-N00270.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00270.label: 癫证
V002-N00270.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜心病｜癫狂
V002-N00270.definition: 多因精神刺激，情志不畅，气郁痰结，蒙蔽神明，或因头颅损伤、脑部疾患、中毒伤神等所致，并常与先天遗传、性格特征等因素有关。以神志错乱、精神抑郁、表情淡漠、沉默痴呆、语无伦次、静而少动为主要表现的脑神疾病。

V002-N00270.label: 癫病
V002-N00270.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病｜癫狂病

V002-N00270.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00270.label: 癫病
V002-N00270.pinyinNames: diān bìng; dian bing; dian  bing
V002-N00270.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00270.definition: A major depressive episode characterized by mental confusion, low mood, dull or indifferent expression, incoherent speech and aversion to activity. Contributing factors may include heredity, personality defects or emotional disturbance. These factors may cause qi to stagnate and cloud the mind. It may also be secondary to brain diseases or poisoning.

V002-N00271.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00271.label: 狂病
V002-N00271.path: 第1部分：内科学｜脑病｜癫狂病
V002-N00271.definition: 以神志错乱，精神亢奋，打骂呼叫,躁妄不宁，动而多怒为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00271.label: 狂病
V002-N00271.definition: 以神志错乱，精神亢奋，打骂呼叫，躁妄不 宁，动而多怒为主要表现的癫狂病。

V002-N00271.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00271.label: 狂证
V002-N00271.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜心病｜癫狂
V002-N00271.definition: 因情志刺激，阴阳失调，痰火内盛，瘀血阻滞等，扰乱神明，心神失主所致。以神志错乱、精神亢奋、打骂呼叫、躁妄不宁、动而多怒为主要表现的脑神疾病。

V002-N00271.label: 狂病
V002-N00271.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜精神情志病类
V002-N00271.definition: 系因五志过极，或先天遗传，致使痰火壅盛、闭塞心窍、神机错乱所引起的以精神亢奋，狂躁不安，骂詈毁物，动而多怒，甚至持刀杀人为特征的临床常见多发的精神病。青壮年罹患者多。

V002-N00271.label: 狂病
V002-N00271.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病｜癫狂病

V002-N00271.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00271.label: 狂病
V002-N00271.englishNames: manic psychosis; Manic psychosis; manic disease
V002-N00271.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00271.definition: A major manic episode characterized by elevated mood, mental/physical hyperactivity, disorganized behaviour, restlessness, and irritability. Contributing factors may include mental stress-induced imbalance between yin and yang, phlegm fire ascending to disturb the mind or stagnant blood obstructing the heart mind.

V002-N00271.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00271.label: 狂病

V002-N00265.label: 梦游症
V002-N00265.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病

V002-N00257.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00257.label: 心水
V002-N00257.definition: 以心悸气短，动则更甚，口唇紫绀,烦躁不安，胸满腹胀，肢体以及阴部浮肿，小便短少，咳喘时作，不能平卧，舌淡暗，苔薄白，脉涩或结代或细数为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00257.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00257.label: 心衰
V002-N00257.definition: 心气虚衰，以喘息心悸,不能平卧,咳吐痰涎，水肿尿少为主要表现的危急重病。

V002-N00257.label: 心衰
V002-N00257.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病证
V002-N00257.definition: 因心病日久，阳气虚衰，运血无力，或气滞血瘀，心脉不畅，血瘀水停。以喘息心悸，不能平卧，咳吐痰涎，水肿少尿为主要表现的脱病类疾病。

V002-N00257.label: 心水病
V002-N00257.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病

V002-N00257.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00257.label: 心水病
V002-N00257.pinyinNames: xīn shuǐ bìng; xin shui bing
V002-N00257.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00257.definition: A severe heart condition characterized by palpitations, rapid breathing upon physical exertion, an inability to lie flat, coughing with foamy sputum, oedema, scanty urine or urine retention. It is often caused by heart qi deficiency, water retention due to heart yang deficiency or heart blood stasis.

V002-N00253.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00253.label: 心痹
V002-N00253.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肢体病｜痹病｜五脏痹
V002-N00253.definition: 风寒湿热诸邪致痹，久病伤及心脏，以心悸，胸闷短气，心脏严重杂音，颧颊紫红等为特征的痹病。

V002-N00253.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00253.label: 心痹
V002-N00253.path: 中医内科学｜内科学肢体病
V002-N00253.definition: 风寒湿热诸邪致痹，久病伤及心脏，以心悸，胸闷短气，心脏严重杂音，颧颊紫红等为主要表现的痹病。

V002-N00253.label: 心痹
V002-N00253.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病证
V002-N00253.definition: 因风寒湿热等邪侵及形体，阻痹经气，复感于邪，内舍于心，久之损伤心气脉络，心脉运行失畅。以心悸、胸闷短气、心脏严重杂音、颧颊紫红等为主要表现的内脏痹病类疾病。

V002-N00253.label: 心痹
V002-N00253.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病

V002-N00253.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00253.label: 心痹
V002-N00253.englishNames: heart impediment; heart bi; Heart bi-impediment
V002-N00253.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00253.definition: Characterized by palpitations, chest tightness, shortness of breath, and flushed cheeks. In severe cases, cardiac murmurs may be present. Often occurs when wind, cold and damp heat affect the heart.

V002-N00253.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00253.label: 心痹

V002-N00254.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00254.label: 心热病
V002-N00254.definition: 以心中烦热,睡眠不宁，神志昏迷，面红，口渴，尿黄，舌红，脉数为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00254.label: 心瘅
V002-N00254.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病证
V002-N00254.definition: 外感温热病邪，或因手术等创伤，温毒之邪乘虚侵入，内舍于心，损伤心之肌肉、内膜。以发热，心悸，胸闷等为主要表现的内脏瘅[热]病类疾病。

V002-N00254.label: 心瘅
V002-N00254.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病

V002-N00254.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00254.label: 心瘅
V002-N00254.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00254.definition: A condition characterized by fever, palpitations, chest tightness and a rapid, abrupt or regularly/irregularly intermittent pulse. Often occurs when exogenous warm heat or warm toxin due to surgical trauma affect the endocardium or cardiac muscle.

V002-N00263.label: 多寐病
V002-N00263.pinyinNames: er mei bing; dong mei bing
V002-N00263.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病

V002-N00263.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00263.label: 多寐病
V002-N00263.pinyinNames: er mei bing; dong mei bing; duō mèi bìng
V002-N00263.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00263.definition: Paroxysmal and uncontrollable excessive daytime sleepiness. Often occurs when turbid phlegm obstructs the ascending of clear yang.

V002-N00260.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00260.label: 百合病
V002-N00260.definition: 以神情恍惚，行、卧、饮食等皆觉不适为主要表现的神志疾病。

V002-N00260.label: 百合病
V002-N00260.definition: 以神情恍惚，行、卧、饮食等皆觉不适为主要 表现的神志疾病。

V002-N00260.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00260.label: 百合病
V002-N00260.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜心病
V002-N00260.definition: 多继发于急性热病，或中毒、脑部疾患等之后，余邪未尽，阴液亏损，气血失调，经脉失养，心神惑乱。以神情恍惚，行、卧、饮食等皆觉不适为主要表现的脑神疾病。

V002-N00260.label: 百合病
V002-N00260.englishNames: Bulbus lillii syndrome; Depressive state of psychic disease
V002-N00260.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜精神情志病类
V002-N00260.definition: 多继发于急性热病，或中毒、脑部疾患等之后，余邪未尽，阴液亏损，气血失调，经脉失养，心神惑乱。以神情恍惚，行、卧、饮食等皆觉不适为主要表现的脑神疾病。

V002-N00260.label: 百合病
V002-N00260.englishNames: lily disease; Baihe Disease; Lily disorder; disease of all vessels
V002-N00260.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病

V002-N00260.label: 百合病
V002-N00260.englishNames: lily disease; Baihe Disease; Lily disorder; disease of all vessels
V002-N00260.path: 传统医学疾病｜精神情志病类

V002-N00260.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00260.label: 百合病
V002-N00260.englishNames: lily disease; Lily bulb disease; Baihe Disease; Lily disorder; disease of all vessels
V002-N00260.pinyinNames: bai he bing; bǎi hé bìng
V002-N00260.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00260.definition: Characterized by mental strain, listlessness, insomnia, and a poor appetite. Often results from disordered qi and blood, deficiency of yin fluids, malnourishment of meridians and disturbance of the heart mind after acute febrile diseases, poisoning or brain trauma.

V002-N00260.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00260.label: 百合病

V002-N00256.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00256.label: 心厥
V002-N00256.definition: 由心脏的严重病变引起，以面白，肢厥，血压降低,晕厥或神昏为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00256.label: 心厥
V002-N00256.definition: 由心脏的严重病变引起的，以面白，肢厥，血 压降低，晕厥或神昏为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00256.label: 心厥
V002-N00256.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病证
V002-N00256.definition: 由于心脏的严重病变，以致心阳虚衰，运血无力，心脉、脑神失血充养而阳气外脱。以面白，肢厥，脉微，血压降低，晕厥或神昏为主要表现的心病及脑的厥病类疾病。

V002-N00256.label: 心厥病
V002-N00256.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病

V002-N00256.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00256.label: 心厥
V002-N00256.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00256.definition: A severe condition characterized by a feeble pulse, cold limbs, low blood pressure and fainting or loss of consciousness. It is often caused by heart yang deficiency and floating of yang qi.

V002-N00261.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00261.label: 神劳
V002-N00261.definition: 以神疲，失眠，健忘，头晕痛等为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00261.label: 神劳
V002-N00261.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜脑系病证
V002-N00261.definition: 因长期神情紧张，劳神思虑过度，导致阴阳失调，神气亏虚。以神疲，失眠，健忘，头晕痛等为主要表现的劳病类疾病。

V002-N00261.label: 神劳病
V002-N00261.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病

V002-N00273.label: 痴呆病
V002-N00273.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病

V002-N00273.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00273.label: 痴呆病
V002-N00273.pinyinNames: chi dai bing; chī dāi bìng
V002-N00273.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00273.definition: A progressive condition characterized by loss of memory, slow reactions and a decline or eventually loss of cognitive and intellectual functions. Contributing factors include ageing-related deficiency of essence blood, congenital deficiency, or phlegm stasis obstructing the mind.

V002-N00262.label: 不寐病
V002-N00262.definition: 以不易入睡或睡眠短浅易醒，甚至整夜不能 入睡为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00262.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00262.label: 失眠症
V002-N00262.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜心病
V002-N00262.definition: 多因思虑劳神太过、气血亏虚，或因情志所伤、气机不舒，以及火热内扰、痰浊阻滞等，使阴阳不和、神气不宁所致，以经常不能获得正常睡眠为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00262.label: 不寐
V002-N00262.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病证
V002-N00262.definition: 由心神失养或心神不安所致，以经常不能获得正常睡眠为特征的一类病证。主要表现为睡眠时间、深度的不足。轻者入睡困难，或寐而不酣，时寐时醒，或醒后不能再寐，重则彻夜不寐。病因为情志失常、饮食不节、劳逸失调、病后体虚。病机为阴盛阳衰、阴阳失交。

V002-N00262.label: 不寐
V002-N00262.aliases: 不得眠； 不眠； 目不瞑； 少寐； 少睡； 失眠； 睡眠减少； 无眠
V002-N00262.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜睡眠症状
V002-N00262.definition: 经常性的睡眠减少，或不易入睡，或睡眠短浅而易醒，甚或彻夜不眠的表现。

V002-N00262.label: 不寐病
V002-N00262.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病

V002-N00262.label: 不寐
V002-N00262.path: 传统医学疾病｜精神情志病类

V002-N00262.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00262.label: 不寐
V002-N00262.path: 分类与代码表｜必要信息（基本症状）｜骨干症状｜心神系症状类

V002-N00262.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00262.label: 不寐
V002-N00262.aliases: 失眠； 不得眠； 不得卧； 不眠； 目不瞑； 少寐； 少睡； 无眠
V002-N00262.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N00262.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00262.label: 不寐
V002-N00262.aliases: 不寐病； Insomnia disorder； Sleeplessness； 失眠
V002-N00262.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00262.definition: Characterized by an inability to obtain normal sleep and drowsiness and low energy during the day. Associated symptoms may include dizziness, tinnitus and poor memory. Often results from emotional disturbances, mental exhaustion and, subsequently, the disharmony between the Ying-nutrients and Wei-defence.

V002-N00262.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00262.label: 失眠
V002-N00262.definition: inability to sleep or abnormal wakefulness, the same as insomnia

V002-N00268.label: 邪祟病
V002-N00268.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病

V002-N00268.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00268.label: 邪祟病
V002-N00268.englishNames: delusional disorders; Paranoia disorders; illusion due to evil disease
V002-N00268.pinyinNames: xié suì bìng; xie sui bing
V002-N00268.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00268.definition: A group of paranoid or delusional symptoms that include seeing things or hearing voices that others do not, smelling something that does not exist, disorganized thinking and speech or hallucinations of sudden death. It is often caused by deficiency of anti-pathogenic qi coupled with pathogenic factors disturbing the mind or phlegm stasis misting the heart mind.

V002-N00252.label: 高原胸痹
V002-N00252.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病证
V002-N00252.definition: 新处高原之地，气候失宜，使胸阳痹阻，心血不畅，气滞血瘀而成。以头痛，胸闷痛，咳嗽气喘，心悸等为主要表现的内脏痹病类疾病。

V002-N00252.label: 高原胸痹
V002-N00252.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病

V002-N00249.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00249.label: 真心痛
V002-N00249.definition: 以心胸剧痛，持续不解，伴汗出肢冷，面白唇青，手足青至节，脉微欲绝为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00249.label: 真心痛
V002-N00249.definition: 以心胸剧痛，持续不解，伴有汗出肢冷，面白 唇青，手足青至节，脉微欲绝为主要表现的 疾病。

V002-N00249.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00249.label: 厥心痛
V002-N00249.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜心病｜胸痹
V002-N00249.definition: 因胸阳虚损，或气阴不足，或瘀痰阻痹、心脉闭塞所致。以心胸剧痛、甚至持续不解，伴有汗出肢冷、面白唇青、脉微欲绝为主要表现的痛症类疾病。

V002-N00249.label: 真心痛
V002-N00249.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病证
V002-N00249.definition: 是胸痹进一步发展的严重病证，其特点为剧烈而持久的胸骨后疼痛，伴心悸、水肿、肢冷、喘促、汗出、面色苍白等症状。病因为寒邪内侵、饮食失调、情志失节、年迈体弱。病机为心脉痹阻，病位在心，涉及肝脾肾等。

V002-N00249.label: 真心痛
V002-N00249.englishNames: real heart pain; angina pectoris; true heart pain; True heart pain disorder
V002-N00249.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病

V002-N00249.label: 厥心痛
V002-N00249.englishNames: Pericordial Pain with Cold Limbs; precordial pain with cold limbs; precordial pain; true heart pain with cold limbs
V002-N00249.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病｜真心痛

V002-N00249.label: 真心痛
V002-N00249.englishNames: real heart pain; angina pectoris; true heart pain; True heart pain disorder
V002-N00249.path: 传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病类｜胸痹

V002-N00249.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00249.label: 厥心痛
V002-N00249.englishNames: precordial pain; Cardiac pain with cold limbs; true heart pain with cold limbs; Pericordial Pain with Cold Limbs; precordial pain with cold limbs
V002-N00249.pinyinNames: jué xīn tòng; jue xin tong
V002-N00249.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00249.definition: A paroxysmal heart condition characterized by cardiac pain radiating toward the back and aggravates upon physical exertion and alleviates after rest. Associated symptoms include upward rushing of qi to the throat, chest discomfort, repeated sighing, cold limbs and a dark-bluish facial complexion. Often results from deficiency of the five zang organs, emotional disturbance, and pathogenic factors affecting the pericardium or phlegm stasis obstructing the heart.

V002-N00249.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00249.label: 真心痛
V002-N00249.englishNames: real heart pain; angina pectoris; true heart pain; true cardiac pain; True heart pain disorder; True cardiac pain
V002-N00249.pinyinNames: zhen xin tong; zhēn xīn tòng
V002-N00249.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00249.definition: A critical heart condition characterized by sudden, severe or persistent cardiac pain. Associated symptoms include sweats, cold limbs, a pale face, bluish lips and an extremely feeble or regularly/irregularly intermittent pulse. Often results from heart yang deficiency, insufficiency of qi and yin, or phlegm-stasis obstructing the heart vessels.

V002-N00251.englishNames: true heart pain with cold limbs
V002-N00251.path: 第1部分：内科学｜心病｜真心痛
V002-N00251.definition: 以心痛发作时伴四肢厥冷为主要表现的轻症真心痛。

V002-N00251.label: 厥心痛
V002-N00251.definition: 一种较真心痛为轻的心系疾病，以心痛发作 时伴四肢厥冷为主要临床特征。

V002-N00251.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表

V002-N00251.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜心病｜胸痹
V002-N00251.definition: 因胸阳虚损，或气阴不足，或瘀痰阻痹、心脉闭塞所致。以心胸剧痛、甚至持续不解，伴有汗出肢冷、面白唇青、脉微欲绝为主要表现的痛症类疾病。

V002-N00251.label: 厥心痛
V002-N00251.englishNames: Precordial Pain Caused by Cold-evil; Precordial Pain With Cold Limbs
V002-N00251.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病证
V002-N00251.definition: 因胸阳虚损，或气阴不足，或瘀痰阻痹，心脉闭塞所致。以心胸剧痛，甚至持续不解，伴有汗出肢冷、面白唇青、脉微欲绝为主要表现的痛病类疾病。

V002-N00251.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病｜真心痛

V002-N00251.label: 厥心痛
V002-N00251.englishNames: precordial pain; Cardiac pain with cold limbs; true heart pain with cold limbs; Pericordial Pain with Cold Limbs; precordial pain with cold limbs
V002-N00251.pinyinNames: jué xīn tòng; jue xin tong
V002-N00251.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00251.definition: A paroxysmal heart condition characterized by cardiac pain radiating toward the back and aggravates upon physical exertion and alleviates after rest. Associated symptoms include upward rushing of qi to the throat, chest discomfort, repeated sighing, cold limbs and a dark-bluish facial complexion. Often results from deficiency of the five zang organs, emotional disturbance, and pathogenic factors affecting the pericardium or phlegm stasis obstructing the heart.

V002-N00250.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00250.label: 卒心痛
V002-N00250.definition: 突发心胸剧痛为主要表现的危急重病。

V002-N00250.label: 卒心痛
V002-N00250.definition: 突然发作心胸剧痛为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00250.label: 卒心痛
V002-N00250.englishNames: sudden heart pain; sudden precordial pain
V002-N00250.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病｜真心痛

V002-N00250.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00250.label: 卒心痛
V002-N00250.englishNames: sudden heart pain; Sudden cardiac pain; sudden cardiac pain; sudden precordial pain
V002-N00250.pinyinNames: zu xin tong; zú xīn tòng
V002-N00250.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00250.definition: Characterized by sudden, stabbing cardiac pain, angina and shortness of breath. In severe cases, feeling of impending death may be present. Often results from deficiency of zang–fu organs, wind cold directly attacking the heart or phlegm stasis obstructing the heart vessels.

V002-N00250.label: 卒心痛

V002-N00264.label: 梦魇病
V002-N00264.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病

V002-N00264.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00264.label: 梦魇
V002-N00264.path: 分类与代码表｜必要信息（基本症状）｜骨干症状｜心神系症状类

V002-N00264.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00264.label: 梦魇
V002-N00264.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00264.definition: An unpleasant dream that may contain screaming, a feeling of oppressed by heavy objects or a sense of suffocation. Individuals often wake up in a state of distress but able to return to sleep. Often occurs when fear or fright damages heart qi or when pathogenic factors disturb the heart mind.

V002-N00255.label: 虚眩
V002-N00255.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜脑系病证
V002-N00255.definition: 因禀赋不足，或后天失养、劳累太过等，以致气弱血亏，心脉、清窍失其所养。以眩晕，疲乏，脉弱等为主要表现的眩晕类疾病。

V002-N00255.label: 虚眩
V002-N00255.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病

V002-N00255.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00255.label: 虚眩
V002-N00255.englishNames: deficiency dizziness; Dizziness due to deficiency
V002-N00255.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00255.definition: Characterized by dizziness that aggravates upon postural changes, fatigue, low blood pressure and a weak pulse. It is often caused by failure of qi and blood to nourish the heart and mind due to congenital deficiency, postnatal malnutrition or over-exertion.

V002-N00259.label: 心悸
V002-N00259.aliases: Palpitation disorders； 过早搏动； 心动过缓； 心动过速； 心动悸； 心房颤动； 心房扑动； 心下悸
V002-N00259.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病证
V002-N00259.definition: 是指气血阴阳亏虚，或痰饮瘀血阻滞，心失所养，心脉不畅，引起心中急剧跳动，惊慌不安，不能自主为主要表现的一种病证。

V002-N00259.label: 怔忡病
V002-N00259.pinyinNames: zheng zhong bing; zheng chong bing
V002-N00259.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病

V002-N00259.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00259.label: 怔忡病
V002-N00259.englishNames: severe palpitations; severe palpitation; Fearful throbbing
V002-N00259.pinyinNames: zheng zhong bing; zhēng chōng bìng; zheng chong bing
V002-N00259.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00259.definition: Characterized by irregular, paroxysmal and involuntary palpitations. Associated symptoms include chest tightness, shortness of breath, visible pulsations on the chest at the apex, umbilical venous pulsations, and a regularly/irregularly intermittent or abrupt and rapid pulse. Often results from heart yin/blood failing to nourish the heart, pathogenic factors obstructing the heart vessels or water retention (due to yang deficiency) affecting the heart.

V002-N00266.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00266.label: 痫病
V002-N00266.definition: 以突然昏仆，口吐涎沫，肢体抽搐，移时苏醒，反复发作为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00266.label: 癇病
V002-N00266.aliases: 癫痫； 痫病； 痫证； 羊痫风
V002-N00266.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病证
V002-N00266.definition: 系指脏腑功能失调，气机逆乱，元神失控所致的一种发作性神志异常疾病。以突然意识丧失，发则仆倒，不省人事，两目上视，口吐涎沫，四肢抽搐，或口中怪叫，移时苏醒，一如常人为主要临床表现的一种发作性疾病。

V002-N00266.label: 痫病
V002-N00266.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病

V002-N00266.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00266.label: 痫病
V002-N00266.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00266.definition: A condition characterized by a long-term risk of recurrent seizures. Clinical signs and symptoms include sudden unconsciousness, drooling, convulsions of the limbs, upward staring of the eyes often preceded by vocalizations. Contributing factors may include heredity, fear/fright, emotional disturbance, or improper diet. It may occur secondary to brain diseases, high fever, poisoning or head trauma. These factors can cause wind phlegm or stagnant blood to cloud the heart mind.

V002-N00266.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00266.label: 痫病

V002-N00266.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00266.label: 癫痫
V002-N00266.aliases: 癫疾； 痫病； 痫证
V002-N00266.definition: a disease characterized by temporary loss of consciousness with foaming at the mouth and convulsions of the limbs, and return to normal after the episode

V002-N00352.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00352.label: 肺系病
肺系病
V002-N00352.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语

V002-N00352.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00352.label: 肺系病
V002-N00352.englishNames: category of lung system disease; Lung system diseases; lung system diseases
V002-N00352.pinyinNames: fei xi bing; fèi xì bìng
V002-N00352.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00352.definition: Dysfunctions of the lung system and meridians due to six exogenous pathogenic factors, emotional disturbance, over-exertion, water retention and stagnant blood.

V002-N00360.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00360.label: 哮病
V002-N00360.definition: 以发作性喉中哮鸣有声，呼吸困难，甚则喘息不得平卧等为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00360.label: 哮病
V002-N00360.definition: 以发作性喉中哮鸣有声，呼吸 困难，甚则喘息不得平卧为主要表现的疾 病。

V002-N00360.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00360.label: 哮喘
V002-N00360.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肺病
V002-N00360.definition: 哮指呼吸喘促而喉间有哮鸣音；喘指呼吸困难，短促急迫，甚则张口抬肩，鼻翼煽动，不能平卧。哮必兼喘，喘不必兼哮。

V002-N00360.label: 喘证
V002-N00360.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病证
V002-N00360.definition: 是指由于感受外邪，痰浊内蕴，情志失调而致肺气上逆，失于宣降，或久病气虚，肾失摄纳，以呼吸困难，甚则张口抬肩，鼻翼煽动，不能平卧等为主要临床表现的一种常见病证。严重者可致喘脱。

V002-N00360.label: 哮喘病
V002-N00360.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病

V002-N00360.label: 哮病
V002-N00360.englishNames: Wheezing disorder; asthma; wheezing; wheezing disease
V002-N00360.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病｜哮喘病

V002-N00360.label: 哮病
V002-N00360.englishNames: Wheezing disorder; asthma; wheezing; wheezing disease
V002-N00360.path: 传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病类

V002-N00360.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00360.label: 哮喘
V002-N00360.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜病理声音情况｜呼吸声

V002-N00360.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00360.label: 哮喘病
V002-N00360.pinyinNames: xiao chuan bing; xiào chuǎn bìng
V002-N00360.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00360.definition: Characterized by recurrent episodes of difficulty breathing, wheezing and shortness of breath with an inability to lie flat. Contributing factors may include congenital deficiency or impaired functions of the lung, spleen and kidney. These factors may generate phlegm to obstruct the airway.

V002-N00360.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00360.label: 哮病
V002-N00360.aliases: 哮喘； 哮证； Wheezing disorder； Wheezing pattern
V002-N00360.englishNames: Wheezing disorder; asthma; wheezing disease; wheezing; Wheezing; wheezing [disease/disorder]
V002-N00360.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00360.definition: Characterized by sudden, whistling sounds with an inability to lie flat. Precursory symptoms may include an itchy nose, sneezing, cough and chest tightness. Contributing factors may include heredity, exposure to dust or irritant gas, exogenous pathogenic factors, fatigue, improper diet or emotions. These factors, coupled with pre-existing phlegm may cause phlegm qi to stagnate and obstruct the respiratory airways.

V002-N00360.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00360.label: 哮喘

V002-N00363.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00363.label: 暴喘
V002-N00363.definition: 以痰鸣如吼，气息喘促，汗出淋漓，不能平卧，胸高胁胀，面色发暗，苔黄黏腻，脉滑数等为主要表现的危急重病。

V002-N00363.label: 暴喘
V002-N00363.definition: 以突然剧烈喘急，呼吸急促，张口抬肩，不能 平卧，四肢厥冷，大汗淋漓，唇肢青紫为主要 表现的疾病。

V002-N00363.label: 暴喘
V002-N00363.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病｜哮喘病

V002-N00363.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00363.label: 暴喘
V002-N00363.englishNames: sudden dyspnea; Fulminant wheezing; fulminant dyspnea
V002-N00363.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00363.definition: An acute, severe condition characterized by sudden wheezing, shortness of breath, sweating, an inability to lie flat, bulging chest, subcostal distension, a dark complexion, and cyanosis of the lips. Contributing factors include a history of chronic asthma, exposure to exogenous pathogens or dysfunction of the internal organs. These factors may cause lung qi to ascend and impair the function of the kidney to absorb qi.

V002-N00363.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00363.label: 暴喘

V002-N00362.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00362.label: 喘病
V002-N00362.definition: 以气短喘促等为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00362.label: 喘病
V002-N00362.definition: 因久患肺系疾病或他脏病变影响，致肺气上 逆肃降无权，以气短喘促为主要表现的疾 病。

V002-N00362.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00362.label: 哮喘
V002-N00362.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肺病
V002-N00362.definition: 哮指呼吸喘促而喉间有哮鸣音；喘指呼吸困难，短促急迫，甚则张口抬肩，鼻翼煽动，不能平卧。哮必兼喘，喘不必兼哮。

V002-N00362.label: 喘证
V002-N00362.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病证
V002-N00362.definition: 是指由于感受外邪，痰浊内蕴，情志失调而致肺气上逆，失于宣降，或久病气虚，肾失摄纳，以呼吸困难，甚则张口抬肩，鼻翼煽动，不能平卧等为主要临床表现的一种常见病证。严重者可致喘脱。

V002-N00362.label: 喘病
V002-N00362.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病｜哮喘病

V002-N00362.label: 喘证
V002-N00362.path: 传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病类

V002-N00362.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00362.label: 喘病
V002-N00362.aliases: 喘证； Dyspnoea disorder； Dyspnoea pattern
V002-N00362.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00362.definition: Characterized by shortness of breath, rapid breathing, and difficulty breathing that worsens upon exertion. In severe cases, breathing with an open mouth and elevated shoulder, nasal flaring and an inability to lie flat may be present. Associated symptoms may include cough with profuse phlegm, chest tightness, cyanosis, raised chest and distension in the subcostal region. Contributing factors may include heredity, exogenous pathogenic wind cold affecting the lung, turbid phlegm accumulating in the lung, chronic cough damaging lung qi or kidney failing to absorb qi.

V002-N00362.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00362.label: 喘证

V002-N00361.label: 哮病
V002-N00361.definition: 以发作性喉中哮鸣有声，呼吸困难，甚则喘息不得平卧等为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00361.label: 哮病
V002-N00361.definition: 以发作性喉中哮鸣有声，呼吸 困难，甚则喘息不得平卧为主要表现的疾 病。

V002-N00361.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00361.label: 哮喘
V002-N00361.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肺病
V002-N00361.definition: 哮指呼吸喘促而喉间有哮鸣音；喘指呼吸困难，短促急迫，甚则张口抬肩，鼻翼煽动，不能平卧。哮必兼喘，喘不必兼哮。

V002-N00361.label: 哮病
V002-N00361.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病证
V002-N00361.definition: 是由于宿痰伏肺，遇诱因或感邪引触，以致痰阻气道，肺失肃降，气道挛急所致发作性的痰鸣气喘疾患。发作时喉中哮鸣有声，呼吸气促困难，甚则喘息不能平卧为主要表现。

V002-N00361.englishNames: Wheezing disorder; asthma; wheezing; wheezing disease

V002-N00361.definition: Characterized by sudden, whistling sounds with an inability to lie flat. Precursory symptoms may include an itchy nose, sneezing, cough and chest tightness. Contributing factors may include heredity, exposure to dust or irritant gas, exogenous pathogenic factors, fatigue, improper diet or emotions. These factors, coupled with pre-existing phlegm may cause phlegm qi to stagnate and obstruct the respiratory airways.

V002-N00370.label: 尘肺
V002-N00370.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病证
V002-N00370.definition: 因长期生活于尘埃环境之中，粉尘吸入，沉积于肺，阻塞肺络，使肺失清肃，主气司宣发之功能减弱。以咳嗽，胸闷，胸痛，气喘等为主要表现的内脏痹病类疾病。

V002-N00370.label: 尘肺
V002-N00370.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病

V002-N00370.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00370.label: 尘肺
V002-N00370.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00370.definition: A chronic condition characterized by persistent coughing, chest tightness/pain, and over time, panting upon physical exertion. Often occurs when inhaled dust in working or living environment obstructs lung collaterals and impairs the lung’s function in dispersing and descending.

V002-N00371.label: 肺心病
V002-N00371.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病证
V002-N00371.definition: 因肺病日久，痰气阻滞，进而导致心脉瘀阻。以咳嗽气喘，咯痰，心悸水肿，唇舌紫暗等为主要表现的肺病及心的疾病。

V002-N00371.label: 肺心病
V002-N00371.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病

V002-N00356.label: 肺咳
V002-N00356.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病

V002-N00356.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00356.label: 肺咳

V002-N00358.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00358.label: 久咳
V002-N00358.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肺病｜咳嗽［病］
V002-N00358.definition: 以咳嗽经久不愈为特征的咳嗽病。

V002-N00358.label: 咳嗽
V002-N00358.aliases: 暴咳； 久咳； 内伤咳嗽； 外感咳嗽
V002-N00358.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病证
V002-N00358.definition: 由六淫外邪侵袭肺系，或脏腑功能失调，内伤及肺，肺气不清，失于宣肃所成，临床以咳嗽、咯痰为主要表现。若咳与嗽分别言之，则有声无痰为咳，有痰无声为嗽。一般痰声多并见，难以截然分开，故以咳嗽并称。

V002-N00358.label: 久咳病
V002-N00358.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病｜肺咳

V002-N00358.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00358.label: 久咳病
V002-N00358.pinyinNames: jiǔ ké bìng; jiu ke bing
V002-N00358.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00358.definition: Characterized by persistent, recurrent coughing with a prolonged period.

V002-N00372.label: 肺水病
V002-N00372.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病

V002-N00372.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00372.label: 肺水病
V002-N00372.pinyinNames: fèi shuǐ bìng; fei shui bing
V002-N00372.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00372.definition: An acute, severe condition characterized by sudden rapid breathing, coughing with a large amount of bloody, foamy sputum, oedema, scanty urine, severe palpitations, a pale face, and cyanosis of the tongue and lips. Often occurs when heart yang deficiency or too fast infusion rates cause excess fluids to accumulate in the lung.

V002-N00367.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00367.label: 肺痈
V002-N00367.definition: 以骤起发热，咳嗽，胸痛，咯腥臭脓血痰为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00367.label: 肺痈
V002-N00367.definition: 以骤起发热，咳嗽，胸痛，咯腥臭脓血痰为主 要表现的疾病。

V002-N00367.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00367.label: 肺痈
V002-N00367.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肺病
V002-N00367.definition: 因热毒壅肺，使肺叶生疮，血败肉腐，形成痈脓。以骤起发热、咳嗽、胸痛、咯腥臭脓血痰为主要表现的内脏痈病类疾病。

V002-N00367.label: 肺痈
V002-N00367.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病证

V002-N00366.definition: 皮痹日久，肺脏虚损，复受风寒湿之邪而致肺气痹阻，以皮肤麻木不仁，甚则变硬,继而喘嗽气急，胸 背疼痛，心胸烦闷，卧则喘促，甚则呕恶等为特征的痹病。

V002-N00359.definition: Characterized by cough with sticky, yellow phlegm or blood-stained sputum and thirst. Associated symptoms may include tidal fever, chills, pain in the subcostal region, constipation and yellow urine. Often occurs when pathogenic heat, heat of zang–fu organs or phlegm heat affect the dispersing and descending of lung qi.

V002-N00373.definition: 以喘促，神志昏蒙为主要表现的肺病及脑的疾病。

V002-N00368.label: 肺胀

V002-N00368.label: 肺胀

V002-N00368.definition: 是指多种慢性肺系疾患反复发作，迁延不愈，肺脾肾三脏虚损，从而导致肺管不利，肺气壅滞，气道不畅，胸膺胀满不能敛降。临床表现见喘息气促，咳嗽，咯痰，胸部膨满，憋闷如塞，或唇甲紫绀，心悸浮肿等症。重者可出现昏迷、喘脱等危重证候。

Often affects children and results from retained phlegm fire in the cheek following wind heat toxin entering the body via the mouth and nose.

V002-N00043.label: 软脚瘟

V002-N00043.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V002-N00043.label: 软脚瘟
V002-N00043.englishNames: Flaccid foot pestilence; pestilence with flaccidity of foot; pestilence with flaccid leg; pestilent flaccidity of foot
V002-N00043.pinyinNames: ruǎn jiǎo wēn; ruan jiao wen
V002-N00043.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00043.definition: Characterized by double-peaked fever, headache, abdominal pain, diarrhoea, pain in the surface of the body, muscle flaccidity/weakness that develops into atrophy, unstable walking, and malformation of the affected limbs. It commonly affects children with pestilence. This condition often occurs when summer dampness affect the intestines and stomach, accumulates in the muscles and obstructs meridians. Alternatively, it may occur when heat damages yin fluids and results in malnourishment of the sinews.

V002-N00047.vocabName: 简帛医药文献词典（2018）（未校勘）
V002-N00047.label: 瘴病
V002-N00047.path: 上編 簡帛醫學詞語｜病症詞語

V002-N00047.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V002-N00047.label: 瘴病
V002-N00047.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00047.definition: Characterized by sudden onset of alternating chill and fever, headache, aversion to cold, upper and lower back stiffness, hoarse voice, abdominal distention, body heaviness, bones and joints pain. In severe case, high fever and unconsciousness may be present. They are commonly seen in tropical or subtropical forests. Often results from exposure to miasma in hot, humid mountainous regions.

V002-N00090.label: 沙虱病
V002-N00090.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜传染病
V002-N00090.definition: 由沙虱（沙螨）叮咬所致的病证，称为沙虱病。

V002-N00090.label: 沙虱病
V002-N00090.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V002-N00090.label: 沙虱病
V002-N00090.pinyinNames: sha shi bing; shā shī bìng
V002-N00090.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00090.definition: An infectious form of typhus caused by the intracellular parasitic bacterium Orientia tsutsugamushi. The bite of an infected mite may not cause pain but a prickly feeling. However, after two or three days, individuals may experience chills, fever, skin rashes, ulcerations and scabbing. Often results from the bite of trombiculid mite. The toxin of the mite then damages the blood in the localized area.

V002-N00033.pinyinNames: feng wen bing; fēng wēn bìng
V002-N00033.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00033.definition: A type of pestilence characterized by a sudden fever, mild aversion to wind cold, cough with yellow phlegm or haemoptysis, sore throat, followed by a persistent high-grade fever, sweating, excessive thirst, chest tightness and panting. In severe cases, unconsciousness, delirium and convulsions may be present. It is often seen in spring and winter. Contributing factors include pathogenic wind warmth attacking the Wei-defence, heat accumulating in the lung or heat transmitting to the pericardium.

V002-N00033.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00033.label: 风温

V002-N00045.label: 急黄
V002-N00045.definition: 病势暴急凶险，伴有高热，烦渴，神昏，谵语， 甚则嗜睡昏迷的黄疸病。

V002-N00045.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00045.label: 阳黄
V002-N00045.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肝胆病｜肝病｜黄疸
V002-N00045.definition: 皮肤及面部黄色鲜明如橘皮者，为湿热熏蒸所致。

V002-N00045.label: 黄疸
V002-N00045.aliases: 黄瘅； 瘟黄； 虚黄
V002-N00045.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证
V002-N00045.definition: 是感受湿热疫毒，肝胆气机受阻，疏泄失常，胆汁外溢所致，以目黄、身黄、尿黄为主要表现的常见肝胆病证。黄疸在古代亦称黄瘅，由于疸与瘅通，故其义相同。

V002-N00045.label: 急黄
V002-N00045.englishNames: Acute Jaundice; Progressive Aggravation of Jaundice
V002-N00045.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证｜黄疸
V002-N00045.definition: 黄疸的一种，为湿热夹毒，郁而化火所致。发病急骤，其色如金，伴皮肤瘙痒，高热口渴，胁痛腹满，神昏谵语，烦躁抽搐，或见衄血，便血，或肌肤瘀斑，舌质红绛，苔黄而燥，脉弦滑或数。

V002-N00045.label: 肝瘟
V002-N00045.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜传染病
V002-N00045.definition: 湿热疫毒内攻，肝脏严重受损，并伤及营血，内闭心神。以发热，黄疸迅速加深，神志昏蒙出血为主要表现的疫病类疾病。

V002-N00045.label: 肝瘟
V002-N00045.aliases: 急黄； 瘟黄； 疫黄
V002-N00045.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V002-N00045.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00045.label: 肝瘟
V002-N00045.aliases: 急黄； 瘟黄； 疫黄； Jaundice disorder； Pestilential jaundice； Acute jaundice
V002-N00045.englishNames: liver-pestilence disease; liver pestilence; Liver pestilence; pestilent jaundice
V002-N00045.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00045.definition: Characterized by a persistent high-grade fever, severe jaundice, pain in the subcostal region, abdominal distension, followed by somnolence, unconsciousness, delirium and mania. Associated symptoms may include bleeding, scanty urine or urine retention. Often occurs when damp heat toxin attacks the spleen and liver to scorch Ying nutrients and blood, damage the liver and, in severe cases, blocks the heart mind.

V002-N00045.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00045.label: 急黄

V002-N00045.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00045.label: 瘟黄

V002-N00037.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00037.label: 伏暑
V002-N00037.definition: 暑热或暑湿病邪郁伏而于秋冬季节发病急骤的温病。

V002-N00037.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00037.label: 伏暑
V002-N00037.path: TC[中医病症]｜伤寒和温病｜温病
V002-N00037.definition: 伏气温病之一。因长夏受暑湿之邪，留伏体内，至秋后发病者。

V002-N00037.label: 伏暑
V002-N00037.aliases: 冬月伏暑； 伏暑秋发； 伏暑晚发； 伏邪温疫； 晚发
V002-N00037.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜外感病证｜温病
V002-N00037.definition: 是由暑热病邪或暑湿病邪郁伏发于秋冬季节的急性热病。

V002-N00037.label: 伏暑病
V002-N00037.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V002-N00037.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00037.label: 伏暑
V002-N00037.englishNames: latent summerheat; Latent Summer Heat Diseases; Latent summer heat pestilence
V002-N00037.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00037.definition: A type of pestilence characterized by a sudden onset, alternating chills and fever or fever without chills that aggravates at night and alleviates during the day, especially after sweating. Associated symptoms may include a burning sensation in the chest and abdomen, skin rashes, and loose stools. In severe cases, restlessness or delirium may be present. Often occurs when seasonal pathogenic factors or epidemic toxin in autumn or winter triggers and causes the latent summer heat and dampness to retain in the qi/Ying nutrient phases, Shaoyang or stomach and intestines.

V002-N00037.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00037.label: 伏暑

V002-N00086.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00086.label: 顿咳
V002-N00086.path: 第7部分：儿科学｜儿科时行病
V002-N00086.definition: 感染百日咳杆菌，以阵发性痉挛性咳嗽，咳后有鸡鸣样吸气性吼声，咯出痰涎而暂停为特征的儿科时行病。

V002-N00086.label: 顿咳
V002-N00086.definition: 以阵发性痉挛性咳嗽，咳后有特殊的吸气性 吼声，咯出痰涎而暂停为特征的时行疾病。

V002-N00086.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00086.label: 百日咳
V002-N00086.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医儿科疾病｜瘟疫
V002-N00086.definition: 时行疫邪犯肺，阻于气道而肺气上逆。以阵发呛咳、咳后有鸡鸣样回声为主要表现的疫病类疾病。

V002-N00086.label: 顿咳
V002-N00086.aliases: 顿呛； 顿嗽； 鸬鹚咳； 天哮呛； 疫咳
V002-N00086.englishNames: Paroxysmal Cough; Paroxysmal Coughing; Whooping Cough
V002-N00086.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科时行疾病
V002-N00086.definition: 是小儿时期感受时行疠气疫邪引起的肺系时行疾病。以阵发性痉挛性咳嗽，咳后有特殊的吸气性吼声，咯出痰涎而暂停为特征。

V002-N00086.label: 百日咳
V002-N00086.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病证
V002-N00086.definition: 时行疫邪犯肺，阻于气道而肺气上逆。以阵发呛咳，咳后有鸡鸣样回声为主要表现的疫病类疾病。

V002-N00086.label: 顿咳
V002-N00086.aliases: 小儿顿嗽； 百日咳； 天哮； 鹭鸶咳
V002-N00086.pinyinNames: dun ke; dong ke; du ke
V002-N00086.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V002-N00086.label: 百日咳
V002-N00086.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜儿科类

V002-N00086.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00086.label: 顿咳
V002-N00086.aliases: 百日咳； 小儿顿嗽； 天哮； 鹭鸶咳； Pertussis
V002-N00086.pinyinNames: dùn ké; dong ke; dun ke; du ke
V002-N00086.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00086.definition: A highly contagious disease affecting children. Initially, symptoms are typically similar to those of a common cold. This is then followed by a paroxysmal cough with a high-pitched whoop sound or gasp. Vomiting of saliva or phlegm may also occur. Often occurs when the bacterium Bordetella pertussis attacks the lung, obstructs the airway and causes lung qi to ascend.

V002-N00086.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00086.label: 顿咳

V002-N00086.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00086.label: 顿咳
V002-N00086.definition: an acute contagious infection of the respiratory system with characteristic paroxysmal cough, consisting of a deep inspiration, followed by a series of quick, short coughs which end with a long shrill and whooping inspiration, referring to pertussis

V002-N00027.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00027.label: 温病
V002-N00027.definition: 感受温热之邪引起的外感热病的统称。

V002-N00027.label: 温病
V002-N00027.definition: 感受温邪引起的外感热病的统称。

V002-N00027.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00027.label: 温病
V002-N00027.definition: 感受温邪引起的外感热病的统称。

V002-N00027.label: 温病
V002-N00027.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜外感病证
V002-N00027.definition: 是由温邪引起的以发热为主症，具有热象偏重、易化燥伤阴等特点的一类急性外感热病。

V002-N00027.label: 温病
V002-N00027.englishNames: warm disease; Seasonal Prevalent Diseases; Warmth disorders

V002-N00027.label: 温病

V002-N00027.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码

V002-N00027.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜影响因素｜兼杂疾病因素

V002-N00027.label: 温病
V002-N00027.englishNames: warm disease; Seasonal Prevalent Diseases; Warmth disorders; warmth disease; Warm diseases
V002-N00027.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00027.definition: A group of disorders caused by external contraction of pathogenic warm/heat. It is initially characterized by typical heat-induced symptoms or heat transforming into dryness after entering the interior. In severe cases, heat may transmit to the pericardium, damage yin or stir up internal wind. They are known as endemic warm diseases when spreading through population within a geographic area.

V002-N00027.label: 温热病

V002-N00027.label: 温病
