V002-N00029.label: 伏邪温病
V002-N00029.englishNames: warm disease caused by incubating pathogens
V002-N00029.definition: 感受病邪后，伏藏于里，过时而发的温病。

V002-N00029.label: 伏邪温病
V002-N00029.englishNames: warm disease caused by incubating pathogens
V002-N00029.definition: 感受病邪后，伏藏于里，过时而发的温病。

V002-N00029.label: 春温
V002-N00029.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜外感病证｜温病
V002-N00029.definition: 是由温病热邪内伏而发，以起病即见里热证候为特征的急性热病。

V002-N00029.label: 伏气温病
V002-N00029.englishNames: warm disease with latent pathogenic factors
V002-N00029.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜温病

V002-N00029.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00029.label: 伏气温病
V002-N00029.englishNames: Latent warm diseases; latent warm diseases; warm disease with latent pathogenic factors
V002-N00029.pinyinNames: fú qì wēn bìng; fu qi wen bing
V002-N00029.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00029.definition: A group of diseases initially characterized by exuberant interior heat and associated symptoms due to dry heat damaging yin. They are often caused by latent pathogenic factors in the interior or pre-existing heat coupled with contraction of new pathogenic factors.

V002-N00029.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00029.label: 伏气温病

V002-N00028.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00028.label: 新感温病
新感温病
V002-N00028.englishNames: newly contracted warm disease; new contraction of warm disease; newly acquired warm disease
V002-N00028.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜温病

V002-N00028.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00028.label: 新感温病
V002-N00028.englishNames: newly contracted warm disease; new contraction of warm disease; newly acquired warm disease; Acute warm diseases
V002-N00028.pinyinNames: xin gan wen bing; xīn gǎn wēn bìng
V002-N00028.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00028.definition: A group of diseases characterized by a sudden fever, mild or no aversion to wind cold, headache, and sore throat, followed by a high-grade fever, persistent sweating and thirst with a desire to drink water. Associated symptoms may include constipation, dysentery, unconsciousness, delirium, maculae, bleeding and convulsions. Contributing factors may include external contraction of pathogenic warmth, warmth transmitting to the stomach/intestine, warmth affecting the heart, warmth damaging blood, or warmth stirring up wind.

V002-N00028.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00028.label: 新感温病

V002-N00080.label: 疫霍乱
V002-N00080.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V002-N00080.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00080.label: 疫霍乱
V002-N00080.aliases: 时疫霍乱； Severe vomiting and diarrhoea disorder
V002-N00080.pinyinNames: yì huò luàn; yi huo luan
V002-N00080.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00080.definition: A fulminating infectious disease characterized by sudden onset of large amounts of watery (like rice water) diarrhoea, sunken eyes and leg cramps. In severe cases, patient may faint or die. It is more commonly seen in summer or autumn. Contributing factors may include ingestion of contaminated food and infection with the bacterium Vibrio cholerae. These factors may damage the stomach and intestines and result in severe exhaustion of qi and bodily fluids.

V002-N00081.label: 湿霍乱
V002-N00081.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜疫霍乱

V002-N00081.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00081.label: 湿霍乱
V002-N00081.pinyinNames: shi huo luan; shī huò luàn
V002-N00081.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00081.definition: An infectious disease characterized by sudden onset of abdominal colic, severe vomiting and diarrhoea, and leg cramps. In severe cases, sunken eyes, dry, wrinkled skin, and cold hands/feet. Often occurs when people eat too much cold food, summer heat and dampness or the bacterium Vibrio cholerae directly affects the stomach and intestines.

V002-N00081.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00081.label: 湿霍乱

V002-N00082.label: 霍乱
V002-N00082.aliases: 瘪螺痧； 吊脚痧； 干霍乱； 绞肠痧
V002-N00082.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜外感病证｜温病
V002-N00082.definition: 是感受时行疫疠之邪，邪随饮食侵入人体胃肠，以发热、腹痛不甚、频繁呕吐、泄泻为临床特征的一种急性疫病。

V002-N00082.label: 干霍乱
V002-N00082.aliases: 搅肠痧； 斑痧； 乌痧胀
V002-N00082.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜疫霍乱

V002-N00082.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00082.label: 干霍乱
V002-N00082.aliases: 搅肠痧； 斑痧； 乌痧胀； Abdominal colic
V002-N00082.pinyinNames: gàn huò luàn; gan huo luan
V002-N00082.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00082.definition: An infectious disease characterized by sudden onset of epigastric discomfort, abdominal colic, and an urge to but failure to vomit or defaecate. In severe cases, bluish complexion or generalized dark purple patches may be present. Contributing factors may include infection with the bacterium Vibrio cholerae or cold retention in the stomach or intestines. These factors may cause qi to stagnate in the chest and abdomen, and obstruct the qi flow of the stomach and intestines.

V002-N00082.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00082.label: 干霍乱

V002-N00044.label: 肝热病
V002-N00044.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜传染病
V002-N00044.definition: 湿热疫毒之邪侵及中焦，郁蒸肝胆，肝失疏泄，脾失健运而成。以腹胀纳差，恶心厌油，右胁疼痛，肝肿大，或有黄疸为主要表现的疫病类疾病。

V002-N00044.label: 肝热病
V002-N00044.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V002-N00044.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00044.label: 肝热病
V002-N00044.englishNames: liver heat disease; Liver heat disease
V002-N00044.pinyinNames: gan re bing; gān rè bìng
V002-N00044.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00044.definition: Characterized by subcostal and abdominal distension and fullness, nausea, aversion to oily food, a poor appetite, and yellow urine. Associated symptoms include fever, jaundice, distending pain in the right subcostal region and enlarged liver. This condition often occurs when damp-heat toxin affects the liver/gallbladder and spleen and causes the bile to overflow.

V002-N00083.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00083.label: 麻疹
V002-N00083.path: 第7部分：儿科学｜儿科时行病
V002-N00083.definition: 感染麻毒,以初热期发热、咳嗽、流涕、眼结膜充血、畏光等,2天～3天后口腔颊黏膜粗糙，细小白点(麻疹黏膜斑)，皮肤红疹为主要表现的出疹性儿科时行病。

V002-N00083.label: 麻疹
V002-N00083.definition: 以初热期发热、咳嗽、流涕、眼结膜充血、畏 光等，2～3天后口腔颊黏膜粗糙，有细小白 点（麻疹黏膜斑）为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00083.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00083.label: 麻疹
V002-N00083.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医儿科疾病｜瘟疫
V002-N00083.definition: 感受麻疹疫毒，毒邪蕴于肺脾，走窜于血络，外发于肌肤，以发热、咳嗽、流涕流泪、遍身发疹、疹退脱屑、留有色素沉着为主要表现的疫病类疾病。

V002-N00083.label: 麻疹
V002-N00083.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科时行疾病
V002-N00083.definition: 为感受麻毒时邪引起的急性肺系时行病。以发热咳嗽，鼻塞流涕，泪水汪汪，全身发红疹及早期出现麻疹粘膜斑为特征。

V002-N00083.label: 麻疹
V002-N00083.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V002-N00083.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00083.label: 麻疹
V002-N00083.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜儿科类

V002-N00083.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00083.label: 麻疹
V002-N00083.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜影响因素｜兼杂疾病因素

V002-N00083.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00083.label: 麻疹
V002-N00083.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V002-N00083.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00083.label: 麻疹
V002-N00083.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00083.definition: A condition characterized by fever, cough, runny nose, watery, inflamed eyes, presence of small white spots inside the mouth, and generalized maculopapular rash, followed by desquamation and pigmentation. In severe cases, complications involving the lung, throat, heart and liver may be present, which are often seen in infants. Often results from toxin (measles virus) affects the lung and spleen and spreads to the bloodstream and skin.

V002-N00083.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00083.label: 麻疹

V002-N00083.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00083.label: 麻疹
V002-N00083.definition: an acute epidemic eruptive disease marked by fever and generalized maculopapular rash preceded by cough, nasal discharge, profuse tearing, and white speckles inside the mouth

V002-N00085.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00085.label: 白喉
V002-N00085.path: 第7部分：儿科学｜儿科时行病
V002-N00085.definition: 感受疫邪，以发热，咽痛，咽、喉、鼻等处出现白色假膜不易剥脱，甚则导致室息为主要表现的时行病。

V002-N00085.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V002-N00085.label: 白喉
V002-N00085.path: 中医耳鼻喉科学｜咽喉病
V002-N00085.definition: 以发热，咽喉痛，咽喉等处出现白色假膜不易剥脱为主要表现的急性传染性咽喉病。

V002-N00085.label: 白喉
V002-N00085.definition: 以发热，咽痛，咽，喉，鼻等处出现白色假膜 不易剥脱为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00085.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00085.label: 白喉
V002-N00085.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医儿科疾病｜瘟疫
V002-N00085.definition: 燥热疫毒之邪搏结于咽喉，耗伤阴液。以发热，咽痛，咽、喉、鼻等处出现白色假膜不易剥脱为主要表现的疫病类疾病。

V002-N00085.label: 白喉
V002-N00085.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜传染病
V002-N00085.definition: 以咽喉间起白腐及疼痛、全身发热为其特征的急性、烈性传染病，称白喉。

V002-N00085.label: 白喉
V002-N00085.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V002-N00085.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00085.label: 白喉
V002-N00085.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜五官科类

V002-N00085.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00085.label: 白喉
V002-N00085.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜儿科类

V002-N00085.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00085.label: 白喉
V002-N00085.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00085.definition: Characterized by fever, sore throat, red, swollen tonsils, the formation of white false membrane attached firmly to the pharynx, larynx and nose, difficulty swallowing, difficulty breathing, rapid breathing, restlessness, palpitations and shock. Often affects children in autumn and winter and occurs when bacterium Corynebacterium diphtheria affects the throat and consumes yin fluids.

V002-N00085.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00085.label: 白喉
V002-N00085.definition: an acute infectious disease characterized by fever, sore throat and the formation of white false membrane attached firmly to the pharynx, larynx and nose

V002-N00093.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00093.label: 天花
V002-N00093.path: 第7部分：儿科学｜儿科时行病
V002-N00093.definition: 感染天花病毒，以严重的毒血症和皮肤损害为主要表现的急性接触性烈性传染病。

V002-N00093.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00093.label: 天花
V002-N00093.aliases: 痘疮； 天痘； 天行痘
V002-N00093.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医儿科疾病｜瘟疫
V002-N00093.definition: 是一种传染性极强、病情险恶的病毒性传染病。又名痘疮、天痘、天行痘等。

V002-N00093.label: 天花
V002-N00093.aliases: 痘疹； 痘疮； 天行时痘； 天痘； 天行痘
V002-N00093.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V002-N00093.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00093.label: 天花
V002-N00093.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜儿科类

V002-N00093.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00093.label: 痘疹
V002-N00093.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类｜疮疡

V002-N00093.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00093.label: 天花
V002-N00093.aliases: 痘疹； 痘疮； 天行时痘； 天痘； 天行痘
V002-N00093.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00093.definition: An infectious disease caused by the variola virus and often affects children. It is characterized by chills, fever and skin rashes, papules, sores, pustules and scabs. The latter may fall off, leaving marks on the skin. This condition usually passes through six stages: fever, early rashes, raised bumps, pustular rashes, scabs and falling off of the scabs.

V002-N00093.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00093.label: 痘疮

V002-N00093.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00093.label: 痘疮
V002-N00093.definition: an acute highly contagious febrile disease characterized by skin eruptions with pustules, sloughing, and scar formation, the same as variola

V002-N00041.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00041.label: 温毒发斑
V002-N00041.path: 第1部分：内科学｜热病｜温毒［病］
V002-N00041.definition: 感受温热毒邪,以皮肤发斑,形大如豆,色紫黑,胸背腰腹尤稠,壮热烦躁,头面红肿，目赤唇焦，大渴 引饮,咽喉肿痛,甚则起腐，口秽喷人,或吐血蛆血,便秘溲赤,神昏谵语，舌紫,苔黄,甚则焦紫起瓣，脉浮 沉俱盛等为特征的温毒病。

V002-N00041.label: 温毒发斑
V002-N00041.englishNames: Epidemic Diseases with Eruptions; Heat Toxin with Skin Eruption
V002-N00041.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜传染病
V002-N00041.definition: 疫毒之邪随虱蚤叮咬侵入血脉，热毒伤营，闭扰神明。以高热，斑疹，头痛，神识昏蒙为主要表现的疫病类疾病。

V002-N00041.label: 瘟毒病
V002-N00041.aliases: 瘟疫发斑； 时疫发斑； 温毒发斑； 瘟毒发斑
V002-N00041.pinyinNames: wen dong bing; wen er bing
V002-N00041.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V002-N00041.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00041.label: 瘟毒
V002-N00041.aliases: 温毒； 温毒发斑； 瘟毒发斑； Pestilence eruptions
V002-N00041.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00041.definition: Characterized by high fever, headache, and presence of maculae or sores/ulcers. In severe cases, clouding of consciousness may be present. This condition often occurs when pestilence toxin enters the bloodstream with lice/fleas to damage the Ying nutrients or disturb the heart mind.

V002-N00042.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00042.label: 大头瘟
V002-N00042.definition: 感受风热时毒，以头面掀赤肿痛为主要表现的急性温病。

V002-N00042.label: 大头瘟
V002-N00042.definition: 感受风热时毒，以头面焮赤肿痛为主要表现 的急性外感热病。

V002-N00042.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00042.label: 大头瘟
V002-N00042.path: TC[中医病症]｜伤寒和温病｜温病｜温毒
V002-N00042.definition: 感受风热时毒，以头面焮赤肿痛为主要表现的急性外感热病。

V002-N00042.label: 大头瘟
V002-N00042.aliases: 大头风； 大头伤寒； 大头天行； 大头温； 虾蟆温
V002-N00042.englishNames: Epidemic disease Characterized by Swelling and Redness of the Face
V002-N00042.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜外感病证｜温病
V002-N00042.definition: 是感受风热时毒所致以头面焮赤肿痛为特征的急性外感热病。

V002-N00042.label: 大头瘟
V002-N00042.englishNames: swollen-head epidemic; swollen-head infection; fever with swollen head; erysipelas facialis; swollen head due to infection
V002-N00042.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V002-N00042.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00042.label: 大头瘟
V002-N00042.englishNames: swollen-head epidemic; swollen-head infection; fever with swollen head; erysipelas facialis; swollen head due to infection; pestilence with swollen face; Swollen face
V002-N00042.pinyinNames: da tou wen; dà tóu wēn
V002-N00042.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00042.definition: Characterized by fever, chills, and local (face, ear, neck and throat) redness, swelling, hotness and pain. It is more common in winter or spring. This condition often occurs when seasonal wind heat toxin attacks the three yang meridians in the face. It is known as erysipelas facialis in modern medicine.

V002-N00042.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00042.label: 大头瘟
V002-N00042.englishNames: erysipelas facialis; swollen-head infection; fever with swollen head

V002-N00040.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00040.label: 水痘
V002-N00040.path: 第7部分：儿科学｜儿科时行病
V002-N00040.definition: 感染水痘病毒,以发热,咳嗽,全身皮肤分批出现皮疹,斑丘疹、疱疹、结痂同时存在为主要表现的出疹性儿科时行病。

V002-N00040.label: 水痘
V002-N00040.definition: 感染水痘病毒引起的疾病。

V002-N00040.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00040.label: 水痘
V002-N00040.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医儿科疾病｜瘟疫
V002-N00040.definition: 外感时邪风毒，内蕴湿热，发于肤表。以发热，皮肤分批出现斑丘疹、水疱并形成痂盖为主要表现的急性疱疹性疾病。

V002-N00040.label: 水痘
V002-N00040.aliases: 水疮； 水花； 水疱
V002-N00040.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科时行疾病
V002-N00040.definition: 是由外感时行邪毒引起的急性发疹性时行疾病。以发热，皮肤粘膜上分批出现丘疹、疱疹、结痂为特征。

V002-N00040.label: 水痘
V002-N00040.aliases: 水疱； 水花； 水疮； varicella
V002-N00040.pinyinNames: shui dong; shui dou; shui er
V002-N00040.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V002-N00040.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00040.label: 水痘
V002-N00040.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜儿科类

V002-N00040.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00040.label: 水痘
V002-N00040.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V002-N00040.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00040.label: 水痘
V002-N00040.aliases: 水疱； 水花； 水疮； varicella； 小儿水痘
V002-N00040.pinyinNames: shui dong; shui dou; shui er; shuǐ dòu
V002-N00040.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00040.definition: Characterized by fever, cough and skin rashes that turn into fluid-filled blisters, which then crust over to form scabs. This condition often occurs when epidemic wind and internal damp heat affect the surface of the body.

V002-N00040.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00040.label: 水痘
V002-N00040.aliases: BES000； 水疱； 水花； 水疮

V002-N00040.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00040.label: 水痘
V002-N00040.aliases: 水疱； 水花； 水疮
V002-N00040.definition: an acute contagious disease caused by seasonal toxin and manifested by fever and bursts of macular and papular eruptions followed by incrustation but no scar formation, the same as varicella

V002-N00092.label: 麻风病
V002-N00092.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V002-N00092.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00092.label: 麻风病
V002-N00092.pinyinNames: ma feng bing; má fēng bìng
V002-N00092.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00092.definition: A long-term infectious disease characterized by generalized numbness and skin lesions with purple-red patches that resemble snake skin. Alternatively, nodules or raised bumps may be present. Often results from close contact with patients infected with leprosy. The bacterium Mycobacterium leprae enters the bloodstream and damages the skin, meridians and the five zang organs.

V002-N00092.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00092.label: 疠风

V002-N00035.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00035.label: 小儿暑温
V002-N00035.path: 第7部分：儿科学｜儿科时行病
V002-N00035.definition: 感受暑热时邪，以高热、头痛、呕吐、嗜睡、惊厥、昏迷为主要表现的儿科时行病。

V002-N00035.label: 暑温
V002-N00035.definition: 感受暑热病邪引起的发病急骤的湿病。

V002-N00035.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00035.label: 暑温
V002-N00035.aliases: Summer Febrile Rreval Dis； warm disease in summer
V002-N00035.path: TC[中医病症]｜伤寒和温病｜温病
V002-N00035.definition: 感受暑热病邪引起的发病急骤的温病。

V002-N00035.label: 暑温
V002-N00035.path: 病因病机｜病因｜外感病因｜六淫｜暑邪
V002-N00035.definition: 指暑邪挟温热之邪的致病邪气。

V002-N00035.label: 小儿暑温
V002-N00035.aliases: 暑风； 暑痉； 暑厥
V002-N00035.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科时行疾病
V002-N00035.definition: 是感受暑温邪毒引起的时行疾病，以高热，抽搐，昏迷为主症。发病突然，变化迅速，病程中可发生内闭外脱，呼吸不整而猝然变险。

V002-N00035.label: 暑温
V002-N00035.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜外感病证｜温病
V002-N00035.definition: 病名。炎暑季令之温热病，症情一般较重。暑多挟湿，暑温系指暑热偏盛者。《湿病条辨·上焦篇》：“暑温者，正夏之时，暑病之偏于热者也。”余奉仙谓：“暑温者，即夏时之热病也。暑字之义，乃日者两字相合而成。日者，阳之精;暑者，热之极。”(见《医方经验汇编》)，症见壮热口渴，心烦面赤，汗多少气，脉多洪大。如不予及时施治，可致邪陷心营、引动肝风，出现高热神昏、嗜睡、肢体抽瘛、角弓反张、或身发斑疹，初起宜以白虎汤原方或加减方，以清气分邪热而保津。神情躁烦、意识不清或神昏谵语、肢体痉强、舌苔黄、舌质红绛或无苔者，宜以犀角地黄汤、清瘟败毒饮、紫雪散、至宝丹等方酌情选用，若津气两虚，宜用白虎人参汤、清暑益气汤等以益气生津。暑温挟湿则兼见胸闷恶心，小便短赤，大便溏泄等症，当兼用芳香化浊、利湿之剂。如见高热、头痛、呕吐、嗜睡、昏迷、抽搐诸症，亦称暑痫。参见温病、湿温、暑痫等条。

V002-N00035.label: 暑温病

V002-N00084.definition: 感受时疫，以咽喉肿痛糜烂，肌肤丹痧密布为主要表现的急性温病。

V002-N00084.definition: 因感受痧毒疫病之邪引起的以发热、咽喉肿 痛或伴腐烂、猩红色皮疹、杨莓舌、疹后脱皮 为主要表现的急性时行疾病。

V002-N00084.label: 烂喉丹痧

Often affects children and occurs when epidemic warm heat affects the throat and skin through the mouth, nose or skin lesion.

V002-N00048.definition: Characterized by paroxysms of sudden coldness followed by shivering and then fever and sweating. In severe cases, unconsciousness, delirium, and masses in the left subcostal region may be present. Often occurs when toxin of malarial parasites enters the bloodstream and struggles with the Wei-defensive qi between the exterior and interior. It may also occur when toxin of malaria parasites disturbs the heart mind.

V002-N00059.label: 奇恒痢
V002-N00059.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜疟疾｜疟母

V002-N00059.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00059.label: 奇恒痢
V002-N00059.pinyinNames: qi heng li; qí héng lì
V002-N00059.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00059.definition: Characterized by a slow onset, abdominal pain, and mild diarrhoea with dark-red, jelly-like stools. In severe cases, a sudden high-grade fever, chills, a dry, swollen throat, unconsciousness, stools containing blood, tenesmus and severe abdominal pain are present. Other critical symptoms may include vomiting, fainting or sepsis. Often occurs when contaminated food/water, damp heat or cold dampness damage the intestinal collaterals or affect the heart and lung.

V002-N00057.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00057.label: 寒湿痢
V002-N00057.path: 第1部分：内科学｜热病｜痢疾
V002-N00057.definition: 感受寒湿，以腹痛拘急，里急后重，痢下赤白黏冻，白多赤少，或纯为白冻，口淡乏味，中皖痞闷不渴，头重身困，小便清白，舌淡，苔白腻，脉濡缓等为特征的痢疾。

V002-N00057.label: 痢疾
V002-N00057.aliases: 肠澼； 赤痢； 寒湿痢； 噤口痢； 湿热痢； 休息痢； 疫毒痢； 滞下
V002-N00057.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N00057.definition: 是因外感时邪疫毒，内伤饮食而致邪蕴肠腑，气血壅滞，传导失司，以腹痛腹泻，里急后重，排赤白脓血便为主要临床表现的具有传染性的外感疾病。

V002-N00057.label: 寒湿困脾证痢疾
V002-N00057.aliases: 寒湿痢； 痢疾寒湿困脾证
V002-N00057.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证｜痢疾

V002-N00057.label: 寒湿痢
V002-N00057.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜疟疾｜疟母

V002-N00057.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00057.label: 寒湿痢
V002-N00057.englishNames: Cold dampness dysentery; cold-dampness dysentery; cold-damp dysentery
V002-N00057.pinyinNames: han shi li; hán shī lì
V002-N00057.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00057.definition: Characterized by abdominal pain/spasm, paroxysmal abdominal pain that alleviates after bowel movements, tenesmus, body heaviness, and chronic diarrhoea with stools containing more mucus than blood or mucus alone. Often results from direct contraction of epidemic cold dampness toxin, contact with dysentery patients or pathogenic factors transforming into cold due to constitutional yang deficiency.

V002-N00056.label: 噤口痢
V002-N00056.path: 第1部分：内科学｜热病｜痢疾
V002-N00056.definition: 以下痢不能进食，或下痢呕恶不能食等为特征的痢疾。

V002-N00056.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00056.label: 噤口痢
V002-N00056.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医儿科疾病｜瘟疫｜痢疾
V002-N00056.definition: 多因湿热疫毒蕴结肠中，邪毒亢盛，损伤气阴所致。以呕恶不食、下痢频繁、肌肉瘦削为特点的痢疾。

V002-N00056.label: 痢疾
V002-N00056.aliases: 肠澼； 赤痢； 寒湿痢； 噤口痢； 湿热痢； 休息痢； 疫毒痢； 滞下
V002-N00056.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N00056.definition: 是因外感时邪疫毒，内伤饮食而致邪蕴肠腑，气血壅滞，传导失司，以腹痛腹泻，里急后重，排赤白脓血便为主要临床表现的具有传染性的外感疾病。

V002-N00056.label: 噤口痢
V002-N00056.englishNames: food-denying dysentery; Fasting Dysentery; anorectic dysentery
V002-N00056.pinyinNames: jin  kou li; jin kou li
V002-N00056.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜疟疾｜疟母

V002-N00056.label: 噤口痢
V002-N00056.englishNames: anorectic dysentery; food-denying dysentery; Fasting Dysentery; Food-denying dysentery
V002-N00056.pinyinNames: jin  kou li; 噤kou li; jin kou li; jìn kǒu lì
V002-N00056.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00056.definition: Characterized by nausea, vomiting, loss of appetite, frequent, severe dysentery and muscle wasting. Often occurs when epidemic damp heat toxin accumulates in the intestine to affect the stomach and damage qi and yin.

V002-N00054.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00054.label: 暴痢
V002-N00054.path: 第1部分：内科学｜热病｜痢疾
V002-N00054.definition: 以骤起发病，高热为特征的痢疾。

V002-N00054.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00054.label: 湿热痢
V002-N00054.path: 第1部分：内科学｜热病｜痢疾
V002-N00054.definition: 湿热积滞，以腹痛，里急后重，下利赤白脓血，赤多白少，或纯下赤冻，肛门灼热，胸皖痞闷，小便短少,舌红，苔黄腻，脉滑数等为特征的痢疾。

V002-N00054.label: 暴痢
V002-N00054.definition: 以骤起发病，高热为主要表现的痢疾。

V002-N00054.label: 痢疾
V002-N00054.aliases: 肠澼； 赤痢； 寒湿痢； 噤口痢； 湿热痢； 休息痢； 疫毒痢； 滞下
V002-N00054.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证

V002-N00054.definition: Characterized by a sudden fever, abdominal pain, tenesmus and diarrhoea with stool containing mucus and blood. Often results from ingestion of contaminated food/water or contact with dysentery patients.

V002-N00058.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00058.label: 休息痢
V002-N00058.path: 第1部分：内科学｜热病｜痢疾
V002-N00058.definition: 时止时发，久久不愈的慢性痢疾。

V002-N00058.label: 休息痢
V002-N00058.definition: 长期反复发作的慢性痢疾。

V002-N00058.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00058.label: 休息痢
V002-N00058.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医儿科疾病｜瘟疫｜痢疾
V002-N00058.definition: 痢疾日久，邪毒蕴结，脾胃气血受损，以长期或反复发作的腹部隐痛、里急后重、粪质稀烂或便中夹血为特点。

V002-N00058.label: 痢疾
V002-N00058.aliases: 肠澼； 赤痢； 寒湿痢； 噤口痢； 湿热痢； 休息痢； 疫毒痢； 滞下
V002-N00058.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N00058.definition: 是因外感时邪疫毒，内伤饮食而致邪蕴肠腑，气血壅滞，传导失司，以腹痛腹泻，里急后重，排赤白脓血便为主要临床表现的具有传染性的外感疾病。

V002-N00058.label: 正虚邪恋证痢疾
V002-N00058.aliases: 痢疾正虚邪恋证； 休息痢
V002-N00058.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证｜痢疾

V002-N00058.label: 休息痢
V002-N00058.englishNames: intermittent dysentery; Chronic Intermittent Dysentery; recurrent dysentery
V002-N00058.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜疟疾｜疟母

V002-N00058.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00058.label: 休息痢
V002-N00058.englishNames: intermittent dysentery; Intermittent dysentery; Chronic Intermittent Dysentery; recurrent dysentery
V002-N00058.pinyinNames: xiu xi li; xiū xi lì
V002-N00058.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00058.definition: Characterized by intermittent diarrhoea containing mucus or blood and dull abdominal pain. Patients present with tenesmus during acute episodes. Abdominal distension, a low food intake and lassitude are present during intermittence. Often occurs when chronic dysentery damages the spleen and stomach, coupled with retention of pathogenic toxin.

V002-N00058.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00058.label: 休息痢

V002-N00055.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00055.label: 疫毒痢
V002-N00055.definition: 以发病急骤，高热，烦躁口渴，腹痛剧烈，大便脓血，甚或神昏抽搐，肢冷为主要表现的危重痢疾。

V002-N00055.label: 疫毒痢
V002-N00055.definition: 以发病急骤，高热，烦躁口渴，腹痛剧烈，大 便脓血，甚或神昏抽搐，肢厥为主要表现的 重度痢疾。

V002-N00055.label: 痢疾
V002-N00055.aliases: 肠澼； 赤痢； 寒湿痢； 噤口痢； 湿热痢； 休息痢； 疫毒痢； 滞下
V002-N00055.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N00055.definition: 是因外感时邪疫毒，内伤饮食而致邪蕴肠腑，气血壅滞，传导失司，以腹痛腹泻，里急后重，排赤白脓血便为主要临床表现的具有传染性的外感疾病。

V002-N00055.label: 疫毒侵袭证痢疾
V002-N00055.aliases: 痢疾疫毒侵袭证； 疫毒痢
V002-N00055.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证｜痢疾

V002-N00055.label: 疫毒痢

V002-N00055.pinyinNames: yi er li; yi dong li
V002-N00055.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜疟疾｜疟母

V002-N00055.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00055.label: 疫毒痢
V002-N00055.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜儿科类

V002-N00055.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00055.label: 疫毒痢
V002-N00055.englishNames: fulminant dysentery; pestilent dysentery; epidemic toxin dysentery; Epidemic toxin dysentery
V002-N00055.pinyinNames: yi er li; yi dong li; yì dú lì
V002-N00055.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00055.definition: Characterized by frequent stools containing blood and mucus, tenesmus, a high-grade fever, and abdominal pain. In severe cases, loss of consciousness with convulsions, cold limbs and cyanosis may be present. Often occurs when epidemic damp heat toxin (dysentery bacillus) damages the intestine, enters the pericardium or stirs liver wind.

V002-N00051.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00051.label: 久疟
V002-N00051.path: 第1部分：内科学｜热病｜疟疾

V002-N00051.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00051.label: 劳疟
V002-N00051.path: 第1部分：内科学｜热病｜疟疾
V002-N00051.definition: 以疟疾日久不愈，稍劳即发，或瘥后复发，寒热时作，面色胱白，倦怠嗜卧，头目眩晕，或胁下结成痞块，触之可得，舌淡胖，脉细弱等为特征的疟疾。

V002-N00051.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00051.label: 久疟
V002-N00051.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医儿科疾病｜瘟疫｜疟疾

V002-N00051.label: 疟疾
V002-N00051.aliases: 寒疟； 间日疟； 劳疟； 热瘴； 湿疟； 疫疟； 瘴疟
V002-N00051.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证
V002-N00051.definition: 为感受疟邪，邪正交争所致，是以寒战壮热，头痛，汗出，休作有时为特征的传染性疾病，多发于夏秋季。

V002-N00051.label: 正虚邪恋证疟疾
V002-N00051.aliases: 劳疟； 疟疾正虚邪恋证
V002-N00051.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证｜疟疾

V002-N00051.label: 久疟
V002-N00051.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜疟疾

V002-N00051.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00051.label: 久疟
V002-N00051.englishNames: chronic malaria; Chronic malaria; Chronic Malaria
V002-N00051.pinyinNames: jiu nue; jiǔ nüè; jiu nve
V002-N00051.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00051.definition: Characterized by intermittent and prolonged episodes. Often results from deficiency of zang–fu organs, damage to Ying nutrients and Wei-defence and retention of Plasmodium parasites.

V002-N00051.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00051.label: 劳疟
V002-N00051.englishNames: consumptive malaria; chronic malaria $ malaria with splenomegaly

V002-N00049.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00049.label: 三日疟
V002-N00049.path: 第1部分：内科学｜热病｜疟疾
V002-N00049.definition: 疟邪深入，元气大虚，以寒热三日一发，缠绵不愈，倦怠食减，面色胱白，脉虚弱，舌淡苔薄白等为特征的疟疾。

V002-N00049.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00049.label: 正疟
V002-N00049.path: 第1部分：内科学｜热病｜疟疾
V002-N00049.definition: 疟邪伏于少阳半表半里，出入营卫,具有寒热往来，界限清楚，并作止有时特点，以初起肢体酸楚,呵欠乏力,继则畏寒战栗,寒罢则遍体灼热，头痛面赤，口渴心烦,数小时后,汗出淋漓,发热骤退,诸症消失,或稍觉头昏神疲,舌红，苔薄白或薄黄,脉弦等为特征的疟疾。

V002-N00049.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00049.label: 间日疟
V002-N00049.path: 第1部分：内科学｜热病｜疟疾
V002-N00049.definition: 疟邪侵于少阳之经，以间日发作，止作有时，先伸欠，继而寒战，腰脊俱痛,寒去则内外皆热，头痛面赤，渴欲饮冷，苔白滑，脉弦数，终则汗出，热退身凉似无病等为特征的疟疾。

V002-N00049.label: 疟疾
V002-N00049.aliases: 寒疟； 间日疟； 劳疟； 热瘴； 湿疟； 疫疟； 瘴疟
V002-N00049.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证
V002-N00049.definition: 为感受疟邪，邪正交争所致，是以寒战壮热，头痛，汗出，休作有时为特征的传染性疾病，多发于夏秋季。

V002-N00049.label: 少阳病证疟疾
V002-N00049.aliases: 疟疾少阳病证； 疟疾邪郁少阳证； 邪郁少阳证疟疾； 正疟
V002-N00049.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证｜疟疾

V002-N00049.label: 正疟
V002-N00049.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜疟疾

V002-N00049.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00049.label: 正疟
V002-N00049.aliases: 间日疟； 三日疟； Quartan malaria
V002-N00049.englishNames: regular malaria; normal malaria; Regular malaria
V002-N00049.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00049.definition: Characterized by shivering and then fever and sweating, occurring every other day or three days. Patients with warm malaria present with more fever than shivering, whereas patients with cold malaria present with more shivering than fever. Often occurs when anti-pathogenic qi struggles with pathogenic factors in between the exterior and interior.

V002-N00049.label: 三日疟
V002-N00049.definition: 疟邪深入，元气大虚，以寒热三日一发，缠绵不愈，倦怠食减，面色晄白，脉虚弱，舌淡苔薄白等为特征的疟疾。

V002-N00032.label: 温病
V002-N00032.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜外感病证
V002-N00032.definition: 是由温邪引起的以发热为主症，具有热象偏重、易化燥伤阴等特点的一类急性外感热病。

V002-N00032.label: 温疫
V002-N00032.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜疫病

V002-N00032.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00032.label: 温疫类病
V002-N00032.englishNames: category of warm epidemic disease; warm epidemic diseases; Epidemic febrile disorders
V002-N00032.pinyinNames: wen yi lei bing; wēn yì lèi bìng
V002-N00032.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00032.definition: A group of febrile disorders caused by external contraction of pathogenic warmth or pestilence. Endemic febrile disorders are prevalent and infectious within a geographic area, whereas pandemic febrile disorders are strongly contagious across the globe.

V002-N00032.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00032.label: 温疫

V002-N00031.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00031.label: 寒疫
V002-N00031.definition: 感受寒邪气，以头痛，身痛，寒热无汗，状如伤寒等为特征的瘟疫。

V002-N00031.label: 寒疫
V002-N00031.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜疫病

V002-N00088.label: 疫斑热
V002-N00088.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜传染病
V002-N00088.definition: 温热疫毒之邪侵入血脉，伤及心肾所致。以骤起壮热，热退病反重，容易发斑出疹，血压低，小便先少后多为主要表现的疫病类疾病。

V002-N00088.label: 疫斑热
V002-N00088.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V002-N00088.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00088.label: 疫斑热
V002-N00088.englishNames: epidemic hemorrhagic fever; Epidemic haemorrhagic fever
V002-N00088.pinyinNames: yi ban re; yì bān rè
V002-N00088.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00088.definition: An infectious disease characterized by sudden onset of high fever, macular eruption, headache, pain in the eye socket, lower back painlower back pain, abdominal pain, muscle/joint pain, and redness of the eyes, throat, cheeks and chest. Patients may experience hypotension, shock and oliguria followed by polyuria. Contributing factors may include contact with rodents or field work. The bacterium Yersinia pestis may enter the bloodstream and damage the heart and kidney.

V002-N00039.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00039.label: 风疹
V002-N00039.path: 第7部分：儿科学｜儿科时行病
V002-N00039.definition: 感染风疹病毒,以轻度发热，咳嗽，全身皮肤出现细沙样玫瑰色斑丘疹，耳后及枕部淋巴结肿大为主要表现的出疹性儿科时行病。

V002-N00039.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00039.label: 风痧
V002-N00039.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医儿科疾病｜瘟疫
V002-N00039.definition: 以低热、咳嗽、全身淡红色斑丘疹、耳后及枕后臖核肿大为主要表现的出疹性疾病。

V002-N00039.label: 风疹
V002-N00039.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科时行疾病
V002-N00039.definition: 因感染风疹病毒，以轻度发热，咳嗽，全身皮肤出现细沙样玫瑰色癍丘疹，耳后及枕部淋巴结肿大为主要表现的出疹性儿科时行病。

V002-N00039.label: 风痧
V002-N00039.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科时行疾病
V002-N00039.definition: 是感受风热时邪引起的急性肺系时行疾病。以轻度发热，咳嗽，皮肤出现淡红色斑丘疹，耳后枕部淋巴结肿大为特征。

V002-N00039.label: 风疹
V002-N00039.aliases: 风痧； 小儿风痧； 风痧(病)
V002-N00039.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V002-N00039.label: 风疹
V002-N00039.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜儿科类

V002-N00039.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00039.label: 风疹
V002-N00039.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V002-N00039.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00039.label: 风疹
V002-N00039.aliases: 风痧； 小儿风痧； 风痧(病)
V002-N00039.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00039.definition: Characterized by fever, cough and pink rashes (resembling fine sand). The rashes start on the face and spread down to the trunk, arms and legs. The rashes may combine into patches. They come and go and do not cause skin peeling or discolouration. Alternatively, swollen lymph node behind the ear may be present. This condition often occurs when epidemic wind heat or virus affects the lung and the surface of the body.

V002-N00039.label: 风疹

V002-N00039.label: 风痧

V002-N00039.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00039.label: 风疹
V002-N00039.definition: a contagious eruptive disease caused by seasonal wind-heat or wind-heat toxin, and marked by mild fever, followed by enlargement of postauricular and suboccipital lymph nodes, and the appearance of pink maculo-papular rash that begins on the head and

V002-N00036.label: 湿温
V002-N00036.definition: 感受湿热病邪引起的温病。

V002-N00036.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00036.label: 湿温
V002-N00036.path: TC[中医病症]｜伤寒和温病｜温病
V002-N00036.definition: 湿热疫疠之邪，经口鼻而入，蕴结中焦，阻滞气机，湿热熏蒸弥漫而成。以持续发热、脘痞腹胀、苔腻脉缓、神情淡漠、玫瑰疹或白pei、左胁下痞块、白细胞减少为主要表现的疫病类疾病。

V002-N00036.label: 湿温
V002-N00036.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜外感病证｜温病
V002-N00036.definition: 是湿热病邪所引起以脾胃为病变中心的急性外感热病。

V002-N00036.label: 湿温病
V002-N00036.aliases: 湿温； 湿瘟病； 湿瘟
V002-N00036.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V002-N00036.label: 湿温
V002-N00036.englishNames: damp warm; damp-warm disease; Dampness Prevalent Diseases; Dampness and warmth disorder; dampness-warmth
V002-N00036.path: 传统医学疾病｜外感病｜温病

V002-N00036.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00036.label: 湿温
V002-N00036.aliases: 湿瘟； 湿温病； 湿瘟病； Dampness febrile disorders； Dampness pestilence disorders； damp warm
V002-N00036.englishNames: damp warm; damp-warm disease; Dampness pestilence; Dampness Prevalent Diseases; Dampness and warmth disorder; dampness-warmth
V002-N00036.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00036.definition: A type of pestilence characterized by a persistent high-grade fever, gastric discomfort, abdominal distension, indifferent expression, a greasy tongue coating, a delayed pulse, pink or white skin rashes, masses in the left subcostal region, and low white blood cell count. Often occurs when damp heat enters the body through the mouth and nose to accumulate in the spleen and stomach and obstruct the qi activity.

V002-N00079.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00079.label: 鼠疫
V002-N00079.definition: 感染鼠疫杆菌引起的烈性传染病。

V002-N00079.label: 鼠疫
V002-N00079.definition: 感染鼠疫杆菌引起的烈性传染病。

V002-N00079.label: 鼠疫
V002-N00079.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜传染病
V002-N00079.definition: 因感触病鼠秽气疫毒，而突然寒战发热，头痛面赤，肢节剧烈痠痛，腋、胯等部位起核，红肿热病，或见衄血、吐血、溲血、便血，或咳嗽气促，或迅速出现神志昏糊，周身紫赤，唇焦舌黑等危重症的一种烈性传染病，称为鼠疫。

V002-N00079.label: 鼠疫
V002-N00079.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V002-N00079.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00079.label: 鼠疫
V002-N00079.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00079.definition: A fulminating infectious disease characterized by a sudden onset, high fever, bleeding, and swelling of lymph nodes. Alternatively, coughing with phlegm or haemoptysis may be present. In severe cases, patients may faint or die. This condition occurs when the bacterium Yersinia pestis enters the lung or bloodstream following flea bites or handling an infected animal.

V002-N00091.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00091.label: 炭疽
V002-N00091.definition: 感染炭疽杆菌，以皮肤溃烂、焦痂及其周围水肿，偶可见肺、肠、脑病变及毒邪流注为主要表现的人畜共患急性传染病。

V002-N00091.label: 炭疽
V002-N00091.path: 内科疾病｜内科其他疾病
V002-N00091.definition: 感染炭疽杆菌引起的人畜共患急性传染病。 以皮肤溃烂、焦痂及其周围水肿，偶可见肺、 肠、脑病变及毒邪流注为主要表现。

V002-N00091.label: 炭疽
V002-N00091.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜传染病
V002-N00091.definition: 接触患病动物及处理皮毛时，疫毒侵袭皮肤及肺肠等器官，以至气血凝滞毒邪蕴结。以皮肤溃烂，焦痂及其周围水肿，偶可见肺，肠，脑病变及毒邪流注为主要表现的疫病类疾病。

V002-N00091.label: 炭疽
V002-N00091.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V002-N00091.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00091.label: 炭疽
V002-N00091.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类｜疽

V002-N00091.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00091.label: 炭疽
V002-N00091.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00091.definition: An infectious disease characterized by skin lesion that eventually forms an ulcer with an eschar and surrounding swelling. This condition may also affect the lungs, intestines, brain and other parts of the body. The bacterium Bacillus anthracis may enter the body via the skin, mouth or nose and cause qi and blood to stagnate. Often results from contact with infected animals, handling infectious animal products or ingestion of undercooked foods of (infectious) animal origin.

V002-N00089.label: 稻瘟病
V002-N00089.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜传染病
V002-N00089.definition: 感受暑湿疫毒，蕴于肌腠脉络，或内攻脏腑，伤及营血所致。以骤起高热，全身酸痛，黄疸，小腿肌肉尤为疼痛，目赤，臖核肿痛等为主要表现的疫病类疾病。

V002-N00089.label: 稻瘟病
V002-N00089.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V002-N00089.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00089.label: 稻瘟病
V002-N00089.pinyinNames: dào wēn bìng; dao wen bing
V002-N00089.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00089.definition: An infectious disease characterized by sudden onset of high fever, headache, muscle pain (especially the lower leg), eye redness and swollen groin lymph nodes. Associated symptoms include unconsciousness, convulsions, jaundice, haemorrhage, hepatosplenomegaly or hepatic/renal insufficiency. It is commonly seen in summer or autumn. This condition often results from contact with water contaminated with the corkscrew-shaped bacteria Leptospira sp. The bacterium enters the body via skin, mucous membrane or digestive tract to affect meridians or zang–fu organs and damage the Ying nutrients and blood.

V002-N00053.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00053.label: 痢疾
V002-N00053.definition: 以腹痛腹泻，里急后重，大便下赤白脓血为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00053.label: 痢疾
V002-N00053.definition: 感染痢疾杆菌引起的，以腹痛腹泻，里急后 重，大便下脓血为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00053.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00053.label: 痢疾
V002-N00053.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医儿科疾病｜瘟疫
V002-N00053.definition: 因疫毒壅滞肠间，阻遏气机，损伤肠络所致。以腹痛腹泻、里急后重、大便下脓血为主要表现的疫病类疾病。

V002-N00053.label: 痢疾
V002-N00053.aliases: 肠澼； 赤痢； 寒湿痢； 噤口痢； 湿热痢； 休息痢； 疫毒痢； 滞下
V002-N00053.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N00053.definition: 是因外感时邪疫毒，内伤饮食而致邪蕴肠腑，气血壅滞，传导失司，以腹痛腹泻，里急后重，排赤白脓血便为主要临床表现的具有传染性的外感疾病。

V002-N00053.label: 痢疾
V002-N00053.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V002-N00053.label: 痢疾
V002-N00053.path: 传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾系病类

V002-N00053.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00053.label: 滞下

V002-N00053.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00053.label: 痢疾

V002-N00053.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V002-N00034.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00034.label: 春温
V002-N00034.definition: 春季感受温热病邪，以初起即见里热证，易发生神昏、痉、出血等为特征的危重温病。

V002-N00034.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00034.label: 春温
V002-N00034.path: TC[中医病症]｜伤寒和温病｜温病
V002-N00034.definition: 发生于春季的温病。包括新感温病及伏气温病；前者为春季感受热邪而发的热病，后者为冬季感受邪气伏于体内化热至春季而发的热病。

V002-N00034.label: 春温
V002-N00034.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜外感病证｜温病
V002-N00034.definition: 是由温病热邪内伏而发，以起病即见里热证候为特征的急性热病。

V002-N00034.label: 春温病
V002-N00034.aliases: 春瘟； 春瘟病； 春温
V002-N00034.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V002-N00034.label: 春温
V002-N00034.englishNames: spring warm disorder; Spring warmth disorder; Spring Warm Syndrome; spring warmth
V002-N00034.path: 传统医学疾病｜外感病｜温病

V002-N00034.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00034.label: 春温
V002-N00034.aliases: spring warm disorder； 春温病； 春瘟病； Spring febrile disorder； Spring pestilence disease
V002-N00034.englishNames: spring warm disorder; Spring warmth disorder; Spring Warm Syndrome; spring warmth; Spring pestilence
V002-N00034.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00034.definition: A type of pestilence characterized by a sudden high-grade fever, headache, neck rigidity, vomiting, macular eruption, restlessness, followed by unconsciousness and convulsions. Often occurs when pathogenic warm heat or epidemic toxin enters the body through the mouth or nose to affect the Ying nutrients, blood and brain.

V002-N00034.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00034.label: 春温

V002-N00046.label: 痧病
V002-N00046.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V002-N00046.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00046.label: 痧胀
V002-N00046.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V002-N00046.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00046.label: 痧病
V002-N00046.englishNames: filthy-attack eruptive disease; Bumpy sand-like exanthem
V002-N00046.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00046.definition: Characterized by a sudden fever, gastric discomfort, abdominal distension or abdominal colic, nausea without vomiting, diarrhoea urges without bowel movements, concurrent vomiting and diarrhoea, and millet-sized red rashes. In severe cases, subcutaneous bluish petechiae may be present. Associated symptoms may include body ache, sore throat, unconsciousness, a band-tightened sensation around the waist, dark, bluish fingernails, and hands/feet rigidity or numbness. Often occurs when seasonal pathogenic qi or turbid toxin accumulates in the stomach or intestines, affects the skin or disturbs the heart mind.

V002-N00060.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00060.label: 痨病
V002-N00060.definition: 以骨蒸潮热，消瘦，盗汗，或可检出结核杆菌等为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00060.label: 肺痨
V002-N00060.aliases: Fatigue consumption disorder； 伏连； 骨蒸； 鬼注； 急劳； 劳瘵； 痨瘵； 尸注； 尸疰； 殗殜
V002-N00060.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病证
V002-N00060.definition: 是指由于正气虚弱，感染痨虫，侵蚀肺脏所致的，以咳嗽、咯血、潮热、盗汗及身体逐渐消瘦等症为主要临床表现，具有传染性的慢性消耗性疾病。

V002-N00060.label: 痨病
V002-N00060.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V002-N00060.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00060.label: 痨病
V002-N00060.englishNames: pulmonary tuberculosis; Tuberculosis; consumptive disease; phthisis; tuberculosis
V002-N00060.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00060.definition: An epidemic condition caused by over-exertion or contraction of the bacterium Mycobacterium tuberculosis. It includes lung tuberculosis, brain tuberculosis, breast tuberculosis, liver tuberculosis, kidney tuberculosis, intestine tuberculosis, flowing phlegm, etc.

V002-N00064.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00064.label: 肝痨
V002-N00064.definition: 发生于肝脏，以右胁痛、右胁下肿块、潮热、盗汗等为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00064.label: 肝痨
V002-N00064.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证
V002-N00064.definition: 因痨虫侵及肝脏，阻碍疏泄，耗吸营养，蚀耗肝阴。以右胁痛，右胁下肿块，潮热，盗汗等为主要表现的痨病类疾病。

V002-N00064.label: 肝痨
V002-N00064.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜痨病

V002-N00064.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00064.label: 肝痨
V002-N00064.englishNames: liver consumption; liver tuberculosis; Liver tuberculosis
V002-N00064.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00064.definition: Characterized by pain and mass in the right subcostal region. Associated symptoms include tidal fever and night sweats. This condition often occurs when bacterium Mycobacterium tuberculosis affects the liver and consumes liver yin.

V002-N00067.label: 肠痨
V002-N00067.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N00067.definition: 因痨虫侵及肠道，肠道络脉受损，瘀浊壅滞，耗伤营气所致。以腹痛，腹泻，或便秘腹泻交替，低热，盗汗为主要表现的痨病类疾病。

V002-N00067.label: 肠痨
V002-N00067.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜痨病

V002-N00067.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00067.label: 肠痨
V002-N00067.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00067.definition: Characterized by abdominal pain, diarrhoea, or alternating constipation and diarrhoea. Associated symptoms are persistent low fever and night sweats. This condition often occurs when Mycobacterium tuberculosis consumes qi and yin and phlegm turbidity obstructs the intestines.

V002-N00061.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00061.label: 肺痨
V002-N00061.definition: 发生于肺脏，以咳嗽、咳血、潮热、盗汗、胸痛、消瘦为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00061.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00061.label: 肺痨
V002-N00061.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肺病
V002-N00061.definition: 因正气不足，痨虫侵袭肺叶所致。以咳嗽、咯血、潮热、盗汗及逐渐消瘦为主要表现的痨病类疾病。

V002-N00061.label: 肺痨
V002-N00061.aliases: Fatigue consumption disorder； 伏连； 骨蒸； 鬼注； 急劳； 劳瘵； 痨瘵； 尸注； 尸疰； 殗殜
V002-N00061.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病证
V002-N00061.definition: 是指由于正气虚弱，感染痨虫，侵蚀肺脏所致的，以咳嗽、咯血、潮热、盗汗及身体逐渐消瘦等症为主要临床表现，具有传染性的慢性消耗性疾病。

V002-N00061.label: 肺痨
V002-N00061.englishNames: pulmonary tuberculosis; Pulmonary Tuberculosis; lung consumption; lung tuberculosis
V002-N00061.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜痨病

V002-N00061.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00061.label: 肺痨
V002-N00061.englishNames: lung consumption; pulmonary tuberculosis; Pulmonary Tuberculosis; lung tuberculosis; Lung tuberculosis
V002-N00061.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00061.definition: Characterized by cough, haemoptysis, tidal fever in the afternoon, night sweats, weight loss and fatigue. Often results from deficiency of anti-pathogenic qi and Mycobacterium tuberculosis affecting the lobes of lung.

V002-N00061.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00061.label: 肺痨

V002-N00065.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00065.label: 肾痨
V002-N00065.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肾膀胱病
V002-N00065.definition: 发生于肾脏，以尿频、尿急、尿痛、颧红、潮热、盗汗为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00065.label: 肾痨
V002-N00065.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V002-N00065.definition: 因痨虫经血脉侵及肾脏，耗伤气阴所致。以尿频、尿急、尿痛、颧红、潮热、盗汗为主要表现的痨病类疾病。

V002-N00065.label: 肾痨
V002-N00065.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜痨病

V002-N00065.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00065.label: 肾痨
V002-N00065.englishNames: renal tuberculosis; kidney consumption; Kidney tuberculosis
V002-N00065.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00065.definition: Characterized by frequent, painful urination, low back soreness, and bloody urine. Associated symptoms include tidal fever, night sweats and flushed cheeks. This condition often occurs when bacterium Mycobacterium tuberculosis affects the kidney through bloodstream and consumes qi and yin.

V002-N00069.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00069.label: 流痰
V002-N00069.englishNames: flowing phlegm;tuberculosis of bone and joint
V002-N00069.path: 第2部分：外科学｜疮疡类疾病｜痨病［外科学］
V002-N00069.definition: 发生于骨和关节间的慢性化脓性疾病。

V002-N00069.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00069.label: 骨关节结核
V002-N00069.definition: 结核杆菌侵入骨和/或关节而引起的慢性感染性疾病。

V002-N00069.label: 流痰
V002-N00069.englishNames: chronic suppurative abscess of bones and joints
V002-N00069.definition: 发生在骨与关节间的慢性化脓性疾病。

V002-N00069.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00069.label: 流痰
V002-N00069.englishNames: Chronic Suppurative Abscess of Bones and Joints
V002-N00069.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡
V002-N00069.definition: 多因先天不足，肾亏骨弱，复感痨虫，痰浊凝聚，蚀伤关节所致。以发生于骨与关节，起病缓，化脓迟，溃后流脓清稀或夹败絮样物，不易愈合，多损伤筋骨，形成脓肿或窦道等为主要表现的痨病类疾病。

V002-N00069.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00069.label: 骨痨
V002-N00069.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医骨伤科疾病
V002-N00069.definition: 多因先天不足，肾亏骨弱，复感痨虫，痰浊凝聚，蚀伤关节所致。以发生于骨与关节，起病缓，化脓迟，溃后流脓清稀或夹败絮样物，不易愈合，多损伤筋骨，形成脓肿或窦道等为主要表现的痨病类疾病。

V002-N00069.label: 流痰
V002-N00069.englishNames: chronic suppurative abscess of bones and joints
V002-N00069.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡
V002-N00069.definition: 是发生在骨与关节间的慢性化脓性疾病。因其成脓后，可流窜于病变附近或较远的空隙处形成脓肿，破溃后脓液稀薄如痰，故名流痰。

V002-N00069.label: 流痰
V002-N00069.aliases: Osteoarticular Tuberculosis； Pyogenous Chronic Arthrosis； 穿骨流注； 骨痨
V002-N00069.englishNames: flowing phlegm; tuberculosis of bone and joint; Chronic Suppurative Abscess of Bones and Joints; flowing  phlegm(tuberculosis of bone and joint); Flowing phlegm disorder; chronic suppurative abscess of bones and joints
V002-N00069.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜痨病

V002-N00069.label: 流痰
V002-N00069.aliases: Osteoarticular Tuberculosis； Pyogenous Chronic Arthrosis； 穿骨流注； 骨痨
V002-N00069.englishNames: flowing phlegm; tuberculosis of bone and joint; Chronic Suppurative Abscess of Bones and Joints; flowing  phlegm(tuberculosis of bone and joint); Flowing phlegm disorder; chronic suppurative abscess of bones and joints

V002-N00069.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00069.label: 流痰
V002-N00069.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V002-N00069.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00069.label: 流痰
V002-N00069.aliases: Osteoarticular Tuberculosis； Pyogenous Chronic Arthrosis； 穿骨流注； 骨痨； Flowing phlegm disorder； Bone and joint tuberculosis disorder； Bone tuberculosis
V002-N00069.englishNames: flowing phlegm; tuberculosis of bone and joint; Chronic Suppurative Abscess of Bones and Joints; tuberculosis of bone andjoint; flowing  phlegm(tuberculosis of bone and joint); Flowing phlegm disorder; Flowing phlegm; chronic suppurative abscess of bones and joints
V002-N00069.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00069.definition: A condition initially characterized by dull soreness and pain upon physical exertion, followed by local swelling, pain and discharge of thin, clear pus or pus that resembles rotten cotton threads, delayed healing, and formation of a sinus tract. If the spine is affected, limb rigidity, impaired movement or paralysis may be present. This condition is known as osteoarticular tuberculosis in modern medicine. Often occurs when Mycobacterium tuberculosis and turbid phlegm flow into bones and joints due to congenital kidney deficiency coupled with contraction of Mycobacterium tuberculosis.

V002-N00069.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00069.label: 流痰
V002-N00069.aliases: BWC170； 骨痨； Osteoarticular Tuberculosis； Pyogenous Chronic Arthrosis
V002-N00069.englishNames: flowing phlegm; Chronic Suppurative Abscess of Bones and Joints; flowing  phlegm(tuberculosis of bone and joint); chronic suppurative abscess of bones and joints

V002-N00069.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00069.label: 流痰
V002-N00069.aliases: BWC170； 骨痨； Osteoarticular Tuberculosis； Pyogenous Chronic Arthrosis
V002-N00069.englishNames: flowing phlegm; Chronic Suppurative Abscess of Bones and Joints; flowing  phlegm(tuberculosis of bone and joint); chronic suppurative abscess of bones and joints
V002-N00069.definition: chronic pyogenic infection, especially tuberculosis, of bone and joint, also known as osteoarticular tuberculosis

V002-N00071.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00071.label: 龟背痰
V002-N00071.path: 第2部分：外科学｜疮疡类疾病｜痨病［外科学］｜流痰
V002-N00071.definition: 生于胸背部，以易损伤脊骨而成龟背之状为特征的流痰。

V002-N00071.label: 龟背痰
V002-N00071.definition: 生于胸背部，易损伤筋骨而成龟背之状，属 于流痰的痨病类疾病。

V002-N00071.label: 龟背痰
V002-N00071.englishNames: Tuberculosis of the Spine; Vertebral Tuberculosis
V002-N00071.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡｜流痰
V002-N00071.definition: 发生于胸背部，易损伤筋骨而成龟背之状，属于流痰的痨病类疾病。

V002-N00071.label: 龟背痰
V002-N00071.englishNames: tortoise-back phlegm; thoracic spine tuberculosis; chronic vertebral suppurative abscess
V002-N00071.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜痨病｜流痰

V002-N00071.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00071.label: 龟背痰
V002-N00071.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类｜流痰

V002-N00071.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00071.label: 龟背痰
V002-N00071.englishNames: tortoise-back phlegm; thoracic spine tuberculosis; Tortoise-back phlegm; chronic vertebral suppurative abscess
V002-N00071.pinyinNames: gui bei tan; guī bèi tán
V002-N00071.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00071.definition: Characterized by swelling and pain of the lower thoracic and upper lumbar vertebrae with an abnormally excessive convex kyphotic curvature of the spine that resembles the back of a tortoise. Often occurs when Mycobacterium tuberculosis affects the spine and damages the bones and sinews.

V002-N00077.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00077.label: 穿拐痰
V002-N00077.englishNames: tuberculous arthritis of the ankle joint
V002-N00077.path: 第2部分：外科学｜疮疡类疾病｜痨病［外科学］｜流痰

V002-N00077.label: 穿拐痰
V002-N00077.englishNames: Tuberculous Arthritis of the Ankle Joint
V002-N00077.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡｜流痰
V002-N00077.definition: 发生于踝关节，属于流痰的痨病类疾病。

V002-N00077.label: 穿拐痰
V002-N00077.englishNames: ankle penetrating phlegm; tuberculous arthritis of the ankle joint
V002-N00077.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜痨病｜流痰

V002-N00077.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00077.label: 穿拐痰
V002-N00077.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类｜流痰

V002-N00077.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00077.label: 穿拐痰
V002-N00077.englishNames: ankle penetrating phlegm; Carbuncle of the ankle joint; tuberculous arthritis of the ankle joint
V002-N00077.pinyinNames: chuan guai tan; chuān guǎi tán
V002-N00077.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00077.definition: Characterized by tuberculous arthritis of ankle joint. This condition often results from downward flow of damp heat along the pathways of the three foot yin meridians.

V002-N00070.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00070.label: 附骨痰
V002-N00070.path: 第2部分：外科学｜疮疡类疾病｜痨病［外科学］｜流痰

V002-N00070.label: 附骨痰
V002-N00070.definition: 生于髋关节部，属于流痰的痨病类疾病。

V002-N00070.label: 附骨痰
V002-N00070.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡｜流痰
V002-N00070.definition: 发生于髓关节部，属于流痰的痨病类疾病。

V002-N00070.label: 附骨痰
V002-N00070.englishNames: bone-attaching phlegm; tuberculosis of hip joint; lumbar vertebrae phlegm; phlegmatic osteomyelitis
V002-N00070.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜痨病｜流痰

V002-N00070.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00070.label: 附骨痰
V002-N00070.englishNames: bone-attaching phlegm; tuberculosis of hip joint; lumbar vertebrae phlegm; Bone phlegm; phlegmatic osteomyelitis
V002-N00070.pinyinNames: fu gu tan; fù gǔ tán
V002-N00070.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00070.definition: Characterized by hip joint swelling and pain, difficulty walking or limping, discharge of thin, clear pus or pus that resembles rotten cotton threads, formation of a sinus tract, and delayed healing. Often occurs when Mycobacterium tuberculosis affects the hip joint.

V002-N00072.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00072.label: 肾俞虚痰
V002-N00072.path: 第2部分：外科学｜疮疡类疾病｜痨病［外科学］｜流痰
V002-N00072.definition: 发生于肾俞穴处的流痰。

V002-N00072.label: 肾俞虚痰
V002-N00072.englishNames: Spinal Tuberculosis Complicated by Cold Abscess
V002-N00072.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡｜流痰
V002-N00072.definition: 发生于肾俞穴处，属于流痰的痨病类疾病。

V002-N00072.label: 肾俞虚痰
V002-N00072.englishNames: spinal tuberculosis in Shenshu; Shenshu (BL 23) deficiency-phlegm
V002-N00072.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜痨病｜流痰

V002-N00072.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00072.label: 肾俞虚痰
V002-N00072.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类｜流痰

V002-N00072.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00072.label: 肾俞虚痰
V002-N00072.englishNames: deficiency phlegm at Shenshu (BL 23); Deficiency phlegm at Shenshu (BL 23); spinal tuberculosis in Shenshu; Shenshu (BL 23) deficiency-phlegm; spinal tuberculosis in shenshu（BL 23）
V002-N00072.pinyinNames: shen yu xu tan; shèn shū xū tán
V002-N00072.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00072.definition: Characterized by an insidious onset, long-continued pus formation, discharge of thin, clear pus containing rotten cotton thread-like substance, delayed healing, and damage to the sinews or bones. It manifests as tuberculous abscess or sinus around the point Shenshu (BL 23).

V002-N00073.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00073.label: 肾俞漏
V002-N00073.path: 第2部分：外科学｜疮疡类疾病｜痨病［外科学］｜流痰
V002-N00073.definition: 发生于肾俞穴处的流痰，溃后难敛而形成窦道的疾病。

V002-N00073.label: 肾俞漏
V002-N00073.englishNames: Fistula of Shenyu; Perforation of Cold Abscess of the Lumbar Vertebrae
V002-N00073.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡｜流痰
V002-N00073.definition: 发生于肾俞穴处的流痰，溃后难敛而形成窦道的瘘病类疾病。

V002-N00073.label: 肾俞漏
V002-N00073.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜痨病｜流痰｜肾俞虚痰

V002-N00073.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00073.label: 肾俞漏
V002-N00073.englishNames: shenshu（BL 23）fistula; Shenshu (BL 23) fistula; fistula at Shenshu (BL 23); Shenshu fistula; Fistula at Shenshu (BL 23)
V002-N00073.pinyinNames: shen yu lou; shèn shū lòu
V002-N00073.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00073.definition: Characterized by sinus around the point Shenshu (BL 23) upon rupture of cold abscess in spinal (lumbar vertebrae) tuberculosis.

V002-N00078.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00078.label: 足跟疽
V002-N00078.path: 第2部分：外科学｜疮疡类疾病｜痨病［外科学］｜流痰

V002-N00078.label: 足跟疽
V002-N00078.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡｜流痰
V002-N00078.definition: 发生于足跟部，属于骨痨的痨病类疾病。

V002-N00078.label: 足跟疽
V002-N00078.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜痨病｜流痰

V002-N00078.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00078.label: 足跟疽
V002-N00078.englishNames: tuberculosis of heel; heel carbuncle; Carbuncle of the heel
V002-N00078.pinyinNames: zu gen ju; zú gēn jū
V002-N00078.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00078.definition: Characterized by tuberculosis of the heel. This condition often results from downward flow of damp heat to the zang–fu organs.

V002-N00074.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00074.label: 蜣螂蛀
V002-N00074.englishNames: dung beetle erosion;tuberculosis of finger joint
V002-N00074.path: 第2部分：外科学｜疮疡类疾病｜痨病［外科学］｜流痰
V002-N00074.definition: 生于手指骨节,以不红不热不痛,渐次肿坚,形如蝉肚，屈伸艰难，日久方知木痛为特征的流痰。

V002-N00074.label: 蜣螂蛀
V002-N00074.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡｜流痰
V002-N00074.definition: 多由体虚而湿痰、寒气凝滞所致。生于手指骨节，不红不热不痛，渐次肿坚，形如蝉肚，屈伸艰难，日久方知木痛，属于流痰的痨病类疾病。

V002-N00074.label: 蜣螂蛀
V002-N00074.englishNames: dung beetle erosion; tuberculosis of finger joint; interphalangeal putrefaction
V002-N00074.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜痨病｜流痰

V002-N00074.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00074.label: 蜣螂蛀
V002-N00074.englishNames: dung beetle erosion; tuberculosis of finger joint; Dung beetle-shaped joints; interphalangeal putrefaction
V002-N00074.pinyinNames: qiang lang zhu; qiāng láng zhù
V002-N00074.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00074.definition: Characterized by swollen (without redness, pain or hot sensation) metacarpophalangeal joints that resemble a dung beetle, impaired flexion and extension, and a gradual sensation of numbness or pain. It is known as tuberculosis of the metacarpophalangeal joints in modern medicine. This condition often results from deficiency-related phlegm dampness and prolonged cold retention.

V002-N00075.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00075.label: 腕疽
V002-N00075.path: 第2部分：外科学｜疮疡类疾病｜痨病［外科学］｜流痰

V002-N00075.label: 腕疽
V002-N00075.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡｜流痰
V002-N00075.definition: 发生手腕关节，属于流痰的痨病类疾病。

V002-N00075.label: 腕疽
V002-N00075.englishNames: carpal carbuncle; tuberculous arthritis of wrist
V002-N00075.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜痨病｜流痰

V002-N00075.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00075.label: 腕疽
V002-N00075.englishNames: tuberculous arthritis of wrist; carpal carbuncle; Carbuncle of the wrist
V002-N00075.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00075.definition: Characterized by tuberculous arthritis of the wrist.

V002-N00076.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00076.label: 鹤膝痰
V002-N00076.englishNames: crane's knee phlegm;tuberculosis of knee joint
V002-N00076.path: 第2部分：外科学｜疮疡类疾病｜痨病［外科学］｜流痰
V002-N00076.definition: 生于膝关节，以日久膝肿粗大，上下股胫枯细，形如鹤膝为特征的流痰。

V002-N00076.label: 鹤膝痰
V002-N00076.definition: 生于膝关节，日久膝肿粗大，上下股胫枯细， 形如鹤膝，属于流痰的痨病类疾病。

V002-N00076.label: 鹤膝痰
V002-N00076.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡｜流痰
V002-N00076.definition: 发生于膝关节，日久膝肿粗大，上下股胫枯细，形如鹤膝，属于流痰的痨病类疾病。

V002-N00076.label: 鹤膝痰
V002-N00076.englishNames: tuberculosis of knee joint; crane’s knee phlegm
V002-N00076.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜痨病｜流痰

V002-N00076.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V002-N00076.label: 鹤膝痰
V002-N00076.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类｜流痰

V002-N00076.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00076.label: 鹤膝风
V002-N00076.englishNames: arthrosis like crane knee; Crane Like Arthropathy; crane knee phlegm; Tuberculosis of the knee joint (crane’s-knee wind)
V002-N00076.pinyinNames: he xi feng; hè xī fēng
V002-N00076.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00076.definition: Characterized by swelling of the knee joint and the wasting of quadriceps muscle, resembling a crane’s knee.

V002-N00066.label: 痨淋
V002-N00066.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证｜淋证
V002-N00066.definition: 因痨虫侵及膀胱，阻滞气机，耗伤营阴。以自小腹疼痛，尿频，淋漓作痛，低热，盗汗为主要表现的痨病类疾病

V002-N00066.label: 痨淋
V002-N00066.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜痨病

V002-N00066.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00066.label: 痨淋
V002-N00066.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00066.definition: Characterized by lower abdominal pain, frequent, hesitant urination, and bloody urine. Associated symptoms are persistent low fever and night sweats. This condition often occurs when bacterium Mycobacterium tuberculosis consumes yin essence and impairs the qi transformation of the urinary bladder.

V002-N00063.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00063.label: 乳痨
V002-N00063.path: 第2部分：外科学｜乳房疾病

V002-N00063.label: 乳痨
V002-N00063.definition: 生于乳房的结核类疾病。

V002-N00063.label: 乳痨
V002-N00063.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜乳房疾病
V002-N00063.definition: 是发生在乳房部的慢性化脓性疾病。因其溃后脓液稀薄如痰，故又名“乳痰”。

V002-N00063.label: 乳痨
V002-N00063.englishNames: tuberculosis of breast; mammary phthisis; mammary tuberculosis
V002-N00063.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜痨病

V002-N00063.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00063.label: 乳痨
V002-N00063.englishNames: tuberculosis of breast; mammary phthisis; Breast tuberculosis; mammary tuberculosis
V002-N00063.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00063.definition: Characterized by (plum-sized) painless breast lumps with unclear boundaries, discharge of thin, clear pus upon disruption of breast abscess, and the formation of breast sinuses or ulcers. Individuals may also experience enlargement of the axillary lymph nodes. This condition often results from infection of bacterium Mycobacterium tuberculosis upon skin lesion or secondary to pulmonary tuberculosis (or scrofula).

V002-N00063.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00063.label: 乳痨
V002-N00063.englishNames: mammary phthisis; Mammary Tuberculosis; tuberculosis of breast

V002-N00063.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00063.label: 乳痨
V002-N00063.englishNames: mammary phthisis; Mammary Tuberculosis; tuberculosis of breast

V002-N00062.label: 脑痨
V002-N00062.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜脑系病证
V002-N00062.definition: 因痨虫侵袭于脑，损伤脑神所致。以发热，盗汗，头痛，呕吐，项强，昏睡，抽搐等为主要表现的痨病类疾病。

V002-N00062.label: 脑痨
V002-N00062.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜痨病

V002-N00062.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00062.label: 脑痨
V002-N00062.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00062.definition: A condition characterized by tidal fever, night sweats, headache, vomiting, neck stiffness, weight loss, and fatigue. In severe cases, drowsiness or convulsions may be present. This condition occurs upon exposure to patients infected with tuberculosis or when the bacterium Mycobacterium tuberculosis affects the brain.

V002-N00068.label: 干血痨
V002-N00068.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜痨病

V002-N00003.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00003.label: 时令病
V002-N00003.definition: 感受季节性外邪所致的疾病。

V002-N00003.label: 时令病
V002-N00003.definition: 感受季节性外邪所致的疾病。

V002-N00003.label: 外感病证
V002-N00003.aliases: External contraction disorders； 外感病； 外感时令类病
V002-N00003.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病
V002-N00003.definition: 是指感受外邪，正邪相争，导致脏腑功能失常所出现的一类病证。

V002-N00003.label: 外感时令类病
V002-N00003.englishNames: category of seasonal external contraction disease
V002-N00003.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜外感病证
V002-N00003.definition: 泛指因过度疲劳，或正气不足，触冒风寒暑湿燥等时令外邪而引起的，具有季节性发病而少有相互染易等特征的一类外感病。

V002-N00003.label: 外感时令类病
V002-N00003.englishNames: category of seasonal external contraction disease
V002-N00003.pinyinNames: wai gan shi ling lei bing
V002-N00003.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语

V002-N00003.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00003.label: 外感时令类病
V002-N00003.englishNames: seasonal external contraction diseases; category of seasonal external contraction disease; Seasonal disorders
V002-N00003.pinyinNames: wai gan shi ling lei bing; wài gǎn shí lìng lèi bìng
V002-N00003.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00003.definition: A group of externally contracted disorders caused by fatigue, deficiency of anti-pathogenic qi, or failure to adjust to exogenous wind, cold, summer heat or dampness. They are characterized by seasonal onset and rarely contagious. Examples of seasonal disorders include common cold, dampness obstructing the spleen and stomach, summer heat stroke, autumn dryness, etc.

V002-N00007.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00007.label: 暑病
V002-N00007.definition: 感受暑邪而发的热病的统称。

V002-N00007.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00007.label: 暑淫证候
V002-N00007.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜病因证候｜外感病证｜六淫证候
V002-N00007.definition: 外感暑邪引起证候的统称。临床表现为发热恶热，汗多头昏，烦渴喜冷饮，神疲气短，肢倦乏力，胸闷懒言，食少呕恶，小便短黄灼热，舌红苔黄少津，脉虚数；或壮热昏仆，神昏谵语，面红气粗，头痛项强，四肢抽搐，舌绛干燥，脉细或虚。

V002-N00007.label: 暑病
V002-N00007.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜外感时令类病

V002-N00007.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00007.label: 暑病
V002-N00007.englishNames: summerheat disease; summer-heat disease; Summer disorders
V002-N00007.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00007.definition: A group of disorders caused by external contraction of summer heat or summer dampness. They often occur when summer heat or dampness remain in the Wei-defence, affect the stomach and intestines, or in severe cases, block the flow of qi.

V002-N00007.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00007.label: 暑病

V002-N00014.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00014.label: 暑秽
V002-N00014.path: 第1部分：内科学｜热病｜暑病
V002-N00014.definition: 感受暑湿秽浊之气，以头痛而胀，胸皖痞闷，烦躁欲呕，肤热有汗,甚则神昏耳聋等为特征的暑病。

V002-N00014.label: 暑秽
V002-N00014.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜外感病证｜温病
V002-N00014.definition: 夏季因感受暑湿秽浊之气而致猝然闷乱、烦躁的病证，称为暑秽。

V002-N00014.label: 暑秽病
V002-N00014.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜外感时令类病｜暑病

V002-N00014.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00014.label: 暑秽病
V002-N00014.englishNames: Summer heat turbidity; summer filthy disease; summer filth disease
V002-N00014.pinyinNames: shu hui bing; shǔ huì bìng
V002-N00014.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00014.definition: A condition characterized by distending headache, gastric stuffiness, chest tightness, restlessness, nausea, a hot sensation of the skin, and sweating. In severe cases, unconsciousness and deafness may be present. Often occurs when summer heat and foul turbidity impair the qi flow of the lung and stomach or disturb the heart mind.

V002-N00014.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00014.label: 暑秽

V002-N00009.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00009.label: 伤暑
V002-N00009.path: 第1部分：内科学｜热病｜暑病

V002-N00009.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00009.label: 冒暑
V002-N00009.path: 第1部分：内科学｜热病｜暑病
V002-N00009.definition: 暑邪在表，以发热恶寒，头痛无汗,身形拘急,皖痞心烦，苔薄腻;或头晕,寒热汗出，咳嗽，苔薄微腻等为特征的暑病。

V002-N00009.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00009.label: 伤暑
V002-N00009.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜病因证候｜外感病证｜六淫证候｜暑淫证候
V002-N00009.definition: 因暑热或暑湿侵袭人体而引起。以骤起发热、汗出、口渴、疲乏等为主要表现的时行热性病。

V002-N00009.label: 中暑
V002-N00009.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜外感病证
V002-N00009.definition: 病名。一名中暍、中热。感受暑邪而发生的急性病证。症见突然闷倒，昏不知人，或身热烦躁，气喘不语，牙关微紧，或口开齿燥，大汗或无汗，脉虚数，甚者昏迷不醒，四肢抽搐。

V002-N00009.label: 冒暑
V002-N00009.englishNames: Affection by Summer-heat; Affection Caused by Summer-heat
V002-N00009.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜外感病证｜温病
V002-N00009.definition: 由暑兼湿邪或挟寒邪引起，肺卫见证为主要临床表现的病证。

V002-N00009.label: 冒暑病
V002-N00009.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜外感时令类病｜暑病

V002-N00009.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00009.label: 伤暑

V002-N00009.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00009.label: 冒暑

V002-N00008.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00008.label: 疰夏
V002-N00008.path: 第1部分：内科学｜热病｜暑病
V002-N00008.definition: 以夏季倦怠嗜卧，低热，纳差为特征的暑病。

V002-N00008.label: 疰夏
V002-N00008.definition: 以夏季倦怠嗜卧，低热，纳差为主要表现的 疾病。

V002-N00008.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00008.label: 疰夏
V002-N00008.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜病因证候｜外感病证｜六淫证候｜暑淫证候
V002-N00008.definition: 因暑湿之气外侵，困阻脾胃，或暑热耗伤正气，脾失健运所致。以夏季倦怠嗜卧、低热、纳差为主要表现的时行热性病。

V002-N00008.label: 疰夏
V002-N00008.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证
V002-N00008.definition: 疰夏是指春夏之交，开始全身倦怠，食欲不振，大便不调，身微热，但体温多正常，秋凉后多可自愈的季节性疾病。

V002-N00008.label: 疰夏
V002-N00008.englishNames: summer non-acclimatization; summer nonacclimation; Summer Fever; summer nonacclimatization; summer consumptive disease
V002-N00008.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜外感时令类病｜暑病

V002-N00008.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00008.label: 疰夏
V002-N00008.englishNames: summer non-acclimatization; Summer non-acclimatization; summer nonacclimation; Summer Fever; summer nonacclimatization; summer consumptive disease
V002-N00008.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00008.definition: A condition characterized by a decreased appetite and lassitude. Alternatively, a low-grade fever may be present. Often occurs when summer dampness affects the spleen and stomach or when summer heat consumes qi and affects the spleen function of transportation and transformation.

V002-N00008.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00008.label: 疰夏
V002-N00008.englishNames: summer nonacclimatization; summer non-acclimatization; summer nonacclimation

V002-N00008.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00008.label: 疰夏
V002-N00008.definition: children’s disease usually occurring in summer, with symptoms of lassitude, dyspepsia, and abnormal bowel movements

V002-N00010.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00010.label: 中暑
V002-N00010.definition: 感受暑邪，以高热，汗出或肤燥无汗,烦躁，口渴，神昏抽搐，或呕恶，腹痛为主要表现的危急重病。

V002-N00010.label: 中暑
V002-N00010.definition: 感受暑邪引起的以高热汗出或肤燥无汗，烦 躁，口渴，神昏抽搐，或呕恶腹痛为主要表现 的疾病。

V002-N00010.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00010.label: 中暑
V002-N00010.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜病因证候｜外感病证｜六淫证候｜暑淫证候
V002-N00010.definition: 夏季在高温或烈日下劳作，或处于气候炎热湿闷的环境，暑热或暑湿秽浊之邪卒中脏腑，热闭心神，或热盛津伤，引动肝风，或暑闭气机。以高热汗出或肤燥无汗、烦躁、口渴、神昏抽搐、或呕恶腹痛、头痛为主要表现的时行热性病。

V002-N00010.label: 中暑
V002-N00010.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜外感病证
V002-N00010.definition: 病名。一名中暍、中热。感受暑邪而发生的急性病证。症见突然闷倒，昏不知人，或身热烦躁，气喘不语，牙关微紧，或口开齿燥，大汗或无汗，脉虚数，甚者昏迷不醒，四肢抽搐。

V002-N00010.label: 中暑
V002-N00010.englishNames: sunstroke; heat stroke and sunstroke; summerheat stroke
V002-N00010.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜外感时令类病｜暑病

V002-N00010.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00010.label: 中暑
V002-N00010.englishNames: sunstroke; heat stroke and sunstroke; summerheat stroke; Summer heat stroke; heat stroke
V002-N00010.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00010.definition: A condition characterized by high fever, excessive sweating or dry skin, restlessness, thirst, nausea, vomiting and abdominal pain. In severe cases, patients may lose consciousness or experience convulsions. Contributing factors may include working in high temperatures during summer, summer heat or summer dampness suddenly blocking the heart mind, exuberant heat consuming fluids and stirring up liver wind, or summer heat blocking the qi activity.

V002-N00010.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00010.label: 中暑

V002-N00013.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00013.label: 暑痉
V002-N00013.path: 第1部分：内科学｜热病｜暑病
V002-N00013.definition: 感受暑邪,发病急骤,以抽搐，伴牙关紧闭、两目上视，甚至角弓反张等为特征的暑病。

V002-N00013.label: 小儿暑温
V002-N00013.aliases: 暑风； 暑痉； 暑厥
V002-N00013.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科时行疾病
V002-N00013.definition: 是感受暑温邪毒引起的时行疾病，以高热，抽搐，昏迷为主症。发病突然，变化迅速，病程中可发生内闭外脱，呼吸不整而猝然变险。

V002-N00013.label: 暑风
V002-N00013.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜外感时令类病｜暑病｜中暑

V002-N00013.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00013.label: 暑风
V002-N00013.englishNames: summerheat-wind; Summer heat convulsion; summer-heat convulsion
V002-N00013.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00013.definition: A condition characterized by heat stroke, high fever, unconsciousness and convulsions. Often occurs when summer heat disturbs the heart mind or stirs liver wind.

V002-N00013.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00013.label: 小儿暑温
V002-N00013.aliases: 暑风； 暑痉； 暑厥
V002-N00013.englishNames: Summer Febrile Prevaldis; infectious summer fever in children(epidemic encephalitis B in children; infantile warm disease in summer

V002-N00011.label: 暑脱
V002-N00011.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜外感时令类病｜暑病｜中暑

V002-N00011.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00011.label: 暑脱
V002-N00011.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00011.definition: A condition characterized by heat stroke, with a sudden pale complexion, cold sweats, a drop in blood pressure, and a feeble, thready and extremely faint pulse. Often occurs when summer heat or summer heat dampness directly affect the zang–fu organs and cause a drastic deprivation of qi, blood, yin and yang.

V002-N00012.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00012.label: 暑厥
V002-N00012.path: 第1部分：内科学｜急症｜厥证
V002-N00012.definition: 夏月高温，暑热所致的厥证。

V002-N00012.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00012.label: 暑厥
V002-N00012.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜病因证候｜外感病证｜六淫证候｜暑淫证候
V002-N00012.definition: 以高热、神昏，或呕恶腹痛等为主要表现的中暑重症。

V002-N00012.label: 小儿暑温
V002-N00012.aliases: 暑风； 暑痉； 暑厥
V002-N00012.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科时行疾病
V002-N00012.definition: 是感受暑温邪毒引起的时行疾病，以高热，抽搐，昏迷为主症。发病突然，变化迅速，病程中可发生内闭外脱，呼吸不整而猝然变险。

V002-N00012.label: 暑厥
V002-N00012.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜外感时令类病｜暑病｜中暑

V002-N00012.label: 暑厥
V002-N00012.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜情志情况｜晕厥

V002-N00012.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00012.label: 暑厥
V002-N00012.englishNames: summerheat syncope; summer-heat syncope; Summer heat syncope
V002-N00012.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00012.definition: A condition characterized by sunstroke, high fever, unconsciousness, and cold limbs. Alternatively, nausea, vomiting and abdominal pain may be present. Often occurs when summer heat disturbs the heart mind or blocks the qi activity.

V002-N00012.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V002-N00015.label: 湿阻
V002-N00015.definition: 因湿邪引起的以纳呆、脘闷、腹胀、头重、倦 怠为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00015.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00015.label: 湿阻
V002-N00015.aliases: 湿邪阻滞； 湿浊困阻； 湿阻气滞
V002-N00015.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜病因证候｜外感病证｜六淫证候｜湿淫证候
V002-N00015.definition: 湿浊邪气阻滞气机，以身体重困，关节、肌肉酸痛，屈伸不利，腹胀腹泻，食欲不振，苔滑脉濡等为常见症的证候。

V002-N00015.label: 湿浊困阻
V002-N00015.aliases: 湿聚胞中； 湿邪内阻； 湿阻
V002-N00015.path: 病因病机｜病机｜内生五邪病机｜湿浊内生
V002-N00015.definition: 指由脾气虚衰，运化功能减退，津液不能转输布散，聚为湿浊的病理变化。

V002-N00015.label: 湿阻
V002-N00015.englishNames: Retention of  dampness; Sagnation of  wetness
V002-N00015.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜外感病证
V002-N00015.definition: 疾病。以头重、倦怠、脘闷、腹胀、纳呆为主要表现的疾病。因湿邪外侵，脾失健运，湿从内生，阻滞中焦，气机不畅所致。

V002-N00015.label: 湿阻病
V002-N00015.aliases: 湿阻； 冒湿； 伤湿
V002-N00015.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜外感时令类病

V002-N00015.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00015.label: 湿阻病
V002-N00015.aliases: 湿阻； 冒湿； 伤湿
V002-N00015.pinyinNames: shi zu bing; shī zǔ bìng
V002-N00015.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00015.definition: A condition characterized by body heaviness, limb soreness, a poor appetite, gastric discomfort, abdominal distension and lassitude. Often occurs when dampness affects the qi flow of the spleen and stomach.

V002-N00015.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00015.label: 伤湿

V002-N00015.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00015.label: 冒湿

V002-N00015.label: 湿阻

V002-N00016.label: 秋燥
V002-N00016.definition: 秋季感受燥邪，以病在肺卫并具有津气干燥特征的急性外感病。

V002-N00016.label: 秋燥
V002-N00016.definition: 秋季感受燥邪引起的湿病。

V002-N00016.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00016.label: 秋燥
V002-N00016.path: TC[中医病症]｜伤寒和温病｜温病
V002-N00016.definition: 秋季感受燥邪引起的温病。

V002-N00016.label: 秋燥
V002-N00016.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜外感病证｜温病
V002-N00016.definition: 是秋季感受燥热病邪，初起以病在肺卫并具有津气干燥特征的急性外感热病。

V002-N00016.label: 秋燥病
V002-N00016.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜外感时令类病

V002-N00016.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00016.label: 秋燥病
V002-N00016.englishNames: autumn dryness disease; Autumn dryness; autumn-dryness disease
V002-N00016.pinyinNames: qiu zao bing; qiū zào bìng
V002-N00016.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00016.definition: A condition characterized by fever, headache, dry cough or difficulty in expectoration of sputum, dry nose and throat, and thirst. Often occurs when dryness affects the exterior and consumes yin fluids.

V002-N00016.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00016.label: 秋燥

V002-N00018.label: 凉燥病
V002-N00018.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜外感时令类病｜秋燥病

V002-N00018.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00018.label: 凉燥病
V002-N00018.pinyinNames: liang zao bing; liáng zào bìng
V002-N00018.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00018.definition: A condition characterized by fever, chills, headache, absence of sweating, unproductive cough or difficulty expectoration of sputum, and a dry throat and lips. Often occurs in autumn when cool dryness affects the lung and consumes bodily fluids.

V002-N00017.label: 温燥病
V002-N00017.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜外感时令类病｜秋燥病

V002-N00017.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00017.label: 温燥病
V002-N00017.pinyinNames: wen zao bing; wēn zào bìng
V002-N00017.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00017.definition: A condition characterized by fever, headache, cough with scanty sputum, dry nose and throat, thirst, and scanty, yellow urine. Often occurs in autumn when dryness and heat affect the lung and consumes yin fluids.

V002-N00004.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00004.label: 感冒
V002-N00004.definition: 感受外邪，以发热恶寒，头身疼痛，鼻塞流涕，喉痒咳嗽等为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00004.label: 感冒
V002-N00004.definition: 感受外邪，以发热恶寒，头身疼痛，鼻塞流 涕，喉痒咳嗽为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00004.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表

V002-N00004.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肺病
V002-N00004.definition: 因风邪冒犯肺表所致。以发热恶寒、头身疼痛、鼻塞喷嚏、喉痒咳嗽等为主要表现的外感疾病。

V002-N00004.label: 感冒
V002-N00004.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病证
V002-N00004.definition: 俗称伤风，是感触风邪或时行病毒，引起肺卫功能失调，临床表现为鼻塞，流涕，喷嚏，头痛，恶寒，发热，全身不适、脉浮等主要特征。

V002-N00004.label: 感冒
V002-N00004.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜影响因素｜兼杂疾病因素

V002-N00004.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00004.label: 感冒
V002-N00004.englishNames: common cold; Common Cold; Common cold disorder; common cold disease; Common cold
V002-N00004.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00004.definition: Characterized by fever, chills, headache, body ache, nasal obstruction, sneezing, sore/scratchy throat and cough. In mild cases, common cold is known as wind injury (shang feng). An epidemic common cold, or influenza, often occurs when exogenous pathogenic factors affect the lung exterior.

V002-N00005.label: 伤风
V002-N00005.definition: 感受风邪，以发热恶寒，鼻塞流涕，喉痒咳嗽等为主要表现的感冒轻证。

V002-N00006.label: 时行感冒
V002-N00006.definition: 由流感病毒引起的急性呼吸道传染病，即流 行性感冒。

V002-N00006.label: 时行感冒
V002-N00006.aliases: Seasonal cold disorder； 流感； 流行性感冒
V002-N00006.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜传染病
V002-N00006.definition: 时令疫疠之邪侵及肺卫所致。以急起发热，咽喉肿痛，头身疼痛为主要表现的疫病类疾病。

V002-N00006.label: 时行感冒
V002-N00006.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜外感时令类病｜感冒

V002-N00006.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00006.definition: A condition characterized by sudden fever, chills or mild aversion to wind or cold, sore, swollen and congested throat, headache, and muscle/joint soreness and pain. Often occurs when pathogenic toxins attack the Wei-defence, and is more common in spring and winter.

V002-N00006.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00006.label: 时行感冒
